keyInnovations.en: Management of mountain tracks and passes, monastic record-keeping, limited firearm adoption, terrace agriculture, and highland pastoral adaptation

strengths.zh: 地形险要、宗教认同强、山口贸易具有战略价值。
strengths.en: It benefited from formidable terrain, strong religious identity, and strategic value in mountain-pass trade.

weaknesses.zh: 人口稀少、财政与军力薄弱、行政覆盖有限，且易受外部势力操控。
weaknesses.en: Its sparse population, weak finances and military, and limited administrative reach made it vulnerable to external manipulation.

outlook.zh: 短期内仍可依赖山地屏障维持王国，但在英国势力扩张下自主空间将继续缩小。
outlook.en: In the short term it could still survive behind mountain barriers, but under expanding British influence its room for independent action would continue to shrink.

description.zh: 1840年的锡金是一个依托佛教王权与山口贸易生存、但受强邻挤压的喜马拉雅小王国。
description.en: In 1840, Sikkim was a small Himalayan kingdom sustained by Buddhist kingship and pass trade, yet squeezed by stronger neighbors.

dynasty.zh: 奥斯曼帝国的黎波里帕夏政权

governmentForm.zh: 名义上隶属于奥斯曼帝国、由帕夏统治的省级君主行政体。
governmentForm.en: A provincial monarchical administration nominally subordinate to the Ottoman Empire and ruled by a pasha.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由城市中的土耳其—库洛格里精英、阿拉伯与柏柏尔部族、商人、乌理玛与农牧民构成。沿海城市以商贸和行政为中心，内陆则更多依赖部族网络与绿洲经济。奴隶与获释者在家政、军役和贸易体系中也占有一定地位。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of urban Turkish-Kouloughli elites, Arab and Berber tribes, merchants, ulama, and agro-pastoral communities. Coastal towns centered on trade and administration, while the interior relied more heavily on tribal networks and oasis economies. Slaves and freedmen also held a visible place in domestic service, military labor, and commerce.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要是由帕夏、奥斯曼官员、驻军军官、地方税包人和与政权合作的城市显贵组成。若干重要部族首领在地方治理与治安维持中拥有实际影响力。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was composed mainly of the pasha, Ottoman officials, garrison officers, tax farmers, and urban notables aligned with the regime. Important tribal shaykhs also exercised real influence in local governance and security.

succession.zh: 帕夏通常由伊斯坦布尔任命，而非本地世袭。地方职务虽可在家族间延续，但合法性最终仍来自奥斯曼苏丹的授权。
succession.en: The pasha was generally appointed from Istanbul rather than inherited locally. Although local offices could persist within families, ultimate legitimacy rested on authorization from the Ottoman sultan.

structure.zh: 1840年前后的的黎波里塔尼亚由总督帕夏统辖，行政上仍属奥斯曼帝国的北非省份。政府依赖少量中央官员管理港口、税收、驻军和司法，同时通过与地方部族首领协商来维持内陆控制。海岸城市受直接管辖较强，腹地治理则较为间接。
structure.en: Around 1840, Tripolitania was governed by a pasha as a North African province of the Ottoman Empire. The government relied on a small central officialdom to oversee ports, taxation, garrisons, and justice, while using negotiated arrangements with tribal leaders to maintain control inland. Direct authority was stronger in the coastal towns than in the hinterland.

function.zh: 处理行政命令、对外往来、部族协商与省级统筹。
function.en: Handled administrative orders, external correspondence, tribal negotiations, and overall provincial coordination.

function.zh: 征收关税、市场税、地税与税包收入，管理国库。
function.en: Collected customs duties, market taxes, land taxes, and tax-farm revenues, and managed the treasury.

function.zh: 管理驻军、炮台、补给与边地巡防。
function.en: Administered the garrison, artillery positions, supplies, and frontier patrols.

name.zh: 沙里亚法庭与宗教事务署

function.zh: 负责伊斯兰司法、瓦克夫与宗教教育监督。
function.en: Oversaw Islamic justice, waqf endowments, and supervision of religious education.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依赖的黎波里、米苏拉塔等城镇的卡伊马卡姆、法官和税吏，以及与政府合作的部族首领。内陆地区常以协定、贡赋和巡防相结合的方式管理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on kaymakams, judges, and tax agents in towns such as Tripoli and Misrata, as well as tribal leaders cooperating with the government. Inland areas were often governed through a combination of agreements, tribute, and patrol enforcement.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以哈乃斐派沙里亚、奥斯曼行政命令和习惯法并存为特征。城市中宗教法院较有制度化，而部族地区常依照调解与习惯法裁断。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Hanafi sharia, Ottoman administrative decrees, and customary law. Religious courts were more institutionalized in the cities, while tribal areas often relied on mediation and customary adjudication.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自港口关税、商税、农业课税和部族贡赋，部分税项通过包税制征收。税负在沿海贸易节点较稳定，在内陆则随治安和部族关系波动。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from port customs, commercial levies, agricultural taxation, and tribal tribute, with some taxes collected through tax farming. The tax burden was more stable in coastal trade nodes and more variable inland depending on security and tribal relations.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教
religion.en: Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 的黎波里城保存了清真寺、经学院、商队旅舍与奥斯曼时期防御建筑群，体现地中海与撒哈拉贸易交汇的城市文化。宗教教育与手抄文书传统维持了地方精英的文化连续性。
culturalAchievements.en: Tripoli preserved mosques, madrasas, caravanserais, and Ottoman-era defensive works, reflecting an urban culture at the intersection of Mediterranean and Saharan trade. Religious learning and manuscript traditions sustained cultural continuity among local elites.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系；主要为阿拉伯语，兼有柏柏尔语支与奥斯曼土耳其语影响。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic; primarily Arabic, with Berber branches and Ottoman Turkish influence.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰法学、奥斯曼行政文化与马格里布地方宗教传统为主。
philosophy.en: Primarily shaped by Sunni Islamic jurisprudence, Ottoman administrative culture, and local Maghribi religious traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语，奥斯曼土耳其语亦用于官方文书。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script was used for Arabic, while Ottoman Turkish also appeared in official documentation.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济总量不大，但因的黎波里港连接地中海与撒哈拉商路，商业中转价值高于人口规模所示。农业、畜牧、转口贸易和征税性收入共同支撑财政。
gdpDescription.en: The overall economy was modest, but the port of Tripoli gave it commercial significance disproportionate to its population by linking the Mediterranean and Saharan routes. Agriculture, pastoralism, transit trade, and fiscal extraction together sustained the province.

mainIndustries.zh: 港口贸易、谷物与橄榄种植、畜牧、皮革加工、手工业、商队运输
mainIndustries.en: Port trade, grain and olive cultivation, pastoralism, leatherworking, handicrafts, and caravan transport

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、橄榄油、羊毛、皮革、盐、枣、牲畜、转口纺织品与撒哈拉货物
tradeGoods.en: Grain, olive oil, wool, leather, salt, dates, livestock, re-exported textiles, and Saharan goods

name.zh: 奥斯曼库鲁什与马赫布布并用
name.en: Ottoman kuruş with mahbub coinage in circulation

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人和官绅家庭财富明显高于一般农牧民，多数家庭以牲畜、粮食储备和家产作为主要资产。现金流通集中于港口和市场城镇。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchant and notable households were substantially wealthier than ordinary agro-pastoral families, whose assets were mainly livestock, grain stores, and household property. Cash circulation was concentrated in ports and market towns.

economicSystem.zh: 以港口商业、包税、地方农业和部族交换网络结合的前近代混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A premodern mixed economy combining port commerce, tax farming, local agriculture, and tribal exchange networks.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库存银有限，足以应付常规军政开支，但一旦商路受阻或部族叛乱，财政弹性较弱。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury held limited reserves, sufficient for routine military and administrative costs but with weak resilience if trade routes were disrupted or tribal unrest broke out.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向维持关税与包税收入稳定，优先保障驻军、港口与总督行政开支。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on stabilizing customs and tax-farm income, with priority given to the garrison, port maintenance, and gubernatorial administration.

description.zh: 驻守的黎波里及主要沿海据点，兼负治安与城防任务。
description.en: Stationed in Tripoli and major coastal posts, serving both security and urban defense roles.

description.zh: 用于巡逻、护商和应对内陆骚动，机动性较强但纪律不一。
description.en: Used for patrols, caravan protection, and responding to inland disturbances; mobile but uneven in discipline.

description.zh: 部署在港口炮台和城防工事，主要承担威慑与防御任务。
description.en: Deployed in port batteries and fortifications, primarily for deterrence and defense.

technology.zh: 武器以燧发枪、火炮和传统骑兵装备为主，部分受奥斯曼军事改革影响但更新有限。海岸防御工事较旧，补给与训练水平参差不齐。
technology.en: Armament centered on flintlocks, artillery, and traditional cavalry equipment, with only limited influence from Ottoman military reforms. Coastal defenses were aging, and supply and training standards were uneven.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自内陆部族反抗、跨撒哈拉治安问题以及欧洲海上势力日益增强的压力。
threats.en: Major threats came from inland tribal resistance, insecurity along trans-Saharan routes, and growing pressure from European naval powers.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于的黎波里沿海带、绿洲和少数商路节点，整体密度很低。阿拉伯人与柏柏尔人占多数，城市中有土耳其人、库洛格里人、犹太商人和少量欧洲侨民。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in the coastal strip around Tripoli, oasis zones, and a few caravan nodes, with very low overall density. Arabs and Berbers formed the majority, while towns also contained Turks, Kouloughlis, Jewish merchants, and a small number of Europeans.

socialClasses.zh: 帕夏与官僚、城市显贵与商人、乌理玛、部族首领、手工业者、农民牧民、奴隶与依附人口。
socialClasses.en: Pasha and bureaucrats, urban notables and merchants, ulama, tribal leaders, artisans, peasants and pastoralists, and enslaved or dependent populations.

allies.zh: 奥斯曼帝国中央政府及与总督合作的沿海城市显贵和部分部族。
allies.en: The central Ottoman government, along with coastal urban notables and certain tribes cooperating with the governor.

enemies.zh: 敌对或不服从的内陆部族、海上走私网络，以及潜在干预的欧洲列强。
enemies.en: Hostile or noncompliant inland tribes, maritime smuggling networks, and potentially interventionist European powers.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持对奥斯曼的忠诚、确保地中海贸易和避免与欧洲强国直接冲突为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on maintaining loyalty to the Ottoman Empire, securing Mediterranean trade, and avoiding direct conflict with major European powers.

era.zh: 前工业晚期的奥斯曼地方政权

keyInnovations.zh: 采用有限的奥斯曼军制改革、港口炮台维护、地中海航运技术与传统商队组织并存。
keyInnovations.en: Featured limited adoption of Ottoman military reforms, maintenance of port batteries, Mediterranean shipping techniques, and continued use of traditional caravan organization.

strengths.zh: 占据连接地中海与撒哈拉的关键港口，具有关税收入和区域商贸枢纽优势。奥斯曼名义支持增强了其政治合法性。
strengths.en: It occupied a key port linking the Mediterranean and the Sahara, giving it customs income and regional commercial importance. Nominal Ottoman backing strengthened its political legitimacy.

weaknesses.zh: 财政规模有限，对贸易和部族合作依赖大，内陆控制力不足。军事现代化缓慢，难以抵御更强大的外部海军力量。
weaknesses.en: Its fiscal base was limited, heavily dependent on trade and tribal cooperation, and its inland control remained weak. Military modernization was slow, leaving it vulnerable to stronger outside naval powers.

outlook.zh: 短期内可维持稳定，但若欧洲影响继续上升或商路受扰，地方自治空间将进一步收缩。
outlook.en: It could remain stable in the short term, but continued European influence or disruption of trade routes would likely narrow its room for autonomous action.

description.zh: 1840年的的黎波里塔尼亚是一个由奥斯曼帕夏统治、依托港口贸易与部族协商维持秩序的北非省级政体。
description.en: In 1840, Tripolitania was a North African provincial polity ruled by an Ottoman pasha and sustained by port commerce and negotiated relations with tribal society.

dynasty.zh: 塞努西教团早期领导体系

governmentForm.zh: 以苏非教团网络为核心、兼具宗教权威与地方政治功能的准君主性统治体。
governmentForm.en: A quasi-monarchical order centered on a Sufi network that exercised both religious authority and local political functions.

socialStructure.zh: 昔兰尼加社会以部族、绿洲聚落、宗教弟子网络和沿海商人为基本构成。塞努西教团通过扎维亚把分散部族与边地居民联结起来，提供教育、调解和施济。沿海与内陆联系相对松散，许多社区保持强烈自治传统。
socialStructure.en: Cyrenaican society was structured around tribes, oasis settlements, religious discipleship networks, and coastal merchants. The Senussi Order linked dispersed tribes and frontier populations through zawiyas that provided education, mediation, and charity. Ties between coast and interior remained relatively loose, and many communities preserved strong traditions of local autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 统治核心是塞努西谢赫及其亲信门徒、地方扎维亚主持人和与教团合作的部族首领。其权威更依赖宗教声望、调解能力和物资分配，而非庞大官僚体系。
rulingClass.en: The ruling core consisted of the Senussi shaykh, trusted disciples, local zawiya heads, and tribal leaders allied with the order. Their authority depended more on religious prestige, mediation, and control of resources than on a large bureaucracy.

succession.zh: 领导权通常由教团创始家族和核心门徒体系内传承，并以宗教声望和社群认可巩固。虽然具有家族连续性，但并非严格世俗王朝式继承。
succession.en: Leadership usually passed within the founding family and the order's inner disciple network, reinforced by religious prestige and community recognition. It had familial continuity, though not a strictly secular dynastic succession.

structure.zh: 1840年的昔兰尼加尚未形成高度集中化国家，其治理主要依靠塞努西教团的宗教网络、绿洲据点和部族协商。行政事务较简，关键在于维持商路安全、宗教教育和纠纷仲裁。沿海城镇与内陆聚落之间不存在强而统一的官僚控制。
structure.en: In 1840, Cyrenaica had not yet developed into a highly centralized state; governance relied mainly on the Senussi religious network, oasis nodes, and tribal negotiation. Administration remained light, with priority given to route security, religious instruction, and dispute settlement. There was no strong, unified bureaucratic control linking the coastal towns and inland settlements.

function.zh: 统筹宗教教育、弟子网络、施济和跨部族联络。
function.en: Coordinated religious education, disciple networks, charity, and intertribal communication.

function.zh: 保障商路、组织护送、仲裁部族纠纷并征收少量通行收入。
function.en: Protected caravan routes, organized escorts, arbitrated tribal disputes, and collected limited transit income.

localAdmin.zh: 地方管理主要依赖各扎维亚主持人、部族谢赫和绿洲长老会议。教团在许多地区通过宗教权威而非正式官衙来维持秩序。
localAdmin.en: Local administration depended chiefly on zawiya heads, tribal shaykhs, and oasis elders' councils. In many areas, the order maintained order through religious authority rather than formal offices.

legalSystem.zh: 司法以马立克派和其他逊尼派伊斯兰法传统、教团调解以及部族习惯法相结合。多数纠纷通过协商、赔偿和宗教仲裁解决。
legalSystem.en: Justice combined Maliki and other Sunni legal traditions, order-based mediation, and tribal customary law. Most disputes were resolved through negotiation, compensation, and religious arbitration.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政征收较轻，主要来自扎卡特、捐献、商路通行费和附属聚落的实物贡献。税收更像宗教与社群性筹资，而非严格领土国家的普遍课税。
taxationSystem.en: Fiscal extraction was relatively light, drawing mainly on zakat, donations, caravan tolls, and in-kind contributions from dependent settlements. Revenue functioned more as religious and communal mobilization than as universal taxation by a territorial state.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教
religion.en: Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 塞努西扎维亚体系在教育、宗教传播、抄写文书和商路组织方面具有突出作用，使昔兰尼加逐渐形成更紧密的宗教—社会网络。其文化成就不在宏伟城市建筑，而在边地社会整合能力。
culturalAchievements.en: The Senussi zawiya system was notable in education, religious propagation, manuscript culture, and caravan organization, gradually binding Cyrenaica into a denser religious-social network. Its cultural achievement lay less in monumental urban architecture than in integrating frontier society.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系；以阿拉伯语为主，兼有柏柏尔语成分。
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic; predominantly Arabic with Berber elements.

philosophy.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰、苏非修行伦理与边地社群互助观念为核心。
philosophy.en: Centered on Sunni Islam, Sufi ethical discipline, and ideals of mutual aid in frontier society.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语。
writingSystem.en: Primarily used Arabic written in the Arabic script.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模较小，以牧业、绿洲农业和区域商路服务为主。塞努西网络提升了贸易安全和物资流通，但整体仍属低密度边地经济。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was small, based on pastoralism, oasis agriculture, and services tied to regional caravan routes. The Senussi network improved security and circulation, but the region remained a low-density frontier economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 牧业、枣椰与谷物种植、商队运输、皮毛与简易手工业
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, date and grain cultivation, caravan transport, hides, and simple handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、牲畜、皮革、枣、盐、谷物、转运撒哈拉货物
tradeGoods.en: Wool, livestock, leather, dates, salt, grain, and trans-Saharan caravan goods

name.zh: 奥斯曼库鲁什与实物交换并用

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富多体现为牲畜、枣园、水井使用权和部族关系网络，现金储蓄较少。宗教中心周边家庭因接近商路与施济网络而更稳健。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was mainly held in livestock, date groves, water rights, and tribal relationship networks, with limited cash savings. Families near religious centers were more secure because of access to caravan routes and charitable distribution.

economicSystem.zh: 以宗教网络支持的部族—绿洲交换经济和小规模商路经济为主。
economicSystem.en: A tribal-oasis exchange economy supported by religious networks and small-scale caravan commerce.

source.en: In-kind contributions from oases and settlements

category.zh: 扎维亚维持与宗教教育

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备较小，多以粮食、牲畜和分散实物资产形式存在，适合维持低成本治理但难以支撑大型战争。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were small and often held in grain, livestock, and dispersed in-kind assets, suitable for low-cost governance but insufficient for major warfare.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在轻征收、重分配，通过宗教合法性换取部族合作与商路秩序。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized light extraction and redistribution, using religious legitimacy to secure tribal cooperation and caravan order.

description.zh: 机动巡逻和远程护送的主要力量，依赖部族动员。
description.en: The main force for mobile patrols and long-distance escort, raised through tribal mobilization.

description.zh: 负责聚落守备、宗教中心保护和基础治安。
description.en: Responsible for settlement defense, protection of religious centers, and basic security.

description.zh: 专司商路护卫，兼具侦察和联络职能。
description.en: Dedicated to caravan protection, with additional scouting and liaison duties.

technology.zh: 武器以火绳枪、燧发枪、冷兵器和骑乘装备为主，重炮极少。军事实力更倚重机动、地理熟悉和部族忠诚，而非正规操练。
technology.en: Weapons consisted mainly of matchlocks, flintlocks, edged arms, and riding equipment, with very little heavy artillery. Military effectiveness depended more on mobility, local knowledge, and tribal loyalty than on regular drill.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自敌对部族、商路掠夺、沿海外来势力渗透以及周边政权对边地控制的竞争。
threats.en: Primary threats came from hostile tribes, caravan raiding, coastal penetration by outside powers, and competing attempts by neighboring authorities to control the frontier.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口稀少且高度分散，集中于班加西、德尔纳沿海地带和少数绿洲聚落。多数居民为阿拉伯化部族人口，定居与半游牧生活方式并存。
populationDescription.en: The population was sparse and highly dispersed, concentrated around Benghazi, Derna, and a small number of oasis settlements. Most inhabitants belonged to Arabized tribal communities, with settled and semi-nomadic lifestyles coexisting.

socialClasses.zh: 教团领袖与门徒精英、部族谢赫、沿海商人、绿洲农民、牧民、护送武装与依附人口。
socialClasses.en: Order leaders and disciple elites, tribal shaykhs, coastal merchants, oasis cultivators, pastoralists, escort fighters, and dependent populations.

allies.zh: 与塞努西网络合作的内陆部族、绿洲社群及部分沿海商人。
allies.en: Inland tribes, oasis communities, and some coastal merchants aligned with the Senussi network.

enemies.zh: 敌对部族、商路掠夺者，以及任何试图削弱教团自治的外来政权力量。
enemies.en: Hostile tribes, caravan raiders, and any outside power seeking to reduce the order's autonomy.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外以扩展宗教影响、稳固边地商路和避免被沿海强权直接控制为主要方针。
foreignPolicy.en: Its external approach focused on expanding religious influence, securing frontier caravan routes, and avoiding direct domination by stronger coastal powers.

era.zh: 前工业边地宗教网络社会

keyInnovations.zh: 关键组织创新在于扎维亚体系、商路护送网络和跨部族调解机制，而非机械工业技术。
keyInnovations.en: Its key innovations lay in the zawiya system, caravan escort networks, and cross-tribal mediation mechanisms rather than in mechanical industry.

strengths.zh: 宗教号召力强，治理成本低，适合整合稀疏人口与边地部族。商路安全与社会调解能力是其核心优势。
strengths.en: It possessed strong religious appeal and low governance costs, well suited to integrating sparse populations and frontier tribes. Route security and social mediation were its central strengths.

weaknesses.zh: 缺乏集中官僚、稳定税源和重型武备，对沿海港口和外来军事力量影响有限。内部 cohesion 依赖宗教威望，一旦分裂较难维持统一。
weaknesses.en: It lacked centralized bureaucracy, stable taxation, and heavy armament, limiting its influence over coastal ports and resistance to external military powers. Internal cohesion depended heavily on religious prestige and could weaken if division emerged.

outlook.zh: 只要教团能维持商路与仲裁信誉，昔兰尼加可保持相对稳定，并在后续数十年扩大其区域影响。
outlook.en: So long as the order maintained secure routes and a reputation for arbitration, Cyrenaica could remain relatively stable and expand its regional influence over subsequent decades.

description.zh: 1840年的昔兰尼加是一个由塞努西教团宗教网络主导、以部族协商和商路控制维系秩序的边地政体。
description.en: In 1840, Cyrenaica was a frontier polity dominated by the Senussi religious network, sustaining order through tribal negotiation and control of caravan routes.

governmentForm.zh: 由英国王室授权总督统治、受殖民部指导的殖民地行政体。
governmentForm.en: A crown colony administration ruled by a British governor under the direction of the Colonial Office.

socialStructure.zh: 特立尼达社会由英国殖民官员、种植园主、自由有色人、获释奴隶、仍受学徒制约束的前奴隶劳工，以及少量商人和手工业者构成。1834年废奴后至1838年学徒制结束的转型余波仍在，社会关系围绕糖业、劳工控制和土地获取展开。法裔克里奥尔与西班牙时代遗留社群也继续影响地方文化。
socialStructure.en: Trinidadian society comprised British colonial officials, plantation proprietors, free people of color, emancipated slaves and recently apprenticed laborers, as well as smaller groups of merchants and artisans. The aftereffects of the transition from slavery through apprenticeship, ending in 1838, were still strong, and social relations revolved around sugar, labor control, and access to land. French Creole and communities inherited from the Spanish period also continued to shape local culture.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要是英国总督、殖民官僚、种植园主和大型商人。尽管人口中非白人比例较高，真正的政治权力仍集中在帝国官员与地产精英手中。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of the British governor, colonial bureaucrats, plantation owners, and major merchants. Although nonwhite groups formed a large share of the population, real political power remained concentrated in imperial officials and property elites.

succession.zh: 总督并非世袭，而由英国政府任命并代表王室行使权力。地方影响力可在种植园家族间延续，但主权归于英国王室。
succession.en: The governor was not hereditary but appointed by the British government to exercise authority on behalf of the Crown. Local influence could persist within plantation families, but sovereignty rested with the British Crown.

structure.zh: 1840年的特立尼达是英国直辖殖民地，由总督、行政机关和有限的殖民咨询机构治理。核心任务是维持治安、确保种植园生产、征收关税并管理港口。行政模式明显服从伦敦殖民部和帝国商业利益。
structure.en: In 1840, Trinidad was a British crown colony governed by a governor, executive offices, and limited colonial advisory institutions. Its core functions were to maintain order, secure plantation production, collect customs, and manage the port. The administrative model was clearly subordinated to the Colonial Office in London and to imperial commercial interests.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、法令发布、对伦敦报告和岛内政策执行。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, proclamation of regulations, reporting to London, and implementation of island policy.

function.zh: 负责关税、港口收费、酒税和殖民地财政管理。
function.en: Managed customs duties, port fees, excise, and overall colonial finance.

function.zh: 维持治安、监控劳工秩序并组织防务准备。
function.en: Maintained public order, monitored labor discipline, and organized defensive readiness.

function.zh: 处理法院、地产登记、土地授予与契约事务。
function.en: Handled courts, property registration, land grants, and contractual affairs.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以西班牙港为中心，并通过乡区官员、治安法官和警察向种植园带延伸。乡村地区的治理重点是劳工管理、道路维护和治安控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was centered on Port of Spain and extended into plantation districts through local officers, magistrates, and police. In the countryside, governance focused on labor management, road maintenance, and public order.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系受英国殖民法主导，但保留部分源自西班牙和法裔传统的地产与民事惯例。司法实践高度服务于财产权保护、商业合同和殖民秩序维持。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was dominated by British colonial law, while retaining some landholding and civil practices inherited from Spanish and French traditions. Judicial practice strongly served property protection, commercial contracts, and maintenance of colonial order.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以进口关税、出口税、港口收费、酒税和地产相关收入为主。由于殖民经济面向出口，海关收入在财政中占据核心地位。
taxationSystem.en: Finance depended mainly on import duties, export levies, port charges, excise, and land-related revenues. Because the colonial economy was export-oriented, customs income occupied a central place in public finance.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 特立尼达在殖民时期形成了多语、多族群和港口导向的加勒比文化雏形，天主教节庆、克里奥尔社交生活和港口商业文化并存。西班牙港逐渐发展为地区性的贸易和行政中心。
culturalAchievements.en: During the colonial period, Trinidad developed an early form of multilingual, multiethnic, port-oriented Caribbean culture in which Catholic festivals, Creole sociability, and commercial urban life coexisted. Port of Spain was gradually emerging as a regional center of trade and administration.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系；英语为行政语言，同时存在法语克里奥尔语与西班牙语影响。
languageFamily.en: Indo-European; English served as the administrative language, alongside French Creole and Spanish influences.

philosophy.zh: 以英国殖民行政文化、天主教传统和法裔克里奥尔社会习俗并存为特征。
philosophy.en: Characterized by a coexistence of British colonial administrative culture, Catholic tradition, and French Creole social customs.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母，行政与商业文书以英语为主，法语和西班牙语传统仍有残余影响。
writingSystem.en: The Latin script was used throughout; administration and commerce were mainly in English, though French and Spanish traditions still retained some influence.

unit.en: pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 特立尼达经济以糖、可可和港口贸易为核心，虽然人口不多，但出口导向使其人均产出高于多数前近代地区。废奴后的劳工重组对生产造成短期摩擦，但殖民港口与帝国市场为经济提供了稳定外部需求。
gdpDescription.en: Trinidad's economy centered on sugar, cocoa, and port commerce; though the population was small, its export orientation gave it a higher per capita output than most premodern regions. Post-emancipation labor reorganization caused short-term frictions in production, but the colonial port and imperial markets provided stable external demand.

mainIndustries.zh: 糖业种植、可可种植、朗姆酒加工、港口贸易、木材与小规模手工业
mainIndustries.en: Sugar planting, cocoa cultivation, rum processing, port trade, timber, and small-scale handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 糖、糖蜜、朗姆酒、可可、咖啡、木材、进口纺织品与制成品
tradeGoods.en: Sugar, molasses, rum, cocoa, coffee, timber, and imported textiles and manufactures

householdWealth.zh: 财富分布高度不均，种植园主和商人拥有大部分土地、设备和信贷渠道。普通自由劳工家庭现金有限，生活更多依赖工资、佃种和家庭副业。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was highly unequal, with plantation owners and merchants holding most land, equipment, and credit access. Ordinary free labor households had limited cash and relied more on wages, tenancy, and household side production.

unit.en: pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year
pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 面向帝国市场的殖民种植园出口经济，辅以港口商业和有限本地消费市场。
economicSystem.en: A colonial plantation export economy oriented toward imperial markets, supplemented by port commerce and a limited local consumer market.

unit.en: pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year
pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year
pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政相对稳健，但高度依赖关税和出口表现。若糖价下跌或贸易受阻，预算平衡将迅速承压。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were relatively sound but highly dependent on customs receipts and export performance. A fall in sugar prices or disruption of trade would quickly strain the budget.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以低成本殖民治理和贸易征收为主，重点支持治安、港口和有利于出口经济的基础设施。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized low-cost colonial administration and trade taxation, prioritizing public order, port facilities, and infrastructure favorable to the export economy.

description.zh: 负责西班牙港、炮台和关键行政设施防卫。
description.en: Defended Port of Spain, the batteries, and key administrative installations.

name.zh: 殖民警察与准军事部队

description.zh: 承担治安、乡区巡逻与劳工秩序控制。
description.en: Handled policing, district patrols, and control of labor order.

description.zh: 由殖民地居民组成，战时或危机时辅助守备。
description.en: Raised from local residents to assist in defense during emergencies.

commanderInChief.zh: 英国总督兼殖民军政最高长官
commanderInChief.en: British Governor as supreme colonial civil-military authority

technology.zh: 装备以英式燧发枪、少量较新式击发枪、海岸火炮和帆船补给体系为主。由于依托英国帝国网络，其训练和后勤水准高于许多同人口规模地区。
technology.en: Equipment centered on British flintlock muskets, a small number of newer percussion firearms, coastal artillery, and sailing-ship logistics. Because it was tied into the British imperial network, its training and supply standards were higher than those of many regions of comparable population.

unit.en: pounds sterling silver-standard equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要安全问题是劳工骚动、奴隶制废除后的社会紧张、走私以及战时可能遭遇敌对海军袭扰。
threats.en: The main security concerns were labor unrest, post-emancipation social tension, smuggling, and the possibility of hostile naval raids in wartime.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于西班牙港及种植园地带，族群构成多元，包括非洲裔、克里奥尔人、欧洲人、自由有色人和少量其他加勒比移民。废奴后的劳动力重组使乡村社会流动性明显增加。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in Port of Spain and the plantation belt, with a diverse composition including Africans, Creoles, Europeans, free people of color, and small numbers of other Caribbean migrants. The post-emancipation reorganization of labor made rural society notably more mobile.

socialClasses.zh: 英国官员与种植园主、商人、中间层自由有色人与专业人士、城市工匠、自由劳工与前奴隶农村人口。
socialClasses.en: British officials and plantation owners, merchants, a middle layer of free people of color and professionals, urban artisans, and free laborers with formerly enslaved rural populations.

allies.zh: 英国本土、英国西印度殖民体系及帝国海军网络。
allies.en: Britain itself, the British West Indian colonial system, and the imperial naval network.

enemies.zh: 战时潜在敌人为其他欧洲海上强国，内部则警惕走私者和可能的劳工骚乱。
enemies.en: Potential wartime enemies were other European maritime powers, while internally the colony was wary of smugglers and possible labor unrest.

foreignPolicy.zh: 其对外政策实为大英帝国政策的一部分，重点在保护加勒比海航路、扩大出口市场并维持殖民秩序。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy was effectively a component of British imperial policy, focused on protecting Caribbean sea lanes, expanding export markets, and preserving colonial order.

era.zh: 工业革命时期的英属加勒比殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 采用英帝国港口管理、糖厂改良设备、标准化海关行政与较成熟的跨洋贸易金融体系。
keyInnovations.en: It employed imperial port administration, improved sugar-mill equipment, standardized customs administration, and a relatively mature transoceanic commercial-financial system.

strengths.zh: 依托英国海军和帝国市场，港口条件优越，出口农业具有较高商业化程度。行政体系紧凑，财政相对稳定。
strengths.en: It benefited from the British navy and imperial markets, had strong port advantages, and possessed a relatively commercialized export agriculture. Its administrative system was compact and its finances comparatively stable.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖少数出口作物和外部市场，社会分层尖锐，劳工问题持续。殖民地缺乏真正自主外交与战略能力。
weaknesses.en: The economy depended too heavily on a few export crops and external markets, while social stratification remained sharp and labor problems persisted. The colony lacked genuine autonomy in diplomacy and strategy.

outlook.zh: 在英国保护下短期稳定性较高，但未来发展将取决于废奴后劳工制度重建和糖业竞争力变化。
outlook.en: Under British protection, short-term stability was fairly high, but future development would depend on rebuilding the labor system after emancipation and on changes in sugar competitiveness.

description.zh: 1840年的英属特立尼达是一个以糖业和港口贸易为核心、由英国总督统治的加勒比殖民地。
description.en: In 1840, British Trinidad was a Caribbean colony ruled by a British governor and centered on sugar production and port commerce.

governmentForm.zh: 由两位半年一任的执政官共同主持的寡头共和制，小议会与大议会掌握核心政务。
governmentForm.en: An oligarchic republic jointly headed by two Captains Regent serving six-month terms, with core affairs controlled by the Small Council and the Grand and General Council.

socialStructure.zh: 圣马力诺社会规模极小，以农村家庭、手工业者、小地主和少数城市公民构成。天主教神职人员在教育与社会生活中具有重要影响。传统家族与地方显贵在政治代表与司法事务中占较大比重。
socialStructure.en: San Marino's society was very small, composed mainly of rural households, artisans, small landholders, and a limited body of urban citizens. Catholic clergy exerted notable influence in education and social life. Traditional families and local notables carried disproportionate weight in political representation and judicial affairs.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由公民贵族、地主家族及担任议会议席的地方名流组成。由于国土狭小，政治精英与社会上层高度重合。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of civic patricians, landed families, and local notables holding council seats. Because the state was so small, the political elite overlapped heavily with the broader social upper stratum.

succession.zh: 国家元首并非世袭，由大议会定期选举两名执政官，每半年更替一次。此制旨在防止个人专权并维持共和国传统。
succession.en: The headship of state was not hereditary; the Grand and General Council regularly elected two Captains Regent, rotated every six months. This system aimed to prevent personal domination and preserve republican tradition.

structure.zh: 1840年前后的圣马力诺延续中世纪以来的共和体制，由大议会行使立法与重要任命权。执政官负责象征性与行政性领导，国务会议处理日常政务。司法与行政未完全分离，仍带有传统城邦特征。
structure.en: Around 1840, San Marino retained its long-standing medieval republican constitution, with the Grand and General Council exercising legislative and major appointive powers. The Captains Regent provided symbolic and administrative leadership, while the Council of State handled daily governance. Judicial and administrative functions were not fully separated, reflecting the character of a traditional city-state.

function.zh: 处理议会决议执行、地方秩序、档案与对外函件。
function.en: Handled implementation of council decisions, local order, archives, and external correspondence.

function.zh: 管理公库、土地税、关卡收入与公共支出。
function.en: Managed the treasury, land taxes, toll revenues, and public expenditure.

function.zh: 负责民刑案件审理、文书认证及法令适用。
function.en: Oversaw civil and criminal adjudication, certification of documents, and application of statutes.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以各堡垒区与乡村社区为单位，受共和国中央机关直接监督。由于领土狭小，中央与地方之间层级极少。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized around castelli and village communities under direct supervision of the republican center. Owing to the tiny territory, there were very few layers between central and local authority.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系建立在共和国旧法、习惯法及教会法影响之上。司法实践较为保守，重视调解与地方传统。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on old republican statutes, customary law, and the influence of canon law. Judicial practice was conservative and placed high value on mediation and local tradition.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以土地、消费与关卡性收费为主，税基狭窄但征收相对稳定。政府避免过重课税，以维持小共和国的社会平衡。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on land, consumption, and toll-like duties, with a narrow but fairly stable base. The government avoided excessively heavy taxation in order to preserve social balance in the small republic.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 圣马力诺以持续数世纪的共和宪政传统闻名，被视为意大利半岛上罕见的古老共和国遗存。其公共仪式、法律文书与城堡景观共同构成鲜明的城邦文化。
culturalAchievements.en: San Marino was renowned for its centuries-long republican constitutional tradition, regarded as a rare survival of the old republics on the Italian peninsula. Its civic ceremonies, legal records, and fortified landscape together formed a distinctive city-state culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－罗曼语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance

philosophy.zh: 天主教伦理与意大利城邦共和传统
philosophy.en: Catholic ethics and the republican tradition of the Italian city-states

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的意大利语
writingSystem.en: Italian written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 圣马力诺经济以自给性农业、小规模手工业和过境贸易服务为基础。总体规模很小，但因社会稳定与负担较轻，生活水平在周边山区中并不算低。
gdpDescription.en: San Marino's economy was based on subsistence agriculture, small-scale crafts, and services linked to transit trade. Its overall scale was tiny, but social stability and relatively light burdens kept living standards from being especially poor by surrounding upland standards.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、葡萄与橄榄、小型畜牧、石材、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Grain farming, vines and olives, small livestock raising, stoneworking, and handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、葡萄酒、奶酪、石材、手工制品
tradeGoods.en: Grain, wine, cheese, stone, and crafted goods

name.zh: 意大利及教皇国流通银币
name.en: Italian and Papal silver coinage in circulation

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富多体现为小块土地、牲畜、住房与少量银币储蓄。财富分布不均但极端贫富分化有限。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was mostly held in small plots of land, livestock, dwellings, and modest silver savings. Wealth was unevenly distributed, but extreme disparities were limited.

economicSystem.zh: 以农村小农经济为主、受共和国法制约束的地方市场经济。
economicSystem.en: A locally regulated market economy centered on rural smallholding.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公库规模不大，但足以覆盖短期行政和警备支出。财政依赖谨慎管理而非大规模借贷。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was modest but sufficient to cover short-term administrative and security costs. Fiscal stability depended on careful management rather than large-scale borrowing.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 奉行保守平衡财政，优先维持自治机构与基本治安支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative and balanced, prioritizing the maintenance of self-governing institutions and basic internal security.

description.zh: 负责要塞、政府建筑与礼仪性警备的常备小部队。
description.en: A small permanent force guarding fortifications, government buildings, and ceremonial functions.

description.zh: 由成年男性公民组成，战时或紧急状态下动员。
description.en: Composed of adult male citizens mobilized in wartime or emergencies.

commanderInChief.zh: 执政官与共和国军务官共同统辖
commanderInChief.en: The Captains Regent together with the republic's military officers

technology.zh: 装备以燧发枪、少量轻炮和传统城防设施为主，军事技术明显落后于欧洲列强。其防务重点在象征性自治与治安维持，而非野战能力。
technology.en: Equipment centered on flintlock muskets, a few light guns, and traditional fortifications, leaving military technology well behind the European great powers. Defense focused more on symbolic autonomy and internal order than on field capability.

threats.zh: 主要风险来自周边意大利政局动荡及大国势力重组，而非直接军事入侵。
threats.en: The principal risks came from instability in surrounding Italian politics and broader shifts in great-power influence rather than direct military invasion.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口稀少且分布于山地聚落，以意大利语天主教居民为绝对多数。出生率较高，但受土地容量限制，对外迁移时有发生。
populationDescription.en: The population was sparse and dispersed across hill settlements, with Italian-speaking Catholics forming an overwhelming majority. Birth rates were relatively high, but limited land capacity encouraged periodic out-migration.

socialClasses.zh: 公民名流与地主、小农、手工业者、神职人员、雇工与贫民。
socialClasses.en: Civic notables and landholders, small farmers, artisans, clergy, laborers, and the poor.

allies.zh: 与教皇国、意大利诸邦及周边地方政权保持谨慎友好关系。
allies.en: Maintained cautious friendly relations with the Papal States, Italian polities, and neighboring local authorities.

enemies.zh: 无固定公开敌国。
enemies.en: No fixed public enemy.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以中立、自保和维护传统独立地位为核心，尽量避免卷入意大利半岛冲突。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on neutrality, self-preservation, and the defense of traditional independence, avoiding entanglement in wider conflicts on the Italian peninsula.

era.zh: 工业革命早期边缘地区

keyInnovations.zh: 道路改善、传统石建筑维护、周边地区输入的近代行政文书和印刷技术。
keyInnovations.en: Road improvements, maintenance of traditional stone architecture, and the import from surrounding regions of modern administrative paperwork and printing methods.

strengths.zh: 政治连续性强、社会规模小而稳定、自治传统深厚。
strengths.en: Strong political continuity, a small but stable society, and a deep-rooted tradition of self-government.

weaknesses.zh: 人口与财政规模极小，缺乏工业基础与战略纵深。
weaknesses.en: Very limited population and finances, with little industrial base or strategic depth.

outlook.zh: 若周边强权容许其中立地位，圣马力诺可继续以象征性独立与低强度行政维持生存。
outlook.en: If neighboring powers continued to tolerate its neutral status, San Marino could survive through symbolic independence and low-intensity administration.

description.zh: 1840年的圣马力诺是一个依靠古老共和制度、山区农业与谨慎中立维系生存的小型城邦共和国。
description.en: In 1840, San Marino was a tiny city-state republic sustained by an ancient republican constitution, upland agriculture, and cautious neutrality.

dynasty.zh: 法兰西七月王朝殖民政权

governmentForm.zh: 由法国本土任命总督统治的殖民地行政体制，权力集中于殖民当局与驻军。
governmentForm.en: A colonial administrative regime ruled by a governor appointed from metropolitan France, with power concentrated in the colonial authorities and garrison.

socialStructure.zh: 1840年的卡宴及法属圭亚那社会由殖民官员、白人种植园主、自由有色人、奴隶和少数土著社群组成。沿海定居点与内陆森林在经济与行政上分化明显。奴隶制仍然存在，社会等级受种族与法律身份深刻影响。
socialStructure.en: In 1840, Cayenne and French Guiana were socially composed of colonial officials, white planters, free people of color, enslaved laborers, and small indigenous communities. Coastal settlements and the forested interior were sharply divided in both economic and administrative terms. Slavery remained in force, and social hierarchy was deeply shaped by race and legal status.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要为法国总督、殖民文官、军官及与殖民贸易相连的种植园精英。巴黎的殖民部对重大政策拥有最终决定权。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted chiefly of the French governor, colonial civil servants, military officers, and planter elites tied to imperial trade. The colonial ministry in Paris held final authority over major policy.

succession.zh: 总督并非世袭，由法国王国政府任命与撤换。殖民权力随着本土政局和部令而变动。
succession.en: The governor was not hereditary, but appointed and removed by the French state. Colonial authority shifted according to metropolitan politics and ministerial orders.

structure.zh: 法属圭亚那在1840年实行典型的法国殖民总督制，行政、司法与军事高度集中于卡宴。地方自治极其有限，沿海据点受殖民官员直接管理，内陆则更多依赖哨所、传教站与临时安排。殖民地政策服务于治安、种植园经济与法国大西洋体系。
structure.en: French Guiana in 1840 operated under a typical French gubernatorial colonial system, with administrative, judicial, and military power highly concentrated in Cayenne. Local self-government was extremely limited; coastal posts were directly managed by colonial officials, while the interior relied more on outposts, missions, and improvised arrangements. Colonial policy served security, plantation interests, and the French Atlantic system.

function.zh: 统筹殖民行政、公文往来、治安与地方监督。
function.en: Coordinated colonial administration, official correspondence, policing, and local supervision.

function.zh: 负责关税、殖民税收、港口收费与预算执行。
function.en: Managed customs duties, colonial taxes, port charges, and budget execution.

function.zh: 处理民刑案件、奴隶法规执行与监狱事务。
function.en: Handled civil and criminal cases, enforcement of slave regulations, and prison affairs.

function.zh: 负责驻军补给、沿海防务和军事工程。
function.en: Oversaw garrison supply, coastal defense, and military engineering.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政集中于卡宴及少数沿海居民点，乡间与内陆控制能力薄弱。殖民政权常通过军警、教会与种植园体系间接实施统治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was concentrated in Cayenne and a few coastal settlements, with weak control over the countryside and interior. Colonial rule was often exercised indirectly through soldiers, police, church institutions, and the plantation system.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以法国殖民法、皇家敕令和地方法规为基础，并区分自由民、奴隶与土著的不同法律地位。司法程序受总督与殖民行政深刻影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on French colonial law, royal ordinances, and local regulations, while distinguishing different legal statuses for free persons, slaves, and indigenous people. Judicial procedure was heavily shaped by the governor and colonial administration.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、港口收费、贸易税和土地或种植相关征收为主。财政规模有限，较大程度依赖法国本土补贴与军事供给。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on customs duties, port fees, trade taxes, and land- or plantation-related levies. The fiscal base was limited, and the colony depended significantly on subsidies and military supply from metropolitan France.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 法属圭亚那的文化成果主要体现在殖民行政文书、传教网络和克里奥尔社会的形成。卡宴逐渐发展出兼具法国、非洲与本地因素的边疆殖民文化。
culturalAchievements.en: French Guiana's cultural achievements lay chiefly in its colonial records, missionary networks, and the emergence of Creole society. Cayenne gradually developed a frontier colonial culture combining French, African, and local elements.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－罗曼语族（官方法语），并存克里奥尔语与土著语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance (official French), alongside Creole and indigenous languages

philosophy.zh: 法国天主教殖民文化与启蒙行政传统并存
philosophy.en: French Catholic colonial culture alongside Enlightenment-derived administrative traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的法语
writingSystem.en: French written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 法属圭亚那经济规模有限，依赖糖、咖啡、染料木与热带农产的出口，以及殖民驻军和行政消费。由于环境恶劣、劳动力结构扭曲和市场狭小，其增长远逊于加勒比核心殖民地。
gdpDescription.en: French Guiana's economy was limited in scale, relying on exports of sugar, coffee, dyewood, and tropical produce, along with demand generated by the garrison and colonial administration. Because of harsh conditions, distorted labor structures, and a small market, its growth lagged far behind the major Caribbean colonies.

mainIndustries.zh: 种植园农业、木材采集、港口贸易、殖民行政服务
mainIndustries.en: Plantation agriculture, timber extraction, port trade, and colonial administrative services

tradeGoods.zh: 糖、糖蜜、咖啡、可可、染料木、木材、朗姆酒
tradeGoods.en: Sugar, molasses, coffee, cocoa, dyewood, timber, and rum

householdWealth.zh: 财富集中于少数殖民官员和种植园主，普通自由民与奴隶几乎没有可观财产。自由有色人与小商人拥有少量房产、工具和贸易存货。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was concentrated among a small number of officials and planters, while ordinary free people and enslaved laborers possessed little significant property. Free people of color and petty merchants held modest real estate, tools, and trading stocks.

economicSystem.zh: 受法国帝国贸易规则支配、依赖奴隶劳动与出口作物的殖民经济。
economicSystem.en: A colonial economy governed by French imperial trade rules and dependent on enslaved labor and export crops.

category.en: Justice, medical services, and church support

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地现金储备有限，财政平衡常依赖法国本土拨款和军需体系。面对疫病、风暴或产量下滑时，公库承压明显。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial cash reserves were limited, and fiscal balance often depended on appropriations and supply support from metropolitan France. Epidemics, storms, or falling output could place severe strain on the treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持殖民控制和港口运转为优先，财政策略偏向汲取贸易税并接受宗主国补贴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining colonial control and port operations, relying on trade extraction and subsidies from the metropole.

description.zh: 驻守卡宴及沿海据点，承担守备、警备和镇压任务。
description.en: Stationed in Cayenne and coastal posts, performing garrison, policing, and suppression duties.

description.zh: 由殖民居民和自由民组成，在紧急情况下协助防务与巡逻。
description.en: Drawn from colonial residents and free inhabitants to assist defense and patrols in emergencies.

name.zh: 港口炮兵与小型海防分遣队
name.en: Port Artillery and Small Naval Detachment

description.zh: 负责港口火炮、补给船只和近岸巡防。
description.en: Handled harbor guns, supply craft, and near-shore patrol duties.

commanderInChief.zh: 法国总督兼殖民地最高军事长官
commanderInChief.en: The French governor as supreme colonial military authority

technology.zh: 装备主要为击发前后过渡期步枪、滑膛火炮和传统木制防御工事，海防与通信能力有限。军力更适合殖民守备和警察行动，而非大规模会战。
technology.en: Equipment consisted mainly of transitional firearms around the percussion era, smoothbore artillery, and traditional timbered fortifications, with limited naval defense and communications. The force was suited more to colonial garrison and policing than to large-scale warfare.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自热带疾病、奴隶反抗、逃奴社群、边境走私及与邻近殖民地的摩擦。
threats.en: Main threats came from tropical disease, slave resistance, maroon communities, border smuggling, and frictions with neighboring colonies.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于卡宴及沿海带，内陆广阔而稀疏。居民构成复杂，包括法国殖民者、克里奥尔人、非洲裔奴隶、自由有色人和土著群体。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated in Cayenne and the coastal strip, while the interior remained vast and thinly settled. The inhabitants were diverse, including French colonists, Creoles, enslaved Africans, free people of color, and indigenous groups.

socialClasses.zh: 总督与官员、白人种植园主、自由有色人、小商人与工匠、奴隶、土著社群。
socialClasses.en: Governor and officials, white planters, free people of color, petty merchants and artisans, enslaved laborers, and indigenous communities.

allies.zh: 依附法国本土，并与法国海军及加勒比法属殖民网络相互支援。
allies.en: Dependent on metropolitan France and supported by the French navy and the wider French Caribbean colonial network.

enemies.zh: 无正式单一敌国，但与邻近英属、荷属和巴西边境地区存在潜在摩擦。
enemies.en: No single formal enemy, though there were latent frictions with neighboring British, Dutch, and Brazilian borderlands.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策服从法国殖民战略，重点在保卫据点、维持航线并防范边境渗透。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy followed French imperial strategy, focusing on holding the colony, maintaining sea links, and preventing border infiltration.

era.zh: 工业革命早期的殖民边疆
era.en: An early Industrial Revolution colonial frontier

keyInnovations.zh: 港口仓储改良、糖作物加工设备、法国式行政文书体系、有限的蒸汽航运联系。
keyInnovations.en: Improved port storage, sugar-processing equipment, French administrative record systems, and limited links to steam navigation.

strengths.zh: 拥有海岸据点、热带出口作物和法国帝国支持。
strengths.en: Possessed coastal strongpoints, tropical export crops, and support from the French Empire.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少、疾病严重、经济基础脆弱且过度依赖奴隶制与宗主国补给。
weaknesses.en: It had a small population, severe disease burden, and a fragile economy overly dependent on slavery and metropolitan support.

outlook.zh: 短期内殖民统治可维持，但随着奴隶制危机和帝国改革推进，其社会结构将面临显著压力。
outlook.en: Colonial rule could persist in the short term, but its social structure would face mounting pressure as the crisis of slavery and imperial reform advanced.

description.zh: 1840年的法属圭亚那是一个由法国总督统治、依赖种植园与驻军维系的热带殖民边疆社会。
description.en: In 1840, French Guiana was a tropical colonial frontier ruled by a French governor and sustained by plantations and garrison power.

dynasty.zh: 大英帝国维多利亚时期殖民政权
dynasty.en: British Imperial colonial regime in the early Victorian era

governmentForm.zh: 由英国王室主权下的总督、执行局与殖民议会共同运作的责任政府过渡期殖民体制。
governmentForm.en: A colonial system under British Crown sovereignty in which the governor, executive council, and colonial legislatures operated during a transitional move toward responsible government.

socialStructure.zh: 1840年的英属北美加拿大社会由英裔殖民者、法裔加拿大人、商人、农民、教会势力及不断增长的移民群体组成。上加拿大与下加拿大在语言、法律和宗教上差异显著，但已开始在统一殖民框架下整合。城市商人、航运资本和木材贸易精英逐渐取得更大影响力。
socialStructure.en: In 1840, British North American Canada was composed of British settlers, French Canadians, merchants, farmers, church interests, and growing immigrant populations. Upper and Lower Canada differed sharply in language, law, and religion, yet were beginning to be integrated within a unified colonial framework. Urban merchants, shipping capital, and timber-trade elites were gaining increasing influence.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括总督、殖民官僚、行政局成员、地主、商人资本家以及与英国帝国相连的金融与航运利益集团。法裔地方精英在下加拿大仍保有重要社会影响，但在殖民高层权力中受限。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the governor, colonial bureaucrats, executive councillors, landholders, merchant capitalists, and financial and shipping interests linked to the British Empire. French Canadian local elites retained major social influence in Lower Canada but remained constrained within the highest colonial power structures.

succession.zh: 最高主权归英国君主所有，总督由伦敦任命。殖民行政职位依靠任命和议会政治安排，而非地方世袭。
succession.en: Ultimate sovereignty rested with the British monarch, and the governor was appointed from London. Colonial offices were filled through appointment and legislative politics rather than local heredity.

structure.zh: 1840年的加拿大正处于《联合法案》实施前后，由总督主持中央殖民行政，并在上、下加拿大原有制度基础上推动统一。行政权集中于总督和执行局，立法机构逐步扩大，但真正的责任政府仍在形成中。地方治理则通过郡、教区、乡镇和治安法官网络来实现。
structure.en: In 1840, Canada stood around the implementation of the Act of Union, with the governor heading a central colonial administration and moving toward unification on the basis of the former Upper and Lower Canadian systems. Executive authority was concentrated in the governor and executive council, while representative institutions were expanding though full responsible government had not yet been achieved. Local governance operated through counties, parishes, townships, and magistrate networks.

function.zh: 处理立法协调、对伦敦报告、行政任命与总体政策执行。
function.en: Handled legislative coordination, reporting to London, administrative appointments, and general policy execution.

function.zh: 负责关税、地租、公共收入征管与预算编制。
function.en: Managed customs, crown rents, public revenue collection, and budget preparation.

name.zh: 土地、公共工程与殖民拓殖署
name.en: Lands, Public Works, and Settlement Department

function.zh: 管理皇家土地、运河道路、移民安置和基础设施建设。
function.en: Oversaw crown lands, canals and roads, immigrant settlement, and infrastructure construction.

function.zh: 负责法院、警务、监狱及地方治安监督。
function.en: Supervised courts, policing, prisons, and local public order.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由郡、乡镇、教区与治安法官构成，在法裔地区还受传统民法与教会网络影响。市政制度尚不完全成熟，但蒙特利尔、魁北克等城市已具较强行政功能。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was built around counties, townships, parishes, and magistrates, with French-speaking areas also shaped by civil law tradition and church networks. Municipal institutions were not yet fully mature, but cities such as Montreal and Quebec already exercised substantial administrative functions.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系呈双重结构：上加拿大偏向英国普通法，下加拿大保留法国民法传统并配合英国公法。殖民司法制度较为成形，法院等级与程序较完整。
legalSystem.en: The legal system had a dual structure: Upper Canada leaned toward English common law, while Lower Canada retained French civil law alongside British public law. Colonial justice was comparatively well developed, with a fairly complete hierarchy of courts and procedures.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要依靠关税、消费税、土地收入和部分执照收费，直接税相对有限。随着运河与道路建设扩张，财政对贸易流量与借贷能力更为敏感。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied chiefly on customs, excise, land revenues, and some licensing fees, while direct taxation remained limited. As canal and road construction expanded, public finance became increasingly sensitive to trade volumes and borrowing capacity.

religion.zh: 基督教
religion.en: Christianity

culturalAchievements.zh: 加拿大在1840年前后形成了兼具英法传统的殖民公共文化，报刊、教会学校和政治辩论日趋活跃。圣劳伦斯流域的商业城市成为出版、教育和改革思想传播的重要中心。
culturalAchievements.en: Around 1840, Canada was developing a colonial public culture combining British and French traditions, with newspapers, church schools, and political debate becoming increasingly active. Commercial cities along the St. Lawrence became important centers for publishing, education, and the circulation of reform ideas.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系－日耳曼语族与罗曼语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic and Romance

philosophy.zh: 英国宪政传统、基督教社会伦理与法裔天主教共同体文化并存
philosophy.en: A coexistence of British constitutionalism, Christian social ethics, and French Canadian Catholic communal culture

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的英语与法语
writingSystem.en: English and French written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年的加拿大经济已显著融入大西洋市场，木材、毛皮、谷物、船运和运河贸易构成其核心。尽管工业化仍处早期阶段，但交通改善、移民流入和英帝国市场准入使其总体经济活力明显强于多数殖民地。
gdpDescription.en: By 1840, Canada's economy was deeply integrated into the Atlantic market, with timber, furs, grain, shipping, and canal trade at its core. Although industrialization remained in an early stage, transport improvements, immigrant inflows, and access to imperial markets gave it significantly greater economic dynamism than most colonies.

mainIndustries.zh: 木材采运、毛皮贸易、农业、造船、航运、面粉加工、运河运输
mainIndustries.en: Timber extraction, fur trade, agriculture, shipbuilding, shipping, flour milling, and canal transport

tradeGoods.zh: 方木、锯材、毛皮、小麦、面粉、鱼类、船舶、钾碱
tradeGoods.en: Square timber, sawn lumber, furs, wheat, flour, fish, ships, and potash

name.zh: 英镑与殖民流通银币并用
name.en: Pound sterling alongside colonial circulating silver coin

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富因地区差异显著：农民多以土地、牲畜和工具为主要资产，城市商人则持有仓储、船只与信贷资产。中等财产家庭数量相对可观，是殖民社会稳定的重要基础。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly by region: farmers held land, livestock, and tools as their main assets, while urban merchants possessed warehouses, vessels, and credit instruments. A relatively substantial layer of middling households formed an important basis of colonial stability.

economicSystem.zh: 以殖民贸易、私人土地经营和逐步扩展的市场资本主义为特征的英帝国边疆经济。
economicSystem.en: An imperial frontier economy characterized by colonial trade, private landholding, and an expanding market capitalism.

unit.en: Spanish silver dollars equivalent per year
Spanish silver dollars equivalent per year
Spanish silver dollars equivalent per year

category.zh: 教育、移民安置与社会事务
category.en: Education, immigration settlement, and social services

treasuryDescription.zh: 加拿大殖民财政相较多数殖民地更为稳健，既有稳定关税来源，也可借助帝国信用支持大型工程。其公库虽受贸易波动影响，但具备一定缓冲能力。
treasuryDescription.en: Canadian colonial finance was more robust than that of most colonies, drawing on stable customs revenue while also benefiting from imperial credit for large works. Though exposed to trade fluctuations, the treasury possessed a meaningful buffer.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以支持基础设施、拓殖与贸易增长为导向，同时维持行政与防务开支的可持续性。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to support infrastructure, settlement, and trade expansion while keeping administrative and defense spending sustainable.

name.zh: 英国驻加步兵与守备部队
name.en: British Regular Infantry and Garrison Forces

description.zh: 驻守蒙特利尔、魁北克、金斯顿及边境要地，是主要常备武装力量。
description.en: Stationed at Montreal, Quebec, Kingston, and key frontier points, forming the principal standing armed force.

description.zh: 由地方居民组成，承担边境防务、治安支援与紧急动员任务。
description.en: Raised from local inhabitants for frontier defense, support to civil order, and emergency mobilization.

name.zh: 湖区与河道海军分遣力量

description.zh: 负责圣劳伦斯河和大湖地区的运输、补给与有限巡逻。
description.en: Handled transport, supply, and limited patrol duties on the St. Lawrence and Great Lakes.

commanderInChief.zh: 总督兼驻北美英军高级指挥体系
commanderInChief.en: The governor together with the senior British command in North America

technology.zh: 军队装备以击发枪、野战炮、要塞火炮和成熟的工兵体系为主，交通与补给依托圣劳伦斯—大湖水道。虽然整体工业军备仍逊于欧洲本土，但在北美殖民地中技术和组织水平均属先进。
technology.en: The forces were equipped mainly with percussion firearms, field artillery, fortress guns, and a mature engineering system, with logistics supported by the St. Lawrence–Great Lakes corridor. Though still behind Europe's industrial core in armament production, their technology and organization were advanced by North American colonial standards.

threats.zh: 主要安全关注包括与美国边境的潜在紧张、1837—1838年叛乱余波、边疆定居冲突及交通线防卫。
threats.en: Major security concerns included potential tension along the U.S. border, the aftermath of the 1837–1838 rebellions, frontier settlement conflicts, and the defense of transport lines.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 漂浮或锚定水雷，封锁航道
description.en: Floating or anchored mine for blocking waterways

populationDescription.zh: 人口快速增长，来源包括自然增长与英伦群岛移民输入。法裔加拿大人集中于圣劳伦斯下游地区，英裔和新移民则在上加拿大及城市港口中比重不断上升。
populationDescription.en: The population was growing rapidly through both natural increase and immigration from the British Isles. French Canadians were concentrated along the lower St. Lawrence, while British settlers and new immigrants were increasing their share in Upper Canada and in urban ports.

socialClasses.zh: 总督与官僚、商人和金融精英、地主与专业人士、农民与定居者、工匠与码头工人、原住民社群。
socialClasses.en: Governor and bureaucrats, merchant and financial elites, landholders and professionals, farmers and settlers, artisans and dockworkers, and Indigenous communities.

allies.zh: 依托英国本土、皇家海军及其他英属北美殖民地。
allies.en: Supported by Britain, the Royal Navy, and the other British North American colonies.

enemies.zh: 无正式战争敌国，但对美国保持持续战略警惕。
enemies.en: No formal wartime enemy, but it maintained continuing strategic vigilance toward the United States.

foreignPolicy.zh: 加拿大自身并无独立外交权，其对外事务服从英国帝国战略，重点在边境安全、贸易航线与殖民稳定。
foreignPolicy.en: Canada possessed no independent foreign policy of its own; external affairs followed British imperial strategy, with emphasis on border security, trade routes, and colonial stability.

era.zh: 工业革命扩散期的北大西洋殖民地
era.en: A North Atlantic colony in the diffusion phase of the Industrial Revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 运河工程、蒸汽船航运、木材加工机械、改良道路桥梁、报刊印刷网络与早期铁路建设准备。
keyInnovations.en: Canal engineering, steamship transport, timber-processing machinery, improved roads and bridges, newspaper printing networks, and preparations for early railway construction.

strengths.zh: 人口增长快、资源丰富、交通网络改善，并享有英国帝国市场与军事实力支持。
strengths.en: It enjoyed rapid population growth, abundant resources, improving transport networks, and support from British imperial markets and military power.

weaknesses.zh: 地区语言分裂、责任政府尚未成熟、边境防务成本较高，且经济对外贸依赖明显。
weaknesses.en: It faced regional and linguistic divisions, an incomplete responsible government system, high border-defense costs, and marked dependence on external trade.

outlook.zh: 在英帝国保护和持续移民推动下，加拿大极可能在未来数十年继续扩张，并逐步走向更成熟的自治殖民体制。
outlook.en: Under imperial protection and sustained immigration, Canada was very likely to continue expanding over the coming decades and move gradually toward a more mature self-governing colonial order.

description.zh: 1840年的加拿大是一个依托英国帝国、以木材贸易与拓殖开发驱动增长、正在迈向更统一殖民政治结构的北美殖民地。
description.en: In 1840, Canada was a North American colony sustained by the British Empire, growing through timber trade and settlement expansion, and moving toward a more unified colonial political structure.

governmentForm.zh: 1831年宪法确立的议会制君主立宪制，国王为国家元首但受宪法约束，实权归于议会与内阁。
governmentForm.en: A parliamentary constitutional monarchy established by the 1831 Constitution, with the king as head of state but bound by the constitution, and real power vested in parliament and cabinet.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族地主、天主教教士、法语资产阶级工商精英以及广大佛拉芒农民和瓦隆工人构成。法语为上层通用语言，佛拉芒语区居民多为中下层。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised noble landowners, Catholic clergy, a Francophone bourgeois commercial elite, and a broad base of Flemish peasants and Walloon workers. French was the language of the upper class, while Flemish speakers were predominantly lower and middle strata.

rulingClass.zh: 法语资产阶级精英、贵族地主与天主教高层教士
rulingClass.en: Francophone bourgeois elite, noble landowners, and senior Catholic clergy

succession.zh: 王位依宪法在萨克森-科堡-哥达王朝男系后裔中世袭继承
succession.en: The throne was constitutionally inherited among male descendants of the House of Saxe-Coburg and Gotha

structure.zh: 比利时实行两院制议会制度，参议院与众议院共同立法，内阁对议会负责。国王保有一定行政权但需部长副署。地方分省治理。
structure.en: Belgium operated a bicameral parliamentary system with a Senate and Chamber of Representatives sharing legislative power, the cabinet answerable to parliament, and the king retaining certain executive powers requiring ministerial countersignature. Provinces were administered locally.

function.zh: 负责地方行政、警务、公共工程与选举事务
function.en: Responsible for local administration, policing, public works, and electoral affairs

function.zh: 管理关税、税收、国库与公共债务
function.en: Managed customs, taxation, the treasury, and public debt

function.zh: 负责外交关系与条约谈判，维护比利时中立地位
function.en: Handled diplomatic relations and treaty negotiations, upholding Belgian neutrality

function.zh: 管理军队组织、征兵、军需与防务
function.en: Administered army organization, conscription, supply, and defense

localAdmin.zh: 全国分九省，由省长领导，下设市镇，各市设市长与市议会。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into nine provinces led by governors, further divided into communes each with a mayor and municipal council.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以拿破仑法典为基础，辅以本国立法。司法独立于行政，设有各级法院。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the Napoleonic Code supplemented by domestic legislation. The judiciary was independent, with courts at multiple levels.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自关税、消费税、土地税与注册税。工业化推动了税基扩大。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from customs duties, excises, land taxes, and registration fees. Industrialization was broadening the tax base.

religion.zh: 天主教为主导信仰，宪法保障宗教自由
religion.en: Catholicism was the dominant faith; the constitution guaranteed religious freedom

culturalAchievements.zh: 比利时以佛拉芒绘画传统、天主教大学教育和蓬勃的纺织工业文化著称。布鲁塞尔是欧洲重要文化都市。
culturalAchievements.en: Belgium was noted for its Flemish painting tradition, Catholic university education, and vibrant textile industrial culture. Brussels was a major European cultural capital.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语支（佛拉芒语/荷兰语）与罗曼语支（法语）并存
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, both Germanic (Flemish/Dutch) and Romance (French)

philosophy.zh: 天主教社会思想与法国启蒙自由主义并存，构成比利时独特的政教互动传统。
philosophy.en: Catholic social thought coexisted with French Enlightenment liberalism, forming Belgium's distinctive tradition of church-state interaction.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 比利时是欧洲大陆工业化最早的国家之一，以煤矿、冶铁与纺织业为支柱，列日与根特等城市工业发达。
gdpDescription.en: Belgium was one of the first countries on the European continent to industrialize, with coal mining, iron smelting, and textile manufacturing as pillars, and cities such as Liège and Ghent as industrial centers.

mainIndustries.zh: 煤矿、冶铁、纺织（亚麻与棉花）、玻璃制造、运河航运
mainIndustries.en: Coal mining, iron smelting, textiles (linen and cotton), glass manufacturing, canal shipping

tradeGoods.zh: 煤炭、钢铁制品、纺织品、玻璃、亚麻布、武器
tradeGoods.en: Coal, iron products, textiles, glass, linen, arms

householdWealth.zh: 资产阶级与贵族掌握大量工业与地产财富；工人阶级生活条件艰苦，工资微薄。
householdWealth.en: The bourgeoisie and nobility held substantial industrial and landed wealth; working-class conditions were harsh with low wages.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以自由市场为主导的早期工业资本主义经济，政府积极推进铁路与基础设施建设。
economicSystem.en: An early industrial capitalist economy with free-market orientation, with the government actively promoting railways and infrastructure.

treasuryDescription.zh: 作为新独立国家，比利时的国库储备有限，但工业化带来的税收增长正在改善财政状况。
treasuryDescription.en: As a newly independent nation, Belgium's treasury reserves were modest, but revenue growth from industrialization was improving the fiscal situation.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政府积极投资铁路国有化与基础设施建设，同时维持审慎的预算平衡。
fiscalPolicy.en: The government actively invested in railway nationalization and infrastructure while maintaining prudent budget balance.

description.zh: 以步兵为主体，包含炮兵与工兵部队。
description.en: Infantry-based with artillery and engineering units.

description.zh: 驻守安特卫普等关键要塞。
description.en: Garrisoned key fortifications such as Antwerp.

description.zh: 维持国内秩序的准军事力量。
description.en: A paramilitary force for maintaining internal order.

technology.zh: 采用欧洲标准滑膛枪与火炮技术，安特卫普堡垒体系为欧洲一流。
technology.en: Employed European-standard smoothbore muskets and artillery; the Antwerp fortress system was among Europe's finest.

threats.zh: 作为欧洲列强之间的缓冲国，比利时面临法国与荷兰的潜在威胁，其中立地位依赖大国条约保障。
threats.en: As a buffer state among European great powers, Belgium faced potential threats from France and the Netherlands; its neutrality depended on great-power treaty guarantees.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 克虏伯式后装线膛钢炮
description.en: Krupp-style breech-loading rifled steel cannon

description.zh: 蒸汽动力铁甲战船，木帆船终结者
description.en: Steam-powered ironclad warship, rendering wooden ships obsolete

populationDescription.zh: 人口约430万，北部佛拉芒区以农业为主，南部瓦隆区工业化程度高。城市化水平在欧洲大陆名列前茅。
populationDescription.en: Population about 4.3 million; the northern Flemish region was mainly agricultural while the southern Walloon region was highly industrialized. Urbanization was among the highest on the European continent.

description.zh: 16世纪欧洲最大港口与金融中心
description.en: 16th-century Europe's largest port and financial center

socialClasses.zh: 贵族、天主教教士、法语资产阶级、佛拉芒农民、瓦隆矿工与纺织工人
socialClasses.en: Nobility, Catholic clergy, Francophone bourgeoisie, Flemish peasants, Walloon miners and textile workers

allies.zh: 英国是比利时独立的主要担保国；与法国关系密切但警惕其扩张。
allies.en: Britain was the principal guarantor of Belgian independence; relations with France were close but guarded against expansion.

enemies.zh: 荷兰曾为宗主国，1839年方承认比利时独立；总体无正式战争敌国。
enemies.en: The Netherlands was the former sovereign, only recognizing Belgian independence in 1839; overall Belgium had no formal wartime enemies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 比利时奉行宪法规定的永久中立政策，获1839年伦敦条约列强保障，专注贸易与殖民探索。
foreignPolicy.en: Belgium pursued constitutionally mandated permanent neutrality, guaranteed by the 1839 Treaty of London, focusing on trade and colonial exploration.

era.zh: 欧洲大陆工业革命前沿

keyInnovations.zh: 蒸汽机驱动的煤矿与冶铁、国有铁路网建设（欧洲大陆最早）、机械纺织、运河改良与蒸汽航运。
keyInnovations.en: Steam-powered coal mining and iron smelting, state railway network construction (earliest on the continent), mechanized textiles, canal improvements, and steam shipping.

strengths.zh: 工业化程度高、宪政体制稳定、地理位置优越连接西欧贸易网络、国际中立地位受条约保护。
strengths.en: Highly industrialized, stable constitutional system, advantageous geographic position connecting Western European trade networks, and internationally guaranteed neutrality.

weaknesses.zh: 国家年轻缺乏战略纵深、语言与地区分裂、军事力量有限依赖外部保障。
weaknesses.en: A young nation lacking strategic depth, linguistic and regional divisions, limited military power depending on external guarantees.

outlook.zh: 比利时在工业化与宪政基础上有望持续繁荣，但其安全高度依赖大国均势的维持。
outlook.en: Belgium was poised for continued prosperity on the basis of industrialization and constitutionalism, but its security depended heavily on the maintenance of great-power equilibrium.

description.zh: 1840年的比利时是欧洲大陆工业化先驱，立宪十年即展现出蓬勃发展势头，以煤铁纺织业和铁路建设领先。
description.en: In 1840 Belgium was a continental European industrial pioneer, showing vigorous growth just a decade after its constitution, leading in coal, iron, textiles, and railway construction.

capital.zh: 海牙（政府所在地）/ 阿姆斯特丹（宪法首都）
capital.en: The Hague (seat of government) / Amsterdam (constitutional capital)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪制，国王仍握有较大行政权力，但议会权力日益增长。
governmentForm.en: A parliamentary constitutional monarchy where the king still held considerable executive power, but parliamentary authority was growing.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族、摄政家族传统精英、商业资产阶级、新教与天主教教士、城市手工业者和农村农民构成。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised nobles, traditional regent-family elites, the commercial bourgeoisie, Protestant and Catholic clergy, urban artisans, and rural peasants.

rulingClass.zh: 国王与宫廷、摄政家族精英、商业寡头与高级官僚
rulingClass.en: The king and court, regent-family elites, commercial oligarchs, and senior bureaucrats

succession.zh: 王位在奥兰治-拿骚王朝中世袭继承
succession.en: The throne was inherited within the House of Orange-Nassau

structure.zh: 荷兰实行两院制议会（国会），一院由省议会选出，二院由有限选举权产生。国王通过任命内阁行使行政权。
structure.en: The Netherlands operated a bicameral parliament (States-General), with the First Chamber elected by provincial assemblies and the Second Chamber by limited suffrage. The king exercised executive power through an appointed cabinet.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、公共秩序与地方治理
function.en: Responsible for domestic administration, public order, and local governance

function.zh: 管理荷属东印度等海外殖民地事务
function.en: Administered overseas colonial affairs including the Dutch East Indies

function.zh: 管理税收、关税、国库与公共债务
function.en: Managed taxes, customs, the treasury, and public debt

function.zh: 负责外交关系、条约与国际事务
function.en: Handled diplomatic relations, treaties, and international affairs

localAdmin.zh: 全国分省治理，省下设市镇，地方自治传统深厚。
localAdmin.en: The country was governed by provinces, further divided into municipalities, with a deep tradition of local self-governance.

legalSystem.zh: 以拿破仑法典改编的荷兰民法典为基础，辅以本国立法。
legalSystem.en: Based on a Dutch civil code adapted from the Napoleonic Code, supplemented by domestic legislation.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自关税、消费税、土地税与殖民地利润上缴。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from customs, excises, land taxes, and colonial profit remittances.

religion.zh: 新教（归正宗）为传统主导，天主教在南部省份有广泛信众，宗教自由受法律保障
religion.en: Protestantism (Reformed) was the traditional majority; Catholicism had wide following in southern provinces; religious freedom was legally protected

culturalAchievements.zh: 荷兰以黄金时代绘画遗产、学术传统、水利工程与全球贸易网络著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Netherlands was renowned for its Golden Age painting heritage, scholarly tradition, hydraulic engineering, and global trade networks.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语支（荷兰语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (Dutch)

philosophy.zh: 加尔文主义伦理与商业实用主义传统并存，推崇宗教宽容与自由贸易。
philosophy.en: Calvinist ethics coexisted with commercial pragmatism, valuing religious tolerance and free trade.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 荷兰经济以国际贸易、航运、金融、农业与殖民地剥削为支柱。荷属东印度的种植制度带来巨额殖民利润。
gdpDescription.en: The Dutch economy rested on international trade, shipping, finance, agriculture, and colonial exploitation. The Cultivation System in the Dutch East Indies generated enormous colonial profits.

mainIndustries.zh: 国际贸易与航运、金融银行、农业（乳品与园艺）、殖民地种植业管理、造船、风车驱动工业
mainIndustries.en: International trade and shipping, banking and finance, agriculture (dairy and horticulture), colonial plantation management, shipbuilding, windmill-powered industry

tradeGoods.zh: 殖民地产品（咖啡、糖、香料、靛蓝）、乳制品、鲱鱼、纺织品、金融服务
tradeGoods.en: Colonial products (coffee, sugar, spices, indigo), dairy, herring, textiles, financial services

householdWealth.zh: 商业精英与摄政家族积累了大量贸易与金融资产；城市工人和农村劳工生活水平中等。
householdWealth.en: Commercial elites and regent families accumulated substantial trade and financial assets; urban workers and rural laborers had moderate living standards.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以自由贸易为导向的商业资本主义，殖民地种植制度为国库提供重要收入。
economicSystem.en: A free-trade-oriented commercial capitalism, with the colonial Cultivation System providing critical treasury income.

treasuryDescription.zh: 因比利时分离造成的战争债务负担沉重，但殖民地利润为国库提供了重要缓冲。
treasuryDescription.en: The war debt burden from Belgian separation was heavy, but colonial profits provided an important buffer for the treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 重视债务偿还与殖民地收入管理，同时投资水利与航运基础设施。
fiscalPolicy.en: Emphasis on debt repayment and colonial revenue management, while investing in hydraulic and shipping infrastructure.

description.zh: 驻守本土的步兵、炮兵与骑兵部队。
description.en: Infantry, artillery, and cavalry units stationed in the homeland.

description.zh: 保护贸易航线与殖民地海上通道。
description.en: Protected trade routes and colonial sea lanes.

description.zh: 驻荷属东印度的荷兰与本地部队。
description.en: Dutch and local troops stationed in the Dutch East Indies.

technology.zh: 采用欧洲标准火器与舰炮技术，海军传统深厚但规模已不复黄金时代。
technology.en: Employed European-standard firearms and naval ordnance; naval tradition was deep but the fleet no longer matched Golden Age scale.

threats.zh: 主要安全关切为法国与普鲁士方向的大陆威胁，以及荷属东印度的殖民地控制维系。
threats.en: Main security concerns were continental threats from France and Prussia, and maintaining colonial control in the Dutch East Indies.

description.zh: 职业化训练，拥有成熟的操典
description.en: Professional training with established manuals

description.zh: 士气一般，作战意志不稳定
description.en: Mediocre morale, inconsistent fighting will

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 克虏伯式后装线膛钢炮
description.en: Krupp-style breech-loading rifled steel cannon

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 本土人口约300万，城市化程度较高。阿姆斯特丹为最大城市和金融中心。
populationDescription.en: Homeland population about 3 million with relatively high urbanization. Amsterdam was the largest city and financial center.

description.zh: 荷兰黄金时代商业中心
description.en: Commercial center of the Dutch Golden Age

socialClasses.zh: 贵族与摄政家族、商业资产阶级、新教与天主教教士、城市工匠、农民与渔民
socialClasses.en: Nobility and regent families, commercial bourgeoisie, Protestant and Catholic clergy, urban artisans, peasants, and fishermen

allies.zh: 与英国保持密切关系；在欧洲体系中寻求大国平衡。
allies.en: Maintained close relations with Britain; sought great-power balance within the European system.

enemies.zh: 1839年被迫承认比利时独立后无正式敌国，但对法国保持警惕。
enemies.en: After being forced to recognize Belgian independence in 1839, had no formal enemies but remained wary of France.

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行谨慎中立与自由贸易政策，重点维护殖民帝国利益与海上贸易通道。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued cautious neutrality and free-trade policy, focusing on colonial empire interests and maritime trade routes.

era.zh: 工业革命初期的商业与航运强国
era.en: Commercial and maritime power in the early Industrial Revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 水利工程（围海造田、排水）、造船与航海技术、风车工业技术、早期铁路与蒸汽航运探索。
keyInnovations.en: Hydraulic engineering (land reclamation, drainage), shipbuilding and navigation, windmill industrial technology, early railway and steam shipping exploration.

strengths.zh: 全球贸易网络与殖民帝国、金融传统深厚、水利工程技术领先、社会相对稳定。
strengths.en: Global trade networks and colonial empire, deep financial tradition, leading hydraulic engineering, and relatively stable society.

weaknesses.zh: 丧失比利时后国力缩减、债务沉重、军事力量有限、过度依赖殖民地收入。
weaknesses.en: Diminished power after losing Belgium, heavy debt burden, limited military strength, excessive dependence on colonial revenue.

outlook.zh: 荷兰凭借殖民地利润和贸易传统可维持中等强国地位，但需适应新的工业化竞争格局。
outlook.en: The Netherlands could maintain a middle-power position through colonial profits and trade tradition, but needed to adapt to the new industrializing competitive landscape.

description.zh: 1840年的荷兰是一个失去比利时后正在调整的商业与殖民强国，依靠荷属东印度殖民利润与全球贸易网络维持繁荣。
description.en: In 1840 the Netherlands was a commercial and colonial power adjusting after losing Belgium, sustaining prosperity through Dutch East Indies colonial profits and global trade networks.

ruler.en: Rotating president of the Federal Diet

dynasty.zh: 无世袭王朝（共和联邦体制）

capital.zh: 无固定首都（议会在各州轮流召开）
capital.en: No fixed capital (the Diet met in rotation among cantons)

governmentForm.zh: 松散的州际邦联，各州（Kanton）保有高度自治权，联邦议会为各州代表协商机构。
governmentForm.en: A loose interstate confederation in which each canton retained extensive autonomy, with the Federal Diet serving as a consultative assembly of cantonal delegates.

socialStructure.zh: 各州社会结构各异：城市州由寡头商业家族主导，农村州以农民共同体为基础，天主教与新教州文化差异明显。
socialStructure.en: Social structures varied by canton: urban cantons were dominated by oligarchic merchant families, rural cantons were based on peasant communities, and Catholic and Protestant cantons differed culturally.

rulingClass.zh: 各州统治寡头或地方精英，城市州的贵族与商人家族、农村州的乡绅与教士
rulingClass.en: Cantonal ruling oligarchies or local elites: noble and merchant families in urban cantons, rural gentry and clergy in agrarian cantons

succession.zh: 联邦无世袭统治者；各州依其宪制自行选举或轮选行政长官
succession.en: The confederation had no hereditary ruler; each canton elected or rotated executive magistrates according to its own constitution

structure.zh: 联邦议会（Tagsatzung）由各州派遣代表组成，处理外交、军事与州际纠纷；各州内部政体多样，从寡头共和到直接民主。
structure.en: The Federal Diet (Tagsatzung) comprised delegates from each canton, handling foreign affairs, military matters, and inter-cantonal disputes; internal cantonal polities varied from oligarchic republics to direct democracies.

function.zh: 协调各州外交、防务与州际争端
function.en: Coordinated inter-cantonal foreign policy, defense, and disputes

function.zh: 各州自行管理内政、司法、财税与教育
function.en: Each canton independently managed internal affairs, justice, taxation, and education

function.zh: 协调各州民兵的联合训练与紧急动员
function.en: Coordinated joint militia training and emergency mobilization across cantons

localAdmin.zh: 各州（22个全州与半州）自行组织地方治理，市镇与教区构成基层单元。
localAdmin.en: Each canton (22 full and half-cantons) organized its own local governance, with municipalities and parishes as basic units.

legalSystem.zh: 各州拥有独立法律体系，部分州采用罗马法传统，部分沿用习惯法。联邦层面缺乏统一法典。
