legalSystem.en: Each canton maintained an independent legal system, some following Roman law traditions, others customary law. There was no unified federal code.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦无直接征税权；各州自行征收关税、消费税与土地税，联邦费用由各州按比例分摊。
taxationSystem.en: The federation had no direct taxing power; each canton levied its own customs, excises, and land taxes, with federal costs apportioned among cantons.

religion.zh: 新教（归正宗）与天主教并存，宗教分界在各州间形成明显文化裂痕
religion.en: Protestantism (Reformed) and Catholicism coexisted, with confessional lines creating distinct cultural cleavages among cantons

culturalAchievements.zh: 瑞士以钟表制造、大学教育（巴塞尔、苏黎世）、阿尔卑斯山水画与文学传统著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Switzerland was known for watchmaking, university education (Basel, Zurich), Alpine landscape painting, and literary tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系：德语、法语、意大利语与罗曼什语并存
languageFamily.en: Indo-European: German, French, Italian, and Romansh coexisted

philosophy.zh: 启蒙自由主义与新教伦理并存，直接民主传统在部分州根深蒂固。
philosophy.en: Enlightenment liberalism coexisted with Protestant ethics; direct democratic traditions were deeply rooted in some cantons.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 瑞士经济以精密手工业（钟表）、纺织、畜牧与过境贸易为特色。银行业开始发展。
gdpDescription.en: The Swiss economy featured precision crafts (watchmaking), textiles, animal husbandry, and transit trade. Banking was beginning to develop.

mainIndustries.zh: 钟表制造、纺织（棉花与丝绸）、奶酪与乳品、过境贸易、早期银行业
mainIndustries.en: Watchmaking, textiles (cotton and silk), cheese and dairy, transit trade, early banking

tradeGoods.zh: 钟表、纺织品、奶酪、丝绸、木材
tradeGoods.en: Watches, textiles, cheese, silk, timber

name.zh: 各州货币（尚无统一联邦货币）
name.en: Various cantonal currencies (no unified federal currency yet)

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人与钟表匠较为富裕，农村山区农民生活简朴但自给。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants and watchmakers were relatively prosperous; rural mountain peasants lived simply but self-sufficiently.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 分散的自由市场经济体系，各州各自制定贸易规则，内部关税壁垒尚存。
economicSystem.en: A decentralized free-market economy with each canton setting its own trade rules; internal customs barriers still existed.

unit.zh: 百万银元等值/年（联邦层面）
unit.en: million silver-dollar equivalent per year (federal level)

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦层面储备有限，各州分别持有自己的财政储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Federal-level reserves were limited; each canton held its own fiscal reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 联邦层面财政极为节约，主要支出由各州自行承担。
fiscalPolicy.en: Federal fiscal policy was extremely frugal, with major expenditures borne by individual cantons.

description.zh: 基于义务兵役的州属民兵，战时可动员。
description.en: Canton-based militias on compulsory service, mobilizable in wartime.

description.zh: 少量联邦直属常备力量。
description.en: A small federal standing force.

commanderInChief.zh: 联邦议会任命之总司令（战时）
commanderInChief.en: Commander-in-chief appointed by the Federal Diet (wartime)

technology.zh: 采用欧洲标准滑膛枪与火炮，民兵训练水平参差不齐但山地作战传统深厚。
technology.en: Employed European-standard smoothbore muskets and artillery; militia training varied but mountain warfare tradition was deep.

threats.zh: 瑞士受维也纳体系保障的中立地位护佑，但内部天主教与自由派的宗教政治对立正在加剧（将导致1847年独立同盟战争）。
threats.en: Switzerland was protected by Vienna Congress-guaranteed neutrality, but internal Catholic-liberal religious-political tensions were escalating (leading to the 1847 Sonderbund War).

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 克虏伯式后装线膛钢炮
description.en: Krupp-style breech-loading rifled steel cannon

description.zh: 手摇式多管机枪，火力压制利器
description.en: Hand-cranked multi-barrel machine gun for fire suppression

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约240万，分散于阿尔卑斯山区、高原城镇与湖畔农村。语言与宗教多样性显著。
populationDescription.en: Population about 2.4 million, dispersed across Alpine valleys, plateau towns, and lakeside rural areas. Linguistic and religious diversity was notable.

socialClasses.zh: 城市寡头与商人家族、钟表匠与手工业者、新教与天主教教士、自耕农与牧民
socialClasses.en: Urban oligarchs and merchant families, watchmakers and artisans, Protestant and Catholic clergy, independent farmers and herdsmen

allies.zh: 瑞士中立得到维也纳会议列强保障，与周边国家保持贸易关系。
allies.en: Swiss neutrality was guaranteed by the Vienna Congress powers; trade relations were maintained with neighboring states.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但内部天主教保守派与自由派矛盾日益尖锐。
enemies.en: No formal external enemies, but internal Catholic-conservative versus liberal tensions were increasingly sharp.

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行武装中立政策，避免卷入欧洲大国纷争，专注维护邦联内部稳定。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued armed neutrality, avoided involvement in European great-power conflicts, and focused on maintaining internal confederal stability.

era.zh: 早期工业化时代的精密手工业中心
era.en: Precision handicraft center in the early industrial era

keyInnovations.zh: 精密钟表机械、纺织机械改进、阿尔卑斯山道路与隧道工程、早期水力发电探索。
keyInnovations.en: Precision clockwork mechanics, textile machinery improvements, Alpine road and tunnel engineering, early hydropower exploration.

strengths.zh: 中立地位受国际保障、精密制造传统、多语言文化多样性、山地防御优势。
strengths.en: Internationally guaranteed neutrality, precision manufacturing tradition, multilingual cultural diversity, mountain defense advantages.

weaknesses.zh: 邦联结构松散导致协调困难、内部宗教政治分裂、缺乏统一货币与关税、工业化起步较慢。
weaknesses.en: Loose confederal structure caused coordination difficulties, internal religious-political divisions, lack of unified currency and customs, and slower industrialization start.

outlook.zh: 瑞士内部矛盾有可能在近期引发冲突，但长远来看其中立传统和多元文化为稳定发展奠定了基础。
outlook.en: Internal tensions could trigger conflict in the near term, but in the longer run Switzerland's neutrality tradition and multicultural foundation laid the groundwork for stable development.

description.zh: 1840年的瑞士是一个松散的中立邦联，内部宗教政治张力正在积聚，但精密制造和阿尔卑斯山地传统赋予其独特韧性。
description.en: In 1840 Switzerland was a loose neutral confederation where internal religious-political tensions were building, but precision manufacturing and Alpine traditions gave it distinctive resilience.

governmentForm.zh: 1832年建立的君主制，巴伐利亚出身的国王奥托实行威权统治，摄政团已解散但宪法尚未制定。
governmentForm.en: A monarchy established in 1832 with the Bavarian-born King Otto ruling in an authoritarian manner; the regency council had been dissolved but no constitution yet existed.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由地方望族（科扎巴希）、教士、商人阶层、农民和前军阀领袖构成。独立战争的军事英雄仍有影响力。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised local notables (kotzabasides), clergy, a merchant class, peasants, and former warlord leaders. Heroes of the independence war still wielded influence.

rulingClass.zh: 国王与巴伐利亚顾问团、希腊望族与前独立战争领袖
rulingClass.en: The king and Bavarian advisers, Greek notables, and former independence war leaders

succession.zh: 王位在维特尔斯巴赫家族中世袭继承
succession.en: The throne was inherited within the House of Wittelsbach

structure.zh: 国王直接统治，无宪法约束的议会。巴伐利亚式官僚体系与本地望族权力并存。地方行政依赖省长与市镇长。
structure.en: The king ruled directly without a constitutionally mandated parliament. A Bavarian-style bureaucracy coexisted with local notable power. Provincial governors and town mayors administered locally.

function.zh: 管理地方行政、警务与公共工程
function.en: Managed local administration, policing, and public works

function.zh: 管理税收、关税与国库
function.en: Managed taxation, customs, and the treasury

function.zh: 管理陆军与海军事务
function.en: Administered army and naval affairs

localAdmin.zh: 全国分省（νομός）治理，省下设市镇。地方望族在基层仍有极大影响力。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces (nomoi), further into municipalities. Local notables retained great influence at the grassroots level.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以拿破仑法典改编的希腊民法典为基础，辅以拜占庭法律传统。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on a Greek civil code adapted from the Napoleonic Code, supplemented by Byzantine legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自土地税、关税、盐税和消费税，但征收效率低下。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from land taxes, customs, salt taxes, and excises, but collection was inefficient.

religion.zh: 希腊正教为国教
religion.en: Greek Orthodoxy was the state religion

culturalAchievements.zh: 希腊以古典遗产复兴、现代希腊语文学萌发与雅典城市重建为文化焦点。
culturalAchievements.en: Greece's cultural focus was on the revival of classical heritage, the emergence of Modern Greek literature, and the rebuilding of Athens.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系希腊语支（现代希腊语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Hellenic branch (Modern Greek)

philosophy.zh: 古典希腊哲学遗产与近代民族主义思想结合，追求恢复古希腊荣光的'大理想'（Megali Idea）。
philosophy.en: Classical Greek philosophical heritage combined with modern nationalist thought, pursuing the Megali Idea of restoring ancient Greek glory.

writingSystem.zh: 希腊字母
writingSystem.en: Greek alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 希腊经济以小规模农业、畜牧和海上贸易为主，工业化程度极低。独立战争的破坏尚未完全恢复。
gdpDescription.en: The Greek economy was based on small-scale agriculture, livestock, and maritime trade, with very low industrialization. Destruction from the independence war had not fully recovered.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（橄榄、葡萄）、畜牧、海运与航运、小规模手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (olives, grapes), livestock, maritime shipping, small-scale handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 橄榄油、葡萄干、海绵、毛皮、航运服务
tradeGoods.en: Olive oil, currants, sponges, hides, shipping services

householdWealth.zh: 大多数农民贫困，商人阶层和航运家族较为富裕。
householdWealth.en: Most peasants were poor; the merchant class and shipping families were comparatively wealthy.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以小农经济和商业航运为基础的前工业化经济。
economicSystem.en: A pre-industrial economy based on smallholder agriculture and commercial shipping.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库空虚，高度依赖英法俄三国保护国贷款。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was depleted, heavily dependent on loans from the three protecting powers: Britain, France, and Russia.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政困难迫使政府依赖外债，税收能力不足。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal difficulties forced reliance on foreign debt, with inadequate tax-collection capacity.

description.zh: 以步兵为主的小型陆军。
description.en: A small infantry-based army.

description.zh: 小型海军，继承独立战争时期的航海传统。
description.en: A small navy inheriting independence-war maritime traditions.

description.zh: 维持国内秩序的准军事力量。
description.en: A paramilitary force maintaining internal order.

technology.zh: 装备参差不齐，部分使用巴伐利亚援助的现代火器，部分仍用独立战争时期武器。
technology.en: Equipment was uneven: some modern Bavarian-supplied firearms alongside independence-war-era weapons.

threats.zh: 奥斯曼帝国仍控制大量希腊人居住区域，希腊边境安全不稳定，海盗也是问题。
threats.en: The Ottoman Empire still controlled areas with large Greek populations; border security was unstable and piracy remained a problem.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约90万，主要分布在伯罗奔尼撒半岛、阿提卡和爱琴海岛屿。
populationDescription.en: Population about 900,000, mainly in the Peloponnese, Attica, and Aegean islands.

description.zh: 西方文明与民主的发源地
description.en: Birthplace of Western civilization and democracy

socialClasses.zh: 地方望族、教士、商人与航运家族、农民与牧民、前独立战争军人
socialClasses.en: Local notables, clergy, merchants and shipping families, peasants and herdsmen, former independence war soldiers

allies.zh: 英、法、俄三国为保护国，保障希腊独立。
allies.en: Britain, France, and Russia were the three protecting powers guaranteeing Greek independence.

enemies.zh: 奥斯曼帝国为宿敌，希腊民族主义追求统一所有希腊人居住区。
enemies.en: The Ottoman Empire was the historic enemy; Greek nationalism aspired to unify all Greek-inhabited territories.

foreignPolicy.zh: 依赖大国保护，追求领土扩张（大理想），同时试图平衡英法俄三方影响。
foreignPolicy.en: Relied on great-power protection, pursued territorial expansion (Megali Idea), while trying to balance British, French, and Russian influence.

era.zh: 后独立时期的早期国家建设阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 雅典城市重建、港口设施改善、现代学校与大学建设、初步的道路修建。
keyInnovations.en: Athens urban reconstruction, port improvements, modern school and university construction, initial road building.

strengths.zh: 三国保护提供安全保障、深厚的航海传统、古典遗产赋予国际文化影响力。
strengths.en: Three-power protection provided security; deep maritime tradition; classical heritage conferred international cultural influence.

weaknesses.zh: 经济落后、国库空虚、政治不稳定、领土狭小、缺乏工业基础。
weaknesses.en: Economic backwardness, empty treasury, political instability, small territory, and lack of industrial base.

outlook.zh: 希腊在大国保护下可维持独立，但经济现代化和领土扩张仍是长期挑战。
outlook.en: Greece could maintain independence under great-power protection, but economic modernization and territorial expansion remained long-term challenges.

description.zh: 1840年的希腊是一个独立不足十年的年轻王国，在三大国保护下艰难重建，追求恢复古希腊荣光的民族理想。
description.en: In 1840 Greece was a young kingdom independent less than a decade, rebuilding under three-power protection and pursuing the national ideal of restoring ancient Greek glory.

ruler.zh: 米哈伊洛·奥布雷诺维奇

governmentForm.zh: 名义上为奥斯曼帝国宗主权下的自治公国，实际由亲王和民族精英自治，1838年宪法（土耳其宪法）规定了国务院与亲王分权。
governmentForm.en: Nominally an autonomous principality under Ottoman suzerainty, in practice self-governed by the prince and national elites; the 1838 Constitution (Turkish Constitution) established a power-sharing arrangement between the State Council and the prince.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以自由农民为主体，地方酋长与商人阶层正在形成，奥斯曼旧地主已被驱逐。
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly free peasant-based; a local chieftain and merchant class was forming, and Ottoman-era landlords had been expelled.

rulingClass.zh: 亲王与奥布雷诺维奇派系、国务院成员与地方有力者
rulingClass.en: The prince and Obrenović faction, State Council members, and local strongmen

succession.zh: 王位在奥布雷诺维奇与卡拉乔尔杰维奇两大家族间竞争，受俄国与奥斯曼影响。
succession.en: The throne was contested between the Obrenović and Karađorđević families, influenced by Russia and the Ottoman Empire.

structure.zh: 政体以亲王为行政首长，1838年宪法设立国务院分享权力。地方分县治理，由亲王任命的县长管理。
structure.en: The prince served as chief executive; the 1838 Constitution established a State Council sharing power. Local districts were administered by prince-appointed county chiefs.

function.zh: 最高政务会议机构，分享立法与行政权
function.en: Supreme policy council sharing legislative and executive power

function.zh: 管理地方行政与公共秩序
function.en: Managed local administration and public order

function.zh: 管理税收与国库
function.en: Managed taxation and the treasury

localAdmin.zh: 全国分若干县（nahija），由县长负责行政、司法与治安。村庄层面有村长与长老议事。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into districts (nahije), with district chiefs handling administration, justice, and policing. Villages had headmen and elder councils.

legalSystem.zh: 以习惯法与1838年宪法为基础，逐步引入现代成文法典。
legalSystem.en: Based on customary law and the 1838 Constitution, with modern codified law gradually being introduced.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入来自人头税、牲畜税、贸易税与关税。奥斯曼宗主权下仍需缴纳贡金。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from head taxes, livestock taxes, trade taxes, and customs. Under Ottoman suzerainty, tribute payments were still required.

religion.zh: 塞尔维亚正教为主导信仰
religion.en: Serbian Orthodoxy was the dominant faith

culturalAchievements.zh: 塞尔维亚民族复兴运动兴起，武克·卡拉季奇推动塞语文字改革，口传史诗与民歌传统丰富。
culturalAchievements.en: The Serbian national revival was underway; Vuk Karadžić promoted Serbian language reform, and oral epic and folk song traditions were rich.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系南斯拉夫语支（塞尔维亚语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, South Slavic branch (Serbian)

philosophy.zh: 塞尔维亚民族主义与东正教传统结合，追求从奥斯曼统治下完全解放所有塞族人。
philosophy.en: Serbian nationalism combined with Orthodox tradition, pursuing full liberation of all Serbs from Ottoman rule.

writingSystem.zh: 西里尔字母
writingSystem.en: Cyrillic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 典型的巴尔干农业经济，以生猪畜牧和谷物种植为主，工业和城市发展水平极低。
gdpDescription.en: A typical Balkan agrarian economy based on pig husbandry and grain cultivation, with very low industrial and urban development.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧（猪、牛）、谷物种植、林业、小规模手工业
mainIndustries.en: Livestock (pigs, cattle), grain cultivation, forestry, small-scale handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 生猪、谷物、木材、皮革、蜡
tradeGoods.en: Pigs, grain, timber, leather, wax

name.zh: 奥斯曼与奥地利货币并用
name.en: Ottoman and Austrian currencies used in parallel

householdWealth.zh: 自由农民家庭以土地和牲畜为主要财产，商人阶层财富有限。
householdWealth.en: Free peasant households held land and livestock as primary assets; merchant-class wealth was limited.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以自给自足小农经济为主，畜牧贸易为主要对外经济活动。
economicSystem.en: Predominantly subsistence smallholder agriculture, with livestock trade as the main external economic activity.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模很小，以实物和少量硬币为主。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was very small, consisting mainly of goods in kind and a small amount of coin.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策保守，以满足基本行政与军事开支为主。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative, focused on meeting basic administrative and military expenditure.

description.zh: 小型步兵常备力量。
description.en: A small standing infantry force.

description.zh: 可动员的农民民兵。
description.en: Mobilizable peasant militia.

technology.zh: 装备以轻型火器和刀剑为主，训练水平有限但游击战传统深厚。
technology.en: Armed mainly with light firearms and blades; training was limited but guerrilla warfare tradition was deep.

threats.zh: 奥斯曼帝国仍是宗主国，保加利亚和波斯尼亚的塞族人仍在奥斯曼统治下。
threats.en: The Ottoman Empire remained suzerain; Serbs in Bulgaria and Bosnia were still under Ottoman rule.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约90万，以塞尔维亚农民为主体，城市人口极少。
populationDescription.en: Population about 900,000, predominantly Serbian peasants with very small urban population.

socialClasses.zh: 亲王与政治精英、商人、教士、自由农民
socialClasses.en: Prince and political elite, merchants, clergy, free peasants

allies.zh: 俄国为主要保护者，同时与奥地利保持复杂关系。
allies.en: Russia was the principal protector; relations with Austria were complex.

enemies.zh: 奥斯曼帝国为宗主国和潜在威胁。
enemies.en: The Ottoman Empire was suzerain and potential threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在奥斯曼宗主权框架内争取最大自治，依赖俄国外交支持，同时发展与其他巴尔干民族的联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Sought maximum autonomy within Ottoman suzerainty, relying on Russian diplomatic support while developing ties with other Balkan peoples.

era.zh: 早期民族国家建设时期

keyInnovations.zh: 初步的道路建设、学校体系建立、语言文字改革与报刊出版。
keyInnovations.en: Initial road construction, school system establishment, language and script reform, and newspaper publishing.

strengths.zh: 民族凝聚力强、俄国外交支持、自由农民社会基础稳固。
strengths.en: Strong national cohesion, Russian diplomatic support, and a solid free-peasant social base.

weaknesses.zh: 经济落后、工业化缺失、奥斯曼宗主权制约、政治制度不成熟。
weaknesses.en: Economic backwardness, absence of industry, Ottoman suzerainty constraints, and immature political institutions.

outlook.zh: 塞尔维亚正在缓慢建设现代国家机构，最终独立的前景可期但面临诸多障碍。
outlook.en: Serbia was slowly building modern state institutions; full independence was a prospect but faced numerous obstacles.

description.zh: 1840年的塞尔维亚是奥斯曼帝国宗主权下的自治公国，正在艰难推进国家建设与民族复兴。
description.en: In 1840 Serbia was an autonomous principality under Ottoman suzerainty, laboriously advancing state-building and national revival.

ruler.zh: 托马斯·布坎南（殖民总督）

governmentForm.zh: 美国殖民协会资助下的自治殖民地，由非裔美国人定居者治理。
governmentForm.en: A self-governing colony under American Colonization Society sponsorship, governed by African-American settlers.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由非裔美国人定居者精英和原住民部族群体构成，两者之间存在明显社会隔阂。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised an African-American settler elite and indigenous tribal communities, with a sharp social divide between them.

rulingClass.zh: 非裔美国定居者精英与殖民协会代表
rulingClass.en: African-American settler elite and Colonization Society representatives

succession.zh: 总督由美国殖民协会任命
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the American Colonization Society

structure.zh: 殖民总督主持行政，定居者社区拥有一定自治权。尚未建立完整国家机构。
structure.en: The colonial governor presided over administration; settler communities had some self-governance. Full state institutions had not yet been established.

function.zh: 总督办公室，处理殖民地行政事务
function.en: Governor's office handling colonial administration

function.zh: 管理港口贸易与关税征收
function.en: Managed port trade and customs collection

function.zh: 组织定居者防务
function.en: Organized settler defense

localAdmin.zh: 定居者社区设有市镇组织，原住民地区依赖部族酋长自治。
localAdmin.en: Settler communities had township organizations; indigenous areas relied on tribal chief self-governance.

legalSystem.zh: 以美国普通法传统为基础的殖民法律体系。
legalSystem.en: A colonial legal system based on American common-law traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自港口关税与贸易税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from port customs and trade taxes.

religion.zh: 基督教新教为定居者主导信仰，原住民保持传统信仰
religion.en: Protestant Christianity was the settlers' dominant faith; indigenous peoples maintained traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 利比里亚是非洲最早的现代殖民定居点之一，定居者带来了美国式教育与教会组织。
culturalAchievements.en: Liberia was one of the earliest modern colonial settlements in Africa; settlers brought American-style education and church organization.

languageFamily.zh: 英语（定居者）、尼日尔-刚果语系（原住民）
languageFamily.en: English (settlers), Niger-Congo family (indigenous peoples)

philosophy.zh: 定居者以基督教文明使命和自由黑人自治理想为精神支柱。
philosophy.en: Settlers were guided by a Christian civilizing mission and the ideal of free Black self-governance.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济规模极小，以港口转口贸易和小规模农业为主。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was extremely small, based on port entrepôt trade and small-scale agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 转口贸易、小规模农业、木材采伐
mainIndustries.en: Entrepôt trade, small-scale agriculture, timber harvesting

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈油、木材、象牙、咖啡、糖
tradeGoods.en: Palm oil, timber, ivory, coffee, sugar

name.en: US dollars and barter used in parallel

householdWealth.zh: 定居者家庭拥有美式住宅与少量资产；原住民以传统方式生活。
householdWealth.en: Settler households had American-style homes and modest assets; indigenous people lived traditionally.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民地商业经济与原住民自给经济并存。
economicSystem.en: Colonial commercial economy coexisted with indigenous subsistence economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政极度依赖美国殖民协会资助。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances were extremely dependent on American Colonization Society funding.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持基本殖民地运作为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Aimed at maintaining basic colonial operations.

description.zh: 定居者组成的防御力量。
description.en: A defensive force of settlers.

technology.zh: 少量美式火器，依赖美国殖民协会供应。
technology.en: A few American firearms, dependent on ACS supply.

threats.zh: 与内陆原住民部族的冲突以及疾病威胁。
threats.en: Conflicts with inland indigenous tribes and disease threats.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 约3万人（定居者约3000-5000人，其余为沿海原住民）。
populationDescription.en: About 30,000 (settlers roughly 3,000-5,000, the rest coastal indigenous peoples).

socialClasses.zh: 定居者精英、定居者平民、原住民酋长与民众
socialClasses.en: Settler elite, settler commoners, indigenous chiefs and populace

allies.zh: 美国殖民协会与美国政府提供非正式支持。
allies.en: The American Colonization Society and US government provided informal support.

enemies.zh: 与部分内陆部族存在冲突。
enemies.en: Conflict with some inland tribes.

foreignPolicy.zh: 争取国际承认，同时扩大定居地范围。
foreignPolicy.en: Sought international recognition while expanding settlement areas.

era.zh: 早期殖民定居阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 美式学校、教会组织与基本港口设施。
keyInnovations.en: American-style schools, church organizations, and basic port facilities.

strengths.zh: 美国支持、港口贸易位置、基督教教育网络。
strengths.en: American support, port trade position, Christian education network.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少、经济脆弱、与原住民关系紧张、疾病流行。
weaknesses.en: Very small population, fragile economy, tense relations with indigenous peoples, prevalent disease.

outlook.zh: 利比里亚正在向正式独立过渡（1847年独立），但发展基础薄弱。
outlook.en: Liberia was transitioning toward formal independence (independent in 1847), but its development base was thin.

description.zh: 1840年的利比里亚是美国殖民协会资助下的西非定居殖民地，非裔美国人定居者正在艰难建设自治社区。
description.en: In 1840 Liberia was a West African settlement colony under American Colonization Society sponsorship, where African-American settlers were laboriously building a self-governing community.

governmentForm.zh: 名义上为奥斯曼附庸的世袭贝伊国，实际高度自治。贝伊推行西化改革。
governmentForm.en: A hereditary beylik, nominally an Ottoman vassal but effectively autonomous. The bey was pursuing Westernizing reforms.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林为主体，辅以土耳其军事精英、犹太商人社区与基督教外国侨民。
socialStructure.en: Arab-Berber Muslims formed the majority, with a Turkish military elite, Jewish merchant community, and Christian foreign residents.

rulingClass.zh: 贝伊与侯赛因王室、马穆鲁克军事精英与高级宗教学者
rulingClass.en: The bey and Husainid royal family, Mamluk military elite, and senior religious scholars

succession.zh: 贝伊位在侯赛因王朝内继承，通常由前任指定或宫廷协商决定。
succession.en: The beyship was inherited within the Husainid dynasty, usually by designation or court negotiation.

structure.zh: 贝伊为最高统治者，通过首相和各部大臣施政。推行现代化改革包括军事和行政西化。
structure.en: The bey was supreme ruler, governing through a prime minister and departmental ministers. Modernizing reforms included military and administrative Westernization.

function.zh: 协调各部政务
function.en: Coordinated departmental affairs

function.zh: 管理税收与国库
function.en: Managed taxation and treasury

function.zh: 管理军队现代化改革
function.en: Administered military modernization

function.zh: 管理伊斯兰法院与宗教基金
function.en: Managed Islamic courts and religious endowments

localAdmin.zh: 地方由贝伊任命的凯伊德（地方官）管理，部族领袖在内地保持影响力。
localAdmin.en: Localities were administered by bey-appointed caids; tribal leaders retained influence in the interior.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法（马利基学派）为基础，辅以贝伊法令。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic law (Maliki school), supplemented by beylical decrees.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自土地税、人头税（非穆斯林）、关税、橄榄油出口税与贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from land taxes, head taxes (non-Muslims), customs, olive oil export taxes, and tribute.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马利基学派）为主导，犹太社区有悠久历史
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school) was dominant; the Jewish community had a long history

culturalAchievements.zh: 突尼斯以宰图纳清真寺大学、阿拉伯-安达卢西亚音乐传统和精美建筑遗产著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Tunis was known for the Zaytuna Mosque university, Arab-Andalusian musical traditions, and fine architectural heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪语支（阿拉伯语突尼斯方言）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Tunisian Arabic)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰改良主义思想正在萌芽，贝伊推动学习欧洲军事和行政技术。
philosophy.en: Islamic reformist thought was emerging; the bey promoted studying European military and administrative techniques.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以农业（橄榄油、谷物）和地中海贸易为支柱的传统经济，改革增加了军事支出。
gdpDescription.en: A traditional economy based on agriculture (olive oil, grain) and Mediterranean trade; reforms increased military expenditure.

mainIndustries.zh: 橄榄油生产、谷物种植、畜牧、地中海贸易、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Olive oil production, grain cultivation, livestock, Mediterranean trade, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 橄榄油、谷物、羊毛、皮革、珊瑚、手工艺品
tradeGoods.en: Olive oil, grain, wool, leather, coral, handicrafts

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人与地主较富裕，农村农民和部族牧民生活简朴。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants and landowners were moderately wealthy; rural peasants and tribal herdsmen lived simply.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以传统农业和地中海商贸为主的经济体系，政府试图引入西方技术。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on traditional agriculture and Mediterranean commerce, with the government attempting to introduce Western technology.

treasuryDescription.zh: 改革支出导致财政紧张，开始出现外债。
treasuryDescription.en: Reform expenditures strained finances; foreign debt was beginning to appear.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 贝伊雄心勃勃的西化改革加重了财政负担。
fiscalPolicy.en: The bey's ambitious Westernization reforms increased the fiscal burden.

description.zh: 按欧洲模式训练的新式军队。
description.en: New army trained on European models.

description.zh: 传统部族武装与地方民兵。
description.en: Traditional tribal warriors and local militia.

technology.zh: 正规军配备欧式火器与火炮，传统部队仍用旧式武器。
technology.en: Regular forces equipped with European firearms and artillery; traditional forces still used older weapons.

threats.zh: 法国殖民扩张（已占领邻近的阿尔及利亚）是最大外部威胁。
threats.en: French colonial expansion (having already occupied neighboring Algeria) was the greatest external threat.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约150万，阿拉伯-柏柏尔穆斯林为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 1.5 million, predominantly Arab-Berber Muslim.

socialClasses.zh: 贝伊与王室、马穆鲁克军事精英、宗教学者、商人、农民与部族民
socialClasses.en: Bey and royal family, Mamluk military elite, religious scholars, merchants, peasants, and tribesmen

allies.zh: 名义上效忠奥斯曼帝国，与法英等国保持贸易关系。
allies.en: Nominally loyal to the Ottoman Empire; maintained trade relations with France, Britain, and others.

enemies.zh: 法国占领阿尔及利亚后成为最大潜在威胁。
enemies.en: France became the greatest potential threat after occupying Algeria.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在奥斯曼与欧洲列强之间维持平衡，推行改革以增强自卫能力。
foreignPolicy.en: Balanced between the Ottoman Empire and European powers, pursuing reforms to strengthen self-defense.

era.zh: 伊斯兰世界早期西化改革时期
era.en: Early Westernization reform period in the Islamic world

keyInnovations.zh: 欧式军事训练、现代炮兵、印刷术引入、初步的行政现代化。
keyInnovations.en: European military training, modern artillery, introduction of printing, and initial administrative modernization.

strengths.zh: 改革意愿强烈、地中海贸易位置优越、文化教育传统深厚。
strengths.en: Strong reform will, advantageous Mediterranean trade position, and deep cultural-educational traditions.

weaknesses.zh: 财政因改革而紧张、法国殖民威胁、社会改革阻力。
weaknesses.en: Finances strained by reforms, French colonial threat, and social resistance to reform.

outlook.zh: 突尼斯的改革努力值得关注，但法国殖民压力日增，财政困难可能成为致命弱点。
outlook.en: Tunisia's reform efforts were noteworthy, but growing French colonial pressure and fiscal difficulties could prove fatal weaknesses.

description.zh: 1840年的突尼斯贝伊领是北非一个雄心勃勃推行西化改革的奥斯曼附庸国，但面临法国殖民扩张的严峻威胁。
description.en: In 1840 the Beylik of Tunis was a North African Ottoman vassal ambitiously pursuing Westernizing reforms, but facing the grave threat of French colonial expansion.

governmentForm.zh: 法国殖民政府直辖的海外贸易站与军事前哨。
governmentForm.en: An overseas trading post and military outpost under direct French colonial government control.

socialStructure.zh: 法国殖民者、混血精英（西尼亚尔人）、沃洛夫与塞雷尔原住民构成分层社会。
socialStructure.en: French colonists, mixed-race elite (Signares), and Wolof and Serer indigenous peoples formed a stratified society.

rulingClass.zh: 法国殖民官员与军官、混血商业精英
rulingClass.en: French colonial officials and officers, mixed-race commercial elite

succession.zh: 总督由法国政府任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by the French government

structure.zh: 殖民总督行使行政权，圣路易设有市政议会。沿海据点由法军驻防。
structure.en: The colonial governor exercised executive power; Saint-Louis had a municipal council. Coastal posts were garrisoned by French troops.

function.zh: 处理殖民行政事务
function.en: Handled colonial administrative affairs

function.zh: 管理花生与树胶贸易
function.en: Managed groundnut and gum trade

function.zh: 负责据点防御
function.en: Responsible for post defense

localAdmin.zh: 法国直接控制仅限圣路易及几个沿海据点，内陆由原住民酋长自治。
localAdmin.en: French direct control was limited to Saint-Louis and a few coastal posts; the interior was self-governed by indigenous chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 殖民地法律与法国法律并行，原住民事务依习惯法处理。
legalSystem.en: Colonial and French law applied in parallel; indigenous affairs were handled by customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自贸易关税与商业许可费。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from trade customs and commercial license fees.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为原住民主导信仰，法国殖民者信奉天主教
religion.en: Islam was the indigenous dominant faith; French colonists practiced Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 圣路易是西非最早的欧洲殖民城镇之一，混血文化独特。
culturalAchievements.en: Saint-Louis was one of the earliest European colonial towns in West Africa, with a distinctive mixed culture.

languageFamily.zh: 法语（殖民者）、尼日尔-刚果语系（沃洛夫语等）
languageFamily.en: French (colonists), Niger-Congo family (Wolof etc.)

philosophy.zh: 法国殖民文明化使命与伊斯兰教苏菲传统并存。
philosophy.en: French colonial civilizing mission coexisted with Islamic Sufi traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（法语）、阿拉伯文字（伊斯兰学校）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (French), Arabic script (Islamic schools)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 殖民经济以树胶和花生贸易为主，自给农业构成大部分经济活动。
gdpDescription.en: The colonial economy was based on gum and groundnut trade; subsistence agriculture constituted most economic activity.

mainIndustries.zh: 树胶采集与出口、花生种植、渔业、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Gum harvesting and export, groundnut cultivation, fishing, subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 阿拉伯树胶、花生、蜂蜡、兽皮
tradeGoods.en: Gum arabic, groundnuts, beeswax, hides

name.en: French francs and barter used in parallel

householdWealth.zh: 殖民者和混血精英拥有贸易资产；原住民以土地和牲畜为主要财产。
householdWealth.en: Colonists and mixed-race elite held trade assets; indigenous people relied on land and livestock.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民榨取型贸易经济与原住民自给经济并存。
economicSystem.en: Colonial extractive trade economy coexisted with indigenous subsistence economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政高度依赖法国本土补贴。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances were highly dependent on metropolitan French subsidies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持殖民据点运营为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Aimed at maintaining colonial outpost operations.

description.zh: 驻圣路易及沿海据点。
description.en: Stationed at Saint-Louis and coastal posts.

description.zh: 本地招募的辅助武装。
description.en: Locally recruited auxiliary forces.

technology.zh: 法军配备标准火器，殖民辅助部队装备较差。
technology.en: French troops had standard firearms; colonial auxiliaries were poorly equipped.

threats.zh: 与内陆穆斯林国家和部族的冲突，以及疾病威胁。
threats.en: Conflicts with inland Muslim states and tribes, and disease threats.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 殖民地控制区人口约100万（法国直接控制区仅数万）。
populationDescription.en: Colony-area population about 1 million (directly French-controlled areas only tens of thousands).

socialClasses.zh: 法国殖民官员与商人、混血精英、原住民酋长、农民与渔民
socialClasses.en: French colonial officials and merchants, mixed-race elite, indigenous chiefs, peasants, and fishermen

allies.zh: 法兰西王国为宗主国。
allies.en: The Kingdom of France was the sovereign power.

enemies.zh: 与内陆穆斯林国家（富塔托罗等）存在摩擦。
enemies.en: Friction with inland Muslim states (Futa Toro etc.).

foreignPolicy.zh: 作为法国殖民前哨，对外事务由巴黎决定。
foreignPolicy.en: As a French colonial outpost, foreign affairs were decided in Paris.

era.zh: 殖民贸易站阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 欧式港口设施、基本医疗站、贸易仓储。
keyInnovations.en: European-style port facilities, basic medical posts, trade warehouses.

strengths.zh: 法国军事保护、地理位置控制塞内加尔河口贸易。
strengths.en: French military protection and geographic control of Senegal River trade.

weaknesses.zh: 控制范围极有限、依赖法国补贴、疾病与内陆冲突。
weaknesses.en: Very limited control range, dependence on French subsidies, disease, and inland conflicts.

outlook.zh: 法国正在考虑扩大在塞内加尔的存在，但大规模殖民尚需时日。
outlook.en: France was considering expanding its presence in Senegal, but large-scale colonization still lay ahead.

description.zh: 1840年的法属塞内加尔是一个以圣路易为中心的小型殖民贸易前哨，法国对内陆的控制十分有限。
description.en: In 1840 French Senegal was a small colonial trading outpost centered on Saint-Louis, with very limited French control of the interior.

governmentForm.zh: 以金凳为象征的中央集权联盟帝国，阿散蒂王通过等级化的酋长体系统治。
governmentForm.en: A centralized confederate empire symbolized by the Golden Stool, ruled by the Asantehene through a hierarchical chieftaincy system.

socialStructure.zh: 以母系氏族为基础，酋长、金匠、商人、农民与奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Based on matrilineal clans; chiefs, goldsmiths, merchants, farmers, and slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 阿散蒂王与奥约科王族、各级酋长与王母
rulingClass.en: The Asantehene and Oyoko royals, graded chiefs, and queen mothers

succession.zh: 阿散蒂王由王母与主要酋长从王族中选出，非严格世袭。
succession.en: The Asantehene was selected from the royal clan by queen mothers and principal chiefs, not by strict heredity.

structure.zh: 中央为阿散蒂王廷，下辖核心区各酋长邦。附庸领地缴纳贡品并提供军队。
structure.en: The center was the Asantehene's court, overseeing core chieftaincies. Vassal territories paid tribute and provided troops.

function.zh: 辅佐阿散蒂王处理国政
function.en: Assisted the Asantehene in state affairs

function.zh: 管理黄金贸易、贡品与国库
function.en: Managed gold trade, tribute, and treasury

function.zh: 组织军队动员与战争
function.en: Organized military mobilization and warfare

localAdmin.zh: 核心区由阿散蒂王直接任命酋长管理，附庸区通过朝贡关系间接控制。
localAdmin.en: Core areas were administered by chiefs appointed by the Asantehene; vassal areas were indirectly controlled through tributary relationships.

legalSystem.zh: 以习惯法和王命为基础，重大案件由阿散蒂王廷裁决。
legalSystem.en: Based on customary law and royal commands; major cases were adjudicated at the Asantehene's court.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自黄金开采、贡品、贸易关税与战争掠获。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from gold mining, tribute, trade duties, and war booty.

religion.zh: 传统阿坎宗教信仰，祖灵崇拜与金凳崇拜
religion.en: Traditional Akan religious beliefs, ancestral veneration, and Golden Stool worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿散蒂以金凳政治象征、精美金器工艺、肯特布编织和宫廷鼓乐传统著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Ashanti were famed for the Golden Stool political symbol, exquisite goldwork, kente cloth weaving, and court drum traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系阿坎语支（契维语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo, Kwa branch, Akan (Twi)

philosophy.zh: 以金凳为核心的国家神圣性、母系氏族伦理与王权正当性传统。
philosophy.en: National sacrality centered on the Golden Stool, matrilineal clan ethics, and the legitimacy of kingship.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统与符号系统（阿丁克拉符号）
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition and symbol systems (Adinkra symbols)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以黄金开采、农业与地区贸易为支柱，是西非最富裕的内陆国家之一。
gdpDescription.en: Supported by gold mining, agriculture, and regional trade, it was one of the wealthiest inland states in West Africa.

mainIndustries.zh: 黄金开采、农业（薯类、棕榈）、金器手工业、肯特布纺织、地区贸易
mainIndustries.en: Gold mining, agriculture (yams, palm), goldsmithing, kente weaving, regional trade

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、可乐果、奴隶、肯特布、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Gold, kola nuts, slaves, kente cloth, palm oil

name.en: Gold dust and cowrie shell currency

householdWealth.zh: 酋长与商人家庭掌握黄金与奴隶；普通农民家庭以土地和作物为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Chiefly and merchant households controlled gold and slaves; ordinary farming households held land and crops as main assets.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以黄金为核心的贡赋贸易经济，国家对关键贸易商品实行垄断。
economicSystem.en: A tribute-trade economy centered on gold, with state monopoly over key trade commodities.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以黄金储备为主，阿散蒂王掌握大量金器与贵重物品。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was mainly gold reserves; the Asantehene controlled vast quantities of goldwork and valuables.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过贡品征收、贸易垄断和战争掠获积累国库。
fiscalPolicy.en: Treasury was accumulated through tribute collection, trade monopolies, and war booty.

description.zh: 常备核心力量。
description.en: Standing core force.

description.zh: 各酋长邦提供的征召兵力。
description.en: Levies from confederate chieftaincies.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿散蒂王夸库·杜阿一世

technology.zh: 大量使用从沿海贸易获得的欧洲火器，兼用传统冷兵器。
technology.en: Extensively used European firearms obtained through coastal trade, alongside traditional cold weapons.

threats.zh: 与英属黄金海岸殖民地及沿海方提联盟的持续对抗。
threats.en: Ongoing confrontation with the British Gold Coast colony and coastal Fante alliance.

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 克虏伯式后装线膛钢炮
description.en: Krupp-style breech-loading rifled steel cannon

description.zh: 蒸汽动力铁甲战船，木帆船终结者
description.en: Steam-powered ironclad warship, rendering wooden ships obsolete

description.zh: 漂浮或锚定水雷，封锁航道
description.en: Floating or anchored mine for blocking waterways

populationDescription.zh: 核心区与附庸地总人口约300万。
populationDescription.en: Total population of core and vassal territories about 3 million.

socialClasses.zh: 阿散蒂王与王族、酋长、金匠与商人、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Asantehene and royals, chiefs, goldsmiths and merchants, farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 部分内陆附庸国保持忠诚。
allies.en: Some inland vassal states remained loyal.

enemies.zh: 英属黄金海岸与沿海方提联盟是主要对手。
enemies.en: The British Gold Coast and coastal Fante alliance were main adversaries.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护帝国统一和对沿海贸易通道的控制权。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained imperial unity and control over coastal trade routes.

era.zh: 前殖民时代非洲帝国晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 欧式火器的大规模采用、黄金冶炼技术、道路网络与信使系统。
keyInnovations.en: Large-scale adoption of European firearms, gold smelting technology, road networks, and messenger systems.

strengths.zh: 黄金财富、强大军事力量、高度组织化的政治体系、深厚文化传统。
strengths.en: Gold wealth, strong military, highly organized political system, deep cultural traditions.

weaknesses.zh: 欧洲殖民压力增大、火器依赖进口、附庸控制不稳定。
weaknesses.en: Growing European colonial pressure, dependence on imported firearms, unstable vassal control.

outlook.zh: 阿散蒂帝国面临英国殖民扩张的严峻挑战，但短期内仍是西非最强大的内陆国家。
outlook.en: The Ashanti Empire faced severe challenges from British colonial expansion, but remained the most powerful inland state in West Africa in the short term.

description.zh: 1840年的阿散蒂帝国是西非以黄金贸易和强大军事著称的强国，正面临英国殖民势力的日益挤压。
description.en: In 1840 the Ashanti Empire was a West African power renowned for gold trade and military strength, facing increasing British colonial pressure.

governmentForm.zh: 高度中央集权的世袭君主制，国王对军队、贸易和宗教仪式拥有绝对权力。
governmentForm.en: A highly centralized hereditary monarchy with the king holding absolute power over the military, trade, and religious ritual.

socialStructure.zh: 国王与王室、女战士（米诺）、官僚、商人、农民与大量奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: King and royal family, female warriors (Mino), bureaucrats, merchants, farmers, and numerous slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 国王与王室成员、高级军事指挥官
rulingClass.en: King and royal family members, senior military commanders

succession.zh: 王位由前任国王选定继承人，经宫廷确认。
succession.en: The throne was passed to an heir selected by the previous king, confirmed by the court.

structure.zh: 国王为绝对统治者，通过宫廷官僚与地方酋长直接治理。年度贡品仪式（习俗节）强化王权。
structure.en: The king was absolute ruler, governing directly through court bureaucrats and local chiefs. The annual tribute ceremony (Custom) reinforced royal authority.

function.zh: 处理国政与外交
function.en: Handled state affairs and diplomacy

function.zh: 组织军队与女战士部队
function.en: Organized army and female warrior units

function.zh: 管理奴隶贸易与棕榈油出口
function.en: Managed slave trade and palm oil exports

localAdmin.zh: 地方由国王任命的酋长管理，中央控制紧密。
localAdmin.en: Localities were administered by king-appointed chiefs with tight central control.

legalSystem.zh: 以王命和习惯法为基础，国王拥有最高司法权。
legalSystem.en: Based on royal commands and customary law; the king held supreme judicial power.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自奴隶贸易、棕榈油出口税、贡品与战争掠获。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from the slave trade, palm oil export taxes, tribute, and war booty.

religion.zh: 伏都教（沃敦信仰）
religion.en: Vodun (Vodou) traditional religion

culturalAchievements.zh: 达荷美以女战士（亚马逊女兵）、精美宫殿浮雕与仪式传统著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Dahomey was famed for its female warriors (Amazons), elaborate palace bas-reliefs, and ritual traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（丰语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family (Fon language)

philosophy.zh: 以王权神圣性和伏都教宇宙观为核心。
philosophy.en: Centered on the sacrality of kingship and Vodun cosmology.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以奴隶贸易和棕榈油出口为支柱，正在从奴隶贸易向棕榈油合法贸易转型。
gdpDescription.en: Supported by the slave trade and palm oil exports, transitioning from slave trade to legitimate palm oil commerce.

mainIndustries.zh: 棕榈油生产、奴隶贸易（正在减少）、农业、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Palm oil production, slave trade (declining), agriculture, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈油、奴隶、棉布、象牙
tradeGoods.en: Palm oil, slaves, cotton cloth, ivory

householdWealth.zh: 王室和军事精英掌握大量财富与奴隶；农民家庭资产有限。
householdWealth.en: Royal and military elite controlled substantial wealth and slaves; peasant household assets were limited.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 国王垄断的贡赋-贸易经济体系。
economicSystem.en: A royal-monopoly tribute-trade economic system.

treasuryDescription.zh: 以实物（贝壳、布匹、金属）和奴隶为主要储备形式。
treasuryDescription.en: Reserves mainly in goods (cowries, cloth, metals) and slaves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 国王严格控制贸易与贡品征收。
fiscalPolicy.en: The king tightly controlled trade and tribute collection.

description.zh: 国王直属步兵。
description.en: Infantry directly under the king.

description.zh: 精锐女性战斗部队。
description.en: Elite female fighting units.

description.zh: 战时可征召的后备力量。
description.en: Reserves mobilizable in wartime.

technology.zh: 大量使用从欧洲贸易获得的燧发枪。
technology.en: Extensively used flintlock muskets obtained through European trade.

threats.zh: 与阿散蒂、约鲁巴邦国的竞争，以及英国禁止奴隶贸易的压力。
threats.en: Competition with Ashanti and Yoruba states, and British pressure to abolish the slave trade.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约60万。
populationDescription.en: Population about 600,000.

socialClasses.zh: 国王与王室、女战士、官僚、商人、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: King and royals, female warriors, bureaucrats, merchants, farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 与部分沿海贸易伙伴保持关系。
allies.en: Maintained relations with some coastal trading partners.

enemies.zh: 约鲁巴各邦（尤其奥约）和阿散蒂是主要竞争对手。
enemies.en: Yoruba states (especially Oyo) and Ashanti were main rivals.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护对沿海贸易通道的控制，适应从奴隶贸易向合法贸易的转型。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained control over coastal trade routes, adapting from slave trade to legitimate commerce.

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非集权王国

keyInnovations.zh: 欧洲火器的大规模采用、宫殿建筑与浮雕艺术、军事组织创新（女兵部队）。
keyInnovations.en: Large-scale European firearms adoption, palace architecture and bas-relief art, military organizational innovation (female warrior units).

strengths.zh: 高度中央集权、精锐军事力量（含女战士）、适应性强的经济转型。
strengths.en: Highly centralized, elite military forces (including female warriors), adaptive economic transition.

weaknesses.zh: 经济转型期阵痛、外部贸易依赖、人口有限。
weaknesses.en: Growing pains of economic transition, external trade dependence, limited population.

outlook.zh: 达荷美在格佐王治下积极推动经济转型，但长期面临欧洲殖民扩张压力。
outlook.en: Under King Ghezo, Dahomey actively pursued economic transition, but faced long-term European colonial expansion pressure.

description.zh: 1840年的达荷美是西非一个以女战士闻名的中央集权王国，正在从奴隶贸易向棕榈油合法贸易转型。
description.en: In 1840 Dahomey was a centralized West African kingdom famed for its female warriors, transitioning from the slave trade to legitimate palm oil commerce.

ruler.zh: 乌马尔·本·穆罕默德·阿明

dynasty.zh: 卡尼米王朝（实权）/赛法瓦王朝（名义）

governmentForm.zh: 名义上由赛法瓦王朝的迈（Mai）统治，实权已转移至卡尼米家族的谢赫。
governmentForm.en: Nominally ruled by the Mai of the Sayfawa dynasty, but real power had shifted to the Sheikh of the El-Kanemi family.

socialStructure.zh: 以穆斯林学者、武士贵族、商人、农民、牧民和奴隶构成分层社会。
socialStructure.en: A stratified society of Muslim scholars, warrior aristocrats, merchants, farmers, pastoralists, and slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 卡尼米家族谢赫与其军事顾问团
rulingClass.en: El-Kanemi family Sheikh and his military council

succession.zh: 谢赫位在卡尼米家族内继承。
succession.en: The sheikhdom was inherited within the El-Kanemi family.

structure.zh: 谢赫通过军事顾问团与伊斯兰法官网络治国，传统迈仅保留礼仪地位。
structure.en: The Sheikh governed through a military council and network of Islamic judges; the traditional Mai retained only ceremonial status.

function.zh: 国政决策中枢
function.en: Central hub for state decisions

function.zh: 管理法律与宗教事务
function.en: Managed legal and religious affairs

function.zh: 管理军队与边疆
function.en: Managed army and frontiers

localAdmin.zh: 地方由谢赫任命的省长和部族领袖管理。
localAdmin.en: Localities were administered by sheikh-appointed governors and tribal leaders.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法（马利基学派）为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic law (Maliki school).

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自牲畜税、谷物什一税、贸易税与贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from livestock taxes, grain tithes, trade taxes, and tribute.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 博尔努以伊斯兰学术传统、古兰经学校网络和跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽地位著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Bornu was noted for its Islamic scholarly tradition, Quranic school network, and position as a trans-Saharan trade hub.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（卡努里语）
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan family (Kanuri)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术与苏丹萨赫勒政治传统结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarship combined with Sudanic Sahel political tradition.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以农业、畜牧和跨撒哈拉贸易为支柱的经济。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on agriculture, livestock, and trans-Saharan trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、谷物种植、跨撒哈拉贸易、手工业、盐贸易
mainIndustries.en: Livestock, grain cultivation, trans-Saharan trade, handicrafts, salt trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、牲畜、盐、纳特碱、皮革、棉布
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, livestock, salt, natron, leather, cotton cloth

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与贝壳
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and cowrie shells

householdWealth.zh: 军事贵族与商人家庭较富裕；牧民和农民以牲畜与土地为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Military aristocrats and merchants were moderately wealthy; pastoralists and farmers held livestock and land.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋经济与跨撒哈拉商业贸易并存。
economicSystem.en: Tribute economy coexisted with trans-Saharan commercial trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以实物和货币混合储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves in a mix of goods and currency.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持军事防御能力和贸易通道安全。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained military defense capability and trade route security.

description.zh: 以骑马和骆驼骑兵为核心。
description.en: Core of horse and camel cavalry.

description.zh: 步兵含部分装备火枪者。
description.en: Infantry including some equipped with muskets.

description.zh: 可动员的部族武装。
description.en: Mobilizable tribal armed forces.

technology.zh: 部分火器通过跨撒哈拉贸易获得，骑兵传统深厚。
technology.en: Some firearms obtained through trans-Saharan trade; cavalry tradition was deep.

threats.zh: 索科托哈里发国的压力与边疆部族冲突。
threats.en: Pressure from the Sokoto Caliphate and frontier tribal conflicts.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约200万，以卡努里人为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 2 million, predominantly Kanuri.

socialClasses.zh: 谢赫与王室、军事贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、农民与牧民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Sheikh and royals, military aristocrats, Islamic scholars, merchants, farmers and pastoralists, slaves

allies.zh: 与北非和跨撒哈拉贸易伙伴保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with North African and trans-Saharan trade partners.

enemies.zh: 索科托哈里发国是主要竞争对手。
enemies.en: The Sokoto Caliphate was the main rival.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护领土完整和跨撒哈拉贸易通道。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained territorial integrity and trans-Saharan trade routes.

era.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰帝国晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易网络、伊斯兰学校体系、部分火器采用。
keyInnovations.en: Trans-Saharan trade networks, Islamic school system, partial firearms adoption.

strengths.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统、跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽、深厚骑兵传统。
strengths.en: Islamic scholarly tradition, trans-Saharan trade hub, deep cavalry tradition.

weaknesses.zh: 索科托压力、政治二元体制不稳、武器技术落后。
weaknesses.en: Sokoto pressure, unstable dual political system, backward weapons technology.

outlook.zh: 博尔努维持着萨赫勒重要国家地位，但面临内外挑战。
outlook.en: Bornu maintained its status as an important Sahelian state but faced internal and external challenges.

description.zh: 1840年的博尔努帝国是乍得湖地区的伊斯兰强国，卡尼米家族掌握实权，维持着跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽地位。
description.en: In 1840 the Bornu Empire was an Islamic power in the Lake Chad region with the El-Kanemi family holding real power, maintaining its trans-Saharan trade hub status.

governmentForm.zh: 以苏丹为核心的伊斯兰世袭君主制，通过省长和部族酋长治理广大领土。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic hereditary sultanate centered on the sultan, governing vast territories through provincial governors and tribal chiefs.

socialStructure.zh: 穆斯林学者-武士精英、商人、农民、牧民与奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Muslim scholar-warrior elite, merchants, farmers, pastoralists, and slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹与王室、宫廷顾问与军事将领
rulingClass.en: Sultan and royal family, court advisers and military commanders

succession.zh: 苏丹位在王室内继承，宫廷斗争影响继承。
succession.en: The sultanate was inherited within the royal family, with court politics influencing succession.

structure.zh: 苏丹通过宫廷与省级官员体系治理，伊斯兰法官处理司法。
structure.en: The sultan governed through a court and provincial official system; Islamic judges handled justice.

function.zh: 国政决策中枢
function.en: Central hub for state decisions

function.zh: 法律与宗教事务
function.en: Legal and religious affairs

function.zh: 军队组织与边防
function.en: Army organization and border defense

localAdmin.zh: 地方由苏丹任命的省长与部族酋长共同管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas administered jointly by sultan-appointed governors and tribal chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为基础，辅以部族习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic law, supplemented by tribal customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自牲畜税、贸易税、贡品与奴隶贸易。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from livestock taxes, trade taxes, tribute, and slave trade.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 瓦达伊以伊斯兰学术、跨撒哈拉贸易与精美皮革工艺著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Wadai was noted for Islamic scholarship, trans-Saharan trade, and fine leatherwork.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（马巴语群）
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan family (Maba languages)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统与萨赫勒政治文化结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarly tradition combined with Sahelian political culture.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧、农业和跨撒哈拉贸易为主的经济。
gdpDescription.en: Economy based on livestock, agriculture, and trans-Saharan trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、谷物种植、跨撒哈拉贸易、皮革工艺
mainIndustries.en: Livestock, grain cultivation, trans-Saharan trade, leatherwork

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、牲畜、皮革、纳特碱、鸵鸟毛
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, livestock, leather, natron, ostrich feathers

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与物物交换

householdWealth.zh: 牧民以牲畜为主要财富，商人持有贸易资产。
householdWealth.en: Pastoralists held livestock as main wealth; merchants held trade assets.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋畜牧经济与跨撒哈拉商路并存。
economicSystem.en: Tribute-pastoral economy combined with trans-Saharan trade routes.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以实物为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury mainly in goods.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持基本军事与行政开支。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained basic military and administrative expenditure.

description.zh: 骑马与骆驼骑兵。
description.en: Horse and camel cavalry.

description.zh: 步兵与可动员的部族武装。
description.en: Infantry and mobilizable tribal forces.

technology.zh: 少量火器，以传统骑兵武器为主。
technology.en: Few firearms; mainly traditional cavalry weapons.

threats.zh: 与博尔努和达尔富尔的竞争，以及内部部族纠纷。
threats.en: Rivalry with Bornu and Darfur, and internal tribal disputes.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约100万，马巴人为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 1 million, predominantly Maba.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹与王室、军事贵族、学者、商人、牧民与农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Sultan and royals, military aristocrats, scholars, merchants, pastoralists and farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 与北非贸易伙伴保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with North African trade partners.

enemies.zh: 博尔努和达尔富尔是竞争对手。
enemies.en: Bornu and Darfur were rivals.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护跨撒哈拉贸易通道和领土安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained trans-Saharan trade routes and territorial security.

era.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰苏丹国时期

keyInnovations.zh: 伊斯兰学校、贸易驿站网络、皮革与金属工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Islamic schools, trade-post networks, leather and metalwork.

strengths.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽、伊斯兰学术传统。
strengths.en: Trans-Saharan trade hub, Islamic scholarly tradition.

weaknesses.zh: 武器技术落后、与邻国冲突频繁。
weaknesses.en: Backward weapons technology, frequent conflicts with neighbors.

outlook.zh: 瓦达伊维持中等萨赫勒国家地位。
outlook.en: Wadai maintained a moderate Sahelian state status.

description.zh: 1840年的瓦达伊苏丹国是中非萨赫勒地区的伊斯兰国家，以跨撒哈拉贸易和伊斯兰学术著称。
description.en: In 1840 the Wadai Sultanate was a Central African Sahelian Islamic state known for trans-Saharan trade and Islamic scholarship.

governmentForm.zh: 高度中央集权的君主制，女王拥有绝对权力，通过贵族与官僚体系统治马达加斯加大部分地区。
governmentForm.en: A highly centralized monarchy with the queen holding absolute power, ruling most of Madagascar through a noble and bureaucratic system.

socialStructure.zh: 安德里亚纳（贵族）、霍瓦（自由民）和安代沃（奴隶及附属民）三大等级。
socialStructure.en: Three main castes: Andriana (nobles), Hova (freemen), and Andevo (slaves and dependents).

rulingClass.zh: 女王与梅里纳贵族精英
rulingClass.en: Queen and Merina noble elite

succession.zh: 王位在梅里纳王室内继承，受宫廷政治影响。
succession.en: Throne inherited within the Merina royal family, influenced by court politics.

structure.zh: 女王通过宫廷与各级官员直接治理，强制劳役制度（fanompoana）是国家动员基础。
structure.en: The queen governed directly through the court and officials at all levels; the compulsory labor system (fanompoana) was the basis of state mobilization.

function.zh: 协助女王处理国政
function.en: Assisted the queen in state affairs

function.zh: 管理军队与防务
function.en: Managed army and defense

function.zh: 管理对外贸易与王室垄断商品
function.en: Managed foreign trade and royal monopoly goods

localAdmin.zh: 全国分省治理，省长由中央任命。强制劳役制度深入地方。
localAdmin.en: The country was governed by provinces with centrally appointed governors. The compulsory labor system penetrated local levels.

legalSystem.zh: 以王命和习惯法为基础，女王拥有最高司法权。
legalSystem.en: Based on royal commands and customary law; the queen held supreme judicial power.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入以强制劳役、实物贡品和贸易垄断为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue mainly from compulsory labor, tribute in kind, and trade monopolies.

religion.zh: 传统马达加斯加信仰为主，拉纳瓦洛娜一世排斥基督教传教
religion.en: Traditional Malagasy beliefs predominated; Ranavalona I persecuted Christian missionaries

culturalAchievements.zh: 梅里纳以梯田灌溉工程、独特建筑风格和丰富口传文学著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Merina was known for terraced irrigation engineering, distinctive architecture, and rich oral literature.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系（马达加斯加语）
languageFamily.en: Austronesian (Malagasy)

philosophy.zh: 祖先崇拜与王权神圣性传统。
philosophy.en: Ancestral veneration and the sacred tradition of kingship.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（传教士引入的马达加斯加文）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Malagasy script introduced by missionaries)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以水稻种植、畜牧和有限的对外贸易为基础的经济，强制劳役为国家提供大量无偿劳动。
gdpDescription.en: Economy based on rice cultivation, livestock, and limited foreign trade; compulsory labor provided the state with vast unpaid labor.

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻种植、畜牧、手工业（纺织、铁器）、有限的对外贸易
mainIndustries.en: Rice cultivation, livestock, handicrafts (textiles, ironwork), limited foreign trade

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、牛、蜡、皮革、少量金银
tradeGoods.en: Rice, cattle, wax, leather, small amounts of gold and silver

name.en: Silver dollars and barter used in parallel

householdWealth.zh: 贵族掌握大量土地和奴隶；自由民以水稻田和牲畜为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Nobles controlled extensive land and slaves; freemen held rice paddies and livestock.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以强制劳役和贡赋为基础的王权经济体系。
economicSystem.en: A royal economic system based on compulsory labor and tribute.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以银元和实物为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury mainly in silver dollars and goods.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 女王通过强制劳役减少货币支出需求。
fiscalPolicy.en: The queen reduced monetary expenditure needs through compulsory labor.

description.zh: 含欧式训练的步兵与本土武装。
description.en: Including European-trained infantry and indigenous forces.

description.zh: 可征召的后备力量。
description.en: Mobilizable reserve forces.

technology.zh: 部分军队按欧洲模式训练，配备火器。女王排斥进一步西化。
technology.en: Some troops trained on European models with firearms. The queen rejected further Westernization.

threats.zh: 法国和英国殖民野心，以及岛内反叛。
threats.en: French and British colonial ambitions, and internal rebellions.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 马达加斯加总人口约500万，梅里纳人控制中央高地和大部分沿海地区。
populationDescription.en: Madagascar's total population about 5 million; the Merina controlled the central highlands and much of the coast.

socialClasses.zh: 贵族（安德里亚纳）、自由民（霍瓦）、奴隶与附属民（安代沃）
socialClasses.en: Nobles (Andriana), freemen (Hova), slaves and dependents (Andevo)

allies.zh: 拉纳瓦洛娜一世奉行孤立主义，减少与欧洲的接触。
allies.en: Ranavalona I pursued isolationism, reducing contact with Europe.

enemies.zh: 法国与英国均对马达加斯加有殖民野心。
enemies.en: Both France and Britain had colonial ambitions toward Madagascar.

foreignPolicy.zh: 排斥外国影响，维护马达加斯加独立与传统文化。
foreignPolicy.en: Rejected foreign influence, defending Malagasy independence and traditional culture.

era.zh: 前殖民时代南岛语系帝国

keyInnovations.zh: 梯田灌溉工程、欧式军事训练（此前引入，现受限）、纺织与铁器手工业。
keyInnovations.en: Terraced irrigation engineering, European military training (previously introduced, now restricted), textile and ironwork handicrafts.

strengths.zh: 中央集权强大、人口众多、梯田农业生产力较高、军事力量在地区内领先。
strengths.en: Strong centralization, large population, relatively productive terraced agriculture, and regionally leading military power.

weaknesses.zh: 孤立主义限制技术进步、强制劳役引发社会不满、欧洲殖民压力。
weaknesses.en: Isolationism limited technological progress, compulsory labor caused social discontent, and European colonial pressure grew.

outlook.zh: 梅里纳王国是非洲与印度洋地区的重要国家，但孤立政策长期来看可能削弱其抵抗殖民的能力。
outlook.en: The Merina Kingdom was an important state in Africa and the Indian Ocean region, but isolationism could undermine its colonial-resistance capacity in the long run.

description.zh: 1840年的梅里纳王国是马达加斯加强大的中央集权国家，拉纳瓦洛娜一世女王奉行排外政策抵御欧洲殖民渗透。
description.en: In 1840 the Merina Kingdom was a powerful centralized state in Madagascar, with Queen Ranavalona I pursuing isolationist policies to resist European colonial penetration.

name.zh: 桑给巴尔与阿曼苏丹国
桑给巴尔与阿曼苏丹国

governmentForm.zh: 阿拉伯海洋贸易帝国，苏丹将首都从马斯喀特迁至桑给巴尔，控制东非沿海贸易。
governmentForm.en: An Arab maritime trading empire; the sultan moved the capital from Muscat to Zanzibar, controlling East African coastal trade.

socialStructure.zh: 阿拉伯-阿曼统治精英、印度商人社区、斯瓦希里城市居民、非洲奴隶与种植园劳工。
socialStructure.en: Arab-Omani ruling elite, Indian merchant community, Swahili urban residents, African slaves and plantation laborers.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹与布赛义德王室、阿拉伯商人贵族
rulingClass.en: Sultan and Busaid royals, Arab merchant aristocracy

succession.zh: 苏丹位在布赛义德家族内继承。
succession.en: Sultanate inherited within the Busaid family.

structure.zh: 苏丹通过个人权威与商业网络治理，桑给巴尔与阿曼分别设有代理人。
structure.en: The sultan governed through personal authority and commercial networks; agents were placed in both Zanzibar and Oman.

function.zh: 处理政务与外交
function.en: Handled state affairs and diplomacy

function.zh: 管理丁香与奴隶贸易及关税
function.en: Managed clove and slave trade and customs

function.zh: 管理舰队与海上巡逻
function.en: Managed fleet and maritime patrol

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城镇由苏丹代理人管理，内陆依赖地方酋长。
localAdmin.en: Coastal towns were managed by sultan's agents; the interior relied on local chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊巴德派伊斯兰法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Ibadi Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自丁香出口税、奴隶贸易税和港口关税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue mainly from clove export taxes, slave-trade taxes, and port customs.

religion.zh: 伊巴德派伊斯兰教为统治阶层信仰，逊尼派在沿海居民中广泛传播
religion.en: Ibadi Islam was the ruling class's faith; Sunni Islam was widespread among coastal residents

culturalAchievements.zh: 桑给巴尔以石城建筑、斯瓦希里文化融合和印度洋贸易网络著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Zanzibar was noted for Stone Town architecture, Swahili cultural synthesis, and Indian Ocean trade networks.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪语支（阿拉伯语）、尼日尔-刚果语系（斯瓦希里语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic Semitic (Arabic), Niger-Congo (Swahili)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰商业伦理与印度洋世界主义结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic commercial ethics combined with Indian Ocean cosmopolitanism.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以丁香种植、奴隶贸易和印度洋转口贸易为支柱的商业经济。
gdpDescription.en: A commercial economy based on clove plantations, the slave trade, and Indian Ocean entrepôt trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 丁香种植、奴隶贸易、印度洋转口贸易、椰子种植
mainIndustries.en: Clove plantations, slave trade, Indian Ocean entrepôt trade, coconut cultivation

tradeGoods.zh: 丁香、奴隶、象牙、椰子、香料
tradeGoods.en: Cloves, slaves, ivory, coconut, spices

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与印度卢比
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and Indian rupee

householdWealth.zh: 阿拉伯与印度商人家庭拥有种植园和贸易资产；奴隶占人口大比例。
householdWealth.en: Arab and Indian merchant families held plantations and trade assets; slaves formed a large share of the population.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 苏丹主导的印度洋商业贸易经济。
economicSystem.en: A sultan-directed Indian Ocean commercial trade economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 苏丹是当时东非最富有的统治者之一。
treasuryDescription.en: The sultan was one of the wealthiest rulers in East Africa at the time.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以贸易税收最大化为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maximizing trade tax revenue was the core objective.

description.zh: 帆船舰队控制印度洋贸易航路。
description.en: Sailing fleet controlling Indian Ocean trade routes.

description.zh: 沿海要塞与城镇驻军。
description.en: Garrisons at coastal forts and towns.

technology.zh: 舰队装备大炮和帆船，陆军配备火器。
technology.en: Fleet armed with cannon and sailing vessels; army equipped with firearms.

threats.zh: 英国反奴隶贸易施压，东非内陆部族反抗。
threats.en: British anti-slave-trade pressure and East African inland tribal resistance.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 桑给巴尔及其东非沿海属地人口约50万。
populationDescription.en: Population of Zanzibar and its East African coastal possessions about 500,000.

description.zh: 东非斯瓦希里海岸贸易中心
description.en: Swahili Coast trading center of East Africa

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹与阿拉伯精英、印度商人、斯瓦希里城市居民、种植园奴隶
socialClasses.en: Sultan and Arab elite, Indian merchants, Swahili urban residents, plantation slaves

allies.zh: 与英国保持贸易关系，同时试图抵制其反奴隶贸易压力。
allies.en: Maintained trade relations with Britain while trying to resist its anti-slave-trade pressure.

enemies.zh: 无正式外部敌国，但面临英国压力和内部分裂风险。
enemies.en: No formal external enemies, but faced British pressure and internal fragmentation risk.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护印度洋贸易霸权和东非沿海控制权。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained Indian Ocean trade hegemony and East African coastal control.

era.zh: 印度洋贸易帝国时期

keyInnovations.zh: 丁香种植园技术、远洋帆船航海、石城建筑、多元贸易网络。
keyInnovations.en: Clove plantation techniques, ocean-going sailing navigation, Stone Town architecture, diverse trade networks.

strengths.zh: 控制东非贸易、丁香垄断、多元贸易网络、战略位置优越。
strengths.en: Controlled East African trade, clove monopoly, diverse trade networks, and strategic position.

weaknesses.zh: 英国反奴隶贸易压力、阿曼与桑给巴尔分裂风险、军事力量有限。
weaknesses.en: British anti-slave-trade pressure, Oman-Zanzibar separation risk, and limited military power.

outlook.zh: 苏丹国在短期内维持东非贸易霸权，但帝国统一与奴隶贸易均面临严峻挑战。
outlook.en: The sultanate maintained East African trade hegemony in the short term, but both imperial unity and the slave trade faced severe challenges.

description.zh: 1840年的桑给巴尔与阿曼苏丹国是东非最强大的贸易帝国，苏丹赛义德统治着丁香岛和广阔的印度洋商业网络。
description.en: In 1840 the Sultanate of Zanzibar & Oman was East Africa's most powerful trading empire, with Sultan Said ruling the clove island and a vast Indian Ocean commercial network.

capital.zh: 无固定中心（多个酋长领地）

governmentForm.zh: 罗兹维帝国衰落后分裂为多个酋长领地，面临恩德贝勒人入侵。
governmentForm.en: After the Rozvi Empire's decline, it fragmented into multiple chieftaincies, facing Ndebele invasion.

socialStructure.zh: 以修纳族为主体，酋长、农民、矿工与牧民构成社会层次。
socialStructure.en: Predominantly Shona; chiefs, farmers, miners, and herders formed the social strata.

rulingClass.zh: 各地罗兹维酋长与长老
rulingClass.en: Various local Rozvi chiefs and elders

succession.zh: 酋长位在罗兹维各系内继承。
succession.en: Chieftainships inherited within Rozvi lineages.

structure.zh: 分散的酋长领地，各自治理，缺乏统一政治中心。
structure.en: Dispersed chieftaincies, each self-governing, lacking a unified political center.

function.zh: 地方政务与纠纷裁决
function.en: Local governance and dispute resolution

function.zh: 管理金矿和贸易活动
function.en: Managed gold mining and trade

localAdmin.zh: 各村落由酋长和长老管理。
localAdmin.en: Villages administered by chiefs and elders.

legalSystem.zh: 以修纳习惯法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Shona customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品以实物形式向酋长缴纳。
taxationSystem.en: Tribute paid in kind to chiefs.

religion.zh: 姆瓦里崇拜与祖先信仰
religion.en: Mwari worship and ancestral beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 继承大津巴布韦石头建筑遗产和金矿开采传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Inherited Great Zimbabwe stone architecture heritage and gold-mining traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（修纳语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo, Bantu branch (Shona)

philosophy.zh: 以祖先崇拜和姆瓦里神谕为精神核心。
philosophy.en: Centered on ancestor worship and the Mwari oracle.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字
writingSystem.en: No indigenous writing system

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以农业、金矿开采和地区贸易为基础，但帝国衰落与恩德贝勒入侵严重破坏经济。
gdpDescription.en: Based on agriculture, gold mining, and regional trade, but empire decline and Ndebele invasion severely damaged the economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、金矿开采、畜牧、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, gold mining, livestock, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、象牙、牲畜、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Gold, ivory, livestock, iron goods

householdWealth.zh: 酋长家庭拥有较多牲畜和金属；普通家庭以农业为生。
householdWealth.en: Chiefly households held more livestock and metals; ordinary households lived by farming.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给农业与地区贸易并存的分散经济。
economicSystem.en: Decentralized economy of subsistence agriculture and regional trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 各酋长领地储备极少。
treasuryDescription.en: Reserves in each chieftaincy were minimal.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持基本生存和防御为目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Aimed at basic survival and defense.

description.zh: 分散的酋长领地武装。
description.en: Dispersed chieftaincy armed forces.

technology.zh: 以传统冷兵器为主，极少量火器。
technology.en: Mainly traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 恩德贝勒人入侵是最大威胁，正在摧毁罗兹维残余势力。
threats.en: Ndebele invasion was the greatest threat, destroying Rozvi remnant power.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 分散的修纳族人口约50万。
populationDescription.en: Dispersed Shona population about 500,000.

socialClasses.zh: 酋长与长老、农民、矿工、牧民
socialClasses.en: Chiefs and elders, farmers, miners, herders

allies.zh: 各酋长领地之间联系松散。
allies.en: Loose ties among chieftaincies.

enemies.zh: 恩德贝勒人（姆齐利卡齐率领）正在入侵。
enemies.en: Ndebele (led by Mzilikazi) were invading.

foreignPolicy.zh: 各酋长独立应对外部威胁，缺乏统一外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Each chief dealt with external threats independently; no unified diplomacy.

era.zh: 后帝国分裂时期

keyInnovations.zh: 金矿开采技术传承、石头建筑遗产、传统铁器冶炼。
keyInnovations.en: Gold-mining technique heritage, stone architecture legacy, traditional iron smelting.

strengths.zh: 金矿资源、修纳文化传统深厚。
strengths.en: Gold resources and deep Shona cultural traditions.

weaknesses.zh: 帝国瓦解、恩德贝勒入侵、军事力量薄弱、政治分裂。
weaknesses.en: Imperial collapse, Ndebele invasion, weak military, political fragmentation.

outlook.zh: 罗兹维继承国正在被恩德贝勒人征服，短期前景极为黯淡。
outlook.en: Rozvi successor states were being conquered by the Ndebele; short-term prospects were very bleak.

description.zh: 1840年的罗兹维帝国继承国是南部非洲分裂的修纳族酋长领地，正面临恩德贝勒人的毁灭性入侵。
description.en: In 1840 the Rozvi Empire successor states were fragmented Shona chieftaincies in Southern Africa, facing devastating Ndebele invasion.

governmentForm.zh: 高度集权的封建君主制，穆瓦米通过等级化的酋长与氏族体系统治。
governmentForm.en: A highly centralized feudal monarchy with the Mwami ruling through a hierarchical system of chiefs and clans.

socialStructure.zh: 图西牧民贵族、胡图农民多数与特瓦族少数构成社会三元结构。
socialStructure.en: Tutsi pastoralist aristocracy, Hutu farmer majority, and Twa minority formed a three-tier social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 穆瓦米与图西贵族精英
rulingClass.en: Mwami and Tutsi noble elite

succession.zh: 穆瓦米位在尼吉尼亚王朝内继承，由王母和贵族确认。
succession.en: Mwami-ship inherited within the Nyiginya dynasty, confirmed by the queen mother and nobles.

structure.zh: 穆瓦米通过三类酋长（牧地、土地、军事）对全国实行精细统治。乌布哈克（牛的侍从制度）是社会控制核心。
structure.en: The Mwami exercised detailed rule through three types of chiefs (cattle, land, and military). Ubuhake (cattle-clientship) was the core social control mechanism.

function.zh: 国政与仪式中心
function.en: Center of state affairs and ritual

function.zh: 管理牲畜分配与图西-胡图关系
function.en: Managed livestock allocation and Tutsi-Hutu relations

function.zh: 组织军队与边防
function.en: Organized army and border defense

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为若干行政区，由穆瓦米任命的酋长（土地、牧地、军事）管理。
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into administrative districts managed by mwami-appointed chiefs (land, cattle, military).

legalSystem.zh: 以王命和习惯法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on royal commands and customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以实物贡品和劳役为主要征收方式。
taxationSystem.en: Levied mainly through tribute in kind and labor service.

religion.zh: 传统信仰（伊马纳神与祖灵崇拜）
religion.en: Traditional beliefs (Imana deity and ancestor worship)

culturalAchievements.zh: 卢旺达以精密的宫廷礼仪、口传诗歌、舞蹈传统和编篮工艺著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Rwanda was noted for elaborate court ritual, oral poetry, dance traditions, and basket weaving.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（基尼亚卢旺达语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo, Bantu branch (Kinyarwanda)

philosophy.zh: 以王权神圣性、氏族秩序与牛的社会象征意义为核心。
philosophy.en: Centered on the sacrality of kingship, clan order, and the social symbolism of cattle.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No indigenous writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以自给农业和畜牧为基础的经济，对外贸易极少。
gdpDescription.en: Economy based on subsistence agriculture and livestock, with minimal foreign trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（豆类、高粱）、畜牧（牛）、编篮手工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (beans, sorghum), livestock (cattle), basket-weaving handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、铁器、盐、编篮制品
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, iron goods, salt, basket-ware

householdWealth.zh: 图西贵族以牛群为主要财富；胡图农民以土地和作物为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Tutsi nobles held cattle herds as main wealth; Hutu farmers held land and crops.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以牛的侍从制度（乌布哈克）为核心的封建畜牧-农业经济。
economicSystem.en: A feudal pastoral-agricultural economy centered on the cattle-clientship system (ubuhake).

treasuryDescription.zh: 以牲畜和实物为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Reserves mainly in cattle and goods.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过乌布哈克制度将资源集中于王廷。
fiscalPolicy.en: Resources concentrated at the royal court through the ubuhake system.

description.zh: 穆瓦米直属常备武装。
description.en: Standing forces under the Mwami.

description.zh: 可动员的后备力量。
description.en: Mobilizable reserves.

technology.zh: 以长矛、弓箭和盾牌为主要武器。
technology.en: Spears, bows, and shields as main weapons.

threats.zh: 与布隆迪和周边部族的边境冲突。
threats.en: Border conflicts with Burundi and neighboring peoples.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口约100万。
populationDescription.en: Population about 1 million.

socialClasses.zh: 穆瓦米与图西贵族、胡图农民、特瓦族
socialClasses.en: Mwami and Tutsi nobles, Hutu farmers, Twa

allies.zh: 与部分大湖地区邻国保持关系。
allies.en: Maintained relations with some Great Lakes neighbors.

enemies.zh: 布隆迪是主要竞争对手。
enemies.en: Burundi was the main rival.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护领土完整和王国独立。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained territorial integrity and kingdom independence.

era.zh: 前殖民时代大湖地区王国

keyInnovations.zh: 精密的社会组织制度、畜牧管理技术、编篮与铁器工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Sophisticated social organization, livestock management, basket-weaving and ironwork.

strengths.zh: 高度中央集权、社会控制体系精密、领土防御意识强。
strengths.en: Highly centralized, sophisticated social control system, strong territorial defense consciousness.

weaknesses.zh: 经济自给封闭、技术落后、社会等级固化。
weaknesses.en: Economically self-sufficient and closed, technologically backward, rigid social stratification.

outlook.zh: 卢旺达王国在区域内保持稳定，但长期封闭可能使其难以应对外部冲击。
outlook.en: The Kingdom of Rwanda maintained regional stability, but long-term isolation could leave it vulnerable to external shocks.

description.zh: 1840年的卢旺达是大湖地区以精密社会等级制度著称的中央集权王国，穆瓦米通过牛的侍从制度实行统治。
description.en: In 1840 Rwanda was a centralized Great Lakes kingdom renowned for its sophisticated social hierarchy, with the Mwami ruling through the cattle-clientship system.

name.en: British Crown Colony of New Zealand

governmentForm.zh: 英国直辖殖民地
governmentForm.en: British Crown Colony

socialStructure.zh: 毛利部落社会与英国殖民定居者社会并存；《怀唐伊条约》理论上承认毛利酋长权威，但实际上殖民政府逐步扩大控制
socialStructure.en: Māori tribal society coexisted with British settler society; the Treaty of Waitangi theoretically recognized Māori chiefly authority, but colonial government gradually expanded control

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官员与军官、毛利酋长（兰加提拉）、传教士
rulingClass.en: British colonial officials and military officers, Māori chiefs (rangatira), missionaries

succession.zh: 总督由英国殖民大臣任命
