succession.en: Governor appointed by the British Colonial Secretary

structure.zh: 总督领导的殖民行政机构，下设行政会议，毛利酋长在《怀唐伊条约》框架下保有一定自治权
structure.en: Colonial administration headed by the Governor with an Executive Council; Māori chiefs retained a degree of autonomy under the Treaty of Waitangi framework

function.zh: 殖民地最高行政机关
function.en: Supreme executive authority of the colony

function.zh: 处理行政事务和与伦敦的通信
function.en: Handled administrative affairs and correspondence with London

function.zh: 土地测量和分配
function.en: Land survey and allocation

localAdmin.zh: 各定居点设地方行政官；毛利部落在部落领地内保持传统治理
localAdmin.en: Local magistrates in each settlement; Māori tribes maintained traditional governance within tribal territories

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法与毛利习惯法并行，但殖民法律逐渐占据主导
legalSystem.en: English common law and Māori customary law coexisted, but colonial law gradually became dominant

taxationSystem.zh: 关税和土地税为主要收入来源，毛利经济基本不纳入殖民税制
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties and land taxes were the main revenue sources; the Māori economy was largely outside the colonial tax system

religion.zh: 英国定居者以英国国教和其他新教宗派为主；毛利人传统信仰与基督教传教并存，部分酋长已皈依
religion.en: British settlers mainly Anglican and other Protestant denominations; Māori traditional beliefs coexisted with Christian missions, with some chiefs already converted

culturalAchievements.zh: 毛利文化以精湛的木雕、纹身艺术（塔莫科）、战舞（哈卡）和口头传统闻名；定居者带来欧洲印刷文化和教育传统
culturalAchievements.en: Māori culture renowned for masterful wood carving, tattoo art (tā moko), war dance (haka), and oral traditions; settlers brought European print culture and educational traditions

languageFamily.zh: 毛利语（南岛语系）和英语
languageFamily.en: Māori (Austronesian family) and English

philosophy.zh: 毛利世界观以万物有灵、祖先崇拜和社群集体观为核心；英国殖民者带来启蒙理性主义和基督教传统
philosophy.en: Māori worldview centered on animism, ancestor veneration, and communal collectivism; British colonists brought Enlightenment rationalism and Christian traditions

writingSystem.zh: 毛利语在传教士帮助下开始拉丁字母书写；殖民者使用英文
writingSystem.en: Māori language began to be written in Latin script with missionary assistance; colonists used English

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年新西兰经济以毛利人自给自足的农业和渔猎为主体，英国定居者带来捕鲸业、伐木业和小规模畜牧业。殖民商业刚刚起步。
gdpDescription.en: In 1840 New Zealand's economy was dominated by Māori subsistence agriculture and fishing-hunting, with British settlers introducing whaling, timber-cutting, and small-scale pastoralism. Colonial commerce was just beginning.

mainIndustries.zh: 毛利农业（甘薯、蕨根）、捕鲸、海豹猎捕、伐木、亚麻贸易、小规模牧羊
mainIndustries.en: Māori agriculture (kūmara, fern root), whaling, sealing, timber-cutting, flax trade, small-scale sheep farming

tradeGoods.zh: 出口鲸油、海豹皮、亚麻纤维和木材；进口铁器、纺织品、火器、工具和日用品
tradeGoods.en: Exports of whale oil, sealskins, flax fiber, and timber; imports of ironware, textiles, firearms, tools, and daily necessities

householdWealth.zh: 毛利家庭财富以土地、独木舟和绿玉装饰品衡量；定居者多为新到移民，个人财产有限
householdWealth.en: Māori household wealth measured in land, canoes, and greenstone ornaments; settlers were mostly recent arrivals with limited personal property

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 毛利礼物经济与英国自由贸易体系并存
economicSystem.en: Māori gift economy coexisted with British free-trade system

unit.en: million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地刚建立，财政依赖伦敦拨款补贴。
treasuryDescription.en: The colony was newly established, with finances dependent on London subsidies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以关税和土地销售维持最低限度殖民行政开支，赤字由英国政府补贴。
fiscalPolicy.en: Customs duties and land sales maintained minimal colonial administrative spending, with deficits subsidized by the British government.

description.zh: 驻扎在奥克兰等定居点的英国正规军。
description.en: British regular troops garrisoned at Auckland and other settlements.

description.zh: 可动员的定居者志愿武装。
description.en: Mobilizable settler volunteer forces.

description.zh: 各部落可动员的武装力量，部分拥有火枪。
description.en: Armed forces mobilizable by various tribes, some equipped with muskets.

technology.zh: 英军装备燧发枪和轻型火炮；毛利战士使用火枪（通过贸易获得）和传统武器（梅雷、泰阿哈）。
technology.en: British troops equipped with flintlock muskets and light artillery; Māori warriors used muskets (acquired through trade) and traditional weapons (mere, taiaha).

unit.en: million taels of silver per year

threats.zh: 毛利部落间冲突和对殖民扩张的抵抗；部分地区毛利人与定居者关系紧张。
threats.en: Inter-tribal Māori conflicts and resistance to colonial expansion; tensions between Māori and settlers in some areas.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口约8万，其中毛利人约7万、英国及欧洲定居者约1万。
populationDescription.en: Population about 80,000, of which approximately 70,000 were Māori and 10,000 were British and European settlers.

socialClasses.zh: 毛利酋长与部落民、英国殖民官员与军人、传教士、捕鲸人和定居农民
socialClasses.en: Māori chiefs and tribespeople, British colonial officials and soldiers, missionaries, whalers, and settler farmers

allies.zh: 大英帝国为宗主国；部分毛利酋长是条约签署方。
allies.en: The British Empire as the metropolitan power; some Māori chiefs were treaty signatories.

enemies.zh: 部分未签署条约的毛利酋长对殖民扩张持抵抗态度。
enemies.en: Some Māori chiefs who did not sign the treaty were resistant to colonial expansion.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交由伦敦殖民部主导，旨在确立英国对新西兰的主权。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy directed by the Colonial Office in London, aimed at establishing British sovereignty over New Zealand.

era.zh: 早期殖民时代

keyInnovations.zh: 毛利人的造船、农业和编织技术；殖民者带来铁器、印刷术、蒸汽船和现代农牧技术。
keyInnovations.en: Māori boat-building, agriculture, and weaving technologies; colonists introduced ironware, printing, steamships, and modern farming techniques.

strengths.zh: 丰富的自然资源（木材、鲸鱼、亚麻）、英国帝国支持、毛利人适应力强。
strengths.en: Rich natural resources (timber, whales, flax), British imperial backing, strong Māori adaptability.

weaknesses.zh: 殖民地机构薄弱、定居者人数极少、毛利人与殖民者之间潜在冲突、距英国极其遥远。
weaknesses.en: Weak colonial institutions, extremely small settler population, potential conflict between Māori and colonists, extreme distance from Britain.

outlook.zh: 《怀唐伊条约》为英国主权奠定了法律基础，但其模糊的双语文本将引发持续争端。定居者移民将加速，土地问题将成为核心矛盾。
outlook.en: The Treaty of Waitangi laid the legal foundation for British sovereignty, but its ambiguous bilingual text would generate ongoing disputes. Settler immigration would accelerate, and land issues would become the core conflict.

description.zh: 1840年的新西兰刚通过《怀唐伊条约》成为英国殖民地，总督霍布森在奥克兰建立行政中心，毛利社会与欧洲殖民力量开始深度交汇。
description.en: In 1840, New Zealand had just become a British colony through the Treaty of Waitangi, with Governor Hobson establishing an administrative center at Auckland as Māori society and European colonial forces began to deeply intersect.

ruler.zh: 陶法阿豪（乔治·图普一世）

governmentForm.zh: 集权化酋长王国，正在向基督教君主制过渡
governmentForm.en: Centralized chiefly kingdom transitioning to a Christian monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 国王与世袭贵族（豪）居于顶层，平民（图阿）从事农业和渔业
socialStructure.en: The king and hereditary nobles (hou'eiki) at the top, commoners (tu'a) engaged in agriculture and fishing

rulingClass.zh: 国王、世袭贵族与卫斯理宗传教士
rulingClass.en: The king, hereditary nobles, and Wesleyan missionaries

succession.zh: 王位传承以家族世袭与贵族协商为基础
succession.en: Succession based on hereditary family line with noble consultation

structure.zh: 国王集权统治，传教士顾问影响日增，正在统一各岛屿酋长领地
structure.en: Centralized royal rule with growing missionary advisory influence, unifying island chieftaincies

function.zh: 国王及贵族顾问处理行政与司法事务
function.en: The king and noble advisors handled administrative and judicial affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各岛由国王任命的贵族管辖
localAdmin.en: Each island governed by a noble appointed by the king

legalSystem.zh: 传统酋长习惯法与基督教道德准则融合，正在形成成文法典
legalSystem.en: Traditional chiefly customary law merging with Christian moral codes, a written law code was being developed

taxationSystem.zh: 以实物贡品（芋头、椰子、树皮布）形式向国王和贵族缴纳
taxationSystem.en: In-kind tribute (taro, coconuts, bark cloth) paid to the king and nobles

religion.zh: 卫斯理宗基督教已成为主导信仰，国王本人于1831年受洗；传统波利尼西亚信仰逐渐退居次要地位
religion.en: Wesleyan Christianity had become the dominant faith, with the king baptized in 1831; traditional Polynesian beliefs gradually receded

culturalAchievements.zh: 精湛的树皮布制作（恩加图）、木雕、编织、拉卡拉卡群舞传统和口头系谱传承
culturalAchievements.en: Fine bark-cloth making (ngatu), wood carving, weaving, lakalaka group dance tradition, and oral genealogical transmission

languageFamily.zh: 汤加语（南岛语系波利尼西亚语族）
languageFamily.en: Tongan (Austronesian, Polynesian branch)

philosophy.zh: 波利尼西亚传统中敬畏神灵（阿图阿）与祖先，重视社群和谐与等级秩序；基督教教义正在重塑世界观
philosophy.en: Polynesian traditions of reverence for gods (atua) and ancestors, valuing communal harmony and hierarchical order; Christian doctrine was reshaping the worldview

writingSystem.zh: 传教士引入拉丁字母书写汤加语
writingSystem.en: Missionaries introduced Latin-script writing for Tongan

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 自给自足的热带农业和渔业经济，椰干出口贸易刚刚起步。
gdpDescription.en: A subsistence tropical agricultural and fishing economy, with copra export trade just beginning.

mainIndustries.zh: 芋头和山药种植、椰子采集、渔业、树皮布制作
mainIndustries.en: Taro and yam cultivation, coconut harvesting, fishing, bark-cloth making

tradeGoods.zh: 出口椰干和少量热带产品；进口铁器、纺织品、工具和火器
tradeGoods.en: Exported copra and small quantities of tropical products; imported ironware, textiles, tools, and firearms

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富以土地使用权、独木舟和编织品衡量
householdWealth.en: Household wealth measured by land-use rights, canoes, and woven goods

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡品和礼物交换为核心的酋长制经济
economicSystem.en: A chiefly economy centered on tribute and gift exchange

unit.en: million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 以实物储备为主，货币储备极少。
treasuryDescription.en: Mainly in-kind reserves, with minimal monetary reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 贡品制度维持王廷开支，贸易收入逐渐增长。
fiscalPolicy.en: Tribute system maintained royal court expenses, with trade revenue gradually growing.

description.zh: 国王直属的常备武装力量。
description.en: Standing armed force directly under the king.

description.zh: 各岛可征召的战士。
description.en: Warriors that could be levied from each island.

technology.zh: 传统武器（木棍、投石索）与贸易获得的火枪并用。
technology.en: Traditional weapons (clubs, slings) combined with muskets acquired through trade.

unit.en: million taels of silver per year

threats.zh: 内部酋长之间的权力斗争和外岛抵抗统一；欧洲列强的潜在干预。
threats.en: Internal power struggles among chiefs and outer island resistance to unification; potential European power intervention.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约2.5万，纯波利尼西亚人，分布在汤加塔布、瓦瓦乌、哈派等岛群。
populationDescription.en: Population about 25,000, ethnically Polynesian, distributed across Tongatapu, Vava'u, Ha'apai, and other island groups.

socialClasses.zh: 国王与贵族（豪）、平民（图阿）、少数欧洲传教士和商人
socialClasses.en: King and nobles (hou'eiki), commoners (tu'a), a few European missionaries and traders

allies.zh: 与卫斯理宗传教团关系密切；与英国保持友好关系。
allies.en: Close ties with the Wesleyan mission; maintained friendly relations with Britain.

enemies.zh: 内部分裂的酋长势力是主要挑战。
enemies.en: Internally divided chiefly factions were the main challenge.

foreignPolicy.zh: 通过接受基督教和建立与欧洲国家的关系来维护独立。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained independence by embracing Christianity and establishing relations with European powers.

era.zh: 波利尼西亚王国向基督教君主制过渡时期
era.en: Polynesian kingdom transitioning to Christian monarchy

keyInnovations.zh: 远洋航海双体独木舟技术、热带农业灌溉、树皮布制作技术、传教士引入的文字书写。
keyInnovations.en: Oceanic double-hulled canoe navigation, tropical agriculture irrigation, bark-cloth making, and missionary-introduced literacy.

strengths.zh: 强有力的集权领导、成功的基督教化增强内部凝聚力、地理隔离提供天然防御。
strengths.en: Strong centralized leadership, successful Christianization enhancing internal cohesion, geographic isolation providing natural defense.

weaknesses.zh: 经济规模极小、技术落后、依赖外部贸易获取铁器和火枪。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small economic scale, technological backwardness, dependence on external trade for ironware and firearms.

outlook.zh: 陶法阿豪将成功统一全岛并于1845年正式加冕为乔治·图普一世，建立太平洋地区唯一未被殖民的波利尼西亚王国。
outlook.en: Taufa'ahau would successfully unify all islands and be formally crowned as George Tupou I in 1845, establishing the only Polynesian kingdom in the Pacific never to be colonized.

description.zh: 1840年的汤加正处于陶法阿豪统一群岛的关键时期，基督教传入深刻改变了社会结构，一个现代化的波利尼西亚王国即将成形。
description.en: In 1840 Tonga was at a critical juncture as Taufa'ahau unified the archipelago, with Christianity profoundly transforming the social structure and a modernized Polynesian kingdom about to take shape.

governmentForm.zh: 分裂的酋长联邦制，姆鲍岛酋长势力最强
governmentForm.en: Fragmented chiefly confederation, with the Bau Island chieftaincy the most powerful

socialStructure.zh: 酋长（图伊）与武士贵族在上，平民种植者和渔民在下，底层有世袭仆从
socialStructure.en: Chiefs (tui) and warrior nobility above, commoner cultivators and fishermen below, with hereditary attendants at the bottom

rulingClass.zh: 高级酋长及其世袭武士贵族
rulingClass.en: High chiefs and their hereditary warrior nobility

succession.zh: 酋长位通常在家族内传承，但常伴随武力争夺
succession.en: Chieftaincy typically passed within the family line, but often accompanied by armed contests

structure.zh: 各大酋长邦各自为政，姆鲍、雷瓦和维瓦是最强的三大势力；没有统一中央政府
structure.en: Major chiefdoms governed independently; Bau, Rewa, and Verata were the three most powerful; no unified central government

function.zh: 酋长与长老协商重大事务
function.en: Chiefs and elders deliberated on major affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各村由世袭村长管辖
localAdmin.en: Each village governed by a hereditary village chief

legalSystem.zh: 酋长习惯法，以口头传统和先例为准
legalSystem.en: Chiefly customary law, based on oral tradition and precedent

taxationSystem.zh: 平民向酋长缴纳实物贡品和劳役
taxationSystem.en: Commoners paid in-kind tribute and labor service to chiefs

religion.zh: 传统万物有灵信仰，祖先崇拜和精灵崇拜为核心；基督教传教刚刚开始
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs, with ancestor and spirit worship at the core; Christian missionary work had just begun

culturalAchievements.zh: 精美的双体独木舟（德鲁阿）建造技术、树皮布制作、陶器、编席、传统建筑和仪式性食人习俗
culturalAchievements.en: Fine double-hulled canoe (drua) construction, bark-cloth making, pottery, mat weaving, traditional architecture, and ritual cannibalism

languageFamily.zh: 斐济语（南岛语系美拉尼西亚语族）
languageFamily.en: Fijian (Austronesian, Melanesian branch)

philosophy.zh: 万物有灵世界观，重视玛纳（精神力量）和塔布（禁忌），社群义务和酋长权威是核心价值
philosophy.en: Animist worldview, emphasizing mana (spiritual power) and tabu (taboo), with communal obligations and chiefly authority as core values

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口头传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system, relying on oral tradition

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以自给自足的热带农业和渔业为基础，檀香木贸易和海参贸易为主要对外经济活动。
gdpDescription.en: Based on subsistence tropical agriculture and fishing, with sandalwood and bêche-de-mer trade as the main external economic activities.

mainIndustries.zh: 芋头和山药种植、渔业、檀香木采伐、海参采集和干制、独木舟建造
mainIndustries.en: Taro and yam cultivation, fishing, sandalwood harvesting, bêche-de-mer collection and curing, canoe building

tradeGoods.zh: 出口檀香木和海参；进口铁器、布匹、火枪和珠子
tradeGoods.en: Exported sandalwood and bêche-de-mer; imported ironware, cloth, muskets, and beads

householdWealth.zh: 以土地使用权、独木舟、编织物和鲸鱼牙饰品衡量
householdWealth.en: Measured by land-use rights, canoes, woven goods, and whale-tooth ornaments

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡品和礼物交换为核心的酋长制经济
economicSystem.en: A chiefly economy centered on tribute and gift exchange

unit.en: million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 以鲸鱼牙（塔布阿）和食物储备为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Mainly in whale teeth (tabua) and food reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 酋长通过贡品制度集中资源，用于军事和仪式性消费。
fiscalPolicy.en: Chiefs concentrated resources through the tribute system for military and ceremonial consumption.

description.zh: 各大酋长的常备武装随从。
description.en: Standing armed retinues of major chiefs.

description.zh: 战时可动员的男性战士。
description.en: Male warriors mobilizable in wartime.

commanderInChief.zh: 拉图·塔诺阿·维萨瓦卡（姆鲍）

technology.zh: 传统武器（战棍、投石索、弓箭）和少量贸易获得的火枪；著名的战争独木舟。
technology.en: Traditional weapons (war clubs, slings, bows) and a few muskets acquired through trade; famous war canoes.

unit.en: million taels of silver per year

threats.zh: 酋长邦之间的持续战争，尤其是姆鲍与雷瓦的争霸；欧洲殖民势力的潜在威胁。
threats.en: Continuous warfare among chiefdoms, especially the rivalry between Bau and Rewa; potential threat from European colonial powers.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约13万，以美拉尼西亚-波利尼西亚混合族群为主，分布在维提岛、瓦努阿岛等数百个岛屿。
populationDescription.en: Population about 130,000, mainly of mixed Melanesian-Polynesian ethnicity, distributed across hundreds of islands including Viti Levu and Vanua Levu.

socialClasses.zh: 高级酋长、武士贵族、平民农渔民、世袭仆从，以及少量欧洲商人和传教士
socialClasses.en: High chiefs, warrior nobility, commoner farmers and fishermen, hereditary attendants, and a small number of European traders and missionaries

allies.zh: 姆鲍酋长邦与汤加王国有长期联盟关系；部分欧洲商人提供火枪支持。
allies.en: The Bau chiefdom had a long-standing alliance with the Kingdom of Tonga; some European traders provided musket support.

enemies.zh: 雷瓦酋长邦是姆鲍的主要对手；各酋长邦之间频繁交战。
enemies.en: The Rewa chiefdom was Bau's main rival; frequent warfare among chiefdoms.

foreignPolicy.zh: 利用与欧洲商人和传教士的关系获取军事优势；尚无统一外交政策。
foreignPolicy.en: Leveraged relations with European traders and missionaries for military advantage; no unified foreign policy yet.

era.zh: 前殖民太平洋岛屿时代

keyInnovations.zh: 大型双体战争独木舟建造技术、热带农业灌溉、陶器制作、树皮布工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Large double-hulled war canoe construction, tropical agriculture irrigation, pottery making, bark-cloth technology.

strengths.zh: 强大的军事传统和战争独木舟、丰富的热带农业资源、姆鲍酋长邦的区域霸权地位。
strengths.en: Strong military traditions and war canoes, rich tropical agricultural resources, Bau chiefdom's regional hegemonic status.

weaknesses.zh: 酋长邦之间的持续战争消耗资源、缺乏统一政治体、对外部贸易品（尤其是火枪）的依赖增加。
weaknesses.en: Continuous warfare among chiefdoms drained resources, lack of unified political entity, growing dependence on external trade goods especially muskets.

outlook.zh: 姆鲍酋长邦在拉图·塔诺阿之子塞鲁·埃佩尼萨·塞空鲍领导下将统一斐济，最终于1874年割让给英国。
outlook.en: Under Ratu Tanoa's son Seru Epenisa Cakobau, the Bau chiefdom would unify Fiji, eventually ceding it to Britain in 1874.

description.zh: 1840年的斐济是多个相互争霸的酋长邦组成的碎片化政治体，姆鲍岛的拉图·塔诺阿是最强大的酋长，檀香木和海参贸易将欧洲人吸引到这片群岛。
description.en: In 1840 Fiji was a fragmented polity of competing chiefdoms, with Ratu Tanoa of Bau Island as the most powerful chief, and sandalwood and bêche-de-mer trade drawing Europeans to the archipelago.

ruler.zh: 多位阿利伊竞争最高头衔
ruler.en: Multiple ali'i competing for paramount titles

capital.zh: 无固定首都（阿皮亚为主要定居点）
capital.en: No fixed capital (Apia as the main settlement)

governmentForm.zh: 法阿马泰酋长制（酋长议事制度）
governmentForm.en: Fa'amatai chiefly system (chiefly deliberative system)

socialStructure.zh: 马泰（酋长）家族居于社会顶层，通过议事会（福诺）进行集体决策，平民家庭隶属于各马泰
socialStructure.en: Matai (chief) families at the top of society, collective decision-making through councils (fono), commoner families affiliated with various matai

rulingClass.zh: 阿利伊（高级酋长）和图拉法莱（演说家酋长）
rulingClass.en: Ali'i (high chiefs) and tulafale (orator chiefs)

succession.zh: 马泰头衔由家族（阿伊加）协商选定，非严格世袭
succession.en: Matai titles selected by family (aiga) consensus, not strictly hereditary

structure.zh: 分散的酋长制，各村和区通过福诺（议事会）自治，没有统一中央政府
structure.en: Decentralized chiefly system, each village and district self-governed through fono (councils), no unified central government

function.zh: 各村马泰集会决定村务
function.en: Village matai assembled to decide village affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各村由马泰（酋长）议事会管辖
localAdmin.en: Each village governed by a matai (chief) council

legalSystem.zh: 口头习惯法，由福诺裁决纠纷
legalSystem.en: Oral customary law, with fono adjudicating disputes

taxationSystem.zh: 家庭向马泰缴纳实物贡品和劳役以维持村社运作
taxationSystem.en: Families paid in-kind tribute and labor to matai to maintain village operations

religion.zh: 伦敦传道会已建立据点，基督教开始传播；传统波利尼西亚万物有灵信仰仍广泛存在
religion.en: The London Missionary Society had established posts and Christianity was spreading; traditional Polynesian animist beliefs still widely held

culturalAchievements.zh: 精美的树皮布（西亚波）和编席、纹身艺术（佩阿）、舞蹈（西瓦）和口头诗歌传统
culturalAchievements.en: Fine bark-cloth (siapo) and mat weaving, tattoo art (pe'a), dance (siva), and oral poetry traditions

languageFamily.zh: 萨摩亚语（南岛语系波利尼西亚语族）
languageFamily.en: Samoan (Austronesian, Polynesian branch)

philosophy.zh: 法阿萨摩亚（萨摩亚之道）是核心文化理念，强调敬重、服务、家族荣誉和社群和谐
philosophy.en: Fa'a Samoa (the Samoan Way) was the core cultural philosophy, emphasizing respect, service, family honor, and communal harmony

writingSystem.zh: 传教士引入拉丁字母书写萨摩亚语
writingSystem.en: Missionaries introduced Latin-script writing for Samoan

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以自给自足的热带农业和渔业为基础，椰干出口贸易开始发展。
gdpDescription.en: Based on subsistence tropical agriculture and fishing, with copra export trade beginning to develop.

mainIndustries.zh: 芋头、面包果和椰子种植、渔业、编席和树皮布制作
mainIndustries.en: Taro, breadfruit, and coconut cultivation, fishing, mat weaving and bark-cloth making

tradeGoods.zh: 出口椰干和少量热带产品；进口铁器、布匹和杂货
tradeGoods.en: Exported copra and small quantities of tropical products; imported ironware, cloth, and sundries

name.zh: 实物交换和精细编席作为礼仪货币
name.en: Barter exchange and fine mats as ceremonial currency

householdWealth.zh: 以精细编席（伊耶通加）、树皮布和食物储备衡量
householdWealth.en: Measured by fine mats (ie toga), bark cloth, and food reserves

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以法阿马泰酋长制度为框架的礼物经济和贡品体系
economicSystem.en: A gift economy and tribute system framed by the fa'amatai chiefly system

unit.en: million taels of silver per year
million taels of silver per year

treasuryDescription.zh: 以精细编席和食物储备为主要储值手段。
treasuryDescription.en: Fine mats and food reserves as the main stores of value.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过礼物交换和贡品维持酋长权威和村社运作。
fiscalPolicy.en: Chiefly authority and village operations maintained through gift exchange and tribute.

description.zh: 各大酋长的常备武装。
description.en: Standing armed forces of major chiefs.

description.zh: 战时可征召的男性战士。
description.en: Male warriors mobilizable in wartime.

technology.zh: 传统武器（战棍、投石索）和少量贸易获得的火枪。
technology.en: Traditional weapons (war clubs, slings) and a few muskets acquired through trade.

unit.en: million taels of silver per year

threats.zh: 各阿利伊家族间的权力争夺和内战；欧洲列强日益增加的影响。
threats.en: Power struggles and civil wars among ali'i families; growing European power influence.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约4.5万，纯波利尼西亚人，分布在乌波卢岛和萨瓦伊岛两大主岛。
populationDescription.en: Population about 45,000, ethnically Polynesian, distributed across the two main islands of Upolu and Savai'i.

socialClasses.zh: 阿利伊（高级酋长）、图拉法莱（演说家酋长）、马泰家族成员、平民、少量欧洲传教士和商人
socialClasses.en: Ali'i (high chiefs), tulafale (orator chiefs), matai family members, commoners, a few European missionaries and traders

allies.zh: 与汤加和斐济有传统文化联系；传教士充当与欧洲国家的中介。
allies.en: Traditional cultural ties with Tonga and Fiji; missionaries acted as intermediaries with European nations.

enemies.zh: 各阿利伊家族间的内部对抗是主要冲突来源。
enemies.en: Internal rivalries among ali'i families were the main source of conflict.

foreignPolicy.zh: 缺乏统一外交政策，各酋长独立与欧洲人交往。
foreignPolicy.en: Lacked a unified foreign policy, with individual chiefs independently engaging with Europeans.

era.zh: 前殖民波利尼西亚时代

keyInnovations.zh: 远洋航海技术、热带农业管理、精细编席和树皮布工艺。
keyInnovations.en: Ocean navigation technology, tropical agriculture management, fine mat and bark-cloth craft.

strengths.zh: 强韧的法阿萨摩亚文化传统、社区凝聚力、自给自足的农业经济。
strengths.en: Resilient fa'a Samoa cultural tradition, community cohesion, self-sufficient agricultural economy.

weaknesses.zh: 政治分裂、缺乏统一领导、技术落后、对外部贸易品依赖增加。
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation, lack of unified leadership, technological backwardness, growing dependence on external trade goods.

outlook.zh: 酋长间的权力争夺将持续，欧洲列强将日益介入萨摩亚事务，最终导致19世纪末的三国争霸和群岛分治。
outlook.en: Power struggles among chiefs would continue, European powers would increasingly intervene in Samoan affairs, ultimately leading to the late-19th-century tripartite rivalry and partition of the islands.

description.zh: 1840年的萨摩亚是一个由法阿马泰酋长制度治理的分散化波利尼西亚社会，多个阿利伊家族竞争最高头衔，基督教传教正在改变传统信仰格局。
description.en: In 1840 Samoa was a decentralized Polynesian society governed by the fa'amatai chiefly system, with multiple ali'i families competing for paramount titles, and Christian missionary work reshaping the traditional religious landscape.

ruler.zh: 卡洛斯·安东尼奥·洛佩斯

governmentForm.zh: 独裁共和国，总统集权统治。
governmentForm.en: Authoritarian republic under presidential dictatorship.

socialStructure.zh: 以混血梅斯蒂索人为主的均质社会，地主精英和农民两极分化。
socialStructure.en: Relatively homogeneous mestizo society, polarized between landowner elites and peasantry.

rulingClass.zh: 洛佩斯家族和军政精英
rulingClass.en: López family and military-political elite

succession.zh: 总统由全民选举产生，任期有限。
succession.en: The president was elected by popular vote for a limited term.

structure.zh: 总统集权体制，行政完全由洛佩斯控制。
structure.en: Presidential autocracy with administration fully controlled by López.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算与公共财政管理。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、治安与地方事务。
function.en: Handled domestic administration, policing, and local affairs.

function.zh: 负责军队建设与国防。
function.en: Responsible for armed forces and national defense.

function.zh: 负责外交关系与国际条约。
function.en: Managed foreign relations and international treaties.

localAdmin.zh: 各省由总统任命的官员管理。
localAdmin.en: Provinces administered by presidentially appointed officials.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，但总统意志高于法律。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, but presidential will overrode law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以国有企业利润、关税和土地税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on state enterprise profits, customs, and land tax.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 国家主导的现代化建设，包括铁路和电报。
culturalAchievements.en: State-led modernization including railways and telegraph.

languageFamily.zh: 瓜拉尼语和西班牙语
languageFamily.en: Guaraní and Spanish

philosophy.zh: 国家主义和自给自足理念。
philosophy.en: Nationalism and self-sufficiency.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以国有企业和农牧业为基础的自给型经济。
gdpDescription.en: Self-sufficient economy based on state enterprises and agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧、木材、马黛茶、造船
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, livestock, timber, yerba mate, shipbuilding

tradeGoods.zh: 马黛茶、木材、烟草、牛皮
tradeGoods.en: Yerba mate, timber, tobacco, hides

householdWealth.zh: 国有资产占比高，民间财富有限。
householdWealth.en: High state asset share, limited private wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导的重商主义经济。
economicSystem.en: State-directed mercantilist economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央银行与国库储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank and treasury reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持财政平衡和偿还外债为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to maintain balance and service external debt.

description.zh: 地面作战主力。
description.en: Main ground combat force.

description.zh: 海上防御与巡逻。
description.en: Maritime defense and patrol.

description.zh: 空中防御与支援。
description.en: Air defense and support.

technology.zh: 开始引进欧洲武器和训练。
technology.en: Beginning to import European arms and training.

threats.zh: 邻国领土野心。
threats.en: Neighbors' territorial ambitions.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在亚松森周围和巴拉圭河流域。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated around Asunción and the Paraguay River.

socialClasses.zh: 洛佩斯家族、军政精英、地主、自由农民、原住民。
socialClasses.en: López family, military-political elite, landowners, free peasants, indigenous peoples.

allies.zh: 较为孤立，但与英国有贸易联系。
allies.en: Relatively isolated, but trade ties with Britain.

enemies.zh: 与阿根廷和巴西存在边界紧张。
enemies.en: Border tensions with Argentina and Brazil.

foreignPolicy.zh: 自给自足和外交孤立。
foreignPolicy.en: Self-sufficiency and diplomatic isolation.

era.zh: 早期工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路、电报、造船厂建设。
keyInnovations.en: Railway, telegraph, and shipyard construction.

strengths.zh: 国家集权高效，军事建设快速。
strengths.en: Efficient state centralization, rapid military buildup.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，孤立，过度依赖国家控制。
weaknesses.en: Small population, isolated, over-reliant on state control.

outlook.zh: 三国联盟战争（1864-1870）将造成毁灭性打击。
outlook.en: The War of the Triple Alliance (1864-1870) would be devastating.

description.zh: 1840年的巴拉圭是洛佩斯家族统治下的集权共和国。
description.en: Paraguay in 1840 was an authoritarian republic under the López family.

governmentForm.zh: 保守派主导的共和国。
governmentForm.en: Conservative-dominated republic.

socialStructure.zh: 考迪略（强人）和大地主主导的社会。
socialStructure.en: Society dominated by caudillos and large landowners.

rulingClass.zh: 考迪略和地主精英
rulingClass.en: Caudillos and landowning elite

succession.zh: 总统由全民选举产生，任期有限。
succession.en: The president was elected by popular vote for a limited term.

structure.zh: 总统制共和国，但考迪略政治主导。
structure.en: Presidential republic dominated by caudillo politics.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算与公共财政管理。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、治安与地方事务。
function.en: Handled domestic administration, policing, and local affairs.

function.zh: 负责军队建设与国防。
function.en: Responsible for armed forces and national defense.

function.zh: 负责外交关系与国际条约。
function.en: Managed foreign relations and international treaties.

localAdmin.zh: 各省由总统任命的长官管理。
localAdmin.en: Provinces managed by presidentially appointed governors.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system.

taxationSystem.zh: 以关税和出口税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Based on customs and export duties.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 独立英雄玻利瓦尔的遗产，早期文学传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Legacy of independence hero Bolívar, early literary tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 西班牙语
languageFamily.en: Spanish

philosophy.zh: 自由主义和保守主义交锋。
philosophy.en: Liberalism and conservatism in conflict.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以可可、咖啡出口和畜牧业为基础的农业经济。
gdpDescription.en: Agricultural economy based on cacao, coffee exports, and livestock.

mainIndustries.zh: 可可、咖啡、畜牧、糖
mainIndustries.en: Cacao, coffee, livestock, sugar

tradeGoods.zh: 可可、咖啡、牛皮
tradeGoods.en: Cacao, coffee, hides

householdWealth.zh: 集中在大地主和商人。
householdWealth.en: Concentrated among large landowners and merchants.

economicSystem.zh: 出口导向的农业经济。
economicSystem.en: Export-oriented agricultural economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央银行与国库储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank and treasury reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持财政平衡和偿还外债为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to maintain balance and service external debt.

description.zh: 地面作战主力。
description.en: Main ground combat force.

description.zh: 海上防御与巡逻。
description.en: Maritime defense and patrol.

description.zh: 空中防御与支援。
description.en: Air defense and support.

technology.zh: 后殖民军队，混合装备。
technology.en: Post-colonial military, mixed equipment.

threats.zh: 内部考迪略竞争和内战风险。
threats.en: Internal caudillo rivalry and civil war risk.

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口沿加勒比海岸和安第斯山脉北段分布。
populationDescription.en: Population along Caribbean coast and northern Andes.

socialClasses.zh: 考迪略、地主、商人、自由混血农民、奴隶和自由黑人。
socialClasses.en: Caudillos, landowners, merchants, free mestizo peasants, slaves and free blacks.

allies.zh: 与英国有贸易联系。
allies.en: Trade ties with Britain.

enemies.zh: 与邻国的边界争端。
enemies.en: Border disputes with neighbors.

foreignPolicy.zh: 玻利瓦尔主义和区域影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Bolivarianism and regional influence.

era.zh: 前工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 有限的基础设施建设。
keyInnovations.en: Limited infrastructure development.

strengths.zh: 丰富的农业资源。
strengths.en: Rich agricultural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 政治不稳定，内战频繁。
weaknesses.en: Political instability, frequent civil wars.

outlook.zh: 考迪略政治将持续数十年。
outlook.en: Caudillo politics would persist for decades.

description.zh: 1840年的委内瑞拉是考迪略帕埃斯主导的保守共和国。
description.en: Venezuela in 1840 was a conservative republic dominated by caudillo Páez.

governmentForm.zh: 1840年仍处于海地统治下，独立运动酝酿中。
governmentForm.en: Still under Haitian rule in 1840, independence movement brewing.

socialStructure.zh: 混血社会，受海地统治影响。
socialStructure.en: Mixed-race society, influenced by Haitian rule.

rulingClass.zh: 克里奥尔精英和地主
rulingClass.en: Creole elite and landowners

succession.zh: 总统由全民选举产生，任期有限。
succession.en: The president was elected by popular vote for a limited term.

structure.zh: 海地统治下的省级行政。
structure.en: Provincial administration under Haitian rule.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算与公共财政管理。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、治安与地方事务。
function.en: Handled domestic administration, policing, and local affairs.

function.zh: 负责军队建设与国防。
function.en: Responsible for armed forces and national defense.

function.zh: 负责外交关系与国际条约。
function.en: Managed foreign relations and international treaties.

localAdmin.zh: 海地任命的地方官。
localAdmin.en: Haitian-appointed local officials.

legalSystem.zh: 海地法律体系。
legalSystem.en: Haitian legal system.

taxationSystem.zh: 海地税制。
taxationSystem.en: Haitian tax system.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 西班牙语文化传统在海地统治下顽强存续。
culturalAchievements.en: Spanish-language cultural traditions persisted under Haitian rule.

languageFamily.zh: 西班牙语
languageFamily.en: Spanish

philosophy.zh: 独立运动和民族认同。
philosophy.en: Independence movement and national identity.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业和小规模农业为基础。
gdpDescription.en: Based on livestock and small-scale agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、烟草、甘蔗、木材
mainIndustries.en: Livestock, tobacco, sugarcane, timber

tradeGoods.zh: 木材、烟草、牛皮
tradeGoods.en: Timber, tobacco, hides

householdWealth.zh: 普遍贫困。
householdWealth.en: Generally impoverished.

economicSystem.zh: 自给农业为主。
economicSystem.en: Subsistence agriculture predominant.

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央银行与国库储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank and treasury reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持财政平衡和偿还外债为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to maintain balance and service external debt.

description.zh: 地面作战主力。
description.en: Main ground combat force.

description.zh: 海上防御与巡逻。
description.en: Maritime defense and patrol.

description.zh: 空中防御与支援。
description.en: Air defense and support.

technology.zh: 基本武器。
technology.en: Basic weapons.

threats.zh: 海地统治和内部分裂。
threats.en: Haitian rule and internal divisions.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口分散于伊斯帕尼奥拉岛东部。
populationDescription.en: Population scattered across eastern Hispaniola.

socialClasses.zh: 克里奥尔精英、混血自由民、农民。
socialClasses.en: Creole elite, free mixed-race people, peasants.

allies.zh: 独立运动与反海地势力。
allies.en: Independence movement and anti-Haitian forces.

enemies.zh: 海地统治。
enemies.en: Haitian rule.

foreignPolicy.zh: 争取独立。
foreignPolicy.en: Seeking independence.

era.zh: 前工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 有限。
keyInnovations.en: Limited.

strengths.zh: 民族认同凝聚力。
strengths.en: National identity cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 贫困、外国统治。
weaknesses.en: Poverty, foreign rule.

outlook.zh: 1844年将实现独立。
outlook.en: Would achieve independence in 1844.

description.zh: 1840年的多米尼加地区仍处于海地统治下，独立在即。
description.en: The Dominican region in 1840 was still under Haitian rule, with independence imminent.

governmentForm.zh: 英国直辖殖民地群，各地总督治理。
governmentForm.en: Group of British Crown colonies, each governed by an appointed governor.

socialStructure.zh: 自由移民、流放犯后代、士兵和少量原住民构成的殖民社会。
socialStructure.en: Colonial society of free settlers, convict descendants, soldiers, and marginalized Aboriginal peoples.

rulingClass.zh: 殖民总督和自由移民精英
rulingClass.en: Colonial governors and free settler elite

succession.zh: 总督由英国王室任命。
succession.en: Governors appointed by the British Crown.

structure.zh: 各殖民地独立行政，均向伦敦负责。
structure.en: Separate colonial administrations, all reporting to London.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算与公共财政管理。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget, and public finance.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、治安与地方事务。
function.en: Handled domestic administration, policing, and local affairs.

function.zh: 负责军队建设与国防。
function.en: Responsible for armed forces and national defense.

function.zh: 负责外交关系与国际条约。
function.en: Managed foreign relations and international treaties.

localAdmin.zh: 殖民地各区由地方治安官管理。
localAdmin.en: Colonial districts administered by local magistrates.

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法。
legalSystem.en: English common law.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税和土地收入。
taxationSystem.en: Customs and land revenue.

religion.zh: 基督教（英国国教和其他新教宗派）
religion.en: Christianity (Anglican and other Protestant denominations)

culturalAchievements.zh: 早期殖民文化，丛林文学传统萌芽。
culturalAchievements.en: Early colonial culture, nascent bush literary tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 英语
languageFamily.en: English

philosophy.zh: 殖民开拓精神和英国制度移植。
philosophy.en: Colonial pioneering spirit and transplanted British institutions.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 以羊毛出口和畜牧业为核心的殖民经济。
gdpDescription.en: Colonial economy centered on wool exports and pastoralism.

mainIndustries.zh: 羊毛、畜牧、捕鲸、农业
mainIndustries.en: Wool, pastoralism, whaling, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、鲸油、木材
tradeGoods.en: Wool, whale oil, timber

householdWealth.zh: 集中在大牧场主和商人。
householdWealth.en: Concentrated in large pastoralists and merchants.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民出口经济。
economicSystem.en: Colonial export economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央银行与国库储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank and treasury reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以维持财政平衡和偿还外债为核心目标。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to maintain balance and service external debt.

description.zh: 地面作战主力。
description.en: Main ground combat force.

description.zh: 海上防御与巡逻。
description.en: Maritime defense and patrol.

description.zh: 空中防御与支援。
description.en: Air defense and support.

technology.zh: 英国殖民驻军标准。
technology.en: British colonial garrison standard.

threats.zh: 内部原住民冲突和边境扩张。
threats.en: Internal Aboriginal conflicts and frontier expansion.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中在悉尼和塔斯马尼亚等沿海殖民地。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated in coastal colonies like Sydney and Tasmania.

socialClasses.zh: 殖民官员、自由移民、流放犯后代、士兵、原住民。
socialClasses.en: Colonial officials, free settlers, convict descendants, soldiers, Aboriginal peoples.

allies.zh: 大英帝国。
allies.en: British Empire.

enemies.zh: 无外部威胁。
enemies.en: No external threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 服从英国帝国外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Subject to British imperial foreign policy.

era.zh: 早期工业化

keyInnovations.zh: 羊毛加工和航运技术。
keyInnovations.en: Wool processing and shipping technology.

strengths.zh: 英国帝国支持，羊毛出口繁荣。
strengths.en: British imperial backing, booming wool exports.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，距英国遥远。
weaknesses.en: Small population, remote from Britain.

outlook.zh: 淘金热（1850年代）将推动人口爆发。
outlook.en: Gold rush (1850s) would trigger population boom.

description.zh: 1840年的澳大利亚殖民地是以羊毛出口为核心的英国殖民地群。
description.en: The Australian Colonies in 1840 were a group of British colonies centered on wool exports.

governmentForm.zh: 以阿拉芬为名义最高统治者、奥约·梅西（七位顾问长老）为制衡力量的约鲁巴传统君主制，1840年王权已大幅衰落
governmentForm.en: A Yoruba traditional monarchy with the Alaafin as nominal supreme ruler and the Oyo Mesi (seven principal counsellors) as a check on power; by 1840 royal authority had greatly diminished

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室家族、奥约·梅西首领、军事酋长、祭司、自由民农民与手工业者、外来商人及奴隶组成；氏族血缘与年龄等级仍是基本纽带
socialStructure.en: Society comprised the royal family, Oyo Mesi chiefs, military leaders, priests, free commoner farmers and artisans, foreign traders, and slaves; clan kinship and age-grade systems remained fundamental bonds

rulingClass.zh: 阿拉芬与王族、奥约·梅西七大首领、巴索伦（首席大臣）与各地方军事酋长
rulingClass.en: The Alaafin and the royal lineage, the seven Oyo Mesi chiefs, the Basorun (prime minister), and regional military warlords

succession.zh: 阿拉芬由奥约·梅西从王族候选人中选定并经伊法神谕确认；1840年阿蒂巴在迁都后重建王权，但地方势力已极难驾驭
succession.en: The Alaafin was selected by the Oyo Mesi from royal candidates and confirmed by Ifa oracle; in 1840 Atiba had re-established the kingship after relocation, but local powers were extremely difficult to control

structure.zh: 中央为阿拉芬宫廷，奥约·梅西议事会参与决策，巴索伦握有实权。旧奥约覆灭后迁至新奥约，中央控制力大为缩小，各地方军事领袖（如伊巴丹的战争酋长）实质半独立
structure.en: The center was the Alaafin's court, with the Oyo Mesi council participating in governance and the Basorun holding significant real power. After Old Oyo's destruction the capital relocated to New Oyo, and central control shrank drastically as regional military leaders (such as the war chiefs of Ibadan) became de facto semi-independent

function.zh: 发布政令、接见使者、协调残余附庸
function.en: Issued decrees, received envoys, coordinated remaining vassals

function.zh: 参与国政决策、制衡王权
function.en: Participated in state decisions and checked royal power

function.zh: 组织骑兵与步兵、防御富拉尼和达荷美侵袭
function.en: Organized cavalry and infantry, defended against Fulani and Dahomey attacks

localAdmin.zh: 地方由各城镇的巴勒（首领）自主管理，中央仅保持名义宗主权；伊巴丹、伊杰布等约鲁巴城邦实际独立
localAdmin.en: Localities were governed autonomously by bale (town chiefs), with central authority retaining only nominal suzerainty; Ibadan, Ijebu, and other Yoruba city-states were effectively independent

legalSystem.zh: 以约鲁巴习惯法为主，辅以伊法神谕裁决和首领仲裁
legalSystem.en: Based on Yoruba customary law, supplemented by Ifa oracle pronouncements and chiefly arbitration

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自贡品、市场税、过路关卡与战争掠获，但税收来源已因领土丧失而大幅缩减
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from tribute, market tolls, transit duties, and war spoils, but income sources had greatly shrunk due to territorial losses

religion.zh: 约鲁巴传统宗教（奥里沙信仰），崇拜尚戈、奥贡等神灵；伊斯兰教在北部有渗透
religion.en: Yoruba traditional religion (Orisha worship), venerating deities such as Shango and Ogun; Islam had penetrated in northern areas

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥约以约鲁巴口述史诗传统、精美青铜与黄铜铸造、纺织业（阿索奥克布）与复杂的政治制度著称
culturalAchievements.en: Oyo was noted for Yoruba oral epic traditions, fine bronze and brass casting, textile production (aso-oke cloth), and its complex political institutions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系约鲁巴语
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Yoruba language

philosophy.zh: 以伊法神谕体系为核心的宇宙观，强调命运、祖灵庇佑与社群和谐
philosophy.en: A worldview centered on the Ifa divination system, emphasizing destiny, ancestral protection, and communal harmony

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统；伊斯兰学者使用阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition; Islamic scholars used Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 旧奥约的繁荣经济已瓦解，新奥约以农业和地方贸易为生，长途贸易收入锐减
gdpDescription.en: The former prosperity of Old Oyo had collapsed; New Oyo subsisted on agriculture and local trade, with long-distance trade revenue sharply diminished

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（薯类、谷物）、纺织（阿索奥克布）、铁器加工、地方贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (yams, grain), weaving (aso-oke cloth), ironworking, local trade

tradeGoods.zh: 布匹、铁器、棕榈油、可乐果、奴隶（减少中）
tradeGoods.en: Cloth, ironware, palm oil, kola nuts, slaves (declining)

householdWealth.zh: 酋长与军事精英家庭拥有奴隶和土地；普通农户财产有限，战乱频繁导致普遍贫困化
householdWealth.en: Chiefly and military elite households held slaves and land; ordinary farmers had limited assets, with frequent warfare causing widespread impoverishment

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋-市场混合经济，因内战与领土丧失而严重衰退
economicSystem.en: A tribute-market mixed economy in severe decline due to civil war and territorial loss

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库空虚，旧奥约宝库已在覆灭时丧失。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was depleted; Old Oyo's stores were lost in its destruction.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 勉力维持宫廷运转与基本防务，无力投入重建。
fiscalPolicy.en: Barely sustained court operations and basic defense, with no capacity for reconstruction.

description.zh: 残余的约鲁巴骑兵力量，远不及旧奥约时期规模
description.en: Remnant Yoruba cavalry force, far smaller than in Old Oyo's heyday

description.zh: 以长矛、刀剑和少量火器武装的步兵与各城镇民兵
description.en: Spear-, sword-, and limited firearm-armed infantry and town militias

technology.zh: 以传统骑兵与冷兵器为主，少量欧洲火器通过沿海贸易获得。
technology.en: Primarily traditional cavalry and melee weapons, with limited European firearms obtained via coastal trade.

threats.zh: 约鲁巴内战（尤其伊巴丹崛起）、富拉尼圣战者南侵、达荷美进攻
threats.en: Yoruba civil wars (especially Ibadan's rise), Fulani jihadist southward pressure, Dahomey attacks

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 新奥约直辖区及周边仍效忠的约鲁巴城镇人口约一百万，远低于旧奥约帝国鼎盛时期。
populationDescription.en: The population of New Oyo's directly governed area and nearby loyal Yoruba towns was about one million, far below Old Oyo's peak.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与高级首领、军事贵族、祭司、自由农民与手工业者、外来商人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Royals and senior chiefs, military aristocracy, priests, free farmers and artisans, foreign traders, slaves

allies.zh: 试图恢复对约鲁巴城邦的宗主权，但伊巴丹仅名义上承认阿拉芬地位
allies.en: Attempted to restore suzerainty over Yoruba city-states, but Ibadan only nominally acknowledged the Alaafin

enemies.zh: 伊洛林富拉尼政权、达荷美王国；约鲁巴内部各城邦间相互竞争
enemies.en: Ilorin Fulani emirate, Kingdom of Dahomey; Yoruba city-states competed internally

foreignPolicy.zh: 阿蒂巴致力于约鲁巴各邦联合以对抗伊洛林和达荷美，但成效有限
foreignPolicy.en: Atiba strove to unite Yoruba states against Ilorin and Dahomey, but with limited success

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 约鲁巴城市规划传统、铁器冶炼与铸造工艺、纺织技术；军事方面仍以骑兵为核心
keyInnovations.en: Yoruba urban planning traditions, iron smelting and casting crafts, textile technology; militarily still cavalry-centered

strengths.zh: 约鲁巴文化凝聚力、城市化传统、纺织与手工业基础
strengths.en: Yoruba cultural cohesion, urbanization tradition, textile and craft base

weaknesses.zh: 中央权威崩溃、领土大幅缩减、内战持续、经济衰落
weaknesses.en: Central authority collapsed, territory greatly reduced, ongoing civil wars, economic decline

outlook.zh: 1840年的奥约已从西非霸主沦为残余小邦，阿蒂巴的重建努力难以遏制约鲁巴碎片化趋势，前途暗淡
outlook.en: By 1840 Oyo had fallen from West African hegemon to a remnant minor state; Atiba's reconstruction efforts could not stem Yoruba fragmentation, and the outlook was bleak

description.zh: 1840年的奥约帝国已迁都新奥约，曾经的约鲁巴霸主政权正在内战与外敌夹击下急剧衰落。
description.en: By 1840 the Oyo Empire had relocated to New Oyo; the former Yoruba hegemon was in steep decline under the pressure of civil wars and external enemies.

ruler.zh: 阿尔马米·布巴卡尔·比罗（索里亚家族）

dynasty.zh: 阿尔法亚/索里亚双家族轮流执政

governmentForm.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为基础的神权伊玛目国，两大家族（阿尔法亚与索里亚）轮流推选阿尔马米执政
governmentForm.en: A theocratic imamate based on Islamic law, with two major families (Alfaya and Soriya) alternating in nominating the ruling Almamy

socialStructure.zh: 富拉尼穆斯林贵族居于顶层，以下有宗教学者、自由牧民、农民、手工业者、曼丁卡等附属族群及大量奴隶
socialStructure.en: Fulani Muslim aristocracy at the top, followed by religious scholars, free pastoralists, farmers, artisans, Mandinka and other subject peoples, and a large slave population

rulingClass.zh: 阿尔法亚与索里亚两大家族、省区阿尔法（学者首领）、伊斯兰法官与军事酋长
rulingClass.en: The Alfaya and Soriya families, provincial alfas (scholar-chiefs), Islamic judges, and military leaders

succession.zh: 阿尔马米由阿尔法亚和索里亚两家轮流推选，经宗教长老与省区首领确认；实际上两家竞争激烈，偶有冲突
succession.en: The Almamy was nominated alternately by the Alfaya and Soriya families, confirmed by religious elders and provincial chiefs; in practice competition between the two houses was fierce and occasionally violent

structure.zh: 阿尔马米为名义最高领袖，蒂姆博为首都，国家分为九个省（迪韦），各省由世袭的阿尔法管理；中央与地方权力分散，宗教学者参与治理
structure.en: The Almamy was the nominal supreme leader based at Timbo; the state was divided into nine provinces (diwe), each administered by a hereditary alfa; power was dispersed between center and provinces, with religious scholars participating in governance

name.zh: 阿尔马米宫廷与秘书处

function.zh: 处理中央政务、接见使节、调解省际争端
function.en: Handled central state affairs, received envoys, mediated inter-provincial disputes

function.zh: 管理伊斯兰教育、法官任命与教法裁判
function.en: Managed Islamic education, judge appointments, and sharia adjudication

function.zh: 征收天课、牲畜税与贡品
function.en: Collected zakat, livestock taxes, and tribute

localAdmin.zh: 九省各有世袭阿尔法，下辖村社长老与地方法官；中央控制力有限，省区自治程度较高
localAdmin.en: Each of the nine provinces had a hereditary alfa, with village elders and local judges beneath; central control was limited and provincial autonomy considerable

legalSystem.zh: 以马立克学派伊斯兰教法为主体，辅以富拉尼习惯法
legalSystem.en: Based primarily on Maliki Islamic law, supplemented by Fulani customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自天课、牲畜税、谷物征收、市场税与奴隶贸易利润
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from zakat, livestock taxes, grain levies, market tolls, and profits from the slave trade

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马立克学派），宗教教育网络发达，是西非重要的伊斯兰学术中心
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school), with an extensive religious education network; a major center of Islamic scholarship in West Africa

culturalAchievements.zh: 以发达的古兰经学校网络、阿拉伯文学术写作、阿贾米文学和畜牧-农业综合管理体系闻名
culturalAchievements.en: Renowned for its extensive Quranic school networks, Arabic scholarly writing, Ajami literature, and integrated pastoral-agricultural management

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系富拉语（普拉尔语）；阿拉伯语为宗教与学术语言
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Fula (Pular) language; Arabic as religious and scholarly language

philosophy.zh: 以伊斯兰改革主义和圣战传统为根基，强调教法正义、社会净化与穆斯林团结
philosophy.en: Rooted in Islamic reformism and jihad tradition, emphasizing sharia justice, social purification, and Muslim unity

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字，兼有普拉尔语的阿贾米书写
writingSystem.en: Arabic script, with Pular Ajami writing as well

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业和自给农业为基础，辅以区域贸易与奴隶贸易收入
gdpDescription.en: Based on pastoralism and subsistence agriculture, supplemented by regional trade and slave trade revenue

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、稻米与粟米种植、皮革加工、纺织、区域贸易、奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, rice and millet cultivation, leatherwork, weaving, regional trade, slave trade

tradeGoods.zh: 牛、皮革、蜂蜡、象牙、奴隶、黄金（转口）、可乐果
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, leather, beeswax, ivory, slaves, gold (transit), kola nuts

householdWealth.zh: 富拉尼贵族以牛群和奴隶衡量财富；普通牧民和农民生活简朴
householdWealth.en: Fulani nobles measured wealth in cattle and slaves; ordinary herders and farmers lived simply

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以宗教法规范的贡赋牧农经济，市场交换存在但商品化程度有限
economicSystem.en: A religiously regulated tribute-pastoral-agricultural economy, with market exchange present but limited commercialization

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以牲畜、谷物、布匹和少量金属贵重品为储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury held reserves in livestock, grain, cloth, and modest quantities of precious metals.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以宗教正当性为基础征税，优先保障军事与宗教教育支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Taxation was based on religious legitimacy, prioritizing military and religious education expenditures.

description.zh: 核心机动力量，由高地牧民贵族组成
description.en: Core mobile force composed of highland pastoral aristocracy

description.zh: 各省征发的步兵，以长矛、刀剑和少量火器武装
description.en: Provincial levies armed with spears, swords, and limited firearms

technology.zh: 以传统骑兵战术为主，部分火器通过沿海贸易获得。
technology.en: Primarily traditional cavalry tactics, with some firearms obtained via coastal trade.

threats.zh: 两大家族内斗、周边异教部落袭扰、法国殖民势力从沿海渗透
threats.en: Internal rivalry between the two ruling houses, raids from surrounding non-Muslim groups, French colonial encroachment from the coast

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约八十万，分布于几内亚高地山区与河谷。
populationDescription.en: Population about 800,000, distributed across the Guinea highland mountains and river valleys.

socialClasses.zh: 富拉尼宗教贵族、学者、自由牧民、农民、手工业者、附属族群、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Fulani religious aristocracy, scholars, free herders, farmers, artisans, subject groups, slaves

allies.zh: 与部分周边富拉尼政权保持宗教联系
allies.en: Maintained religious ties with some neighboring Fulani polities

enemies.zh: 周边非穆斯林社群、沿海欧洲殖民据点
enemies.en: Surrounding non-Muslim communities, European coastal colonial posts

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护高地自治、控制通往沿海的贸易路线、抵抗法国渗透
foreignPolicy.en: Defended highland autonomy, controlled trade routes to the coast, resisted French encroachment

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 高地梯田农业管理、畜牧育种、古兰经教育体系、制革与纺织工艺
keyInnovations.en: Highland terrace agriculture management, livestock breeding, Quranic education system, leatherwork and weaving crafts

strengths.zh: 宗教凝聚力、地形防御优势、发达的教育体系、畜牧业基础稳固
strengths.en: Religious cohesion, terrain-based defensive advantages, well-developed education system, solid pastoral base

weaknesses.zh: 双家族轮替制导致内部政治不稳定、经济商品化程度低、火器不足
weaknesses.en: Dual-family alternation caused internal political instability, low economic commercialization, insufficient firearms

outlook.zh: 1840年的富塔贾隆维持着独立，但内部派系竞争和外部法国压力日增，长期前景堪忧
outlook.en: In 1840 Futa Jallon maintained its independence, but internal factional competition and growing French pressure made the long-term outlook worrisome

description.zh: 几内亚高地的富拉尼伊斯兰神权国家，以双家族轮替执政和发达的宗教教育闻名。
description.en: A Fulani Islamic theocratic state in the Guinea highlands, known for its dual-family alternating rule and advanced religious education.

ruler.zh: 阿尔马米（由乌理玛选举产生）

dynasty.zh: 托罗贝伊斯兰学者政权

governmentForm.zh: 由乌理玛（伊斯兰学者）选举阿尔马米的神权寡头共和制
governmentForm.en: A theocratic oligarchic republic in which the ulama (Islamic scholars) elected the Almamy

socialStructure.zh: 托罗贝（富拉尼穆斯林学者阶层）居上，以下有自由牧民、渔民、农民、手工种姓（铁匠、织工、歌手）与奴隶
socialStructure.en: The Torodbe (Fulani Muslim scholarly class) at the top, followed by free herders, fishermen, farmers, endogamous artisan castes (smiths, weavers, griots), and slaves

rulingClass.zh: 托罗贝学者贵族与选举人团
rulingClass.en: Torodbe scholarly nobility and the electoral body

succession.zh: 阿尔马米由宗教选举人团从托罗贝家族中推选，非严格世袭；频繁更替导致政治不稳
succession.en: The Almamy was chosen by a religious electoral body from Torodbe families, not strictly hereditary; frequent turnover caused political instability

structure.zh: 阿尔马米为最高领袖但受乌理玛选举人团制约，国家沿塞内加尔河谷分为若干省区，各省有世袭首领
structure.en: The Almamy was supreme leader but constrained by the ulama electoral body; the state was divided into several provinces along the Senegal River valley, each with hereditary chiefs

function.zh: 处理国政与外交
function.en: Handled state affairs and diplomacy

function.zh: 伊斯兰教法裁判与教育管理
function.en: Sharia adjudication and education management

localAdmin.zh: 各省由世袭酋长管理，中央权威有限
localAdmin.en: Provinces were administered by hereditary chiefs, with limited central authority

legalSystem.zh: 以马立克学派伊斯兰教法为主
legalSystem.en: Based primarily on Maliki Islamic law

taxationSystem.zh: 天课、谷物征收、牲畜税、贸易关税
taxationSystem.en: Zakat, grain levies, livestock taxes, trade duties

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马立克学派），宗教学术传统深厚
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school), with deep religious scholarly traditions

culturalAchievements.zh: 以伊斯兰教育、阿贾米文学传统和塞内加尔河谷农业管理著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for Islamic education, Ajami literary traditions, and Senegal River valley agricultural management

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系富拉语（普拉尔语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Fula (Pulaar) language

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰改革主义、学者治国理念
philosophy.en: Islamic reformism, scholar-led governance ideals

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字与普拉尔语阿贾米
writingSystem.en: Arabic script and Pulaar Ajami

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以塞内加尔河谷洪泛农业和畜牧业为基础，兼有河流贸易
gdpDescription.en: Based on Senegal River valley floodplain agriculture and pastoralism, with some river trade

mainIndustries.zh: 洪泛农业、畜牧业、渔业、河流贸易、手工业
mainIndustries.en: Floodplain agriculture, pastoralism, fishing, river trade, handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、牛、皮革、树胶、奴隶
tradeGoods.en: Grain, cattle, leather, gum arabic, slaves

householdWealth.zh: 学者家族与牧民精英较富裕；大部分农渔民家庭仅够温饱
householdWealth.en: Scholar families and pastoral elites were relatively wealthy; most farming and fishing households lived at subsistence

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以宗教规范的自给型河谷农牧经济
economicSystem.en: A religiously regulated subsistence river-valley agro-pastoral economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库微薄，以谷物和牲畜为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was modest, with grain and livestock as primary reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 量入为出，以维持宗教教育和基本防务为优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Spending within means, prioritizing religious education and basic defense.

description.zh: 以富拉尼骑兵为核心、各省征召步兵为主体
description.en: Fulani cavalry as the core, with provincial levy infantry as the bulk

technology.zh: 传统骑兵战术，火器有限。
technology.en: Traditional cavalry tactics, limited firearms.

threats.zh: 法国从圣路易河口向内陆渗透、摩尔人袭扰、内部派系竞争
threats.en: French encroachment from Saint-Louis upriver, Moorish raids, internal factional competition

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约四十万，沿塞内加尔河中游河谷分布。
populationDescription.en: Population about 400,000, distributed along the middle Senegal River valley.

socialClasses.zh: 托罗贝学者贵族、自由牧民与农民、手工种姓、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Torodbe scholarly aristocracy, free herders and farmers, artisan castes, slaves

allies.zh: 与富塔贾隆保持宗教联系
allies.en: Maintained religious ties with Futa Jallon

enemies.zh: 法国圣路易据点、摩尔部落
enemies.en: French post at Saint-Louis, Moorish tribes

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护河谷独立，对法国河流贸易控制提出交涉
foreignPolicy.en: Defended river-valley independence, negotiated with France over river trade control

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 洪泛农业水利管理、伊斯兰教育体系
keyInnovations.en: Floodplain agricultural water management, Islamic education system

strengths.zh: 深厚的伊斯兰学术传统、河谷农业生产力
strengths.en: Deep Islamic scholarly tradition, river-valley agricultural productivity

weaknesses.zh: 政治不稳定（阿尔马米频繁更替）、法国殖民压力增大、军事力量有限
weaknesses.en: Political instability (frequent Almamy turnover), growing French colonial pressure, limited military power

outlook.zh: 法国正在加紧控制塞内加尔河谷，富塔托罗的独立地位日益受到威胁
outlook.en: France was tightening its grip on the Senegal River valley, and Futa Toro's independence was increasingly threatened

description.zh: 塞内加尔河中游的富拉尼伊斯兰学者国家，政治分散、法国殖民压力日增。
description.en: A Fulani Islamic scholarly state in the middle Senegal River valley, politically fragmented and under growing French colonial pressure.

capital.zh: 姆班扎刚果（圣萨尔瓦多）

governmentForm.zh: 高度衰落的世袭君主制，马尼刚果实为葡萄牙附庸
governmentForm.en: A greatly diminished hereditary monarchy, with the Manikongo effectively a Portuguese vassal

socialStructure.zh: 名义上的王室与贵族、天主教传教士、地方首领、农民与奴隶；传统社会秩序严重瓦解
socialStructure.en: Nominal royalty and nobles, Catholic missionaries, local chiefs, peasants, and slaves; the traditional social order had severely disintegrated

rulingClass.zh: 马尼刚果与残余贵族家族，受葡萄牙殖民官员制约
rulingClass.en: The Manikongo and remnant noble families, constrained by Portuguese colonial officials

succession.zh: 王位在基曼帕和金拉扎两大王室分支间争夺，葡萄牙干预日增
succession.en: The throne was contested between the Kimpanzu and Kinlaza royal branches, with growing Portuguese intervention

structure.zh: 马尼刚果仅控制首都周边有限区域，大部分旧省已脱离控制或被葡萄牙直接管辖
structure.en: The Manikongo controlled only a limited area around the capital; most former provinces had seceded or come under direct Portuguese control

function.zh: 处理残余国政与礼仪
function.en: Handled residual state affairs and ceremonies

localAdmin.zh: 首都附近几个村社保持名义效忠
localAdmin.en: A few villages near the capital maintained nominal allegiance

legalSystem.zh: 传统刚果习惯法与天主教教规混合
legalSystem.en: Mix of traditional Kongo customary law and Catholic canon law

taxationSystem.zh: 微薄的贡品征收，实际财政高度依赖葡萄牙补助
taxationSystem.en: Meager tribute collection, with finances heavily dependent on Portuguese subsidies

religion.zh: 天主教与刚果传统信仰融合
religion.en: Catholicism blended with traditional Kongo beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 撒哈拉以南非洲最早接受基督教的王国之一；独特的天主教-刚果融合文化传统
culturalAchievements.en: One of the earliest sub-Saharan African kingdoms to adopt Christianity; distinctive Catholic-Kongo syncretic cultural traditions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（基刚果语）；葡萄牙语用于外交与宗教
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Kikongo); Portuguese used for diplomacy and religion

philosophy.zh: 天主教教义与刚果祖灵信仰交融
philosophy.en: Catholic doctrine interwoven with Kongo ancestral beliefs

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（通过葡萄牙传教士引入）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (introduced through Portuguese missionaries)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 仅余微薄的自给农业，旧日的奴隶贸易财富早已消散
gdpDescription.en: Reduced to meager subsistence agriculture; the former wealth from the slave trade had long dissipated

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、少量手工业
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, minor handicrafts

tradeGoods.zh: 少量象牙、蜂蜡
tradeGoods.en: Small quantities of ivory, beeswax

householdWealth.zh: 王室贫困，普通民众以自给农业勉强度日
householdWealth.en: The royal house was impoverished; ordinary people barely subsisted on farming

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 崩溃后的自给经济，高度依赖葡萄牙殖民经济体系
economicSystem.en: A post-collapse subsistence economy, heavily dependent on the Portuguese colonial economic system

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库实际为空。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was effectively empty.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 完全依赖葡萄牙补助维持王廷运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Entirely dependent on Portuguese subsidies to maintain court functions.

description.zh: 仅余的名义武装力量
description.en: The sole remaining nominal armed force

technology.zh: 极为落后，仅有传统武器和少量老旧火器。
technology.en: Extremely backward, with only traditional weapons and a few antiquated firearms.

threats.zh: 完全受葡萄牙控制，无力自主防御
threats.en: Entirely under Portuguese control, incapable of independent defense

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 残余刚果王国直辖人口约十万，主要在姆班扎刚果周边。
populationDescription.en: The remnant Kongo kingdom's directly governed population was about 100,000, mainly around Mbanza Kongo.

socialClasses.zh: 名义王室、天主教教士、村社首领、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Nominal royalty, Catholic clergy, village chiefs, peasants, slaves

allies.zh: 葡萄牙（宗主国）
allies.en: Portugal (suzerain power)

enemies.zh: 无自主外交能力
enemies.en: No independent diplomatic capacity

foreignPolicy.zh: 完全依附葡萄牙
foreignPolicy.en: Entirely subordinate to Portugal

era.zh: 前殖民-殖民过渡时代

keyInnovations.zh: 历史上曾是非洲最早接受欧洲技术的王国之一，但1840年已完全衰落
keyInnovations.en: Historically one of the earliest African kingdoms to adopt European technologies, but by 1840 completely declined

strengths.zh: 悠久的历史传统与天主教-刚果融合文化
strengths.en: Long historical tradition and Catholic-Kongo syncretic culture

weaknesses.zh: 政治完全附庸化、领土极度萎缩、经济崩溃、军事形同虚设
weaknesses.en: Politically completely vassalized, territory extremely shrunken, economic collapse, military virtually nonexistent

outlook.zh: 刚果王国已沦为葡萄牙名义附庸，仅保留象征性存在
outlook.en: The Kingdom of Kongo had become a nominal Portuguese vassal, retaining only symbolic existence

description.zh: 曾经辉煌的中非基督教王国，1840年已沦为葡萄牙附庸残余。
description.en: Once a magnificent Central African Christian kingdom, by 1840 reduced to a remnant Portuguese vassal.

governmentForm.zh: 以莫格·纳巴为最高统治者的联合王国体制，下辖多个半自治的莫西王邦
governmentForm.en: A confederate kingdom system with the Mogho Naba as paramount ruler, overseeing several semi-autonomous Mossi principalities

socialStructure.zh: 纳科姆塞（王族战士阶层）居上，以下有尼约尼奥塞（原住民地权持有者）、自由农民、手工种姓与奴隶
socialStructure.en: Nakomsé (royal warrior class) at the top, followed by Nyonyosé (autochthonous earth-priest lineages), free farmers, artisan castes, and slaves

rulingClass.zh: 纳科姆塞王族与各邦纳巴（首领）
rulingClass.en: Nakomsé royals and the naba (chiefs) of each principality

succession.zh: 莫格·纳巴由选举人从王族中推选，非长子继承制
succession.en: The Mogho Naba was selected by electors from the royal lineage, not by primogeniture

structure.zh: 莫格·纳巴统领瓦加杜古王国，亚滕加、滕科多戈等附属王邦保持内部自治但承认宗主权
structure.en: The Mogho Naba ruled the Ouagadougou kingdom; vassal states like Yatenga and Tenkodogo maintained internal autonomy while acknowledging suzerainty

function.zh: 处理政务、仪式与对外关系
function.en: Handled administration, ceremonies, and external relations

function.zh: 组织防务与征战
function.en: Organized defense and military campaigns

localAdmin.zh: 各地由纳巴和尼约尼奥塞地权长老共同管理
localAdmin.en: Localities were jointly administered by nabas and Nyonyosé earth-priest elders

legalSystem.zh: 以莫西习惯法为主体，部分地区受伊斯兰法影响
legalSystem.en: Primarily based on Mossi customary law, with some Islamic law influence in certain areas

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品、劳役征发、市场税
taxationSystem.en: Tribute, labor corvée, market taxes

religion.zh: 莫西传统宗教（祖灵与地神崇拜）为主，伊斯兰教在商人群体中有影响
religion.en: Mossi traditional religion (ancestor and earth-spirit worship) dominant, with Islam influential among merchant communities

culturalAchievements.zh: 以独特的纳巴宫廷仪式体系、面具传统和抵御伊斯兰帝国扩张的历史著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for its distinctive naba court ceremonial system, mask traditions, and history of resisting Islamic empire expansion

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系古尔语支（莫西语/莫雷语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Gur branch (Mossi/Mooré language)

philosophy.zh: 以王权神圣性、地权与政权二元体系、祖灵庇佑为核心
philosophy.en: Centered on the sacrality of kingship, the dualism of earth-rights and political power, and ancestral protection

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以粟米、高粱等旱地农业为基础，辅以畜牧业和跨萨赫勒贸易中转
gdpDescription.en: Based on dryland agriculture (millet, sorghum), supplemented by pastoralism and trans-Sahelian trade transit

mainIndustries.zh: 旱地农业、畜牧业、铁器加工、棉纺织、区域贸易中转
mainIndustries.en: Dryland agriculture, pastoralism, ironworking, cotton weaving, regional trade transit

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、牲畜、棉布、铁器、可乐果（转口）、盐（转口）
tradeGoods.en: Grain, livestock, cotton cloth, ironware, kola nuts (transit), salt (transit)

householdWealth.zh: 王族与首领家庭拥有较多牲畜和奴隶；农民家庭以土地和谷物储备为主
householdWealth.en: Royal and chiefly families held more livestock and slaves; farming households depended on land and grain stores

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋与市场并存的农牧经济
economicSystem.en: An agro-pastoral economy combining tribute and market exchange

treasuryDescription.zh: 以实物（谷物、牲畜、布匹）为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Reserves mainly in kind (grain, livestock, cloth).

fiscalPolicy.zh: 稳健保守，确保宫廷维持和军事防务。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative, ensuring court maintenance and military defense.

description.zh: 王族战士贵族组成的骑兵，是军事核心力量
description.en: Cavalry formed by the royal warrior aristocracy, the military core

description.zh: 各地农民征召的步兵力量
description.en: Infantry levied from local farming populations

technology.zh: 以骑兵和传统武器为主，少量火器。莫西诸国历史上曾成功抵御松海帝国入侵。
technology.en: Primarily cavalry and traditional weapons, with few firearms. The Mossi states historically resisted Songhai Empire invasions.

threats.zh: 周边伊斯兰政权压力、内部各邦竞争
threats.en: Pressure from surrounding Islamic polities, competition among internal principalities

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 莫西诸王国（含瓦加杜古、亚滕加、滕科多戈等）总人口约一百五十万。
populationDescription.en: The Mossi kingdoms (including Ouagadougou, Yatenga, Tenkodogo, etc.) had a total population of about 1.5 million.

socialClasses.zh: 纳科姆塞王族、尼约尼奥塞地权阶层、自由农民、手工种姓、商人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Nakomsé royals, Nyonyosé earth-priest lineages, free farmers, artisan castes, merchants, slaves

allies.zh: 莫西诸王邦之间保持联盟关系
allies.en: The Mossi principalities maintained alliance ties among themselves

enemies.zh: 周边伊斯兰政权（索科托哈里发国的影响区）
enemies.en: Surrounding Islamic polities (influence zone of the Sokoto Caliphate)

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护独立、抵制伊斯兰化、控制贸易通道
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained independence, resisted Islamization, controlled trade routes

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 旱地农业管理、骑兵战术、铁器冶炼
keyInnovations.en: Dryland agricultural management, cavalry tactics, iron smelting

strengths.zh: 政治稳定持久、骑兵力量较强、成功维持宗教独立性
strengths.en: Long-standing political stability, relatively strong cavalry, successfully maintained religious independence

weaknesses.zh: 技术落后于火器普及地区、经济商品化程度低、各邦凝聚力有限
weaknesses.en: Technologically behind firearms-equipped regions, low economic commercialization, limited cohesion among principalities

outlook.zh: 1840年的莫西诸国总体稳定，但面对19世纪后期欧洲殖民浪潮缺乏准备
outlook.en: In 1840 the Mossi states were broadly stable, but unprepared for the European colonial onslaught of the later 19th century

description.zh: 以瓦加杜古为中心的西非莫西联合王国，以骑兵传统和抵御伊斯兰化闻名。
description.en: A West African Mossi confederate kingdom centered on Ouagadougou, known for its cavalry tradition and resistance to Islamization.

governmentForm.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为框架的世袭苏丹制，苏丹通过省区长官与部族酋长体系统治
governmentForm.en: A hereditary sultanate framed by Islamic law, with the sultan ruling through provincial governors and a tribal chieftaincy system

socialStructure.zh: 苏丹与凯拉王族居上，以下有乌理玛、地方酋长、自由农牧民、手工业者与大量奴隶
socialStructure.en: The sultan and Keira royals at the top, followed by ulama, local chiefs, free farmer-herders, artisans, and a large enslaved population

rulingClass.zh: 凯拉王族与宫廷大臣、主要部族酋长
rulingClass.en: Keira royals and court ministers, major tribal chiefs

succession.zh: 苏丹位在凯拉家族内部传承，经宫廷与部族首领确认
succession.en: The sultanate passed within the Keira family, confirmed by court and tribal leaders

structure.zh: 苏丹驻法希尔统领全国，国家分为多个省区和部族领地，各有酋长负责征税和司法
structure.en: The sultan ruled from El Fasher; the state was divided into provinces and tribal domains, each with chiefs responsible for tax collection and justice

function.zh: 处理政务、接见部族代表与外来商人
function.en: Handled state affairs, received tribal representatives and foreign merchants

function.zh: 征收贡赋与管理跨撒哈拉贸易收入
function.en: Collected tribute and managed trans-Saharan trade revenue

function.zh: 维持骑兵与边防力量
function.en: Maintained cavalry and frontier forces

localAdmin.zh: 地方由部族酋长和省区长官分层管理
localAdmin.en: Local governance operated through tribal chiefs and provincial administrators in a layered system

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与当地习惯法并行
legalSystem.en: Islamic law and local customary law operated in parallel

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品、牲畜税、市场关税、跨撒哈拉贸易过境税
taxationSystem.en: Tribute, livestock taxes, market duties, trans-Saharan trade transit tolls

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马立克学派），混合苏丹地区传统信仰
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school), blended with Sudanic traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 以跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽地位、伊斯兰学术传统和独特的富尔族文化著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for its role as a trans-Saharan trade hub, Islamic scholarly tradition, and distinctive Fur ethnic culture

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（富尔语）；阿拉伯语为通用语
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan family (Fur language); Arabic as lingua franca

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰法学与苏丹地区传统权威理念结合
philosophy.en: Islamic jurisprudence combined with Sudanic traditional concepts of authority

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以农牧业为基础，跨撒哈拉贸易（奴隶、象牙、鸵鸟羽毛）带来重要收入
gdpDescription.en: Based on agro-pastoralism, with significant income from trans-Saharan trade (slaves, ivory, ostrich feathers)

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（粟米、高粱）、畜牧业、跨撒哈拉贸易、奴隶贸易、铁器加工
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (millet, sorghum), pastoralism, trans-Saharan trade, slave trade, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、象牙、鸵鸟羽毛、牛、兽皮、阿拉伯树胶
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, ivory, ostrich feathers, cattle, hides, gum arabic

unitName.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unitName.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

householdWealth.zh: 苏丹家族与大酋长极富，拥有大量牲畜和奴隶；普通牧农民生活简朴
householdWealth.en: The sultan's family and great chiefs were very wealthy with large herds and slaves; ordinary farmer-herders lived simply

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋与跨撒哈拉贸易为核心的混合经济
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy centered on tribute and trans-Saharan trade

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库充裕，以金属、布匹、牲畜和奴隶为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was ample, with metals, cloth, livestock, and slaves as primary reserves.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持强大骑兵与宫廷开支，同时投资贸易路线安全。
fiscalPolicy.en: Sustained a strong cavalry and court expenditures while investing in trade route security.

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

unit.zh: 布匹、铜棒、玛丽亚·特蕾西亚银元
unit.en: Cloth, copper bars, Maria Theresa thalers

description.zh: 核心机动力量，以富尔族和阿拉伯骑兵为主
description.en: Core mobile force, primarily Fur and Arab horsemen

description.zh: 各部族征发的步兵与地方守备力量
description.en: Infantry and local garrison forces levied from various tribes

technology.zh: 以骑兵为核心的萨赫勒战争传统，火器通过跨撒哈拉贸易获取但数量有限。
technology.en: Cavalry-centered Sahelian warfare tradition; firearms obtained through trans-Saharan trade but in limited quantities.

threats.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里的埃及苏丹政权在东邻扩张、南部部族动荡
threats.en: Muhammad Ali's Egyptian Sudan regime expanding to the east, southern tribal unrest

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一百七十万，分布于达尔富尔高原及周边地区。
populationDescription.en: Population about 1.7 million, distributed across the Darfur plateau and surrounding areas.

socialClasses.zh: 凯拉王族、乌理玛、部族酋长、自由农牧民、手工业者、商人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Keira royals, ulama, tribal chiefs, free farmer-herders, artisans, merchants, slaves

allies.zh: 与部分跨撒哈拉贸易伙伴保持关系
allies.en: Maintained ties with trans-Saharan trade partners

enemies.zh: 埃及苏丹（土耳其总督区）是最大威胁
enemies.en: Egyptian Sudan (the Turkiyya) was the greatest threat

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护独立、控制跨撒哈拉贸易路线、抵抗埃及扩张
foreignPolicy.en: Defended independence, controlled trans-Saharan trade routes, resisted Egyptian expansion

era.zh: 前殖民时代苏丹地区

keyInnovations.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易网络管理、旱地农牧综合技术、铁器冶炼
keyInnovations.en: Trans-Saharan trade network management, dryland agro-pastoral technology, iron smelting

strengths.zh: 地处贸易要道、骑兵力量强大、凯拉王朝统治根基深厚
strengths.en: Located on key trade routes, strong cavalry, deeply rooted Keira dynasty rule

weaknesses.zh: 受埃及苏丹政权威胁、火器与现代军事技术不足、依赖奴隶贸易
weaknesses.en: Threatened by the Egyptian Sudan regime, insufficient firearms and modern military technology, dependent on slave trade

outlook.zh: 达尔富尔在1840年仍保持独立和稳定，但埃及扩张主义构成日益严重的长期威胁
outlook.en: Darfur remained independent and stable in 1840, but Egyptian expansionism posed an increasingly serious long-term threat

description.zh: 苏丹西部凯拉王朝统治的伊斯兰苏丹国，是跨撒哈拉贸易的重要枢纽。
description.en: An Islamic sultanate in western Sudan ruled by the Keira dynasty, an important hub of trans-Saharan trade.

ruler.zh: 总督阿赫迈德·帕夏·阿布·维丹

dynasty.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里王朝（埃及派遣）

governmentForm.zh: 埃及赫迪夫国的殖民省区，由开罗任命的总督管辖
governmentForm.en: A colonial province of the Egyptian Khedivate, administered by a governor appointed from Cairo

socialStructure.zh: 埃及-土耳其军官与官僚居上，以下有科普特书记官、阿拉伯商人、苏丹本地部族首领、农民、牧民与大量奴隶
socialStructure.en: Turco-Egyptian military officers and bureaucrats at the top, followed by Coptic clerks, Arab merchants, Sudanese tribal chiefs, farmers, herders, and a large enslaved population

rulingClass.zh: 埃及派遣的土耳其-埃及军官阶层
rulingClass.en: Turco-Egyptian officer class sent from Egypt

succession.zh: 总督由穆罕默德·阿里及其继承人从开罗任命
succession.en: Governors were appointed from Cairo by Muhammad Ali and his successors

structure.zh: 喀土穆为行政中心，下辖森纳尔、科尔多凡、努巴山区等省区，各省设穆迪尔管辖。实行军事-官僚统治，对本地部族采取间接管理
structure.en: Khartoum was the administrative center; below it were provinces including Sennar, Kordofan, and the Nuba mountains, each with a mudir. Military-bureaucratic rule prevailed, with indirect management of local tribes

function.zh: 统管殖民行政与军事事务
function.en: Oversaw colonial administration and military affairs
