function.zh: 征收赋税与管理贸易垄断
function.en: Collected taxes and managed trade monopolies

function.zh: 维持军事占领与镇压反抗
function.en: Maintained military occupation and suppressed resistance

localAdmin.zh: 地方通过本地部族酋长间接管理，但受驻军威慑约束
localAdmin.en: Local areas were indirectly managed through native tribal chiefs, constrained by garrison deterrence

legalSystem.zh: 埃及行政法令为主，伊斯兰教法适用于穆斯林民事事务
legalSystem.en: Egyptian administrative decrees predominated, with Islamic law applying to Muslim civil matters

taxationSystem.zh: 沉重的赋税包括谷物税、牲畜税、奴隶征发、贸易垄断与劳役征召
taxationSystem.en: Heavy taxes including grain levies, livestock taxes, slave requisitions, trade monopolies, and labor corvées

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，苏菲教团（尤其卡迪里耶和萨马尼耶）影响深远
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant, with Sufi orders (especially Qadiriyya and Sammaniyya) deeply influential

culturalAchievements.zh: 喀土穆作为新兴行政城市开始发展；尼罗河汇流处的地理优势使其成为贸易中心
culturalAchievements.en: Khartoum was developing as a new administrative city; its location at the Nile confluence gave it advantages as a trade center

languageFamily.zh: 阿拉伯语为行政语言；努比亚语、贝贾语、努巴语等本地语言并存
languageFamily.en: Arabic as administrative language; Nubian, Beja, Nuba, and other local languages coexisted

philosophy.zh: 苏菲神秘主义与伊斯兰教法传统并存，对埃及殖民统治的不满在宗教话语中蓄积
philosophy.en: Sufi mysticism and Islamic legal traditions coexisted; resentment against Egyptian colonial rule accumulated in religious discourse

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 殖民地经济以向埃及输送贡赋（奴隶、黄金、牲畜、阿拉伯树胶）为导向，本地民众负担沉重
gdpDescription.en: A colonial economy oriented toward sending tribute to Egypt (slaves, gold, livestock, gum arabic), with heavy burdens on the local population

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、奴隶贸易与掠奴远征、阿拉伯树胶采集、象牙贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, slave trade and raiding expeditions, gum arabic collection, ivory trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、象牙、阿拉伯树胶、牛、黄金、鸵鸟羽毛
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, ivory, gum arabic, cattle, gold, ostrich feathers

householdWealth.zh: 埃及官员与大商人极富；苏丹本地民众在沉重赋税下普遍贫困
householdWealth.en: Egyptian officials and major merchants were very wealthy; Sudanese locals were generally impoverished under heavy taxation

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 殖民掠夺型经济，利润大部分回流开罗
economicSystem.en: An extractive colonial economy, with most profits flowing back to Cairo

treasuryDescription.zh: 盈余上缴埃及国库。
treasuryDescription.en: Surplus remitted to the Egyptian treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以最大化对埃及的贡赋输送为目标，对本地发展投入极少。
fiscalPolicy.en: Aimed to maximize tribute remittance to Egypt, with minimal investment in local development.

name.zh: 埃及正规军驻苏丹部队

description.zh: 配备现代火器的埃及-土耳其正规军
description.en: Turco-Egyptian regular forces equipped with modern firearms

description.zh: 招募的苏丹本地非正规武装
description.en: Recruited Sudanese irregular fighters

description.zh: 从南部掠获训练的奴隶士兵
description.en: Slave soldiers captured and trained from the south

technology.zh: 配备欧式步枪和火炮的近代化军队，远超周边非洲政权的军事水平。
technology.en: Modernized army equipped with European-style rifles and artillery, far surpassing the military level of surrounding African polities.

threats.zh: 达尔富尔独立势力、南部部族反抗、苏丹本地民众反埃及统治情绪
threats.en: Darfur independence forces, southern tribal resistance, Sudanese popular resentment against Egyptian rule

description.zh: 常规训练体系，兵种有基本配合
description.en: Regular training regimen with basic unit coordination

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 克虏伯式后装线膛钢炮
description.en: Krupp-style breech-loading rifled steel cannon

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 蒸汽动力铁甲战船，木帆船终结者
description.en: Steam-powered ironclad warship, rendering wooden ships obsolete

populationDescription.zh: 埃属苏丹管辖区人口约两百五十万，包括尼罗河谷阿拉伯化居民、努比亚人、贝贾人、努巴山区居民及南部部族。
populationDescription.en: The population under Egyptian Sudan's administration was about 2.5 million, including Arabized Nile valley inhabitants, Nubians, Beja, Nuba mountain peoples, and southern tribes.

socialClasses.zh: 土耳其-埃及军官与官僚、科普特书记、阿拉伯商人、部族首领、农牧民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Turco-Egyptian officers and bureaucrats, Coptic clerks, Arab merchants, tribal chiefs, farmer-herders, slaves

allies.zh: 作为埃及殖民地，外交由开罗主导
allies.en: As an Egyptian colony, diplomacy was directed from Cairo

enemies.zh: 达尔富尔苏丹国、南部反抗部族
enemies.en: Sultanate of Darfur, southern resistance tribes

foreignPolicy.zh: 扩大控制范围、镇压反抗、最大化资源掠夺
foreignPolicy.en: Expanded territorial control, suppressed resistance, maximized resource extraction

era.zh: 近代殖民统治时期

keyInnovations.zh: 引入欧式军事技术、开辟尼罗河蒸汽航运、建立喀土穆行政基础设施
keyInnovations.en: Introduced European military technology, opened Nile steamship navigation, established Khartoum administrative infrastructure

strengths.zh: 现代化军事力量、开罗的财政与军事支持、战略地理位置
strengths.en: Modernized military, Cairo's fiscal and military backing, strategic geographic position

weaknesses.zh: 殖民统治引发广泛民怨、财政依赖掠夺性税收、治理效率低下
weaknesses.en: Colonial rule generated widespread resentment, finances depended on extractive taxation, governance was inefficient

outlook.zh: 1840年埃及苏丹控制力尚稳固，但沉重剥削已埋下日后马赫迪起义的种子
outlook.en: In 1840 Egyptian Sudan's control was still firm, but heavy exploitation was sowing the seeds of the future Mahdist uprising

description.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里征服后建立的埃及殖民统治区，以喀土穆为中心实行军事-官僚管理。
description.en: An Egyptian colonial territory established after Muhammad Ali's conquest, administered by military-bureaucratic governance centered on Khartoum.

ruler.zh: 穆洛佩韦·伊卢恩加·卡巴莱

governmentForm.zh: 以穆洛佩韦为神圣国王的世袭君主制，通过一套复杂的政治记忆体系（卢库萨）和宫廷官职维持统治
governmentForm.en: A hereditary monarchy with the Mulopwe as sacred king, maintained through an elaborate political memory system (lukasa) and court offices

socialStructure.zh: 王室与巴洛佩韦贵族居上，以下有班布迪耶（记忆持有者）、地方首领、农民、铁匠与奴隶
socialStructure.en: Royal family and balopwe nobility at the top, followed by bambudye (memory holders), local chiefs, farmers, smiths, and slaves

rulingClass.zh: 穆洛佩韦王族与班布迪耶秘密社团
rulingClass.en: The Mulopwe's royal lineage and the Bambudye secret society

succession.zh: 穆洛佩韦由王族与班布迪耶等核心精英从合格候选人中推选
succession.en: The Mulopwe was selected by the royal clan and Bambudye elite from qualified candidates

structure.zh: 中央为穆洛佩韦宫廷，辅以班布迪耶和其他宫廷官职；地方由世袭首领与任命官员并行管理
structure.en: The center was the Mulopwe's court, supported by the Bambudye and other court offices; localities were managed by hereditary chiefs and appointed officials in parallel

function.zh: 政务决策、仪式主持与附庸管理
function.en: Policy decisions, ceremonial leadership, and vassal management

function.zh: 保管政治记忆、参与王权合法性认证与继承仲裁
function.en: Preserved political memory, validated royal legitimacy, and arbitrated succession

localAdmin.zh: 地方由世袭首领和中央派遣官员共同管理
localAdmin.en: Localities were jointly managed by hereditary chiefs and centrally appointed officials

legalSystem.zh: 卢巴习惯法，由穆洛佩韦宫廷终裁
legalSystem.en: Luba customary law, with the Mulopwe's court as final arbiter

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品（铜、铁器、盐、象牙、食物）、劳役征发
taxationSystem.en: Tribute (copper, ironware, salt, ivory, food), labor corvée

religion.zh: 卢巴传统宗教，崇拜最高神维迪耶·穆库鲁和祖灵
religion.en: Luba traditional religion, worshipping the supreme deity Vidye Mukulu and ancestral spirits

culturalAchievements.zh: 以卢库萨记忆板、精美木雕、铜器铸造和复杂的政治制度创新闻名
culturalAchievements.en: Famous for lukasa memory boards, fine woodcarving, copper casting, and innovative political institutions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（基卢巴语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Kiluba language)

philosophy.zh: 以神圣王权、政治记忆与祖灵庇佑为核心的世界观
philosophy.en: A worldview centered on sacred kingship, political memory, and ancestral protection

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，以卢库萨记忆板作为政治知识的辅助记忆工具
writingSystem.en: No script; lukasa memory boards served as mnemonic devices for political knowledge

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以自给农业和区域贸易为基础，铜和铁器加工为重要产业
gdpDescription.en: Based on subsistence agriculture and regional trade, with copper and iron processing as important industries

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（木薯、粟米）、铜矿开采与加工、铁器制造、盐业、象牙贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (cassava, millet), copper mining and processing, ironworking, salt production, ivory trade

tradeGoods.zh: 铜十字币、铁器、盐、象牙、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Copper cross-ingots, ironware, salt, ivory, palm oil

householdWealth.zh: 王族与高级首领拥有铜器和奴隶；普通农民以土地和作物为资产
householdWealth.en: Royals and senior chiefs held copper and slaves; ordinary farmers relied on land and crops

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋和区域铜-盐贸易为核心的经济体系
economicSystem.en: An economic system centered on tribute and regional copper-salt trade

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以铜器、象牙和实物贡品为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves consisted mainly of copperware, ivory, and tribute goods in kind.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持宫廷运转、资助班布迪耶机构与防务。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained court operations, funded Bambudye institution and defense.

description.zh: 穆洛佩韦直属的精锐武装力量
description.en: Elite armed forces directly under the Mulopwe

description.zh: 各省首领征发的战士
description.en: Warriors levied by provincial chiefs

technology.zh: 以铁制长矛、刀剑和弓箭为主要武器，无火器。
technology.en: Iron spears, swords, and bows as primary weapons; no firearms.

threats.zh: 边境地区分离势力、赞比西河流域的阿拉伯-斯瓦希里贸易者武装渗透
threats.en: Frontier secessionist forces, Arab-Swahili armed trader penetration from the Zambezi basin

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一百万，分布于刚果东南部的卢阿拉巴河与卢武阿河流域。
populationDescription.en: Population about one million, distributed across the Lualaba and Luvua river basins in southeastern Congo.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与巴洛佩韦贵族、班布迪耶秘密社团成员、地方首领、农民、铁匠、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Royals and balopwe nobility, Bambudye society members, local chiefs, farmers, smiths, slaves

allies.zh: 与卢恩达帝国保持传统联系
allies.en: Maintained traditional ties with the Lunda Empire

enemies.zh: 分离的附庸首领、外部贸易者武装
enemies.en: Secessionist vassal chiefs, armed external traders

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护核心领土控制、管理附庸关系、参与区域铜-盐贸易网络
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained core territorial control, managed vassal relations, participated in regional copper-salt trade networks

era.zh: 前殖民时代中非

keyInnovations.zh: 铜矿冶炼技术、精致木雕与铸造工艺、卢库萨记忆板政治技术、铁器生产
keyInnovations.en: Copper smelting technology, refined woodcarving and casting, lukasa memory board political technology, iron production

strengths.zh: 精巧的政治制度、铜与铁器加工能力、丰富的文化传统
strengths.en: Sophisticated political institutions, copper and iron processing capability, rich cultural traditions

weaknesses.zh: 无火器、面对外部贸易网络冲击脆弱、中央控制有离心化倾向
weaknesses.en: No firearms, vulnerable to external trade network disruptions, central control tending toward decentralization

outlook.zh: 1840年的卢巴王国尚保持稳定，但东非奴隶-象牙贸易前沿的推进将很快冲击其社会结构
outlook.en: In 1840 the Luba Kingdom was still stable, but the advancing East African slave-ivory trade frontier would soon impact its social structure

description.zh: 刚果东南部以神圣王权和精巧政治制度闻名的班图王国。
description.en: A Bantu kingdom in southeastern Congo renowned for its sacred kingship and sophisticated political institutions.

governmentForm.zh: 以祖鲁军事体制为基础的中央集权君主制，国王对军政大权实行绝对控制
governmentForm.en: A centralized monarchy based on the Zulu military system, with the king exercising absolute control over military and political power

socialStructure.zh: 以原祖鲁核心群体（赞西）居上，以下有恩赫拉（被吸纳的索托-茨瓦纳群体）与霍利（被征服的绍纳群体及其他附庸），按年龄团编入军团
socialStructure.en: The original Zulu core group (Zansi) at the top, followed by Enhla (absorbed Sotho-Tswana groups) and Hole (conquered Shona and other subject peoples), organized into age-regiment units

rulingClass.zh: 姆齐利卡齐与库马洛王族、赞西核心贵族与高级军团指挥官
rulingClass.en: Mzilikazi and the Khumalo royals, Zansi core aristocracy, and senior regimental commanders

succession.zh: 理论上由国王指定继承人，实际为姆齐利卡齐独裁统治
succession.en: In theory the king designated a successor; in practice it was Mzilikazi's autocratic rule

structure.zh: 国王为绝对统治者，通过军团体制和地区驻军管理国家；军事据点兼行政中心
structure.en: The king was absolute ruler, governing through the regimental system and regional garrisons; military posts doubled as administrative centers

function.zh: 处理政务与外交
function.en: Handled state affairs and diplomacy

function.zh: 管理年龄军团与军事行动
function.en: Managed age-regiments and military operations

localAdmin.zh: 各地由军团驻地指挥官管理，绍纳附庸酋长缴纳贡品
localAdmin.en: Localities were managed by regimental garrison commanders; Shona vassal chiefs paid tribute

legalSystem.zh: 国王拥有最高司法权，以恩德贝莱习惯法为基础
legalSystem.en: The king held supreme judicial power, based on Ndebele customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品（牛、谷物）、劳役、战争掠获
taxationSystem.en: Tribute (cattle, grain), labor service, war booty

religion.zh: 恩德贝莱传统宗教，崇拜姆利莫（最高神）和祖灵
religion.en: Ndebele traditional religion, worshipping Mlimo (supreme deity) and ancestral spirits

culturalAchievements.zh: 以祖鲁式军事组织、精美盾牌艺术与珠饰传统著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for Zulu-style military organization, fine shield art, and beadwork traditions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（恩德贝莱语/北恩德贝莱语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Ndebele/Northern Ndebele language)

philosophy.zh: 以军事荣誉、牛群财富和王权至上为核心价值观
philosophy.en: Core values centered on military honor, cattle wealth, and royal supremacy

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No script; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业（牛群）和战争掠获为经济基础，农业由附庸提供
gdpDescription.en: Economy based on pastoralism (cattle herds) and war spoils, with agriculture provided by subject peoples

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、掠夺经济、附庸贡赋农业、狩猎（象牙）
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, raiding economy, vassal tribute agriculture, hunting (ivory)

tradeGoods.zh: 象牙、牛皮、兽皮
tradeGoods.en: Ivory, cattle hides, animal skins

householdWealth.zh: 王族和军团指挥官控制大量牛群；普通战士和附庸民众财产有限
householdWealth.en: Royals and regimental commanders controlled large cattle herds; ordinary warriors and subject peoples had limited property

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以战争掠夺和牧牛为核心的军事化经济
economicSystem.en: A militarized economy centered on raiding and cattle herding

treasuryDescription.zh: 财富以牛群和象牙形式存在，无集中货币化国库。
treasuryDescription.en: Wealth existed in the form of cattle herds and ivory; no centralized monetary treasury.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 通过掠夺和贡赋维持军事国家运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Sustained the military state through raiding and tribute.

description.zh: 按祖鲁模式编组的年龄军团，是国家军事核心，使用短矛（阿塞盖）和牛皮盾
description.en: Age-regiments organized on the Zulu model, the military core of the state, using short spears (assegai) and cowhide shields

technology.zh: 祖鲁式近战战术精湛，但火器极为有限。
technology.en: Mastered Zulu-style close-combat tactics, but firearms were extremely limited.

threats.zh: 布尔人（沃尔特雷克者）从南方进入、绍纳各邦反抗、英国传教士与猎人带来的政治渗透
threats.en: Boer voortrekkers approaching from the south, Shona resistance, political penetration by British missionaries and hunters

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约五十万，包括恩德贝莱核心群体和被征服的绍纳及其他族群。
populationDescription.en: Population about 500,000, including the Ndebele core group and conquered Shona and other peoples.

socialClasses.zh: 赞西（祖鲁核心）、恩赫拉（被吸纳群体）、霍利（被征服群体）、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Zansi (Zulu core), Enhla (absorbed groups), Hole (conquered groups), slaves

allies.zh: 与部分欧洲传教士和猎人保持贸易关系
allies.en: Maintained trade relations with some European missionaries and hunters

enemies.zh: 布尔人、绍纳各邦、祖鲁王国
enemies.en: Boers, Shona polities, Zulu Kingdom

foreignPolicy.zh: 巩固对马塔贝莱兰的控制、防范布尔人与外来势力
foreignPolicy.en: Consolidated control over Matabeleland, guarded against Boers and external forces

era.zh: 穆费卡内后时代南非

keyInnovations.zh: 祖鲁式军团组织、近战战术、军事移民殖民体制
keyInnovations.en: Zulu-style regimental organization, close-combat tactics, military settler colonization system

strengths.zh: 强大的军事组织、姆齐利卡齐的个人权威、新建立的领土控制
strengths.en: Powerful military organization, Mzilikazi's personal authority, newly established territorial control

weaknesses.zh: 缺乏火器、依赖掠夺经济、面临布尔人武装殖民压力
weaknesses.en: Lacked firearms, dependent on a raiding economy, faced Boer armed colonial pressure

outlook.zh: 恩德贝莱王国在1840年处于扩张期，但火器劣势将在与欧洲殖民者的对抗中暴露致命弱点
outlook.en: The Ndebele Kingdom was in an expansionary phase in 1840, but its firearms disadvantage would prove fatal in confrontations with European colonists

description.zh: 穆费卡内后由姆齐利卡齐建立的恩德贝莱军事王国，控制今津巴布韦西南部。
description.en: A Ndebele military kingdom established by Mzilikazi after the Mfecane, controlling southwestern modern Zimbabwe.

governmentForm.zh: 以莫舒舒一世为首的酋长制国家，通过联姻和外交手段整合各索托群体
governmentForm.en: A chieftaincy-based state led by Moshoeshoe I, integrating various Sotho groups through marriage alliances and diplomacy

socialStructure.zh: 王族与高级酋长居上，以下有中低级酋长、自由平民（农牧民）与少量附庸
socialStructure.en: Royals and senior chiefs at the top, followed by mid- and lower-level chiefs, free commoners (farmer-herders), and a few dependents

rulingClass.zh: 莫舒舒及其子侄构成的王族、各主要酋长
rulingClass.en: Moshoeshoe and his sons and nephews forming the royal family, along with major chiefs

succession.zh: 由莫舒舒指定继承人，王位在其家族内传承
succession.en: Successor designated by Moshoeshoe, with the throne passing within his family

structure.zh: 莫舒舒以塔巴博西乌山顶堡垒为都城，通过子侄派驻各区、联姻与外交手段维持对各索托群体的统合
structure.en: Moshoeshoe ruled from his mountaintop fortress at Thaba Bosiu, maintaining integration of Sotho groups through posting sons and nephews to districts, marriage alliances, and diplomacy

function.zh: 政务商议与决策
function.en: Deliberation and decision-making on state affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各区由王族成员或受信任酋长管理
localAdmin.en: Districts were managed by royal family members or trusted chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 索托习惯法，由酋长裁判
legalSystem.en: Sotho customary law, adjudicated by chiefs

taxationSystem.zh: 牛贡与劳役
taxationSystem.en: Cattle tribute and labor service

religion.zh: 索托传统信仰与基督教（巴黎传教会）并存
religion.en: Sotho traditional beliefs coexisting with Christianity (Paris Evangelical Missionary Society)

culturalAchievements.zh: 以莫舒舒的外交智慧、塔巴博西乌山顶堡垒和索托口述传统闻名
culturalAchievements.en: Known for Moshoeshoe's diplomatic wisdom, the Thaba Bosiu mountaintop fortress, and Sotho oral traditions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（南索托语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Southern Sotho language)

philosophy.zh: 以社群和谐、外交智慧与包容性整合为核心理念
philosophy.en: Core principles of communal harmony, diplomatic wisdom, and inclusive integration

writingSystem.zh: 法国传教士引入的拉丁字母索托文
writingSystem.en: Latin-alphabet Sotho writing introduced by French missionaries

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业（牛、羊）和高地农业为基础的自给经济
gdpDescription.en: A subsistence economy based on pastoralism (cattle, sheep) and highland agriculture

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、高地农业（高粱、玉米）、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, highland agriculture (sorghum, maize), hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 牛、谷物、兽皮
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, grain, animal hides

householdWealth.zh: 酋长以牛群衡量财富；普通家庭拥有少量牲畜和农田
householdWealth.en: Chiefs measured wealth in cattle; ordinary households held modest livestock and farmland

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给型牧农经济
economicSystem.en: Subsistence pastoral-agricultural economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 财富以牛群和实物形式存在。
treasuryDescription.en: Wealth existed in the form of cattle herds and goods in kind.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以外交与联姻代替财政开支维持统一。
fiscalPolicy.en: Used diplomacy and marriage alliances rather than fiscal spending to maintain unity.

description.zh: 利用山地地形防御的步兵力量，擅长据险固守
description.en: Infantry forces using mountain terrain for defense, skilled at holding fortified positions

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器为主，少量从开普殖民地获得的火器；主要依靠塔巴博西乌天险防御。
technology.en: Primarily traditional melee weapons, with some firearms obtained from Cape Colony; defense relied mainly on the natural fortress of Thaba Bosiu.

threats.zh: 布尔人向内陆殖民扩张、祖鲁与恩德贝莱余波、开普殖民地边界压力
threats.en: Boer inland colonial expansion, aftershocks of Zulu and Ndebele movements, Cape Colony frontier pressure

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约二十五万，以穆费卡内难民整合而成的索托各群体为主。
populationDescription.en: Population about 250,000, mainly composed of Sotho groups integrated from Mfecane refugees.

socialClasses.zh: 王族与高级酋长、中低级酋长、自由农牧民、依附民
socialClasses.en: Royals and senior chiefs, mid- and lower-level chiefs, free farmer-herders, dependents

allies.zh: 法国巴黎传教会（提供外交渠道和教育）、寻求英国保护
allies.en: Paris Evangelical Missionary Society (provided diplomatic channels and education); seeking British protection

enemies.zh: 布尔人移民，与恩德贝莱、科拉纳等群体有摩擦
enemies.en: Boer settlers; friction with Ndebele, Korana, and other groups

foreignPolicy.zh: 莫舒舒以杰出的外交手段在列强（英国、布尔人）间周旋，寻求保护以对抗布尔殖民
foreignPolicy.en: Moshoeshoe maneuvered between powers (Britain, Boers) with outstanding diplomacy, seeking protection against Boer colonization

era.zh: 穆费卡内后时代南非

keyInnovations.zh: 山地堡垒防御战术、传教士引入的文字与初等教育
keyInnovations.en: Mountain fortress defensive tactics, literacy and primary education introduced by missionaries

strengths.zh: 莫舒舒卓越的外交与领导才能、天险地形防御、社群凝聚力
strengths.en: Moshoeshoe's exceptional diplomatic and leadership skills, natural terrain defenses, community cohesion

weaknesses.zh: 人口和军事力量有限、经济落后、面对火器武装的布尔人处于劣势
weaknesses.en: Limited population and military strength, backward economy, disadvantaged against firearms-armed Boers

outlook.zh: 莫舒舒正积极寻求英国保护以避免被布尔人吞并，王国存亡系于外交博弈
outlook.en: Moshoeshoe was actively seeking British protection to avoid Boer annexation; the kingdom's survival depended on diplomatic maneuvering

description.zh: 莫舒舒一世以卓越外交整合穆费卡内难民群体建立的山地王国，正寻求英国保护。
description.en: A mountain kingdom built by Moshoeshoe I through outstanding diplomacy integrating Mfecane refugee groups, seeking British protection.

governmentForm.zh: 以恩格温亚马（国王）和因德洛乌卡蒂（王太后）二元权力为核心的班图传统君主制
governmentForm.en: A Bantu traditional monarchy with dual authority centered on the Ngwenyama (king) and Indlovukazi (queen mother)

socialStructure.zh: 德拉米尼王族居上，以下有各级酋长、自由平民（农牧民）与附庸
socialStructure.en: Dlamini royals at the top, followed by graded chiefs, free commoners (farmer-herders), and dependents

rulingClass.zh: 恩格温亚马、因德洛乌卡蒂与德拉米尼王族
rulingClass.en: The Ngwenyama, Indlovukazi, and Dlamini royals

succession.zh: 恩格温亚马由利库拉（国家议事会）从王族中选出，王太后共治
succession.en: The Ngwenyama was selected from the royal family by the Liqoqo (national council), with the queen mother as co-ruler

structure.zh: 国王与王太后共治，通过年龄军团和地方酋长管理国家
structure.en: The king and queen mother co-ruled, governing through age-regiments and local chiefs

function.zh: 重大国政咨议
function.en: Advisory on major state affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各区由酋长管理
localAdmin.en: Districts were administered by chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 斯威士习惯法
legalSystem.en: Swazi customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 牛贡、劳役与首次收获仪式贡品
taxationSystem.en: Cattle tribute, labor service, and first-fruits ceremony contributions

religion.zh: 斯威士传统宗教，崇拜姆维林坎吉（造物主）和祖灵
religion.en: Swazi traditional religion, worshipping Mvelinchanti (creator) and ancestral spirits

culturalAchievements.zh: 以因克瓦拉（首次收获节）仪式和年龄军团传统著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for the Incwala (first-fruits festival) ceremony and age-regiment traditions

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（斯威士语/西斯瓦蒂语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Swazi/SiSwati language)

philosophy.zh: 以王权仪式合法性和社群团结为核心
philosophy.en: Centered on ritual legitimacy of kingship and communal solidarity

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No script; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧业和自给农业为基础
gdpDescription.en: Based on pastoralism and subsistence agriculture

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、农业（玉米、高粱）、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, agriculture (maize, sorghum), hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 牛、兽皮、谷物
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, animal hides, grain

householdWealth.zh: 王族拥有大量牛群；普通家庭以少量牲畜和农田为主
householdWealth.en: Royals held large cattle herds; ordinary households had modest livestock and farmland

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给型牧农经济
economicSystem.en: Subsistence pastoral-agricultural economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 财富以王室牛群为主要形式。
treasuryDescription.en: Wealth primarily in the form of royal cattle herds.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以贡赋维持王廷和军事力量。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintained the court and military through tribute.

description.zh: 类祖鲁式年龄军团体制
description.en: Zulu-style age-regiment system

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，火器极少。
technology.en: Traditional melee weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 祖鲁王国威胁、布尔人渗透
threats.en: Zulu Kingdom threat, Boer encroachment

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约十五万。
populationDescription.en: Population about 150,000.

socialClasses.zh: 德拉米尼王族、各级酋长、自由平民、附庸
socialClasses.en: Dlamini royals, graded chiefs, free commoners, dependents

allies.zh: 姆斯瓦蒂二世正扩大领土并与周边势力周旋
allies.en: Mswati II was expanding territory and maneuvering among surrounding powers

enemies.zh: 祖鲁王国、部分邻近部族
enemies.en: Zulu Kingdom, some neighboring tribes

foreignPolicy.zh: 扩张领土、巩固王权、在祖鲁与布尔人之间求生存
foreignPolicy.en: Expanded territory, consolidated royal power, survived between Zulu and Boer pressures

era.zh: 穆费卡内后时代南非

keyInnovations.zh: 年龄军团组织、山地防御战术
keyInnovations.en: Age-regiment organization, mountain defensive tactics

strengths.zh: 姆斯瓦蒂二世的扩张进取精神、仪式体系维系的社会凝聚力
strengths.en: Mswati II's expansionist drive, social cohesion maintained by the ceremonial system

weaknesses.zh: 人口和军事规模有限、缺乏火器、经济落后
weaknesses.en: Limited population and military scale, lacking firearms, backward economy

outlook.zh: 姆斯瓦蒂二世治下斯威士王国正在扩张，但长期面临南非殖民势力挤压
outlook.en: Under Mswati II the Swazi Kingdom was expanding, but faced long-term compression by South African colonial forces

description.zh: 姆斯瓦蒂二世统治下的斯威士王国正处于扩张期，以二元王权与因克瓦拉仪式传统闻名。
description.en: The Swazi Kingdom under Mswati II was in an expansionary phase, known for its dual monarchy and Incwala ceremonial tradition.

ruler.zh: 最高酋长桑迪莱（加莱卡）/马卡纳之后各酋长

dynasty.zh: 措萨王室（加莱卡与拉尔哈贝支系）
dynasty.en: Tshawe royal house (Gcaleka and Rharhabe branches)

capital.zh: 无固定都城（各酋长各有驻地）
capital.en: No fixed capital (each chief had own seat)

governmentForm.zh: 松散的酋邦联合，各酋长自治，名义上承认加莱卡支系最高地位
governmentForm.en: A loose confederation of chiefdoms, each autonomous, nominally acknowledging the Gcaleka branch's paramount status

socialStructure.zh: 各酋长与其氏族为核心，以下有自由平民（农牧民）与少量依附民
socialStructure.en: Each chief and his clan at the center, followed by free commoners (farmer-herders) and a few dependents

rulingClass.zh: 各部族酋长与王族长老
rulingClass.en: Tribal chiefs and royal elders

succession.zh: 酋长位在王族内传承，通常由长妻之子继承
succession.en: Chieftainship passed within the royal house, usually to the son of the great wife

structure.zh: 各酋邦独立运作，无统一中央政府；桑迪莱作为拉尔哈贝支系最高酋长在与开普殖民地打交道中扮演重要角色
structure.en: Each chiefdom operated independently with no unified central government; Sandile as paramount chief of the Rharhabe branch played a key role in dealings with Cape Colony

function.zh: 部族事务商议
function.en: Deliberation on tribal affairs

localAdmin.zh: 各酋长辖区内的克拉尔（围栏聚落）为基本社会单元
localAdmin.en: Kraals (enclosed settlements) within each chief's domain were the basic social units

legalSystem.zh: 科萨习惯法
legalSystem.en: Xhosa customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 酋长通过牛贡和劳役获取资源
taxationSystem.en: Chiefs obtained resources through cattle tribute and labor service

religion.zh: 科萨传统宗教（祖灵崇拜、赫莱神话）；部分人受传教士影响皈依基督教
religion.en: Xhosa traditional religion (ancestral worship, uHlanga mythology); some converted to Christianity under missionary influence

culturalAchievements.zh: 以口述诗歌传统（赞词诗）、珠饰艺术和成年礼仪式闻名
culturalAchievements.en: Known for oral praise poetry (izibongo), beadwork art, and initiation ceremonies

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（科萨语，含吸气音）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Xhosa language, with click consonants)

philosophy.zh: 以乌班图（人道主义）、祖灵庇佑和牛群财富为核心价值
philosophy.en: Core values of Ubuntu (humaneness), ancestral protection, and cattle wealth

writingSystem.zh: 传教士引入的拉丁字母科萨文
writingSystem.en: Latin-alphabet Xhosa writing introduced by missionaries

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以牧牛为核心的自给经济，正受到开普殖民地蚕食土地的冲击
gdpDescription.en: A subsistence economy centered on cattle herding, increasingly impacted by Cape Colony's encroachment on land

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业（牛）、自给农业、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism (cattle), subsistence agriculture, hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 牛、兽皮、少量与开普殖民地的边境贸易
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, hides, limited frontier trade with Cape Colony

householdWealth.zh: 酋长以大量牛群为财富；普通家庭牛群日减，受边境冲突影响严重
householdWealth.en: Chiefs measured wealth in large herds; ordinary households had shrinking herds, severely affected by frontier conflicts

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以牛群为核心的自给型牧业经济，正遭受殖民侵蚀
economicSystem.en: A cattle-centered subsistence pastoral economy, suffering colonial erosion

treasuryDescription.zh: 无集中国库，财富分散在各酋长手中。
treasuryDescription.en: No centralized treasury; wealth was dispersed among individual chiefs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 各酋长自行维持，无统一财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Each chief managed independently; no unified fiscal policy.

description.zh: 各酋邦征发的步兵战士，在九次开普边境战争中积累了丰富的对抗殖民军队经验
description.en: Infantry warriors levied from each chiefdom, with extensive experience fighting colonial forces in the Cape Frontier Wars

commanderInChief.zh: 桑迪莱（拉尔哈贝最高酋长）

technology.zh: 主要使用传统长矛（阿塞盖）与盾牌，部分战士从边境贸易获得火器。
technology.en: Primarily used traditional spears (assegai) and shields; some warriors obtained firearms from frontier trade.

threats.zh: 开普殖民地持续扩张，第七次开普边境战争（1846年）即将爆发；土地被持续侵占
threats.en: Cape Colony's continuous expansion; the Seventh Cape Frontier War (1846) was imminent; land was being steadily encroached upon

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 科萨诸部落总人口约三十五万，分布在鱼河至凯河一带。
populationDescription.en: The total Xhosa population was about 350,000, distributed from the Fish River to the Kei River area.

socialClasses.zh: 各部族酋长与长老、自由农牧民、依附民
socialClasses.en: Tribal chiefs and elders, free farmer-herders, dependents

allies.zh: 科伊科伊残余群体、部分传教士
allies.en: Remnant Khoikhoi groups, some missionaries

enemies.zh: 开普殖民地（英国）、布尔人殖民者
enemies.en: Cape Colony (British), Boer settlers

foreignPolicy.zh: 抵抗开普殖民地的土地侵占，部分酋长尝试谈判、部分选择武力抵抗
foreignPolicy.en: Resisted Cape Colony land encroachment; some chiefs attempted negotiation, others chose armed resistance

era.zh: 殖民边境时代南非

keyInnovations.zh: 游击战与丛林战经验、传教士引入的初等文化教育
keyInnovations.en: Guerrilla and bush warfare experience, primary education introduced by missionaries

strengths.zh: 丰富的边境战争经验、文化凝聚力、地形利于游击战
strengths.en: Rich frontier war experience, cultural cohesion, terrain favorable for guerrilla warfare

weaknesses.zh: 各酋邦分散无统一指挥、火器严重不足、领土持续缩小
weaknesses.en: Chiefdoms dispersed with no unified command, severely insufficient firearms, continuously shrinking territory

outlook.zh: 科萨诸部正面临开普殖民地的系统性侵略，前途极为严峻
outlook.en: The Xhosa chiefdoms faced systematic aggression from Cape Colony, with an extremely grave outlook

description.zh: 东开普地区的科萨各部族联合体，在九次边境战争中抵抗英国殖民扩张。
description.en: A Xhosa tribal confederation in the Eastern Cape, resisting British colonial expansion through nine frontier wars.

name.en: British Crown Colony of Sierra Leone

governmentForm.zh: 英国直辖殖民地，由伦敦任命的总督管辖
governmentForm.en: A British Crown colony administered by a London-appointed governor

socialStructure.zh: 英国殖民官员居上，克里奥尔人（获释奴隶后裔）组成社会精英和中产，本地曼丁卡、滕内等部族为主体
socialStructure.en: British colonial officials at the top; Krio (freed slave descendants) formed the social elite and middle class; local Mande, Temne, and other tribes were the majority

rulingClass.zh: 英国总督与殖民官、克里奥尔精英
rulingClass.en: British governor and colonial officials, Krio elite

succession.zh: 总督由英国殖民部任命
succession.en: Governor appointed by the British Colonial Office

structure.zh: 总督统领殖民行政，辅以行政与立法委员会；弗里敦直辖区管理较规范，内陆影响有限
structure.en: The governor oversaw colonial administration, assisted by executive and legislative councils; Freetown's direct jurisdiction was well-governed, but inland influence was limited

function.zh: 殖民行政管理
function.en: Colonial administration

function.zh: 审理民刑事案件
function.en: Adjudicated civil and criminal cases

localAdmin.zh: 弗里敦及半岛由殖民行政直接管理，克里奥尔村社有一定自治
localAdmin.en: Freetown and the peninsula were directly administered; Krio village communities had some self-governance

legalSystem.zh: 英国普通法
legalSystem.en: English common law

taxationSystem.zh: 关税、港口税、少量地方税收
taxationSystem.en: Customs duties, port fees, modest local taxes

religion.zh: 基督教（英国圣公会和卫斯理宗为主）；本地居民保持传统信仰
religion.en: Christianity (Anglican and Wesleyan Methodist dominant); local inhabitants maintained traditional beliefs

culturalAchievements.zh: 弗里敦是西非最早的英语教育中心和基督教传播基地；福拉湾学院正在筹建中
culturalAchievements.en: Freetown was one of the earliest English-language education centers and Christian missionary bases in West Africa; Fourah Bay College was being established

languageFamily.zh: 克里奥尔英语（克里奥语）、英语；本地有滕内语、曼丁卡语等
languageFamily.en: Krio (Creole English), English; locally Temne, Mande languages, etc.

philosophy.zh: 基督教博爱主义与反奴隶制理念，克里奥尔文化融合非洲与英国传统
philosophy.en: Christian philanthropic and anti-slavery ideals; Krio culture blended African and British traditions

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 作为获释奴隶安置地和反奴隶贸易巡逻基地，经济规模有限但弗里敦港口贸易活跃
gdpDescription.en: As a freed slave settlement and anti-slave-trade patrol base, the economy was small but Freetown's port trade was active

mainIndustries.zh: 港口贸易、农业、木材出口、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Port trade, agriculture, timber export, fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 木材、棕榈油、姜、花生
tradeGoods.en: Timber, palm oil, ginger, groundnuts

householdWealth.zh: 克里奥尔商人家庭较富裕；大部分获释奴隶定居者生活简朴
householdWealth.en: Krio merchant families were relatively prosperous; most freed slave settlers lived simply

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 英国殖民贸易经济
economicSystem.en: British colonial trade economy

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民地财政赤字，需伦敦补贴。
treasuryDescription.en: The colony ran a deficit, requiring London subsidies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 依赖关税收入和英国政府拨款维持运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Relied on customs revenue and British government grants to operate.

description.zh: 英国驻军小部队
description.en: Small British garrison force

description.zh: 维持弗里敦治安
description.en: Maintained order in Freetown

technology.zh: 配备英式步枪和火炮的正规驻军。
technology.en: Regular garrison equipped with British rifles and artillery.

threats.zh: 内陆部族冲突、海上残余奴隶贩运活动
threats.en: Inland tribal conflicts, residual maritime slave trafficking

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 殖民地直辖人口约六万，主要为克里奥尔人（获释奴隶及其后裔）。
populationDescription.en: The colony's directly governed population was about 60,000, mainly Krio (freed slaves and their descendants).

socialClasses.zh: 英国殖民官员、克里奥尔精英与中产、获释奴隶定居者、本地部族民众
socialClasses.en: British colonial officials, Krio elite and middle class, freed slave settlers, local tribal populations

allies.zh: 英国（宗主国）
allies.en: Britain (metropolitan power)

enemies.zh: 无主要敌对势力
enemies.en: No major enemies

foreignPolicy.zh: 作为英国在西非的反奴隶贸易基地和海军巡逻站
foreignPolicy.en: Served as Britain's anti-slave-trade base and naval patrol station in West Africa

era.zh: 英属殖民时代

keyInnovations.zh: 西非最早的英式教育机构、基督教传播基地、反奴隶贸易海军基地
keyInnovations.en: Among the earliest British-style educational institutions in West Africa, Christian missionary base, anti-slave-trade naval base

strengths.zh: 英国海军保护、教育和基督教传播中心的文化影响力、弗里敦港口优势
strengths.en: British naval protection, cultural influence as education and Christian missionary center, Freetown's port advantage

weaknesses.zh: 殖民地规模极小、财政赤字、对内陆影响有限
weaknesses.en: Extremely small colony, fiscal deficit, limited inland influence

outlook.zh: 作为英国在西非的桥头堡，弗里敦将成为日后殖民扩张的跳板
outlook.en: As Britain's bridgehead in West Africa, Freetown would become a springboard for future colonial expansion

description.zh: 英属西非殖民地，以获释奴隶定居地和反奴隶贸易基地闻名，弗里敦是西非最早的英语教育中心。
description.en: A British West African colony known as a freed-slave settlement and anti-slave-trade base; Freetown was one of the earliest English-language education centers in West Africa.

ruler.zh: 法马·恩亚内·蒂耶瑟（恩戈洛·迪亚拉后裔）
ruler.en: Faama Nyénéma Tiéssé (descendant of Ngolo Diarra)

dynasty.zh: 迪亚拉王朝（恩戈洛·迪亚拉后裔）

governmentForm.zh: 以法马为最高统治者的军事王权制，依赖顿索（猎人/战士兄弟会）和奴隶兵维持统治
governmentForm.en: A military kingship with the Faama as supreme ruler, dependent on ton-djon (hunter/warrior brotherhoods) and slave soldiers to maintain rule

socialStructure.zh: 王族与军事贵族居上，顿索战士兄弟会拥有特殊地位，以下有自由农民、铁匠与格里奥特等种姓群体、商人与大量奴隶
socialStructure.en: Royals and military aristocracy at the top, ton-djon warrior brotherhoods held special status, followed by free farmers, endogamous castes (smiths, griots), merchants, and a large slave population

rulingClass.zh: 迪亚拉王族与顿索军事首领
rulingClass.en: Diarra royals and ton-djon military leaders

succession.zh: 法马在王族内部争夺继承，顿索的支持至关重要
succession.en: The Faama was contested within the royal family, with ton-djon support being crucial

structure.zh: 法马驻塞古统治，通过顿索组织和奴隶兵控制尼日尔河中游地区；中央集权程度有限，附庸区域贡赋不稳
structure.en: The Faama ruled from Ségou, controlling the middle Niger region through ton-djon organization and slave soldiers; centralization was limited, with unstable tribute from vassal areas

function.zh: 处理政务、指挥军事行动
function.en: Handled state affairs, directed military operations

function.zh: 王国核心军事力量和权力支柱
function.en: The kingdom's core military force and power base

localAdmin.zh: 地方由附庸酋长和驻军管理，中央控制力随距离递减
localAdmin.en: Localities managed by vassal chiefs and garrisons, with central control diminishing with distance

legalSystem.zh: 班巴拉习惯法，法马拥有最高裁判权
legalSystem.en: Bambara customary law, with the Faama holding supreme judicial authority

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品、战争掠获、市场税与奴隶贸易收入
taxationSystem.en: Tribute, war booty, market taxes, and slave trade income

religion.zh: 班巴拉传统宗教（祖灵崇拜、恩亚马力量信仰）为主；伊斯兰教在商人群体中有渗透
religion.en: Bambara traditional religion (ancestral worship, nyama spiritual force) dominant; Islam had penetrated among merchant communities

culturalAchievements.zh: 以顿索（猎人兄弟会）文化传统、格里奥特口述史诗和木雕、铁器工艺著称
culturalAchievements.en: Known for ton-djon (hunter brotherhood) cultural traditions, griot oral epics, and woodcarving and ironwork crafts

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系曼德语支（班巴拉语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Mande branch (Bambara/Bamanankan language)

philosophy.zh: 以恩亚马（精神力量）、勇武精神和社群荣誉为核心
philosophy.en: Centered on nyama (spiritual force), martial valor, and communal honor

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统；部分穆斯林使用阿拉伯文
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition; some Muslims used Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以尼日尔河中游农业和区域贸易为基础，奴隶贸易仍是重要收入来源
gdpDescription.en: Based on middle Niger agriculture and regional trade, with the slave trade still an important revenue source

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（粟米、高粱）、渔业、铁器加工、纺织、区域贸易、奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (millet, sorghum), fishing, ironworking, weaving, regional trade, slave trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、铁器、布匹、谷物、金粉（转口）、盐（转口）
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, ironware, cloth, grain, gold dust (transit), salt (transit)

householdWealth.zh: 王族与军事精英拥有大量奴隶和土地；普通农民生活困苦
householdWealth.en: Royals and military elite held many slaves and lands; ordinary farmers lived in hardship

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以奴隶劳动和贡赋为基础的军事-农业经济
economicSystem.en: A military-agricultural economy based on slave labor and tribute

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以奴隶、谷物和武器为主要储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves consisted mainly of slaves, grain, and weapons.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以军事掠夺和贡赋维持国家运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Sustained the state through military plunder and tribute.

description.zh: 核心职业军事力量，由猎人兄弟会成员组成
description.en: Core professional military force composed of hunter brotherhood members

description.zh: 奴隶战士与各地征召的步兵
description.en: Slave warriors and infantry levied from various localities

technology.zh: 以冷兵器为主，部分从沿海贸易获得火器。
technology.en: Primarily melee weapons, with some firearms obtained from coastal trade.

threats.zh: 马西纳帝国威胁、奥马尔·塔尔的托克勒尔圣战运动正在兴起、卡尔塔王国竞争
threats.en: Massina Empire threat, Omar Tall's Toucouleur jihad movement rising, Kaarta Kingdom competition

description.zh: 初步正规化，有季节性操练
description.en: Semi-professional, seasonal drills

description.zh: 士气低迷，纪律涣散
description.en: Low morale, weakening discipline

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一百万，分布于尼日尔河中游沿岸及周边地区。
populationDescription.en: Population about one million, distributed along the middle Niger and surrounding areas.

socialClasses.zh: 迪亚拉王族、顿索战士、自由农民、铁匠与格里奥特种姓、商人、奴隶（比例极高）
socialClasses.en: Diarra royals, ton-djon warriors, free farmers, smith and griot castes, merchants, slaves (very high proportion)

allies.zh: 无稳定盟友
allies.en: No stable allies

enemies.zh: 马西纳帝国、卡尔塔王国、新兴的托克勒尔势力
enemies.en: Massina Empire, Kaarta Kingdom, emerging Toucouleur forces

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护尼日尔河中游控制权，抵抗马西纳和新兴圣战运动的扩张
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained control over the middle Niger, resisting expansion by Massina and emerging jihad movements

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 铁器冶炼与武器制造、尼日尔河沿岸灌溉农业、军事组织（顿索体制）
keyInnovations.en: Iron smelting and weapons manufacturing, Niger riverside irrigated agriculture, military organization (ton-djon system)

strengths.zh: 职业化的顿索军事力量、尼日尔河沿岸农业生产力
strengths.en: Professionalized ton-djon military force, Niger riverside agricultural productivity

weaknesses.zh: 内部政治不稳定、高度依赖奴隶经济、面临多方军事威胁、火器不足
weaknesses.en: Internal political instability, heavy dependence on slave economy, facing multiple military threats, insufficient firearms

outlook.zh: 1840年的塞古班巴拉王国已显衰象，日后将被奥马尔·塔尔的托克勒尔圣战征服
outlook.en: The Ségou Bambara Kingdom showed signs of decline in 1840; it would later be conquered by Omar Tall's Toucouleur jihad

description.zh: 尼日尔河中游的班巴拉军事王国，以顿索战士传统闻名，正面临多方威胁走向衰落。
description.en: A Bambara military kingdom on the middle Niger known for its ton-djon warrior tradition, declining under multiple threats.

governmentForm.zh: 以法马为首的军事王权制，结构与塞古班巴拉相似
governmentForm.en: A military kingship headed by the Faama, structurally similar to Ségou Bambara

socialStructure.zh: 王族与军事贵族居上，顿索战士、自由农民、种姓群体（铁匠、格里奥特）和大量奴隶
socialStructure.en: Royals and military aristocracy at the top, ton-djon warriors, free farmers, caste groups (smiths, griots), and a large slave population

rulingClass.zh: 库利巴利王族与军事首领
rulingClass.en: Coulibaly royals and military leaders

succession.zh: 王位在库利巴利家族内争夺
succession.en: The throne was contested within the Coulibaly family

structure.zh: 法马驻尼奥罗统治，通过军事首领和地方酋长管理领土
structure.en: The Faama ruled from Nioro, governing territory through military commanders and local chiefs

function.zh: 政务与军事指挥
function.en: State affairs and military command

localAdmin.zh: 地方由军事驻地和附庸酋长管理
localAdmin.en: Localities managed by military garrisons and vassal chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 班巴拉习惯法
legalSystem.en: Bambara customary law

taxationSystem.zh: 贡品、战争掠获、市场税
taxationSystem.en: Tribute, war booty, market taxes

religion.zh: 班巴拉传统宗教为主，伊斯兰教在部分群体中传播
religion.en: Bambara traditional religion dominant, with Islam spreading among some groups

culturalAchievements.zh: 与塞古班巴拉共享曼德文化传统，包括格里奥特史诗和铁器工艺
culturalAchievements.en: Shared Mande cultural traditions with Ségou Bambara, including griot epics and ironwork

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系曼德语支（班巴拉语/索宁克语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Mande branch (Bambara/Soninke languages)

philosophy.zh: 以恩亚马精神力量和军事勇武为核心
philosophy.en: Centered on nyama spiritual force and martial valor

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，依赖口述传统
writingSystem.en: No indigenous script; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以旱地农业和跨萨赫勒贸易中转为基础
gdpDescription.en: Based on dryland agriculture and trans-Sahelian trade transit

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（粟米、高粱）、畜牧业、铁器、区域贸易、奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (millet, sorghum), pastoralism, ironworking, regional trade, slave trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、谷物、铁器、盐（转口）、金粉（转口）
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, grain, ironware, salt (transit), gold dust (transit)

householdWealth.zh: 军事精英拥有奴隶和土地；普通农民生活贫困
householdWealth.en: Military elite held slaves and land; ordinary farmers lived in poverty

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以奴隶劳动和军事掠夺为基础的贡赋经济
economicSystem.en: A tribute economy based on slave labor and military plunder

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库微薄，以奴隶和实物为主。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury was meager, consisting mainly of slaves and goods in kind.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 依赖军事掠夺维持国家运转。
fiscalPolicy.en: Depended on military plunder to keep the state functioning.

description.zh: 以猎人兄弟会战士和奴隶兵为核心
description.en: Core force of hunter brotherhood warriors and slave soldiers

technology.zh: 冷兵器为主，少量火器。
technology.en: Primarily melee weapons, with few firearms.

threats.zh: 塞古班巴拉的长期竞争、奥马尔·塔尔圣战运动的威胁、马西纳帝国
threats.en: Long-term rivalry with Ségou Bambara, the threat of Omar Tall's jihad movement, Massina Empire

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约五十万，分布于尼奥罗及周边萨赫勒地区。
populationDescription.en: Population about 500,000, distributed around Nioro and the surrounding Sahel.

socialClasses.zh: 库利巴利王族、军事贵族、自由农民、种姓群体、大量奴隶
socialClasses.en: Coulibaly royals, military aristocracy, free farmers, caste groups, large slave population

allies.zh: 无稳定盟友
allies.en: No stable allies

enemies.zh: 塞古班巴拉王国、马西纳帝国、新兴的托克勒尔势力
enemies.en: Ségou Bambara Kingdom, Massina Empire, emerging Toucouleur forces

foreignPolicy.zh: 在塞古和马西纳之间求存，控制跨萨赫勒贸易通道
foreignPolicy.en: Survived between Ségou and Massina, controlling trans-Sahelian trade routes

era.zh: 前殖民时代西非

keyInnovations.zh: 铁器冶炼、军事组织、旱地农业
keyInnovations.en: Iron smelting, military organization, dryland agriculture

strengths.zh: 军事传统深厚、控制重要贸易通道
strengths.en: Deep military traditions, controlled important trade routes

weaknesses.zh: 夹在塞古和马西纳等强邻之间、内部政治动荡、经济落后
weaknesses.en: Squeezed between powerful neighbors Ségou and Massina, internal political turmoil, backward economy

outlook.zh: 卡尔塔处境艰难，将成为奥马尔·塔尔圣战征服的首批目标之一
outlook.en: Kaarta was in a difficult position and would be among the first targets of Omar Tall's jihad conquest

description.zh: 马里-塞内加尔边境地区的班巴拉军事王国，塞古的长期竞争对手，正面临多重威胁。
description.en: A Bambara military kingdom on the Mali-Senegal border, a long-time rival of Ségou, facing multiple threats.

name.zh: 奥罗莫诸邦（吉贝诸王国）

ruler.zh: 阿巴·吉法尔一世（吉马王）

dynasty.zh: 吉马·阿巴·吉法尔王朝（各邦各有王室）
dynasty.en: Jimma Abba Jifar dynasty (each state had its own royal house)

governmentForm.zh: 以加达制度为基础的多元政治体，部分邦国已转型为伊斯兰君主制，吉马、卡法、利穆-埃纳里亚等各有独立政权。
governmentForm.en: A diverse political landscape rooted in the Gadaa system, with some states having transitioned to Islamic monarchies; Jimma, Kaffa, Limmu-Ennarea and others each maintained independent governments.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、自由农民与牧民以及奴隶构成。加达年龄等级制在部分地区仍发挥作用。
socialStructure.en: Society comprised royalty and nobility, Islamic scholars, merchants, free farmers and pastoralists, and slaves. The Gadaa age-grade system still functioned in some areas.

rulingClass.zh: 各邦国王（莫蒂）及其宫廷贵族、伊斯兰教长与大商人
rulingClass.en: The kings (Moti) of each state and their court nobles, Islamic clerics, and major merchants

succession.zh: 各邦王位多在王室家族内世袭传承，宫廷斗争与贵族合议影响继承。
succession.en: Kingship in each state was generally inherited within the royal family, influenced by court politics and noble consensus.

structure.zh: 各吉贝王国拥有独立的宫廷与行政体系。吉马设有宫廷议事会与省级官吏，伊斯兰法官参与司法。加达制度在部分区域仍作为平行治理结构存在。
structure.en: Each Gibe kingdom had its own court and administrative system. Jimma had a court council and provincial officials, with Islamic judges involved in justice. The Gadaa system persisted as a parallel governance structure in some areas.

function.zh: 辅佐国王处理政务与外交
function.en: Assisted the king in governance and diplomacy

function.zh: 管理长途贸易与市场税收
function.en: Managed long-distance trade and market taxation

function.zh: 军队组织与边境防御
function.en: Army organization and border defense

localAdmin.zh: 地方由各邦国王任命的省长与地区长官管理，基层依赖部族长老与加达长老会。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were administered by governors and district chiefs appointed by each state's king, with community-level governance relying on clan elders and Gadaa councils.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与奥罗莫习惯法（加达法）并存，各邦侧重不同。
legalSystem.en: Islamic sharia and Oromo customary law (Gadaa law) coexisted, with varying emphasis across states.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自市场贸易税、咖啡与牲畜贡品、奴隶贸易利润及农产品什一税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from market trade taxes, coffee and livestock tribute, slave trade profits, and agricultural tithes.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教在吉马等国占主导，卡法等国保留传统奥罗莫信仰与基督教影响，各邦信仰多元。
religion.en: Islam dominated in Jimma and similar states; Kaffa and others retained traditional Oromo beliefs and Christian influences; religious diversity prevailed across states.

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥罗莫诸邦以咖啡发源地（卡法）闻名，加达民主制度是独特的政治遗产，长途贸易网络连接红海与印度洋。
culturalAchievements.en: The Oromo states were known as the birthplace of coffee (Kaffa), the Gadaa democratic system was a unique political heritage, and long-distance trade networks connected to the Red Sea and Indian Ocean.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系库希特语族（奥罗莫语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic family, Cushitic branch (Oromo language)

philosophy.zh: 加达制度强调年龄等级、民主协商与代际权力交替；伊斯兰苏菲思想在商业城镇传播。
philosophy.en: The Gadaa system emphasized age-grades, democratic consultation, and generational power transitions; Islamic Sufi thought spread in commercial towns.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字（伊斯兰学校使用）；大部分事务依赖口传。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script (used in Islamic schools); most affairs relied on oral tradition.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以咖啡种植与贸易、畜牧、自给农业和长途贸易为基础。吉马是区域最大咖啡集散地。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on coffee cultivation and trade, pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, and long-distance commerce. Jimma was the largest regional coffee trading center.

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡种植与贸易、畜牧业、自给农业、奴隶贸易、手工纺织与铁器制作
mainIndustries.en: Coffee cultivation and trade, pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, slave trade, handloom textiles, and ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 咖啡、象牙、麝香、奴隶、牲畜、蜂蜜、黄金
tradeGoods.en: Coffee, ivory, musk, slaves, livestock, honey, gold

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与盐条并用
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and salt bars used in parallel

householdWealth.zh: 财富以牲畜、土地和贸易存货衡量；咖啡商人积累了可观财富。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was measured in livestock, land, and trade inventories; coffee merchants accumulated considerable wealth.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋与市场贸易并存的混合经济，咖啡贸易使部分地区高度商业化。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining tribute and market trade, with coffee commerce making some areas highly commercialized.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以部族动员为基础的步兵，装备矛、盾与少量火器。
description.en: Tribally mobilized infantry armed with spears, shields, and a few firearms.

description.zh: 马匹骑兵，用于侦察与快速突袭。
description.en: Mounted cavalry used for reconnaissance and rapid raids.

commanderInChief.zh: 各邦国王分别统帅本国军队
commanderInChief.en: Each state's king commanded his own forces

technology.zh: 以传统冷兵器为主，少量通过贸易获得的火器。
technology.en: Mainly traditional cold weapons, with some firearms acquired through trade.

threats.zh: 埃塞俄比亚诸侯（尤其绍阿）的扩张压力、各邦间争斗以及奴隶掠夺引发的冲突。
threats.en: Expansionist pressure from Ethiopian lords (especially Shewa), inter-state rivalries, and conflicts driven by slave raiding.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 奥罗莫诸邦总人口约350万，散布于埃塞俄比亚西南至肯尼亚北部的广大地区。
populationDescription.en: The Oromo states had a total population of about 3.5 million, spread across a vast area from southwestern Ethiopia to northern Kenya.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、伊斯兰学者与教士、商人、自由农民与牧民、手工匠人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Royalty and nobility, Islamic scholars and clerics, merchants, free farmers and pastoralists, artisans, slaves

allies.zh: 各邦间存在不稳定的联盟关系，与阿拉伯和斯瓦希里商人保持贸易往来。
allies.en: Unstable alliances existed between states; trade ties maintained with Arab and Swahili merchants.

enemies.zh: 绍阿王国（埃塞俄比亚扩张势力）是主要威胁，各邦间也时有争斗。
enemies.en: The Kingdom of Shewa (Ethiopian expansionist power) was the main threat; inter-state conflicts were also frequent.

foreignPolicy.zh: 各邦独立推行外交，以维护贸易通道安全和抵御埃塞俄比亚扩张为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Each state pursued independent diplomacy, focusing on securing trade routes and resisting Ethiopian expansion.

era.zh: 东非高原农牧社会

keyInnovations.zh: 咖啡栽培与加工技术、铁器锻造、灌溉梯田。
keyInnovations.en: Coffee cultivation and processing, iron smelting, irrigated terrace farming.

strengths.zh: 咖啡贸易带来可观财富，加达制度提供社会凝聚力，人口众多且占据战略性高原地带。
strengths.en: Coffee trade brought considerable wealth, the Gadaa system provided social cohesion, a large population occupied strategic highland territory.

weaknesses.zh: 各邦分立缺乏统一指挥，军事技术落后于火器时代，面临埃塞俄比亚日益增强的扩张威胁。
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation lacked unified command, military technology lagged behind the firearms era, and they faced increasingly strong Ethiopian expansionist threats.

outlook.zh: 奥罗莫诸邦在19世纪中叶面临被埃塞俄比亚吞并的严峻挑战。
outlook.en: The Oromo states faced severe challenges of annexation by Ethiopia in the mid-nineteenth century.

description.zh: 1840年的奥罗莫诸邦是埃塞俄比亚西南部一组以咖啡贸易和加达制度著称的独立王国与部族联盟。
description.en: In 1840 the Oromo states were a group of independent kingdoms and tribal confederations in southwestern Ethiopia, known for coffee trade and the Gadaa system.

governmentForm.zh: 以姆邦为核心的伊斯兰世袭苏丹国，通过宫廷官僚与部族酋长实施统治。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic hereditary sultanate centered on the Mbang, governing through court officials and tribal chiefs.

socialStructure.zh: 以巴尔马人为统治核心，穆斯林学者、商人、自由农民与渔民以及大量奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: The Barma people formed the ruling core, with Muslim scholars, merchants, free farmers and fishermen, and a large slave population forming the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 姆邦与王室家族、宫廷大臣与军事贵族
rulingClass.en: The Mbang and royal family, court ministers, and military aristocrats

succession.zh: 姆邦位在王室内继承，宫廷政治与邻国干预常影响继承。
succession.en: The Mbang's position was inherited within the royal family, with court politics and neighboring interference often affecting succession.

structure.zh: 姆邦通过宫廷议事会与省级官吏治理，伊斯兰法官处理法律事务。
structure.en: The Mbang governed through a court council and provincial officials; Islamic judges handled legal matters.

function.zh: 国政决策与行政中枢
function.en: Central hub for state decisions and administration

function.zh: 宗教与法律事务
function.en: Religious and legal affairs

function.zh: 军队组织与防御
function.en: Army organization and defense

localAdmin.zh: 地方由姆邦任命的省长与部族酋长管理，沙里河沿岸聚落有独立管理传统。
localAdmin.en: Local areas administered by governors appointed by the Mbang and tribal chiefs; settlements along the Chari River had independent administrative traditions.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为基础，辅以巴尔马人习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Based on Islamic sharia, supplemented by Barma customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自贡品、牲畜税、贸易税与奴隶贸易利润。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from tribute, livestock taxes, trade taxes, and slave trade profits.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴吉尔米以伊斯兰学术、精美棉布纺织与沙里河流域渔业文化著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Bagirmi was known for Islamic scholarship, fine cotton textile weaving, and Chari River fishing culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系（巴尔马语）
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan family (Barma/Bagirmi language)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统与萨赫勒宫廷文化相结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarly tradition combined with Sahelian court culture.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以沙里河流域农业、渔业、畜牧与奴隶贸易为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on Chari River agriculture, fishing, pastoralism, and slave trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、渔业、畜牧、棉纺织、奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, fishing, pastoralism, cotton textiles, slave trade

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、棉布、鱼干、牲畜、象牙
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, cotton cloth, dried fish, livestock, ivory

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与棉布条
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and cotton strips

householdWealth.zh: 牧民以牲畜为主要财富，农民依赖土地与渔获。
householdWealth.en: Pastoralists held livestock as main wealth; farmers relied on land and fish.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋经济与区域贸易并存。
economicSystem.en: Tribute economy combined with regional trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 马匹与骆驼骑兵，巴吉尔米军事核心力量。
description.en: Horse and camel cavalry, the military core of Bagirmi.

description.zh: 步兵与可动员的部族武装。
description.en: Infantry and mobilizable tribal forces.

technology.zh: 少量火器，主要依赖传统骑兵武器（矛、刀、锁子甲）。
technology.en: Few firearms; mainly relied on traditional cavalry weapons (spears, swords, chain mail).

threats.zh: 博尔努帝国与瓦达伊苏丹国的夹击，内部部族叛乱。
threats.en: Caught between Bornu Empire and Wadai Sultanate, with internal tribal rebellions.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约70万，巴尔马人为主体，散布于沙里河流域。
populationDescription.en: Population about 700,000, predominantly Barma people, spread along the Chari River basin.

socialClasses.zh: 姆邦与王室、军事贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、农民与渔民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Mbang and royals, military aristocrats, Islamic scholars, merchants, farmers and fishermen, slaves

allies.zh: 与北非贸易伙伴保持联系，偶尔与瓦达伊或博尔努结盟对抗另一方。
allies.en: Maintained ties with North African trade partners; occasionally allied with Wadai or Bornu against the other.

enemies.zh: 博尔努帝国和瓦达伊苏丹国均为潜在威胁。
enemies.en: Both the Bornu Empire and Wadai Sultanate were potential threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在博尔努与瓦达伊之间寻求平衡，维护独立与贸易通道。
foreignPolicy.en: Sought balance between Bornu and Wadai, preserving independence and trade routes.

era.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰苏丹国时期

keyInnovations.zh: 伊斯兰学校、棉布纺织技术、沙里河灌溉农业。
keyInnovations.en: Islamic schools, cotton textile technology, Chari River irrigated agriculture.

strengths.zh: 沙里河流域的农渔资源、伊斯兰学术传统与区域贸易网络。
strengths.en: Agricultural and fishing resources of the Chari basin, Islamic scholarly tradition, and regional trade networks.

weaknesses.zh: 夹在两大强邻之间，军事力量不足，频遭掠奴战争。
weaknesses.en: Sandwiched between two powerful neighbors, insufficient military strength, frequently subjected to slave raids.

outlook.zh: 巴吉尔米将继续在博尔努与瓦达伊的夹缝中求存。
outlook.en: Bagirmi would continue struggling to survive between Bornu and Wadai.

description.zh: 1840年的巴吉尔米苏丹国是乍得地区一个夹在博尔努与瓦达伊之间的伊斯兰苏丹国。
description.en: In 1840 the Bagirmi Sultanate was an Islamic sultanate in the Chad region caught between Bornu and Wadai.

governmentForm.zh: 以瓦塔拉家族为核心的伊斯兰商业王国，朱拉商人阶层在政治中具有重要影响力。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic commercial kingdom centered on the Wattara family, with the Dyula merchant class holding significant political influence.

socialStructure.zh: 瓦塔拉王族与军事贵族、朱拉穆斯林商人、塞努福农民与手工匠人以及奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: The Wattara royals and military nobles, Dyula Muslim merchants, Senufo farmers and artisans, and slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 瓦塔拉王族与朱拉大商人
rulingClass.en: Wattara royals and major Dyula merchants

succession.zh: 王位在瓦塔拉家族内传承，商人精英的支持对继承至关重要。
succession.en: The throne passed within the Wattara family; support from the merchant elite was crucial for succession.

structure.zh: 法马通过宫廷议事会与朱拉商人长老会共同治理，附庸塞努福村社保持内部自治。
structure.en: The Fama governed through a court council and Dyula merchant elder council; vassal Senufo villages maintained internal autonomy.

function.zh: 国政与贸易决策
function.en: State governance and trade policy

function.zh: 管理跨区域贸易网络
function.en: Managed cross-regional trade networks

function.zh: 法律与宗教事务
function.en: Legal and religious affairs

localAdmin.zh: 朱拉商业城镇由商人长老自治，塞努福农村由村长管理。
localAdmin.en: Dyula commercial towns were self-governed by merchant elders; Senufo villages were managed by village chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法用于穆斯林社区，塞努福习惯法适用于农村。
legalSystem.en: Islamic sharia applied to Muslim communities; Senufo customary law applied in rural areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自贸易关税、市场税和附庸贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from trade customs, market taxes, and vassal tribute.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（朱拉商人与统治阶层）与传统泛灵信仰（塞努福农民）并存
religion.en: Islam (Dyula merchants and ruling class) coexisted with traditional animist beliefs (Senufo farmers)

culturalAchievements.zh: 孔城是西非著名的伊斯兰学术与商业中心，以古兰经学校和跨区贸易网络闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Kong was a renowned center of Islamic scholarship and commerce in West Africa, famous for Quranic schools and cross-regional trade networks.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系曼德语族（朱拉语）与沃尔特语族（塞努福语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Mande branch (Dyula) and Voltaic branch (Senufo)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统强调贸易伦理与宗教宽容，朱拉文化倡导商业网络与伊斯兰传播并行。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarly tradition emphasized trade ethics and religious tolerance; Dyula culture promoted commerce and Islamic expansion in parallel.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字（伊斯兰学校），口传为主
writingSystem.en: Arabic script (Islamic schools), primarily oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以跨区域长途贸易为特色的商业经济，朱拉商人控制科拉果、黄金与盐的贸易网络。
gdpDescription.en: A commercial economy featuring cross-regional long-distance trade; Dyula merchants controlled networks for kola nuts, gold, and salt.

mainIndustries.zh: 长途贸易、科拉果与黄金交易、自给农业、手工纺织
mainIndustries.en: Long-distance trade, kola nut and gold commerce, subsistence agriculture, handloom textiles

tradeGoods.zh: 科拉果、黄金、盐、棉布、奴隶
tradeGoods.en: Kola nuts, gold, salt, cotton cloth, slaves

householdWealth.zh: 朱拉商人持有大量贸易存货；塞努福农民财富以土地和粮食储备为主。
householdWealth.en: Dyula merchants held substantial trade inventories; Senufo farmers' wealth consisted mainly of land and grain stores.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以朱拉商业网络为核心的贸易经济，辅以贡赋与自给农业。
economicSystem.en: A trade economy centered on Dyula commercial networks, supplemented by tribute and subsistence agriculture.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 保护贸易路线与商队安全的武装力量。
description.en: Armed forces protecting trade routes and caravan security.

description.zh: 由附庸村社征召的步兵。
description.en: Infantry levied from vassal villages.

technology.zh: 少量从沿海贸易获得的火器，以传统武器为主。
technology.en: A few firearms obtained from coastal trade; mainly traditional weapons.

threats.zh: 阿散蒂帝国的扩张压力、萨摩里·杜尔崛起前的西非政治动荡。
threats.en: Expansionist pressure from the Ashanti Empire; political turbulence in West Africa before the rise of Samori Ture.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约70万，朱拉商人与塞努福农民为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 700,000, mainly Dyula merchants and Senufo farmers.

socialClasses.zh: 瓦塔拉王族、朱拉商人、伊斯兰学者、塞努福农民、手工匠人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Wattara royals, Dyula merchants, Islamic scholars, Senufo farmers, artisans, slaves

allies.zh: 与西非各朱拉商业社区保持贸易联盟。
allies.en: Maintained trade alliances with Dyula commercial communities across West Africa.

enemies.zh: 阿散蒂帝国为潜在威胁。
enemies.en: The Ashanti Empire was a potential threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护贸易网络安全和宗教宽容为外交核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Diplomacy focused on securing trade networks and maintaining religious tolerance.

era.zh: 西非伊斯兰商业城邦时期
era.en: West African Islamic commercial city-state era

keyInnovations.zh: 跨区域贸易网络组织、伊斯兰学校体系、棉布染织技术。
keyInnovations.en: Cross-regional trade network organization, Islamic school systems, cotton dyeing and weaving techniques.

strengths.zh: 朱拉商业网络遍布西非，伊斯兰学术声誉卓著，贸易城市繁荣。
strengths.en: Dyula commercial networks spanned West Africa, strong Islamic scholarly reputation, prosperous trading towns.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量较弱，政治凝聚力因商业利益分散而降低，面临周边军事强国威胁。
weaknesses.en: Weak military, political cohesion diminished by dispersed commercial interests, threatened by surrounding military powers.

outlook.zh: 孔帝国的商业地位正受到新兴势力挑战，19世纪晚期将面临萨摩里帝国的毁灭性打击。
outlook.en: Kong's commercial position was being challenged by emerging powers; in the late 19th century it would face destructive conquest by the Samorian Empire.

description.zh: 1840年的孔帝国是科特迪瓦北部一个以朱拉长途贸易和伊斯兰学术著称的商业王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Kong Empire was a commercial kingdom in northern Ivory Coast known for Dyula long-distance trade and Islamic scholarship.

governmentForm.zh: 以奥穆加贝为核心的世袭君主制，巴希马牧民贵族与巴伊鲁农民构成双层社会。
governmentForm.en: A hereditary monarchy centered on the Omugabe, with Bahima pastoral aristocrats and Bairu farmer commoners forming a dual-tier society.

socialStructure.zh: 巴希马牧民贵族居上，巴伊鲁农民为下层，社会分层基于牲畜占有与世系。
socialStructure.en: Bahima pastoral aristocrats occupied the upper tier; Bairu farmers were the lower tier; social stratification was based on cattle ownership and lineage.

rulingClass.zh: 奥穆加贝与巴欣达王室、巴希马大牧主
rulingClass.en: The Omugabe and Bahinda royals, major Bahima cattle owners

succession.zh: 奥穆加贝位在巴欣达王室内传承，宫廷竞争常影响继承。
succession.en: The Omugabe's position was inherited within the Bahinda royal house; court competition often influenced succession.

structure.zh: 奥穆加贝通过宫廷与巴希马贵族长老会统治，地方由地区酋长管理。
structure.en: The Omugabe ruled through a court and Bahima noble elder council; localities were managed by district chiefs.

function.zh: 国政决策与司法仲裁
function.en: State decisions and judicial arbitration

function.zh: 军队组织与牛群保护
function.en: Army organization and cattle protection

localAdmin.zh: 地方由国王任命的地区酋长管理，基层以氏族为单位。
localAdmin.en: Local areas administered by district chiefs appointed by the king; community-level units were clan-based.

legalSystem.zh: 以国王裁决和巴希马习惯法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on royal adjudication and Bahima customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自牲畜贡品、劳役和战利品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from cattle tribute, labor services, and war spoils.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰，崇拜祖先和自然神灵
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs, with ancestor and nature spirit worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 恩科雷以长角安科莱牛的牧牛文化和精美牛角竖琴音乐著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Nkore was known for its long-horned Ankole cattle culture and fine trough-zither music.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（鲁尼安科雷语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Runyankore)

philosophy.zh: 以牛为财富与地位象征的牧民文化，强调世系、牛群规模与军事勇武。
philosophy.en: A pastoral culture with cattle as the symbol of wealth and status, emphasizing lineage, herd size, and martial valor.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧和自给农业为主的经济。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on pastoralism and subsistence agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、自给农业、铁器锻造
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、牛奶制品、铁器、盐
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, dairy products, iron implements, salt

name.en: Cattle as primary medium of exchange

householdWealth.zh: 财富主要以牛群大小衡量。
householdWealth.en: Wealth was primarily measured by herd size.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以牲畜为中心的贡赋牧业经济。
economicSystem.en: A cattle-centered tributary pastoral economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛、弓和盾装备的牧民战士。
description.en: Pastoral warriors armed with spears, bows, and shields.

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，无火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; no firearms.

threats.zh: 布干达王国的扩张压力与布尼奥罗的竞争。
threats.en: Expansionist pressure from the Kingdom of Buganda and rivalry with Bunyoro.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约25万，巴希马与巴伊鲁两大群体为主。
populationDescription.en: Population about 250,000, mainly Bahima and Bairu communities.

socialClasses.zh: 奥穆加贝与王室、巴希马牧民贵族、巴伊鲁农民
socialClasses.en: Omugabe and royals, Bahima pastoral aristocrats, Bairu farmers

allies.zh: 与周边小王国保持不稳定的联盟。
allies.en: Maintained unstable alliances with surrounding small kingdoms.

enemies.zh: 布干达和布尼奥罗为主要竞争对手。
enemies.en: Buganda and Bunyoro were the main rivals.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在大湖地区诸王国间寻求平衡，维护牧场与牛群安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Sought balance among Great Lakes kingdoms, protecting pastures and cattle.

era.zh: 东非大湖地区铁器时代
era.en: East African Great Lakes Iron Age

keyInnovations.zh: 安科莱长角牛选育、铁器锻造、香蕉种植。
keyInnovations.en: Ankole long-horned cattle breeding, ironworking, banana cultivation.

strengths.zh: 大规模牛群提供经济基础，巴希马武士善于保卫领地。
strengths.en: Large cattle herds provided an economic base; Bahima warriors were effective at defending territory.

weaknesses.zh: 军事技术简单，社会分层严格限制了动员能力。
weaknesses.en: Simple military technology; rigid social stratification limited mobilization capacity.

outlook.zh: 恩科雷将在大湖地区政治格局中维持中等王国地位。
outlook.en: Nkore would maintain its position as a mid-sized kingdom in the Great Lakes political landscape.

description.zh: 1840年的恩科雷王国是乌干达西部一个以畜牧和安科莱长角牛闻名的班图王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Kingdom of Nkore was a Bantu kingdom in western Uganda known for pastoralism and Ankole long-horned cattle.

governmentForm.zh: 以因邦加拉军事传统为基础的世袭王国，深度参与跨大西洋奴隶贸易。
governmentForm.en: A hereditary kingdom rooted in Imbangala military traditions, deeply involved in the transatlantic slave trade.

socialStructure.zh: 王室与军事贵族居上，自由民与依附民居中，奴隶与战俘居下。奴隶贸易深刻塑造了社会结构。
socialStructure.en: Royals and military nobles at the top, free and dependent commoners in the middle, slaves and captives at the bottom. The slave trade profoundly shaped social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 因邦加拉王族与军事首领
rulingClass.en: Imbangala royals and military chiefs

succession.zh: 王位在因邦加拉王室内传承，军事力量对继承有决定性影响。
succession.en: The throne passed within the Imbangala royal lineage; military power was decisive in succession.

structure.zh: 国王通过军事首领与地区酋长统治，奴隶贸易站作为经济行政核心。
structure.en: The king ruled through military chiefs and district headmen; slave trading stations served as economic-administrative centers.

function.zh: 国政与军事决策
function.en: State and military decisions

function.zh: 管理奴隶贸易与转口商业
function.en: Managed slave trade and entrepôt commerce

localAdmin.zh: 地方由军事首领与村落长老管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas managed by military chiefs and village elders.

legalSystem.zh: 以国王裁决和因邦加拉军事习惯法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on royal adjudication and Imbangala military customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入主要来自奴隶贸易利润、过境税与贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue mainly from slave trade profits, transit taxes, and tribute.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰，部分受到天主教传教影响
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs, with some Catholic missionary influence

culturalAchievements.zh: 卡桑吉以独特的因邦加拉军事文化和作为内陆-沿海奴隶贸易中枢的地位闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Kasanje was known for its distinctive Imbangala military culture and its role as an interior-coastal slave trade hub.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（金本杜语群）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Kimbundu group)

philosophy.zh: 因邦加拉文化重视军事勇武与战争荣耀，奴隶贸易被视为合法经济活动。
philosophy.en: Imbangala culture valued martial valor and the glory of war; the slave trade was viewed as legitimate economic activity.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济高度依赖奴隶贸易和内陆-沿海转口商业，自给农业为补充。但因跨大西洋奴隶贸易衰落，经济正在收缩。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was highly dependent on the slave trade and interior-coastal entrepôt commerce, supplemented by subsistence agriculture. However, the economy was contracting due to the decline of the transatlantic slave trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 奴隶贸易、蜂蜡收集、象牙贸易、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Slave trade, beeswax collection, ivory trade, subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、蜂蜡、象牙、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, beeswax, ivory, iron implements

householdWealth.zh: 军事首领与贸易商人积累奴隶与贸易品财富；普通民众依赖农业。
householdWealth.en: Military chiefs and trade merchants accumulated wealth in slaves and trade goods; commoners relied on agriculture.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以奴隶贸易为核心的掠夺性商业经济。
economicSystem.en: A predatory commercial economy centered on the slave trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以军事传统著称的因邦加拉战士，装备矛、刀与少量火器。
description.en: Warriors renowned for Imbangala military tradition, armed with spears, swords, and a few firearms.

technology.zh: 少量火器通过葡萄牙贸易获得，以传统武器为主。
technology.en: Some firearms obtained through Portuguese trade; mainly traditional weapons.

threats.zh: 葡萄牙殖民势力扩张、隆达帝国的压力以及奴隶贸易衰落。
threats.en: Portuguese colonial expansion, Lunda Empire pressure, and decline of the slave trade.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约15万，因长期奴隶贸易导致人口损耗严重。
populationDescription.en: Population about 150,000, severely depleted by long-term slave trading.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与军事首领、自由商人、普通民众、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Royals and military chiefs, free merchants, commoners, slaves

allies.zh: 与葡萄牙殖民者维持贸易关系（虽日益不平等）。
allies.en: Maintained trade relations with Portuguese colonists (though increasingly unequal).

enemies.zh: 隆达帝国与葡萄牙扩张势力为主要威胁。
enemies.en: The Lunda Empire and Portuguese expansion were the main threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 试图在葡萄牙与隆达之间维持独立地位。
foreignPolicy.en: Attempted to maintain independence between Portuguese and Lunda pressures.

era.zh: 中部非洲铁器时代晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 铁器锻造、奴隶贸易商路组织。
keyInnovations.en: Ironworking, slave trade route organization.

strengths.zh: 因邦加拉军事传统提供战斗力，内陆贸易枢纽位置。
strengths.en: Imbangala military tradition provided fighting capacity; inland trade hub location.

weaknesses.zh: 奴隶贸易衰落严重打击经济基础，人口损耗严重，面临葡萄牙与隆达双重压力。
weaknesses.en: Decline of slave trade severely damaged the economic base, serious population depletion, facing dual pressure from Portuguese and Lunda.

outlook.zh: 卡桑吉王国正因奴隶贸易衰落和外部压力而走向衰亡。
outlook.en: The Kasanje Kingdom was declining toward collapse due to the end of slave trade and external pressures.

description.zh: 1840年的卡桑吉王国是安哥拉中部一个因奴隶贸易衰落而日趋衰弱的因邦加拉王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Kasanje Kingdom was an Imbangala kingdom in central Angola weakening due to the decline of the slave trade.

name.zh: 索马里诸苏丹国（盖莱迪与马杰尔丁）

ruler.zh: 盖莱迪苏丹·艾哈迈德·优素福
ruler.en: Sultan Ahmed Yusuf of the Geledi

dynasty.zh: 盖莱迪王朝与马杰尔丁王朝

governmentForm.zh: 以氏族为基础的多个苏丹国，盖莱迪苏丹国控制谢贝利河下游，马杰尔丁苏丹国控制东北部角。
governmentForm.en: Multiple clan-based sultanates; the Geledi Sultanate controlled the lower Shebelle, the Majeerteen Sultanate controlled the northeastern horn.

socialStructure.zh: 以父系氏族为核心，苏丹与贵族氏族长老、宗教学者、商人、牧民与农民以及被庇护群体构成等级。
socialStructure.en: Centered on patrilineal clans; sultans and noble clan elders, religious scholars, merchants, pastoralists and farmers, and client groups formed the hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹与贵族氏族长老、伊斯兰学者
rulingClass.en: Sultans and noble clan elders, Islamic scholars

succession.zh: 苏丹位在统治氏族内传承，长老会议的认可至关重要。
succession.en: The sultanate was inherited within the ruling clan; endorsement by the elder council was crucial.

structure.zh: 各苏丹国分别治理，苏丹通过氏族长老会议处理政务，伊斯兰法官管理司法。
structure.en: Each sultanate governed separately; sultans managed affairs through clan elder councils; Islamic judges administered justice.
