function.zh: 政务决策与纠纷仲裁
function.en: Policy decisions and dispute arbitration

function.zh: 管理港口与区域贸易
function.en: Managed ports and regional trade

function.zh: 伊斯兰教法与习惯法
function.en: Islamic law and customary law (xeer)

localAdmin.zh: 地方以氏族长老自治为主，苏丹对远离核心区的部族影响力有限。
localAdmin.en: Local governance was primarily through clan elder self-rule; the sultan had limited influence over clans far from the core area.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与索马里习惯法（赫尔法）并行。
legalSystem.en: Islamic sharia and Somali customary law (xeer) operated in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自港口关税、牲畜贡品、贸易税和跨区域商旅通行费。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from port duties, livestock tribute, trade taxes, and cross-regional caravan transit fees.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（沙斐仪学派）
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Shafi'i school)

culturalAchievements.zh: 索马里诸苏丹国以口传诗歌传统、印度洋航海与乳香贸易著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Somali sultanates were known for oral poetry traditions, Indian Ocean seafaring, and frankincense trade.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系库希特语族（索马里语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic family, Cushitic branch (Somali language)

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰学术传统与索马里赫尔法氏族习惯法相结合。
philosophy.en: Islamic scholarly tradition combined with Somali xeer clan customary law.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字用于宗教与行政，日常事务依赖口传
writingSystem.en: Arabic script used for religious and administrative purposes; daily affairs relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以畜牧、印度洋贸易、乳香与没药出口为主的经济。盖莱迪控制谢贝利河灌溉农业区。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on pastoralism, Indian Ocean trade, and frankincense and myrrh exports. The Geledi controlled Shebelle River irrigated agricultural areas.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、印度洋海上贸易、乳香与没药出口、灌溉农业
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, Indian Ocean maritime trade, frankincense and myrrh exports, irrigated agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 乳香、没药、牲畜、兽皮、象牙
tradeGoods.en: Frankincense, myrrh, livestock, hides, ivory

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与考里贝壳
name.en: Maria Theresa thaler and cowrie shells

householdWealth.zh: 牧民以骆驼与牛群为主要财富；沿海商人持有贸易资产。
householdWealth.en: Pastoralists held camels and cattle as main wealth; coastal merchants held trade assets.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以氏族为基础的牧业与海上贸易并存经济。
economicSystem.en: A clan-based economy combining pastoralism and maritime trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以氏族为单位的步兵与骆驼骑兵。
description.en: Clan-based infantry and camel cavalry.

description.zh: 盖莱迪与马杰尔丁苏丹的直属卫队。
description.en: Personal guards of the Geledi and Majeerteen sultans.

commanderInChief.zh: 各苏丹分别统帅本国军队
commanderInChief.en: Each sultan commanded his own forces

technology.zh: 部分火器通过印度洋贸易获得，以传统武器为主。
technology.en: Some firearms acquired through Indian Ocean trade; mainly traditional weapons.

threats.zh: 桑给巴尔苏丹国的商业竞争、氏族间冲突以及欧洲列强对东非海岸的日益关注。
threats.en: Commercial competition from the Zanzibar Sultanate, inter-clan conflicts, and growing European interest in the East African coast.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 索马里诸苏丹国人口约150万，以游牧民为主，谢贝利河沿岸有定居农民。
populationDescription.en: The Somali sultanates had about 1.5 million people, mostly nomadic pastoralists, with settled farmers along the Shebelle River.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹与贵族氏族、宗教学者、商人、牧民与农民、被庇护群体
socialClasses.en: Sultans and noble clans, religious scholars, merchants, pastoralists and farmers, client groups

allies.zh: 与印度洋贸易伙伴（阿拉伯商人、印度商人）保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with Indian Ocean trade partners (Arab and Indian merchants).

enemies.zh: 桑给巴尔苏丹国对索马里南部海岸的觊觎，各苏丹国间也存在竞争。
enemies.en: The Zanzibar Sultanate's ambitions for the southern Somali coast; competition also existed between sultanates.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护印度洋贸易利益，抵制外部控制。
foreignPolicy.en: Defended Indian Ocean trade interests and resisted external control.

era.zh: 东非沿海伊斯兰商业社会
era.en: East African coastal Islamic commercial society

keyInnovations.zh: 印度洋航海技术、灌溉农业、伊斯兰学校体系。
keyInnovations.en: Indian Ocean navigation, irrigated agriculture, Islamic school systems.

strengths.zh: 控制非洲之角重要海岸与贸易路线，牧民军事动员能力强。
strengths.en: Controlled key Horn of Africa coasts and trade routes; strong pastoral military mobilization capacity.

weaknesses.zh: 氏族分裂削弱统一行动能力，面临桑给巴尔和欧洲列强的压力。
weaknesses.en: Clan fragmentation weakened unified action; faced pressure from Zanzibar and European powers.

outlook.zh: 索马里诸苏丹国将在19世纪后期面临欧洲殖民瓜分的严峻挑战。
outlook.en: The Somali sultanates would face severe challenges from European colonial partition in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的索马里诸苏丹国控制着非洲之角的海岸与内陆，以牧业与印度洋贸易为经济支柱。
description.en: In 1840 the Somali sultanates controlled the coasts and interior of the Horn of Africa, with pastoralism and Indian Ocean trade as economic pillars.

ruler.zh: 各芳蒂城邦酋长联合议事
ruler.en: Joint council of Fante town chiefs

dynasty.zh: 无统一王朝，各邦有独立酋长家系
dynasty.en: No unified dynasty; each town had its own chiefly lineage

governmentForm.zh: 以阿坎城邦为基础的松散联盟，各邦通过联席议事会协调对外事务，尤其对抗阿散蒂帝国与英国殖民势力。
governmentForm.en: A loose confederation of Akan city-states coordinating external affairs through a joint council, especially against the Ashanti Empire and British colonial influence.

socialStructure.zh: 以母系氏族为基础，酋长、长老、商人、农民与渔民以及奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Based on matrilineal clans; chiefs, elders, merchants, farmers and fishermen, and slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 各城邦酋长与母族长老
rulingClass.en: Town chiefs and matrilineal elders of each state

succession.zh: 酋长由母系氏族内选举产生，需经长老会议认可。
succession.en: Chiefs were elected from within matrilineal clans, requiring elder council approval.

structure.zh: 松散联盟，各邦保持内部自治，仅在军事与对外事务上偶尔联合行动。
structure.en: A loose confederation; each state maintained internal autonomy, with joint action only occasionally in military and external affairs.

function.zh: 协调对外军事与外交
function.en: Coordinated external military and diplomatic affairs

function.zh: 各城邦内部政务与司法
function.en: Internal governance and justice of each town

localAdmin.zh: 各城邦由酋长与长老议事会自治管理。
localAdmin.en: Each town was self-governed by its chief and elder council.

legalSystem.zh: 阿坎习惯法为主，英国殖民法在海岸堡垒区有部分影响。
legalSystem.en: Akan customary law predominated; British colonial law had some influence in the coastal fort areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自市场税、渔业税和沿海贸易利润。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from market taxes, fishing levies, and coastal trade profits.

religion.zh: 传统阿坎泛灵信仰为主，基督教传教活动在沿海有影响
religion.en: Traditional Akan animist beliefs predominated; Christian missionary activity had influence on the coast

culturalAchievements.zh: 芳蒂以沿海贸易城镇文化、与欧洲人早期接触传统和阿坎金器工艺著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Fante were known for their coastal trading town culture, early contact traditions with Europeans, and Akan goldwork.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系阿坎语族（芳蒂语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Akan branch (Fante language)

philosophy.zh: 阿坎政治思想强调集体协商与母系继承，对联盟与联邦治理有独特实践。
philosophy.en: Akan political thought emphasized collective consultation and matrilineal succession, with distinctive practices in alliance and confederal governance.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，部分精英接触英语拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: No indigenous writing system; some elites had exposure to English Latin alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以沿海贸易、渔业和棕榈油出口为基础的经济。与英国殖民堡垒的贸易往来使其较内陆地区更商业化。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on coastal trade, fishing, and palm oil exports. Trade with British colonial forts made it more commercialized than inland areas.

mainIndustries.zh: 沿海贸易、渔业、棕榈油生产、黄金与盐贸易、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Coastal trade, fishing, palm oil production, gold and salt trade, subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈油、黄金、盐、鱼干、欧洲进口品
tradeGoods.en: Palm oil, gold, salt, dried fish, European imports

householdWealth.zh: 沿海商人持有贸易品存货；渔民与农民财富较为有限。
householdWealth.en: Coastal merchants held trade inventories; fishermen and farmers had more limited wealth.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 沿海贸易与自给农渔并存的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining coastal trade with subsistence farming and fishing.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 各城邦征召的步兵，装备矛、火枪与盾。
description.en: Infantry levied from each town, armed with spears, muskets, and shields.

commanderInChief.en: Wartime commander elected by the confederacy

technology.zh: 通过沿海贸易获得欧洲火枪，但装备不一。
technology.en: European muskets obtained through coastal trade, but equipment was uneven.

threats.zh: 阿散蒂帝国的军事压力和英国殖民势力的渗透。
threats.en: Military pressure from the Ashanti Empire and encroachment by British colonial forces.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约35万，集中于黄金海岸中南部沿海地带。
populationDescription.en: Population about 350,000, concentrated in the south-central Gold Coast coastal zone.

socialClasses.zh: 酋长与氏族长老、沿海商人、渔民、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Chiefs and clan elders, coastal merchants, fishermen, farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 与英国在海岸角的殖民势力保持复杂的合作-对抗关系。
allies.en: Maintained a complex cooperative-adversarial relationship with British colonial forces at Cape Coast.

enemies.zh: 阿散蒂帝国是长期敌人。
enemies.en: The Ashanti Empire was the longstanding enemy.

foreignPolicy.zh: 借助英国军事支持对抗阿散蒂，同时试图维护自身自治权。
foreignPolicy.en: Leveraged British military support against Ashanti while trying to preserve their own autonomy.

era.zh: 西非沿海贸易城邦时期
era.en: West African coastal trading town era

keyInnovations.zh: 沿海渔业技术、与欧洲人的贸易交流带来部分西方技术接触。
keyInnovations.en: Coastal fishing technology; trade exchanges with Europeans brought some Western technological contact.

strengths.zh: 沿海贸易地位优越，与英国的联系提供军事保障。
strengths.en: Advantageous coastal trade position; ties with Britain provided military backing.

weaknesses.zh: 联盟松散缺乏统一行动力，日益依赖英国保护导致自主权流失。
weaknesses.en: Loose confederation lacked unified action capacity; growing dependence on British protection led to loss of autonomy.

outlook.zh: 芳蒂联盟将在英国殖民化加速中逐渐丧失独立性。
outlook.en: The Fante Confederacy would gradually lose independence as British colonization accelerated.

description.zh: 1840年的芳蒂联盟是黄金海岸一组对抗阿散蒂帝国的阿坎城邦松散联盟。
description.en: In 1840 the Fante Confederacy was a loose alliance of Akan city-states on the Gold Coast opposing the Ashanti Empire.

name.zh: 阿加德兹苏丹国（阿伊尔）

governmentForm.zh: 以图阿雷格贵族为核心的伊斯兰苏丹国，苏丹为名义上的图阿雷格部族联盟首领。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic sultanate centered on the Tuareg aristocracy, with the sultan as nominal head of the Tuareg tribal confederation.

socialStructure.zh: 以图阿雷格等级制为基础：伊莫沙格（贵族武士）、伊纳丹（工匠）、伊克兰（附属群体）与进贡农民构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Based on Tuareg hierarchy: Imashaghen (noble warriors), Inadan (artisans), Iklan (dependent groups), and tribute-paying farmers formed the social strata.

rulingClass.zh: 图阿雷格伊莫沙格贵族与苏丹
rulingClass.en: Tuareg Imashaghen nobles and the sultan

succession.zh: 苏丹由贵族氏族选举产生，母系与父系因素均影响继承。
succession.en: The sultan was elected by noble clans; both matrilineal and patrilineal factors influenced succession.

structure.zh: 苏丹为名义首领，实权分散于各图阿雷格部族首领。阿加德兹城设有伊斯兰法官。
structure.en: The sultan was nominal head; real power was dispersed among Tuareg tribal chiefs. Agadez city had Islamic judges.

function.zh: 协调部族事务与贸易管理
function.en: Coordinated tribal affairs and trade management

function.zh: 宗教与法律事务
function.en: Religious and legal affairs

localAdmin.zh: 游牧部族由各自首领自治管理，苏丹在阿加德兹城和绿洲定居点有较多权力。
localAdmin.en: Nomadic tribes were self-governed by their own chiefs; the sultan had more authority in Agadez city and oasis settlements.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与图阿雷格习惯法并行。
legalSystem.en: Islamic sharia and Tuareg customary law operated in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自跨撒哈拉商旅通行费、盐矿和牲畜贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from trans-Saharan caravan transit fees, salt mines, and livestock tribute.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿加德兹以其独特的撒哈拉建筑风格（泥砖清真寺）、图阿雷格银器工艺和跨撒哈拉贸易枢纽地位著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Agadez was known for its distinctive Saharan architectural style (mudbrick mosque), Tuareg silverwork, and status as a trans-Saharan trade hub.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系柏柏尔语族（塔玛舍克语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic family, Berber branch (Tamasheq)

philosophy.zh: 图阿雷格文化强调贵族荣誉、沙漠生存智慧与游牧自由。
philosophy.en: Tuareg culture emphasized noble honor, desert survival wisdom, and nomadic freedom.

writingSystem.zh: 提非纳格文字（图阿雷格本土文字）与阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Tifinagh script (Tuareg indigenous script) and Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以跨撒哈拉贸易中继、畜牧和绿洲农业为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on trans-Saharan trade relay, pastoralism, and oasis agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 跨撒哈拉贸易中继、畜牧（骆驼与山羊）、绿洲农业、银器手工艺、盐矿
mainIndustries.en: Trans-Saharan trade relay, pastoralism (camels and goats), oasis agriculture, silverwork, salt mining

tradeGoods.zh: 盐、牲畜、银器、鸵鸟毛、皮革
tradeGoods.en: Salt, livestock, silverwork, ostrich feathers, leather

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币与物物交换

householdWealth.zh: 贵族以骆驼群和贸易资产为主要财富；工匠以银器技艺为生。
householdWealth.en: Nobles held camel herds and trade assets as main wealth; artisans lived by silverwork skills.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 游牧贡赋经济与跨撒哈拉中继贸易相结合。
economicSystem.en: Nomadic tribute economy combined with trans-Saharan relay trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以骆驼机动的沙漠武士，图阿雷格军事核心。
description.en: Camel-mounted desert warriors, the military core of the Tuareg.

description.zh: 定居绿洲人口与附属群体征召的步兵。
description.en: Infantry levied from settled oasis populations and dependent groups.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿加德兹苏丹与各部族首领
commanderInChief.en: Sultan of Agadez and tribal chiefs

technology.zh: 少量火器，以传统骆驼骑兵武器（长矛、剑、盾）为主。
technology.en: Few firearms; mainly traditional camel cavalry weapons (lances, swords, shields).

threats.zh: 索科托哈里发国的扩张压力和博尔努帝国的竞争。
threats.en: Expansionist pressure from the Sokoto Caliphate and competition from the Bornu Empire.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约50万，以图阿雷格游牧民为主，阿加德兹城和绿洲有定居人口。
populationDescription.en: Population about 500,000, mainly Tuareg nomads, with settled populations in Agadez city and oases.

socialClasses.zh: 伊莫沙格贵族、伊斯兰学者、商人、伊纳丹工匠、牧民与农民、伊克兰附属群体
socialClasses.en: Imashaghen nobles, Islamic scholars, merchants, Inadan artisans, pastoralists and farmers, Iklan dependent groups

allies.zh: 与北非贸易伙伴和部分图阿雷格联盟保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with North African trade partners and some Tuareg alliances.

enemies.zh: 索科托哈里发国和博尔努帝国为主要竞争对手。
enemies.en: The Sokoto Caliphate and Bornu Empire were the main rivals.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护跨撒哈拉贸易通道安全和图阿雷格游牧领地。
foreignPolicy.en: Defended trans-Saharan trade route security and Tuareg nomadic territories.

era.zh: 撒哈拉游牧苏丹国时期

keyInnovations.zh: 骆驼育种与沙漠导航技术、银器工艺、提非纳格文字。
keyInnovations.en: Camel breeding and desert navigation, silverwork, Tifinagh script.

strengths.zh: 控制跨撒哈拉贸易要道，图阿雷格骆驼骑兵在沙漠环境中具有优势。
strengths.en: Controlled key trans-Saharan trade routes; Tuareg camel cavalry had advantages in the desert environment.

weaknesses.zh: 部族分散难以统一行动，军事技术落后于火器时代。
weaknesses.en: Dispersed tribes difficult to unify; military technology lagged behind the firearms era.

outlook.zh: 阿加德兹苏丹国将在19世纪后期面临法国殖民扩张的严重威胁。
outlook.en: The Sultanate of Agadez would face serious threats from French colonial expansion in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的阿加德兹苏丹国是尼日尔阿伊尔地区的图阿雷格撒哈拉国家，以跨撒哈拉贸易和骆驼游牧著称。
description.en: In 1840 the Sultanate of Agadez was a Tuareg Saharan state in the Aïr region of Niger, known for trans-Saharan trade and camel pastoralism.

governmentForm.zh: 以恩古尼军事体系为基础的中央集权王国，由姆菲卡纳大动乱后北迁的恩古尼武士建立。
governmentForm.en: A centralized kingdom based on the Nguni military system, established by Nguni warriors who migrated north after the Mfecane upheaval.

socialStructure.zh: 恩古尼武士贵族居上，被征服的聪加人和其他民族居下。军事团体（阿马布多）为核心组织。
socialStructure.en: Nguni warrior aristocrats occupied the top; conquered Tsonga and other peoples were below. Military regiments (amabutho) were the core organizational units.

rulingClass.zh: 索尚加内与恩德万德韦王室、恩古尼军事精英
rulingClass.en: Soshangane and the Ndwandwe royals, Nguni military elite

succession.zh: 王位在恩德万德韦王室内传承，军事力量对继承有决定性影响。
succession.en: The throne passed within the Ndwandwe royal house; military power was decisive in succession.

structure.zh: 国王通过军事团体体系和地区首领统治被征服领土。恩古尼军事制度被移植到新领地。
structure.en: The king ruled conquered territories through the military regiment system and district chiefs. Nguni military institutions were transplanted to new territories.

function.zh: 国政与军事决策
function.en: State and military decisions

function.zh: 管理被征服领土
function.en: Administered conquered territories

localAdmin.zh: 被征服地区由恩古尼军事首领管理，本地聪加酋长在服从条件下保留部分权力。
localAdmin.en: Conquered areas were managed by Nguni military chiefs; local Tsonga headmen retained some authority on condition of submission.

legalSystem.zh: 以恩古尼习惯法和国王裁决为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Nguni customary law and royal adjudication.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自征服贡品、牲畜税、劳役和贸易利润。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from conquest tribute, cattle levies, labor services, and trade profits.

religion.zh: 传统恩古尼泛灵信仰与祖先崇拜
religion.en: Traditional Nguni animist beliefs and ancestor worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 加扎王国将祖鲁式军事制度传播到莫桑比克地区，创造了独特的恩古尼-聪加混合文化。
culturalAchievements.en: The Gaza Kingdom spread Zulu-style military institutions to the Mozambique region, creating a distinctive Nguni-Tsonga hybrid culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（恩古尼语群与聪加语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Nguni language group and Tsonga)

philosophy.zh: 恩古尼军事文化强调征服、部族忠诚与军事荣耀。
philosophy.en: Nguni military culture emphasized conquest, tribal loyalty, and martial glory.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以畜牧、征服掠夺和对外贸易为基础。通过德拉戈阿湾与葡萄牙人进行象牙贸易。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on pastoralism, conquest plunder, and external trade. Ivory was traded with the Portuguese through Delagoa Bay.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧、自给农业、象牙贸易、掠夺经济
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, ivory trade, plunder economy

tradeGoods.zh: 象牙、牲畜、兽皮、奴隶
tradeGoods.en: Ivory, livestock, hides, slaves

householdWealth.zh: 恩古尼军事贵族拥有大量牛群；被征服民众的财产受到掠夺。
householdWealth.en: Nguni military aristocrats held large cattle herds; conquered peoples' property was subject to plunder.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以征服掠夺和畜牧为核心的军事化经济。
economicSystem.en: A militarized economy centered on conquest plunder and pastoralism.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以祖鲁式军事训练的精锐步兵团体。
description.en: Elite infantry regiments trained in Zulu-style military methods.

description.zh: 被征服聪加人中征召的辅助武装。
description.en: Auxiliary forces conscripted from conquered Tsonga peoples.

technology.zh: 祖鲁式短矛（阿塞盖）与牛皮盾战术，少量火器。
technology.en: Zulu-style short spear (assegai) and cowhide shield tactics; a few firearms.

threats.zh: 葡萄牙殖民势力的渗透与恩德贝勒等其他姆菲卡纳离散群体的竞争。
threats.en: Portuguese colonial encroachment and competition from Ndebele and other Mfecane diaspora groups.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 人口约70万，以被征服的聪加人为主体，恩古尼武士为统治少数。
populationDescription.en: Population about 700,000, mainly conquered Tsonga people, with Nguni warriors as the ruling minority.

socialClasses.zh: 恩古尼王室与军事贵族、团体战士、被征服聪加酋长、聪加农民与劳工
socialClasses.en: Nguni royals and military aristocrats, regiment warriors, conquered Tsonga headmen, Tsonga farmers and laborers

allies.zh: 与葡萄牙殖民者维持紧张的贸易关系。
allies.en: Maintained tense trade relations with Portuguese colonists.

enemies.zh: 葡萄牙殖民势力与恩德贝勒王国为主要对手。
enemies.en: Portuguese colonial forces and the Ndebele Kingdom were the main adversaries.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以军事威慑维护领土，同时利用象牙贸易获取外部资源。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained territory through military deterrence while exploiting ivory trade for external resources.

era.zh: 南部非洲姆菲卡纳后军事国家时期
era.en: Post-Mfecane southern African military state era

keyInnovations.zh: 祖鲁式军事组织、阿塞盖短矛战术。
keyInnovations.en: Zulu-style military organization, assegai short spear tactics.

strengths.zh: 精锐的恩古尼军事团体，对被征服民族的有效控制。
strengths.en: Elite Nguni military regiments; effective control over conquered peoples.

weaknesses.zh: 统治建立在征服之上缺乏合法性，面临葡萄牙殖民和内部不满。
weaknesses.en: Rule was built on conquest without legitimacy; faced Portuguese colonialism and internal discontent.

outlook.zh: 加扎王国在索尚加内统治下达到鼎盛，但其子嗣间的继承争斗将削弱王国。
outlook.en: The Gaza Kingdom reached its peak under Soshangane, but succession struggles among his sons would weaken it.

description.zh: 1840年的加扎王国是莫桑比克南部由姆菲卡纳离散恩古尼武士建立的军事征服国家。
description.en: In 1840 the Gaza Kingdom was a military conquest state in southern Mozambique established by Mfecane-era Nguni warriors.

governmentForm.zh: 以阿斯基亚后裔为名义君主的衰落王国，实际权力日益分散。
governmentForm.en: A declining kingdom with Askia descendants as nominal monarchs; real power was increasingly dispersed.

socialStructure.zh: 桑海贵族后裔、伊斯兰学者、渔民与农民以及奴隶构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Songhai noble descendants, Islamic scholars, fishermen and farmers, and slaves formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 阿斯基亚后裔与桑海贵族
rulingClass.en: Askia descendants and Songhai nobility

succession.zh: 王位在阿斯基亚后裔间传承，但实际权力已大幅缩减。
succession.en: The throne passed among Askia descendants, but real power had greatly diminished.

structure.zh: 名义上由阿斯基亚后裔统治，实际上地方酋长和伊斯兰学者拥有较大自主权。
structure.en: Nominally ruled by Askia descendants; in practice local chiefs and Islamic scholars held considerable autonomy.

function.zh: 名义上的国政中枢
function.en: Nominal center of state affairs

function.zh: 法律与宗教事务
function.en: Legal and religious affairs

localAdmin.zh: 地方由各村落与河段酋长自治管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas self-governed by village and river-segment chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与桑海习惯法并存。
legalSystem.en: Islamic sharia and Songhai customary law coexisted.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自河流渔业税、农产品和有限的贸易税。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from river fishing levies, agricultural products, and limited trade taxes.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 登迪保留了旧桑海帝国的伊斯兰学术传统和尼日尔河渔业文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Dendi preserved the old Songhai Empire's Islamic scholarly tradition and Niger River fishing culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系桑海语族
languageFamily.en: Nilo-Saharan family, Songhai branch

philosophy.zh: 继承桑海帝国的伊斯兰学术传统，但已衰落。
philosophy.en: Inherited the Songhai Empire's Islamic scholarly tradition, though in decline.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 以尼日尔河渔业和沿河自给农业为主的衰落经济。
gdpDescription.en: A declining economy based on Niger River fishing and riverine subsistence agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 渔业、自给农业、有限的区域贸易
mainIndustries.en: Fishing, subsistence agriculture, limited regional trade

tradeGoods.zh: 鱼干、谷物、少量象牙
tradeGoods.en: Dried fish, grain, small amounts of ivory

householdWealth.zh: 贵族保有少量贸易资产和土地；大多数民众为自给渔农。
householdWealth.en: Nobles held small trade assets and land; most people were subsistence fishermen-farmers.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以渔农为基础的自给经济。
economicSystem.en: A subsistence economy based on fishing and farming.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛和弓装备的步兵及独木舟河上武装。
description.en: Infantry armed with spears and bows, and canoe-borne river forces.

technology.zh: 极少火器，以传统冷兵器为主。
technology.en: Very few firearms; mainly traditional cold weapons.

threats.zh: 索科托哈里发国的持续扩张和周边部族的侵袭。
threats.en: Continued expansion of the Sokoto Caliphate and raids from surrounding tribes.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

populationDescription.zh: 人口约35万，桑海后裔聚居于尼日尔河中游弯曲地带。
populationDescription.en: Population about 350,000; Songhai descendants settled along the middle Niger River bend.

socialClasses.zh: 阿斯基亚后裔与桑海贵族、伊斯兰学者、渔民、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Askia descendants and Songhai nobility, Islamic scholars, fishermen, farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 与部分尼日尔河沿岸小政体保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with some small polities along the Niger River.

enemies.zh: 索科托哈里发国为主要威胁。
enemies.en: The Sokoto Caliphate was the main threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以保存桑海文化遗产和维护尼日尔河沿岸领地为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Focused on preserving Songhai cultural heritage and defending Niger River territories.

era.zh: 西非尼日尔河流域衰落帝国残余
era.en: Declining empire remnant of the West African Niger River basin

keyInnovations.zh: 尼日尔河航行技术、灌溉农业、伊斯兰学校。
keyInnovations.en: Niger River navigation, irrigated agriculture, Islamic schools.

strengths.zh: 尼日尔河提供渔业与交通便利，保留桑海帝国文化遗产。
strengths.en: The Niger River provided fishing and transportation; preserved Songhai Empire cultural heritage.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量极弱，政治碎片化，无力抵抗索科托扩张。
weaknesses.en: Extremely weak military, political fragmentation, unable to resist Sokoto expansion.

outlook.zh: 登迪桑海王国将继续衰落，最终被索科托哈里发国和后来的法国殖民所吞并。
outlook.en: The Dendi Songhai kingdom would continue declining, eventually being absorbed by the Sokoto Caliphate and later French colonization.

description.zh: 1840年的登迪桑海王国是旧桑海帝国在尼日尔河中游的残余政体，已严重衰落。
description.en: In 1840 the Dendi Songhai kingdom was a severely declined remnant of the old Songhai Empire along the middle Niger River.

governmentForm.zh: 以阿法尔部族联盟为基础的伊斯兰苏丹国。
governmentForm.en: An Islamic sultanate based on the Afar tribal confederation.

socialStructure.zh: 以父系氏族为基础，苏丹家族、贵族氏族、牧民和盐商构成社会等级。
socialStructure.en: Based on patrilineal clans; the sultan's family, noble clans, pastoralists, and salt traders formed the social hierarchy.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹与贵族阿法尔氏族
rulingClass.en: The sultan and noble Afar clans

succession.zh: 苏丹位在统治家族内传承。
succession.en: The sultanate was inherited within the ruling family.

structure.zh: 苏丹通过氏族长老议事会治理，各部族保持较大自主权。
structure.en: The sultan governed through a clan elder council; each tribe maintained considerable autonomy.

function.zh: 政务决策与部族协调
function.en: State decisions and tribal coordination

function.zh: 管理阿法尔盆地盐矿与贸易
function.en: Managed Afar Depression salt mines and trade

localAdmin.zh: 地方由各氏族长老自治管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas self-governed by clan elders.

legalSystem.zh: 阿法尔习惯法与伊斯兰教法并存。
legalSystem.en: Afar customary law and Islamic sharia coexisted.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自盐矿利润、商旅通行费和牲畜贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from salt mine profits, caravan transit fees, and livestock tribute.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教
religion.en: Sunni Islam

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥萨以控制阿法尔盆地盐矿贸易和阿法尔游牧文化著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Aussa was known for controlling Afar Depression salt trade and Afar nomadic culture.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系库希特语族（阿法尔语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic family, Cushitic branch (Afar language)

philosophy.zh: 阿法尔文化强调氏族荣誉、牧民自由与伊斯兰信仰。
philosophy.en: Afar culture emphasized clan honor, pastoral freedom, and Islamic faith.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字用于宗教事务
writingSystem.en: Arabic script used for religious affairs

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以盐矿贸易和畜牧为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on salt trade and pastoralism.

mainIndustries.zh: 盐矿开采与贸易、畜牧（骆驼与山羊）、有限的绿洲农业
mainIndustries.en: Salt mining and trade, pastoralism (camels and goats), limited oasis agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 盐条（阿莫莱）、牲畜、兽皮
tradeGoods.en: Salt bars (amole), livestock, hides

name.zh: 盐条（阿莫莱）与玛利亚·特蕾西亚银币
name.en: Salt bars (amole) and Maria Theresa thaler

householdWealth.zh: 以骆驼群和盐贸易利润为主要财富。
householdWealth.en: Camel herds and salt trade profits constituted main wealth.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以盐矿与牧业为核心的部族贸易经济。
economicSystem.en: A tribal trade economy centered on salt mining and pastoralism.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以弯刀和矛装备的阿法尔牧民战士。
description.en: Afar pastoral warriors armed with curved swords and spears.

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，极少火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 埃塞俄比亚诸侯的扩张和周边部族的竞争。
threats.en: Ethiopian lords' expansion and competition from surrounding tribes.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约18万，阿法尔游牧民为主体。
populationDescription.en: Population about 180,000, predominantly Afar nomads.

socialClasses.zh: 苏丹与贵族氏族、盐商、牧民、少量定居农民
socialClasses.en: Sultan and noble clans, salt traders, pastoralists, a few settled farmers

allies.zh: 与红海沿岸阿拉伯商人保持贸易联系。
allies.en: Maintained trade ties with Arab merchants along the Red Sea coast.

enemies.zh: 埃塞俄比亚诸侯与伊萨族为潜在对手。
enemies.en: Ethiopian lords and the Issa were potential adversaries.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护盐矿控制权和阿法尔牧地安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Defended control of salt mines and Afar pastureland security.

era.zh: 东非游牧部族苏丹国

keyInnovations.zh: 盐矿开采技术、骆驼商旅组织。
keyInnovations.en: Salt mining techniques, camel caravan organization.

strengths.zh: 控制重要的阿法尔盆地盐矿贸易，沙漠环境提供天然屏障。
strengths.en: Controlled important Afar Depression salt trade; desert environment provided natural barriers.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，军事力量弱，经济规模有限。
weaknesses.en: Small population, weak military, limited economic scale.

outlook.zh: 奥萨苏丹国将在19世纪后期面临意大利和法国殖民势力的威胁。
outlook.en: The Sultanate of Aussa would face threats from Italian and French colonial forces in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的奥萨苏丹国是阿法尔地区以盐矿贸易和游牧为主的小型伊斯兰苏丹国。
description.en: In 1840 the Sultanate of Aussa was a small Islamic sultanate in the Afar region based on salt trade and pastoralism.

governmentForm.zh: 以马科科为宗教与政治最高权威的联邦制王国，各地方领主保持较大自治权。
governmentForm.en: A federal kingdom with the Makoko as supreme religious and political authority; local lords maintained considerable autonomy.

socialStructure.zh: 马科科与王族居上，地方领主与贸易精英居中，农民与渔民为主体，另有奴隶阶层。
socialStructure.en: The Makoko and royals at the top, local lords and trade elites in the middle, farmers and fishermen as the majority, with a slave class.

rulingClass.zh: 马科科与泰凯王族、地方领主
rulingClass.en: The Makoko and Teke royals, local lords

succession.zh: 马科科由王族内选举产生，需经贵族会议认可。
succession.en: The Makoko was elected from within the royal lineage, requiring noble council approval.

structure.zh: 马科科通过分封地方领主统治广大领地，中央权力有限，更多依赖宗教权威。
structure.en: The Makoko ruled vast territories through enfeoffed local lords; central power was limited, relying more on religious authority.

function.zh: 宗教仪式、外交与重大纠纷仲裁
function.en: Religious ceremonies, diplomacy, and major dispute arbitration

function.zh: 管理刚果河贸易
function.en: Managed Congo River trade

localAdmin.zh: 各地方由领主自治管理，定期向马科科缴纳贡品。
localAdmin.en: Local areas self-governed by lords, with regular tribute payments to the Makoko.

legalSystem.zh: 以泰凯习惯法和马科科裁决为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Teke customary law and Makoko's adjudication.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自贡品、贸易税和过境商旅费用。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from tribute, trade taxes, and transit caravan fees.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰，马科科被视为拥有超自然力量的宗教领袖
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs; the Makoko was seen as a religious leader with supernatural powers

culturalAchievements.zh: 泰凯王国以其独特的面具艺术、拉菲亚布织造和刚果河贸易网络著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Teke Kingdom was known for its distinctive mask art, raffia cloth weaving, and Congo River trade networks.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（泰凯语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Teke language)

philosophy.zh: 泰凯文化中马科科兼具政治与宗教权威，祖先崇拜和自然精灵信仰渗透社会生活。
philosophy.en: In Teke culture the Makoko held both political and religious authority; ancestor worship and nature spirit beliefs permeated social life.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以刚果河贸易、拉菲亚布生产和自给农业为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on Congo River trade, raffia cloth production, and subsistence agriculture.

mainIndustries.zh: 拉菲亚布织造、刚果河贸易、自给农业、渔业、铁器制作
mainIndustries.en: Raffia cloth weaving, Congo River trade, subsistence agriculture, fishing, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 拉菲亚布、象牙、奴隶、铁器、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Raffia cloth, ivory, slaves, iron implements, palm oil

householdWealth.zh: 领主持有拉菲亚布存货和贸易资产；普通民众依赖农业和渔业。
householdWealth.en: Lords held raffia cloth inventories and trade assets; commoners relied on agriculture and fishing.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以拉菲亚布为货币媒介的贡赋与贸易并存经济。
economicSystem.en: An economy combining tribute and trade with raffia cloth as a currency medium.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛和刀装备的泰凯步兵与河上独木舟武装。
description.en: Teke infantry armed with spears and swords, and canoe-borne river forces.

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，极少火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 刚果河下游势力的竞争和欧洲探险者对刚果盆地的日益关注。
threats.en: Competition from lower Congo forces and growing European explorers' interest in the Congo basin.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

populationDescription.zh: 人口约55万，散布于刚果河北岸与加蓬南部的广大草原地带。
populationDescription.en: Population about 550,000, spread across the vast savanna north of the Congo River and southern Gabon.

socialClasses.zh: 马科科与王族、地方领主、商人、农民与渔民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Makoko and royals, local lords, merchants, farmers and fishermen, slaves

allies.zh: 与刚果河流域各贸易伙伴保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with trade partners across the Congo River basin.

enemies.zh: 与刚果河下游其他政体存在贸易竞争。
enemies.en: Trade competition with other polities in the lower Congo.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护刚果河贸易通道和拉菲亚布贸易网络。
foreignPolicy.en: Defended Congo River trade routes and the raffia cloth trade network.

era.zh: 中部非洲班图王国时期

keyInnovations.zh: 拉菲亚布织造技术、刚果河独木舟航行、铁器锻造。
keyInnovations.en: Raffia cloth weaving, Congo River canoe navigation, ironworking.

strengths.zh: 拉菲亚布贸易网络和马科科的宗教权威提供政治凝聚力。
strengths.en: Raffia cloth trade networks and the Makoko's religious authority provided political cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 中央权力有限，军事技术简单，面临欧洲殖民扩张威胁。
weaknesses.en: Limited central power, simple military technology, faced threats from European colonial expansion.

outlook.zh: 泰凯王国将在1880年代被法国殖民者利用，马科科被迫签署保护条约。
outlook.en: The Teke Kingdom would be exploited by French colonists in the 1880s, with the Makoko forced to sign a protectorate treaty.

description.zh: 1840年的泰凯王国是刚果河北岸以马科科为政治宗教领袖的拉菲亚布贸易王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Teke Kingdom was a raffia cloth trading kingdom north of the Congo River with the Makoko as political-religious leader.

governmentForm.zh: 以布尚戈人为核心的联邦制王国，尼米通过精密的宫廷体系和省级官吏统治多个附庸族群。
governmentForm.en: A federal kingdom centered on the Bushoong people; the Nyim ruled multiple vassal groups through an elaborate court system and provincial officials.

socialStructure.zh: 尼米与布尚戈王族居上，艺术匠人和商人受高度尊重，农民构成主体，另有奴隶阶层。
socialStructure.en: The Nyim and Bushoong royals at the top; artisans and merchants were highly respected; farmers formed the majority; a slave class also existed.

rulingClass.zh: 尼米与布尚戈王族、宫廷高级官员
rulingClass.en: The Nyim and Bushoong royals, senior court officials

succession.zh: 尼米由布尚戈王族选举产生，需经宫廷重臣认可。
succession.en: The Nyim was elected from the Bushoong royal lineage, requiring approval from senior court officials.

structure.zh: 尼米通过复杂的宫廷官僚体系统治，设有专门的贸易、司法和仪式官员。附庸部族向中央纳贡。
structure.en: The Nyim governed through a complex court bureaucracy with specialized trade, judicial, and ceremonial officials. Vassal tribes paid tribute to the center.

function.zh: 国政决策、仪式与司法
function.en: State decisions, ceremonies, and justice

function.zh: 管理拉菲亚布贸易与贡品
function.en: Managed raffia cloth trade and tribute

function.zh: 组织宫廷艺术创作与工匠生产
function.en: Organized court artistic production and artisan workshops

localAdmin.zh: 各附庸部族由本族酋长管理，定期向恩绍恩格朝贡。
localAdmin.en: Vassal tribes were managed by their own chiefs, with regular tribute to Nsheng.

legalSystem.zh: 以尼米裁决和库巴习惯法为基础的精密司法体系。
legalSystem.en: An elaborate judicial system based on Nyim's adjudication and Kuba customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自拉菲亚布贡品、象牙贸易和附庸部族进贡。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from raffia cloth tribute, ivory trade, and vassal tribe offerings.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰，崇拜造物主万贝（Woot）和祖先
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs, worshipping creator figure Woot and ancestors

culturalAchievements.zh: 库巴以精美的拉菲亚布织造、木雕面具、国王肖像雕刻（恩多普）和复杂的几何图案闻名于世。
culturalAchievements.en: Kuba was world-renowned for its exquisite raffia cloth weaving, wood-carved masks, royal portrait sculptures (ndop), and complex geometric patterns.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（库巴语/布尚戈语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Kuba/Bushoong language)

philosophy.zh: 库巴文化极度重视艺术创新与美学，国王被要求在统治期间创制新的艺术样式或设计。
philosophy.en: Kuba culture placed extreme value on artistic innovation and aesthetics; kings were expected to create new art styles or designs during their reigns.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，但发展出复杂的视觉符号与几何图案体系
writingSystem.en: No writing system, but developed a complex system of visual symbols and geometric patterns

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以高品质拉菲亚布生产与贸易、自给农业和象牙贸易为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on high-quality raffia cloth production and trade, subsistence agriculture, and ivory trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 拉菲亚布织造、木雕与艺术品制作、自给农业、象牙贸易
mainIndustries.en: Raffia cloth weaving, wood carving and art production, subsistence agriculture, ivory trade

tradeGoods.zh: 拉菲亚布、木雕、象牙、铁器、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Raffia cloth, wood carvings, ivory, iron implements, palm oil

householdWealth.zh: 拉菲亚布在库巴社会中同时充当货币与财富储存手段。
householdWealth.en: Raffia cloth served simultaneously as currency and a store of wealth in Kuba society.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以拉菲亚布为核心的贡赋与内部贸易经济。
economicSystem.en: A tribute and internal trade economy centered on raffia cloth.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛和刀装备的步兵与王家卫队。
description.en: Infantry and royal guards armed with spears and swords.

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，极少火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 周边部族的侵扰和日益增长的外部贸易商渗透。
threats.en: Raids from surrounding tribes and growing penetration by external traders.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约35万，布尚戈人为核心，多个附庸族群共同构成王国。
populationDescription.en: Population about 350,000; the Bushoong were the core, with multiple vassal groups composing the kingdom.

socialClasses.zh: 尼米与王族、宫廷官员、艺术匠人、商人、农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Nyim and royals, court officials, artisans, merchants, farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 与周边部族保持贸易联系。
allies.en: Maintained trade ties with surrounding tribes.

enemies.zh: 与隆达帝国有领土与贸易竞争。
enemies.en: Had territorial and trade competition with the Lunda Empire.

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护王国独立与拉菲亚布贸易网络。
foreignPolicy.en: Defended kingdom independence and raffia cloth trade networks.

era.zh: 中部非洲班图王国艺术高峰期
era.en: Central African Bantu kingdom artistic peak era

keyInnovations.zh: 精密拉菲亚布织造技术、恩多普肖像雕刻、复杂几何图案设计。
keyInnovations.en: Advanced raffia cloth weaving, ndop portrait sculpture, complex geometric pattern design.

strengths.zh: 高度发达的艺术传统与精密宫廷组织，拉菲亚布贸易提供经济基础。
strengths.en: Highly developed artistic tradition and elaborate court organization; raffia cloth trade provided an economic base.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量薄弱，地理位置偏内陆难以获取火器。
weaknesses.en: Weak military; remote inland location made it difficult to obtain firearms.

outlook.zh: 库巴王国将在19世纪后期面临阿拉伯-斯瓦希里奴隶商和欧洲殖民者的严重威胁。
outlook.en: The Kuba Kingdom would face severe threats from Arab-Swahili slave traders and European colonists in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的库巴王国是刚果中部以精美拉菲亚布和木雕艺术闻名的班图王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Kuba Kingdom was a Bantu kingdom in central Congo renowned for its exquisite raffia cloth and wood-carving art.

governmentForm.zh: 以隆达帝国模式为蓝本的世袭王国，基亚姆武为最高统治者，受隆达帝国名义上的宗主权。
governmentForm.en: A hereditary kingdom modeled on the Lunda Empire pattern, with the Kiamvu as supreme ruler, under nominal Lunda suzerainty.

socialStructure.zh: 基亚姆武与贵族居上，自由民与农民为主体，大量奴隶居下。
socialStructure.en: Kiamvu and nobles at the top, free commoners and farmers as the majority, large slave population at the bottom.

rulingClass.zh: 基亚姆武与雅卡贵族
rulingClass.en: Kiamvu and Yaka nobility

succession.zh: 王位在雅卡王室内传承，需获得隆达帝国的名义认可。
succession.en: The throne passed within the Yaka royal house; nominal Lunda recognition was required.

structure.zh: 基亚姆武通过地区酋长和贵族议事会统治。
structure.en: The Kiamvu ruled through district chiefs and a noble council.

function.zh: 国政决策与纠纷仲裁
function.en: State decisions and dispute arbitration

function.zh: 管理贸易路线与贡品征收
function.en: Managed trade routes and tribute collection

localAdmin.zh: 地方由地区酋长管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas managed by district chiefs.

legalSystem.zh: 以雅卡习惯法和国王裁决为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Yaka customary law and royal adjudication.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自贡品、贸易税和奴隶贸易利润。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from tribute, trade taxes, and slave trade profits.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰与祖先崇拜
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs and ancestor worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 雅卡以独特的面具艺术（尤其成人礼面具）和雕刻传统著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Yaka were known for their distinctive mask art (especially initiation masks) and carving traditions.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（雅卡语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Yaka language)

philosophy.zh: 雅卡文化重视成人礼仪式与面具表演在社会教化中的作用。
philosophy.en: Yaka culture valued initiation ceremonies and mask performances for social education.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给农业、贸易中转和有限的奴隶贸易为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on subsistence agriculture, trade transit, and limited slave trade.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、手工雕刻、贸易中转、铁器制作
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, hand carving, trade transit, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、蜂蜡、象牙、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, beeswax, ivory, palm oil

householdWealth.zh: 贵族持有奴隶和贸易品；普通民众依赖农业。
householdWealth.en: Nobles held slaves and trade goods; commoners relied on agriculture.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以贡赋与自给农业为基础的经济。
economicSystem.en: An economy based on tribute and subsistence agriculture.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛和刀装备的步兵。
description.en: Infantry armed with spears and swords.

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，极少火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 隆达帝国的宗主权压力与周边势力的侵扰。
threats.en: Lunda suzerainty pressure and raids from surrounding powers.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 线膛野战炮，使用开花弹
description.en: Rifled field gun firing explosive shells

populationDescription.zh: 人口约18万，散布于刚果-安哥拉边境地带。
populationDescription.en: Population about 180,000, spread across the Congo-Angola border area.

socialClasses.zh: 基亚姆武与贵族、自由民与农民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Kiamvu and nobles, free commoners and farmers, slaves

allies.zh: 名义上臣服于隆达帝国。
allies.en: Nominally subject to the Lunda Empire.

enemies.zh: 与周边其他附庸国存在竞争。
enemies.en: Competition with other vassal states in the region.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在隆达宗主权下维护实际自治。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintained practical autonomy under Lunda suzerainty.

era.zh: 中部非洲班图附庸王国时期
era.en: Central African Bantu vassal kingdom era

keyInnovations.zh: 面具雕刻艺术、铁器锻造。
keyInnovations.en: Mask carving art, ironworking.

strengths.zh: 独特的艺术传统和隆达帝国的名义保护。
strengths.en: Distinctive artistic tradition and nominal Lunda protection.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量弱小，经济规模有限，受隆达宗主权约束。
weaknesses.en: Weak military, limited economic scale, constrained by Lunda suzerainty.

outlook.zh: 雅卡王国将在19世纪后期面临殖民势力的渗透。
outlook.en: The Yaka Kingdom would face colonial encroachment in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的雅卡王国是刚果-安哥拉边境地区受隆达帝国名义宗主权影响的班图王国。
description.en: In 1840 the Yaka Kingdom was a Bantu kingdom in the Congo-Angola border area under nominal Lunda suzerainty.

ruler.zh: 各王国之王（索马·因内内、比耶等）
ruler.en: Kings of the various kingdoms (Bailundu, Bié, etc.)

dynasty.en: Each kingdom had its own dynasty

governmentForm.zh: 以多个独立翁本杜王国为基础的松散政治体。拜伦杜和比耶为最强大的两个王国，各有国王与宫廷体系。
governmentForm.en: A loose political entity based on multiple independent Ovimbundu kingdoms. Bailundu and Bié were the two most powerful, each with its own king and court system.

socialStructure.zh: 各王国由王室与贵族、长途贸易商人、农民以及奴隶构成等级社会。
socialStructure.en: Each kingdom had a hierarchical society of royals and nobles, long-distance traders, farmers, and slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 各王国索马与贵族、大商人
rulingClass.en: Soma and nobles of each kingdom, major merchants

succession.zh: 索马位在王室内传承，贵族议事会的支持至关重要。
succession.en: The Soma's position was inherited within the royal house; noble council support was crucial.

structure.zh: 各王国独立治理，索马通过贵族议事会处理政务。长途贸易商人在政策中有重要发言权。
structure.en: Each kingdom governed independently; the Soma handled affairs through a noble council. Long-distance traders had significant say in policy.

function.zh: 国政决策与贸易管理
function.en: State decisions and trade management

function.zh: 组织横跨安哥拉的长途商队
function.en: Organized long-distance caravans across Angola

localAdmin.zh: 地方由索马任命的酋长和村落长老管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas managed by chiefs appointed by the Soma and village elders.

legalSystem.zh: 以翁本杜习惯法和国王裁决为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Ovimbundu customary law and royal adjudication.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自长途贸易利润、市场税和农产品贡品。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from long-distance trade profits, market taxes, and agricultural tribute.

religion.zh: 传统泛灵信仰为主，天主教传教活动在沿海地区有部分影响
religion.en: Traditional animist beliefs predominated; Catholic missionary activity had some influence in coastal areas

culturalAchievements.zh: 翁本杜以横跨中南部非洲的长途贸易网络和商旅组织能力著称。
culturalAchievements.en: The Ovimbundu were known for their long-distance trade networks spanning central-southern Africa and their caravan organizational skills.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（翁本杜语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Umbundu language)

philosophy.zh: 翁本杜商业文化重视贸易技能、旅行经验与跨文化交流能力。
philosophy.en: Ovimbundu commercial culture valued trading skills, travel experience, and cross-cultural communication abilities.

writingSystem.zh: 无本土文字，部分接触葡萄牙语拉丁字母
writingSystem.en: No indigenous writing system; some contact with Portuguese Latin alphabet

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以长途贸易为特色，翁本杜商人充当内陆产品与沿海殖民港口之间的中间商。橡胶和蜂蜡贸易正在兴起。
gdpDescription.en: The economy featured long-distance trade; Ovimbundu merchants served as middlemen between inland products and coastal colonial ports. Rubber and beeswax trade was rising.

mainIndustries.zh: 长途商队贸易、蜂蜡与橡胶收集、自给农业、铁器制作
mainIndustries.en: Long-distance caravan trade, beeswax and rubber collection, subsistence agriculture, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 蜂蜡、橡胶、象牙、奴隶（虽在减少）、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Beeswax, rubber, ivory, slaves (though declining), iron implements

householdWealth.zh: 大商人积累了可观的贸易资产；农民财富较为有限。
householdWealth.en: Major merchants accumulated considerable trade assets; farmers had more limited wealth.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以长途贸易中间商为核心的商业经济。
economicSystem.en: A commercial economy centered on long-distance trade intermediation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 兼具贸易护卫和军事职能的武装力量。
description.en: Armed forces serving both trade escort and military functions.

technology.zh: 通过贸易获得数量可观的火器，装备水平在中部非洲较高。
technology.en: Acquired a considerable number of firearms through trade; equipment levels were relatively high for Central Africa.

threats.zh: 葡萄牙殖民势力的扩张和内部各王国间的竞争。
threats.en: Portuguese colonial expansion and competition between the kingdoms.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 骑兵军刀仍在使用
description.en: Cavalry saber still in active use

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约85万，散布于安哥拉中部高原。
populationDescription.en: Population about 850,000, spread across the central Angolan highlands.

socialClasses.zh: 索马与王室、长途贸易商人、农民、手工匠人、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Soma and royals, long-distance traders, farmers, artisans, slaves

allies.zh: 与葡萄牙殖民者保持复杂的贸易-对抗关系。
allies.en: Maintained a complex trade-adversarial relationship with Portuguese colonists.

enemies.zh: 葡萄牙殖民扩张为主要威胁，各王国间也时有争斗。
enemies.en: Portuguese colonial expansion was the main threat; inter-kingdom conflicts were also frequent.

foreignPolicy.zh: 利用贸易中间商地位维护独立，在葡萄牙与内陆势力间保持平衡。
foreignPolicy.en: Leveraged middleman trading position to maintain independence, balancing between Portuguese and inland powers.

era.zh: 中南部非洲长途贸易社会

keyInnovations.zh: 长途商队组织技术、与欧洲人的贸易交流带来火器和新作物。
keyInnovations.en: Long-distance caravan organization; trade exchanges with Europeans brought firearms and new crops.

strengths.zh: 控制安哥拉内陆-沿海贸易要道，商旅组织能力强，火器装备较好。
strengths.en: Controlled Angola's interior-coastal trade corridor; strong caravan organization; relatively well-equipped with firearms.

weaknesses.zh: 各王国分立缺乏统一行动，日益依赖葡萄牙殖民商业体系。
weaknesses.en: Kingdoms were divided without unified action; growing dependence on Portuguese colonial commercial system.

outlook.zh: 翁本杜将在19世纪后期面临葡萄牙殖民化加速的严重挑战。
outlook.en: The Ovimbundu would face severe challenges from accelerating Portuguese colonization in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的翁本杜诸王国是安哥拉中部高原以长途贸易中间商角色闻名的班图王国群。
description.en: In 1840 the Ovimbundu Kingdoms were a group of Bantu kingdoms on the central Angolan highlands known for their long-distance trade middleman role.

dynasty.zh: 无王朝（布尔人民共和制）

governmentForm.zh: 由大迁徙布尔人建立的共和政体，人民议会（Volksraad）为最高权力机构。成立仅一年（1839年）。
governmentForm.en: A republic established by Great Trek Boers; the Volksraad (People's Council) was the supreme authority. Founded only a year earlier (1839).

socialStructure.zh: 布尔定居者（自由市民）居上，少数英国人和有色人群居中，祖鲁人等非洲人社群在定居区外生活。
socialStructure.en: Boer settlers (free burghers) at the top, a few British and colored groups in the middle, Zulu and other African communities living outside settler areas.

rulingClass.zh: 大迁徙领袖家族与布尔农场主
rulingClass.en: Great Trek leader families and Boer farmers

succession.zh: 议会成员由布尔市民选举产生。
succession.en: Council members were elected by Boer citizens.

structure.zh: 人民议会行使立法权，战场委员和地方行政官处理日常事务。体制极为初步。
structure.en: The Volksraad exercised legislative power; field cornets and local magistrates handled daily affairs. Institutions were extremely rudimentary.

function.zh: 立法与重大决策
function.en: Legislation and major decisions

function.zh: 民兵组织与边防
function.en: Militia organization and border defense

localAdmin.zh: 地方由战场委员和选出的地方行政官管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas managed by field cornets and elected local magistrates.

legalSystem.zh: 以罗马-荷兰法传统为基础的简易法律体系。
legalSystem.en: A rudimentary legal system based on Roman-Dutch law tradition.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收极为有限，主要依赖土地分配费和少量市场税。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was extremely limited, relying mainly on land allocation fees and small market taxes.

religion.zh: 荷兰归正教（加尔文宗）
religion.en: Dutch Reformed Church (Calvinism)

culturalAchievements.zh: 纳塔利亚体现了布尔大迁徙精神和荷裔南非人建立独立共和国的政治理想。
culturalAchievements.en: Natalia embodied the Great Trek spirit and the Dutch-descended South Africans' political ideal of establishing independent republics.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（荷兰语/早期阿非利堪斯语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European family, Germanic branch (Dutch / early Afrikaans)

philosophy.zh: 加尔文宗信仰与布尔人追求独立、自治和土地自由的拓荒精神。
philosophy.en: Calvinist faith combined with the Boer spirit of seeking independence, self-governance, and freedom of land.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（荷兰语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Dutch)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 极初期的自给牧农经济。布尔定居者依靠大面积牧场放牧牛群。
gdpDescription.en: An extremely early-stage subsistence pastoral-agricultural economy. Boer settlers relied on large-scale pastures for cattle herding.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、自给农业、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、兽皮、象牙
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, hides, ivory

name.zh: 极少货币流通，以物物交换为主
name.en: Very little currency in circulation; barter predominated

householdWealth.zh: 布尔农场主以土地和牛群为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Boer farmers held land and cattle herds as main assets.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给牧场经济。
economicSystem.en: Subsistence pastoral economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政支出受战争与帝国扩张驱动，赤字依靠国债与殖民收入弥补。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal spending is driven by warfare and imperial expansion, with deficits covered by sovereign bonds and colonial revenue.

description.zh: 全体成年布尔男性均为民兵，自备马匹和火枪。骑马射击精准。
description.en: All adult Boer males served as militia, providing their own horses and firearms. Excellent mounted marksmen.

technology.zh: 布尔民兵自备燧发枪和击发式步枪，骑射水平在南部非洲首屈一指。
technology.en: Boer militia supplied their own flintlock and percussion rifles; mounted marksmanship was unmatched in southern Africa.

threats.zh: 英国殖民势力对纳塔尔的觊觎和祖鲁王国的军事威胁。
threats.en: British colonial ambitions for Natal and military threats from the Zulu Kingdom.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 布尔定居者约6000人（另有大量祖鲁与其他非洲人口不在共和国行政控制之下）。
populationDescription.en: About 6,000 Boer settlers (with large Zulu and other African populations outside republican administrative control).

socialClasses.zh: 大迁徙领袖家族、布尔农场主、少数英国商人
socialClasses.en: Great Trek leader families, Boer farmers, a few British merchants

allies.zh: 与其他布尔迁徙社区保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with other Boer trek communities.

enemies.zh: 英国殖民政府欲将纳塔尔纳入帝国版图；祖鲁王国仍构成军事威胁。
enemies.en: The British colonial government sought to incorporate Natal into the empire; the Zulu Kingdom still posed a military threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 拒绝英国管辖，试图维护独立的布尔共和政体。
foreignPolicy.en: Rejected British jurisdiction; attempted to maintain an independent Boer republic.

era.zh: 南非布尔拓荒社会

keyInnovations.zh: 欧洲火器、牛车运输、畜牧围栏技术。
keyInnovations.en: European firearms, ox-wagon transport, pastoral fencing techniques.

strengths.zh: 布尔突击队火力强劲、机动性高；占据肥沃的纳塔尔低地。
strengths.en: Boer commandos had strong firepower and high mobility; occupied the fertile Natal lowlands.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少，制度极为初步，面临英国必将吞并的压力。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small population, very rudimentary institutions, facing inevitable British annexation.

outlook.zh: 纳塔利亚将在1843年被英国吞并，多数布尔人将再次迁徙至德兰士瓦。
outlook.en: Natalia would be annexed by Britain in 1843; most Boers would trek again to the Transvaal.

description.zh: 1840年的纳塔利亚是大迁徙布尔人在纳塔尔建立的短命共和国，即将面临英国吞并。
description.en: In 1840 Natalia was a short-lived republic established by Great Trek Boers in Natal, soon to face British annexation.

ruler.zh: 各社区领袖（如波蒂吉特、亨德里克·波特吉特尔等）
ruler.en: Various community leaders (e.g. Potgieter, Hendrik Potgieter etc.)

capital.zh: 波切夫斯特鲁姆（主要聚落之一）

governmentForm.zh: 尚未形成统一共和国的松散布尔拓荒社区群，各社区由选出的领袖和民兵指挥官管理。
governmentForm.en: Loose Boer frontier communities not yet forming a unified republic; each community was managed by elected leaders and militia commanders.

socialStructure.zh: 布尔拓荒家庭为基本社会单位，社区领袖和大农场主具有影响力。
socialStructure.en: Boer frontier families were the basic social unit; community leaders and large-scale farmers held influence.

rulingClass.zh: 大迁徙领袖家族与布尔大农场主
rulingClass.en: Great Trek leader families and large Boer farmers

succession.zh: 领袖由社区成年男性选举产生。
succession.en: Leaders were elected by adult male community members.

structure.zh: 极为松散的社区自治，各拓荒社区各行其政，仅在军事威胁时才临时联合。
structure.en: Extremely loose community self-governance; each frontier community governed itself independently, uniting only temporarily under military threats.

function.zh: 社区事务决策
function.en: Community affairs decisions

function.zh: 民兵组织与防御
function.en: Militia organization and defense

localAdmin.zh: 各农场和小聚落基本自治。
localAdmin.en: Each farm and small settlement was essentially self-governing.

legalSystem.zh: 以罗马-荷兰法传统和社区决议为基础。
legalSystem.en: Based on Roman-Dutch law tradition and community resolutions.

taxationSystem.zh: 几乎无正式税收。
taxationSystem.en: Almost no formal taxation.

religion.zh: 荷兰归正教（加尔文宗）
religion.en: Dutch Reformed Church (Calvinism)

culturalAchievements.zh: 德兰士瓦布尔社区代表了布尔大迁徙的北路开拓传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Transvaal Boer communities represented the northern route of the Great Trek pioneering tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（荷兰语/早期阿非利堪斯语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European family, Germanic branch (Dutch / early Afrikaans)

philosophy.zh: 布尔人追求独立自治、宗教虔诚与广袤牧场的拓荒生活理想。
philosophy.en: Boer pursuit of independent self-governance, religious piety, and the frontier life ideal of vast pastures.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（荷兰语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Dutch)

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 纯粹的自给牧农拓荒经济，几乎没有市场交换。
gdpDescription.en: A purely subsistence pastoral-agricultural frontier economy with almost no market exchange.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、自给农业、狩猎
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, subsistence agriculture, hunting

tradeGoods.zh: 牲畜、兽皮、象牙（通过猎象）
tradeGoods.en: Livestock, hides, ivory (through elephant hunting)

householdWealth.zh: 以土地占有（通常一个农场6000英亩）和牛群为主要资产。
householdWealth.en: Land ownership (typically 6,000-acre farms) and cattle herds were main assets.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 自给牧场拓荒经济。
economicSystem.en: Subsistence pastoral frontier economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约3个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 3 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政支出受战争与帝国扩张驱动，赤字依靠国债与殖民收入弥补。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal spending is driven by warfare and imperial expansion, with deficits covered by sovereign bonds and colonial revenue.

description.zh: 自备马匹和火枪的骑马民兵，以精准射击著称。
description.en: Mounted militia providing their own horses and firearms, renowned for accurate marksmanship.

commanderInChief.zh: 亨德里克·波特吉特尔等社区领袖
commanderInChief.en: Hendrik Potgieter and other community leaders

technology.zh: 欧洲火器（燧发枪与击发式步枪），牛车阵地战术。
technology.en: European firearms (flintlocks and percussion rifles); ox-wagon laager defensive tactics.

threats.zh: 恩德贝勒王国（姆齐利卡齐）和其他非洲势力的军事威胁，以及英国远期殖民计划。
threats.en: Military threats from the Ndebele Kingdom (Mzilikazi) and other African powers, and long-term British colonial plans.

description.zh: 基础训练，民兵水平
description.en: Basic training, militia level

description.zh: 士气极低，厌战情绪蔓延
description.en: Very low morale, widespread war-weariness

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 套筒刺刀，仍为步兵白刃战标配
description.en: Socket bayonet, still standard for infantry close combat

populationDescription.zh: 布尔定居者约4000人，散布于瓦尔河以北广大地区。
populationDescription.en: About 4,000 Boer settlers scattered across a vast area north of the Vaal River.

socialClasses.zh: 社区领袖、布尔农场主家庭
socialClasses.en: Community leaders, Boer farmer families

allies.zh: 与纳塔利亚布尔共和国和其他迁徙社区保持联系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with the Natalia Republic and other trek communities.

enemies.zh: 恩德贝勒王国（已被迫北迁但仍有冲突）和英国殖民势力。
enemies.en: The Ndebele Kingdom (forced to migrate north but conflicts continued) and British colonial forces.

foreignPolicy.zh: 追求脱离英国管辖的完全独立。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued complete independence from British jurisdiction.

era.zh: 南非布尔拓荒社会

keyInnovations.zh: 欧洲火器、牛车阵地战术（拉格）、牧场管理技术。
keyInnovations.en: European firearms, ox-wagon laager tactics, pastoral management techniques.

strengths.zh: 布尔民兵火力和机动性强，占据广大草原牧地。
strengths.en: Boer militia had strong firepower and mobility; occupied vast grassland pastures.

weaknesses.zh: 人口极少，制度不成熟，各社区互不统属，面临非洲势力和英国的双重压力。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small population, immature institutions, communities independent of each other, facing dual pressure from African powers and Britain.

outlook.zh: 这些布尔社区将在1852年合并为南非共和国（德兰士瓦），获英国承认独立。
outlook.en: These Boer communities would merge into the South African Republic (Transvaal) in 1852, gaining British recognition of independence.

description.zh: 1840年的德兰士瓦布尔社区是大迁徙布尔人在瓦尔河以北建立的松散拓荒聚落群。
description.en: In 1840 the Transvaal Boer communities were loose frontier settlements established by Great Trek Boers north of the Vaal River.

name.zh: 绍纳诸邦（穆塔帕残余与诸酋长领地）
name.en: Shona States (Mutapa remnant and various chieftaincies)

dynasty.zh: 穆塔帕残余王室与各绍纳酋长世系
dynasty.en: Mutapa remnant royal house and various Shona chiefly lineages

capital.zh: 无统一首都（各邦各有政治中心）
capital.en: No unified capital (each state had its own political center)

governmentForm.zh: 多个绍纳酋长领地并立，穆塔帕帝国名义上仍存在但权力已极度缩小。各邦处于罗兹维后裔和恩德贝勒势力之间。
governmentForm.en: Multiple Shona chieftaincies coexisted; the Mutapa Empire nominally still existed but with drastically reduced power. States were situated between Rozwi descendants and Ndebele forces.

socialStructure.zh: 酋长与贵族居上，铁匠与工匠受尊重，自由农民与牧民为主体，另有奴隶。
socialStructure.en: Chiefs and nobles at the top, blacksmiths and artisans respected, free farmers and pastoralists as the majority, with some slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 各邦酋长与贵族世系
rulingClass.en: Paramount chiefs and noble lineages of each state

succession.zh: 酋长位在各酋长世系内传承，长老会议影响继承。
succession.en: Chieftaincy was inherited within each chiefly lineage; elder councils influenced succession.

structure.zh: 各酋长领地独立治理，通过长老会议和精神媒介（灵媒）参与决策。
structure.en: Each chieftaincy governed independently, with elder councils and spirit mediums participating in decision-making.

function.zh: 政务决策与纠纷仲裁
function.en: Policy decisions and dispute arbitration

function.zh: 通过姆霍恩多罗灵媒传达祖先意旨
function.en: Communicated ancestral will through mhondoro spirit mediums

localAdmin.zh: 地方由村落头人和氏族长老管理。
localAdmin.en: Local areas managed by village headmen and clan elders.

legalSystem.zh: 以绍纳习惯法和酋长裁决为基础，灵媒在重大决策中有影响。
legalSystem.en: Based on Shona customary law and chiefly adjudication; spirit mediums influenced major decisions.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自农产品贡品、牲畜和劳役。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue from agricultural tribute, livestock, and labor services.

religion.zh: 传统绍纳信仰，以姆瓦里（至高神）崇拜和姆霍恩多罗祖先灵媒为核心
religion.en: Traditional Shona beliefs centered on Mwari (supreme deity) worship and mhondoro ancestral spirit mediums

culturalAchievements.zh: 绍纳文化继承了大津巴布韦的石建筑传统，以灵媒制度和精美的铁器、陶器工艺著称。
culturalAchievements.en: Shona culture inherited the Great Zimbabwe stone-building tradition, and was noted for its spirit medium institution and fine ironwork and pottery.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（绍纳语群）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family, Bantu branch (Shona language group)

philosophy.zh: 绍纳世界观强调祖先灵魂与生者的持续联系，姆霍恩多罗灵媒是政治与精神权威的重要来源。
philosophy.en: Shona worldview emphasized the ongoing connection between ancestral spirits and the living; mhondoro spirit mediums were an important source of political and spiritual authority.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字，依赖口传传统
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以自给农业、畜牧和黄金开采为基础。黄金贸易虽已不如穆塔帕鼎盛时期，但仍有一定规模。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on subsistence agriculture, pastoralism, and gold mining. Though gold trade had declined from Mutapa's peak, it still existed at some scale.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、畜牧、黄金开采、铁器锻造
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, pastoralism, gold mining, ironworking

tradeGoods.zh: 黄金、象牙、铁器、牲畜
tradeGoods.en: Gold, ivory, iron implements, livestock

householdWealth.zh: 酋长家庭拥有较多牲畜和黄金；普通农民财富有限。
householdWealth.en: Chiefly families held more livestock and gold; ordinary farmers had limited wealth.

unit.en: international dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以自给农牧和黄金贸易为基础的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on subsistence agro-pastoralism and gold trade.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以金银储备和政府债券资产为主，可支持约4个月政府运营。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury consisted primarily of gold and silver reserves plus government bond assets, sufficient for about 4 months of operations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以审慎管理为主，注重金本位约束下的收支平衡，偿债义务优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal management is prudent under gold standard discipline, prioritizing debt service and budget balance.

description.zh: 以矛、弓和战斧装备的步兵。
description.en: Infantry armed with spears, bows, and battle axes.

commanderInChief.en: Each state's paramount chief commanded separately

technology.zh: 传统冷兵器，极少火器。
technology.en: Traditional cold weapons; very few firearms.

threats.zh: 恩德贝勒王国（姆齐利卡齐）的持续掠夺和领土侵占是最大威胁。
threats.en: The Ndebele Kingdom (Mzilikazi)'s continued raiding and territorial encroachment was the greatest threat.

description.zh: 几乎无正规训练，依靠部落传承
description.en: Virtually untrained, relying on tribal traditions

description.zh: 士气崩溃，大规模逃亡
description.en: Morale collapsed, mass desertion

description.zh: 米尼弹线膛步枪，射程与精度大幅提升
description.en: Minié ball rifled musket with greatly improved range and accuracy

description.zh: 柯尔特型转轮手枪，可连发六弹
description.en: Colt-type revolver capable of firing six rounds

populationDescription.zh: 人口约70万，散布于津巴布韦高原，介于罗兹维残余和恩德贝勒势力范围之间。
populationDescription.en: Population about 700,000, spread across the Zimbabwe plateau, between Rozwi remnants and Ndebele sphere of influence.

socialClasses.zh: 酋长与贵族、灵媒、铁匠与工匠、农民与牧民、奴隶
socialClasses.en: Chiefs and nobles, spirit mediums, blacksmiths and artisans, farmers and pastoralists, slaves

allies.zh: 各绍纳邦偶尔联合对抗恩德贝勒掠夺。
allies.en: Shona states occasionally united against Ndebele raiding.

enemies.zh: 恩德贝勒王国为主要敌人。
enemies.en: The Ndebele Kingdom was the main enemy.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以抵御恩德贝勒侵袭和维护黄金贸易通道为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Focused on resisting Ndebele raids and maintaining gold trade routes.

era.zh: 津巴布韦高原晚期铁器时代

keyInnovations.zh: 黄金开采与冶炼、石建筑传统、铁器锻造。
keyInnovations.en: Gold mining and smelting, stone-building tradition, ironworking.

strengths.zh: 丰富的黄金矿藏和铁矿资源，灵媒制度提供政治凝聚力。
strengths.en: Rich gold and iron ore resources; spirit medium institution provided political cohesion.

weaknesses.zh: 政治碎片化无法形成统一抵抗，军事技术落后于恩德贝勒。
weaknesses.en: Political fragmentation prevented unified resistance; military technology lagged behind the Ndebele.

outlook.zh: 绍纳诸邦将在恩德贝勒压力下持续衰落，19世纪末面临英国殖民的最终征服。
outlook.en: Shona states would continue declining under Ndebele pressure, facing final British colonial conquest in the late 19th century.

description.zh: 1840年的绍纳诸邦是津巴布韦高原上穆塔帕帝国残余和多个绍纳酋长领地，深受恩德贝勒侵袭之苦。
description.en: In 1840 the Shona states were Mutapa Empire remnants and multiple Shona chieftaincies on the Zimbabwe plateau, suffering heavily from Ndebele raids.

name.zh: 丹属格陵兰（卡拉利特·努纳特）

ruler.zh: 克里斯蒂安八世（丹麦国王）

governmentForm.zh: 由丹麦王国任命殖民管理官（kolonibestyrer）统治的封闭式殖民地，皇家格陵兰贸易公司垄断一切对外贸易。
governmentForm.en: A closed colony governed by Danish-appointed colonial managers (kolonibestyrere), with the Royal Greenland Trading Company holding a monopoly on all external trade.

socialStructure.zh: 社会主要由因纽特猎人家庭构成，辅以极少数丹麦行政官员、传教士和贸易站职员。因纽特社会内部以扩展家庭和猎人声望为核心组织原则，丹麦人虽人数极少却掌握行政与贸易权力。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted overwhelmingly of Inuit (Kalaallit) hunting families, supplemented by a tiny number of Danish administrators, missionaries, and trading-post employees. Inuit society was organized around extended families and hunter prestige, while Danes, though vastly outnumbered, held administrative and commercial power.

rulingClass.zh: 丹麦殖民管理官、皇家格陵兰贸易公司代表和路德宗传教士构成统治阶层；因纽特猎手领袖在地方社区中仍具威望。
rulingClass.en: Danish colonial managers, Royal Greenland Trading Company agents, and Lutheran missionaries formed the ruling stratum; Inuit hunter-leaders retained prestige within local communities.

succession.zh: 殖民管理官由哥本哈根任命与调换，非世袭职位。因纽特社区领导权基于猎猎能力和个人威望。
succession.en: Colonial managers were appointed and rotated by Copenhagen, not hereditary. Inuit community leadership was based on hunting skill and personal prestige.

structure.zh: 1840年的格陵兰由丹麦王室通过皇家格陵兰贸易公司（KGH）间接管理。全岛分为南北两个监察区，各设一名总监（inspektør），下辖若干殖民点，每点由一名殖民管理官负责。行政体系极为简单，传教士兼具教育和部分司法职能。岛上无立法机构，一切重大决策由哥本哈根做出。
structure.en: In 1840 Greenland was administered indirectly by the Danish crown through the Royal Greenland Trading Company (KGH). The island was divided into two inspectorates (north and south), each headed by an inspector, with subordinate colonial stations each managed by a kolonibestyrer. The administrative apparatus was minimal; missionaries doubled as educators and quasi-judicial authorities. There was no legislative body on the island; all major decisions were made in Copenhagen.

function.zh: 管辖戈特霍布以南各殖民点的行政、贸易与传教事务。
function.en: Administered colonial stations south of Godthåb, overseeing governance, trade, and missionary activity.

function.zh: 管辖戈特霍布以北各殖民点的行政、贸易与传教事务。
function.en: Administered colonial stations north of Godthåb, overseeing governance, trade, and missionary activity.

name.zh: 皇家格陵兰贸易公司格陵兰分部

function.zh: 垄断格陵兰与丹麦之间的一切进出口贸易，运营贸易站和补给船。
function.en: Held monopoly over all import-export trade between Greenland and Denmark, operating trading stations and supply ships.

function.zh: 负责因纽特人的宗教教化、初等教育和部分民事登记。
function.en: Responsible for religious instruction of the Inuit, primary education, and some civil registration.

localAdmin.zh: 地方管理极度简单。每个殖民点由一名殖民管理官和数名丹麦职员运营贸易站；因纽特聚落在日常事务中基本自治，由猎手中的长者和有威望者协调。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was extremely simple. Each colonial station was run by a kolonibestyrer and a few Danish employees operating the trading post; Inuit settlements were largely self-governing in daily affairs, coordinated by elders and prestigious hunters.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系名义上适用丹麦法律，但在实际中因纽特社区多依习惯法和社区调解解决纠纷。严重案件由殖民管理官裁决，极端情况下移交丹麦本土。
legalSystem.en: Nominally Danish law applied, but in practice Inuit communities largely resolved disputes through customary norms and community mediation. Serious cases were adjudicated by the kolonibestyrer, and in extreme circumstances referred to Denmark.

taxationSystem.zh: 格陵兰无正式税收体系。殖民财政依赖皇家格陵兰贸易公司的贸易利润（以低价收购海豹油脂、海豹皮等因纽特产品再高价售予欧洲市场）以及丹麦国库拨款。
taxationSystem.en: Greenland had no formal taxation system. Colonial finances depended on the trading profits of the Royal Greenland Trading Company — buying Inuit products such as seal blubber and sealskins at low prices for resale on European markets — and on appropriations from the Danish treasury.

religion.zh: 路德宗基督教与因纽特传统萨满信仰并存。自汉斯·埃格德1721年开始传教以来，多数格陵兰因纽特人名义上皈依路德宗，但传统精神信仰和萨满实践仍在偏远地区延续。
religion.en: Lutheran Christianity coexisted with traditional Inuit shamanic beliefs. Since Hans Egede began missionary work in 1721, most Greenlandic Inuit were nominally Lutheran, but traditional spiritual beliefs and shamanic practices persisted in remote areas.

philosophy.zh: 因纽特世界观强调人与自然的和谐共生、尊重猎物灵魂和互惠的社群伦理；丹麦路德宗虔敬主义传统叠加其上。
philosophy.en: The Inuit worldview emphasized harmonious coexistence with nature, respect for animal spirits, and reciprocal community ethics; Danish Lutheran Pietist traditions were layered on top.

writingSystem.zh: 丹麦语为官方书写语言；格陵兰因纽特语（卡拉利苏特语）已由传教士用拉丁字母转写，用于宗教文本和初等教育。
writingSystem.en: Danish was the official written language; Greenlandic Inuit (Kalaallisut) had been transcribed into the Latin alphabet by missionaries and was used in religious texts and primary education.

culturalAchievements.zh: 因纽特人传承精湛的皮艇制造技术、海豹皮服饰缝制工艺、鼓歌（piseq）口头文学传统和石雕艺术。传教士开始记录格陵兰语并编纂词典和圣经译本。
culturalAchievements.en: The Inuit maintained masterful kayak-building techniques, sealskin garment craftsmanship, drum-song (piseq) oral literary traditions, and stone carving. Missionaries had begun recording Greenlandic and compiling dictionaries and Bible translations.

languageFamily.zh: 爱斯基摩-阿留申语系（卡拉利苏特语），行政语言为丹麦语（印欧语系-日耳曼语族）
languageFamily.en: Eskimo-Aleut (Kalaallisut); administrative language Danish (Indo-European, Germanic)

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年格陵兰经济几乎完全依赖海豹猎捕和捕鲸业，产出通过皇家格陵兰贸易公司以垄断价格收购出口。货币经济极不发达，多数因纽特家庭以实物交换获取丹麦进口品（铁器、火药、面粉、咖啡等）。全岛经济规模极小，约相当于丹麦一个小镇。
gdpDescription.en: In 1840 Greenland's economy depended almost entirely on seal hunting and whaling, with output purchased at monopoly prices by the Royal Greenland Trading Company for export. The monetary economy was extremely undeveloped; most Inuit families bartered products for Danish imports (iron tools, gunpowder, flour, coffee, etc.). The island's total economic output was minuscule, roughly equivalent to a small Danish town.

mainIndustries.zh: 海豹猎捕（油脂与皮毛）、捕鲸、渔业、皮毛贸易、皮艇和服饰手工制造
mainIndustries.en: Seal hunting (blubber and pelts), whaling, fishing, fur trade, kayak and garment handicraft manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 输出海豹油脂、海豹皮、鲸油、鲸骨、北极狐皮、独角鲸牙和干鱼；输入铁器工具、火药铅弹、面粉、咖啡、烟草、纺织品和木材。
tradeGoods.en: Exports: seal blubber, sealskins, whale oil, whalebone (baleen), Arctic fox pelts, narwhal ivory, and dried fish. Imports: iron tools, gunpowder and shot, flour, coffee, tobacco, textiles, and timber.

name.zh: 丹麦里格斯达勒（实际以物物交换为主）

householdWealth.zh: 因纽特家庭的财富主要体现在皮艇、狗拉雪橇、猎具、帐篷/草皮屋和储存的肉脂上。丹麦官员和贸易站职员拥有少量欧洲制成品和薪俸。贫富差距不大，但猎获能力决定了家庭的物质水平。
householdWealth.en: Inuit household wealth consisted mainly of kayaks, dog sleds, hunting equipment, tents or turf houses, and stored meat and blubber. Danish officials and trading-post employees possessed modest European manufactured goods and salaries. Inequality was limited, though hunting prowess determined a family's material standing.

unit.en: rigsdaler equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 皇家格陵兰贸易公司垄断下的殖民重商主义经济，因纽特生计经济与丹麦贸易体系并存。
economicSystem.en: A colonial mercantilist economy under the Royal Greenland Trading Company monopoly, with Inuit subsistence economy coexisting alongside the Danish trade system.

unit.zh: 里格斯达勒/年（赤字由丹麦国库补贴）
unit.en: rigsdaler per year (deficit subsidized by the Danish treasury)

source.zh: 皇家格陵兰贸易公司贸易利润
source.en: Royal Greenland Trading Company trade profits

source.zh: 传教基金与其他小额收入
source.en: Mission funds and other minor income

category.en: Trading post operations and supply ships

treasuryDescription.zh: 格陵兰殖民地几乎没有独立财政储备，运营资金依赖丹麦国库年度拨款和贸易公司利润回流。恶劣冰况或猎获歉收可立即导致财政危机。
